KPI.desc: This KPI shows the Spectral efficiency calculated from the initial transmission or retransmission on PUSCH and the PUSCH OFDM symbols time.

KPI.name: 5G Usage ratio of PDSCH data slots over all DL data slots
KPI.lformula: PDSCH sl per all DL dat sl R = 100 * Data slot with PDSCH / DL Data slots
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the ratio of PDSCH data slots with at least one user scheduled over all DL data slots.

KPI.name: 5G Usage ratio of PUSCH data slots over all UL data slots
KPI.lformula: PUSCH sl per all UL dat sl R = 100 * Data slot with PUSCH / UL Data slots
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the ratio of PUSCH data slots with at least one user scheduled over all UL data slots.

KPI.name: 5G Average number of co-scheduled UEs in DL per data slot
KPI.lformula: Avg num co-scheduled UE DL = Number of co-scheduled UEs DL / (number of DL data slots + number of SSB slot with PDSCH + number of TRS slot with PDSCH)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the average number of co-scheduled UEs per downlink data slots.

KPI.name: 5G PRB utilization for PDSCH
KPI.lformula: PRB util PDSCH = 100 * PRBs used for PDSCH / PRBs available for PDSCH
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the utilization of PRBs for PDSCH, including paging and SIB PRBs which are scheduled over PDSCH.

KPI.name: 5G PRB utilization for PUSCH
KPI.lformula: PRB util PUSCH = 100 * PRBs used for PUSCH / PRBs available for PUSCH
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the utilization of PRBs for PUSCH.

KPI.name: 5G SA DU Radio admission success ratio for SA users
KPI.lformula: 100 * number of admitted radio admission requests for SA user / number of radio admission requests for SA user
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the ratio of admitted radio admission requests for SA user in DU.

KPI.name: 5G SA Non-GBR DRB radio admission success ratio for SA users in DU
KPI.lformula: 100 * number of non-GBR DRB radio admission requests for SA user / number of non-GBR DRB successful radio admissions for SA user
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the ratio of non-GBR DRB successful radio admissions for SA user in DU.

KPI.name: 5G Percentage of Power Headroom Reports of UEs with Available Uplink Power
KPI.lformula: % of UEs with available Uplink Pwr = UE Pwr Hdr PUSCH level 18 - 37 / (UE Pwr Hdr PUSCH level 1 - 37)*100
KPI.nformula: 100 * Sum(UE_PWR_HEADROOM_PUSCH_LEV_18+ UE_PWR_HEADROOM_PUSCH_LEV_19+ UE_PWR_HEADROOM_PUSCH_LEV_20+ UE_PWR_HEADROOM_PUSCH_LEV_21+ UE_PWR_HEADROOM_PUSCH_LEV_22+ UE_PWR_HEADROOM_PUSCH_LEV_23+ UE_PWR_HEADROOM_PUSCH_LEV_24+ UE_PWR_HEADROOM_PUSCH_LEV_25+ UE_PWR_HEADROOM_PUSCH_LEV_26+ UE_PWR_HEADROOM_PUSCH_LEV_27+ UE_PWR_HEADROOM_PUSCH_LEV_28+ UE_PWR_HEADROOM_PUSCH_LEV_29+ UE_PWR_HEADROOM_PUSCH_LEV_30+ UE_PWR_HEADROOM_PUSCH_LEV_31+ UE_PWR_HEADROOM_PUSCH_LEV_32+ UE_PWR_HEADROOM_PUSCH_LEV_33+ UE_PWR_HEADROOM_PUSCH_LEV_34+ UE_PWR_HEADROOM_PUSCH_LEV_35+ UE_PWR_HEADROOM_PUSCH_LEV_36+ UE_PWR_HEADROOM_PUSCH_LEV_37)/Sum(UE_PWR_HEADROOM_PUSCH_LEV_1+ UE_PWR_HEADROOM_PUSCH_LEV_2+ UE_PWR_HEADROOM_PUSCH_LEV_3+ UE_PWR_HEADROOM_PUSCH_LEV_4+ UE_PWR_HEADROOM_PUSCH_LEV_5+ UE_PWR_HEADROOM_PUSCH_LEV_6+ UE_PWR_HEADROOM_PUSCH_LEV_7+ UE_PWR_HEADROOM_PUSCH_LEV_8+ UE_PWR_HEADROOM_PUSCH_LEV_9+ UE_PWR_HEADROOM_PUSCH_LEV_10+ UE_PWR_HEADROOM_PUSCH_LEV_11+ UE_PWR_HEADROOM_PUSCH_LEV_12+ UE_PWR_HEADROOM_PUSCH_LEV_13+ UE_PWR_HEADROOM_PUSCH_LEV_14+ UE_PWR_HEADROOM_PUSCH_LEV_15+ UE_PWR_HEADROOM_PUSCH_LEV_16+ UE_PWR_HEADROOM_PUSCH_LEV_17+ UE_PWR_HEADROOM_PUSCH_LEV_18+ UE_PWR_HEADROOM_PUSCH_LEV_19+ UE_PWR_HEADROOM_PUSCH_LEV_20+ UE_PWR_HEADROOM_PUSCH_LEV_21+ UE_PWR_HEADROOM_PUSCH_LEV_22+ UE_PWR_HEADROOM_PUSCH_LEV_23+ UE_PWR_HEADROOM_PUSCH_LEV_24+ UE_PWR_HEADROOM_PUSCH_LEV_25+ UE_PWR_HEADROOM_PUSCH_LEV_26+ UE_PWR_HEADROOM_PUSCH_LEV_27+ UE_PWR_HEADROOM_PUSCH_LEV_28+ UE_PWR_HEADROOM_PUSCH_LEV_29+ UE_PWR_HEADROOM_PUSCH_LEV_30+ UE_PWR_HEADROOM_PUSCH_LEV_31+ UE_PWR_HEADROOM_PUSCH_LEV_32+ UE_PWR_HEADROOM_PUSCH_LEV_33+ UE_PWR_HEADROOM_PUSCH_LEV_34+ UE_PWR_HEADROOM_PUSCH_LEV_35+ UE_PWR_HEADROOM_PUSCH_LEV_36+ UE_PWR_HEADROOM_PUSCH_LEV_37)
KPI.desc: This KPI provides the percentage of Power Headroom reports of UEs with enough UL power resources to transmit on PUSCH, (when UE reports a positive Power Headroom).

KPI.name: 5G SA Maximum number of SA users with non-GBR DRBs
KPI.lformula: Maximum number of NonGBR users
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the maximum number of SA users having one or more non-GBR DRBs.

KPI.name: 5G Average number of active UEs with data in the buffer for DRBs in DL
KPI.lformula: Avg nr act UEs data buff DRBs DL = Accumulated number of UEs with DL DRB data buffered / Sample count for NR Cell Utilization DL counters
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the average number of PSCell or SCell UEs which have buffered data in any DRB in downlink direction.

KPI.name: 5G Average number of active UEs with data in the buffer for DRBs in UL
KPI.lformula: Avg nr act UEs data buff DRBs UL = Accumulated number of UEs with UL DRB data buffered /Sample count for NR Cell Utilization UL counters
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the average number of PSCell or SCell UEs which have buffered data in any DRB in uplink direction.

KPI.name: 5G Maximum number of active UEs with data in the buffer for DRBs in DL
KPI.lformula: Max nr UEs data in buff DRBs DL = Maximum number of UEs with DL DRB data buffered
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the maximum number of PSCell or SCell UEs having data in buffers for DRBs in downlink direction during the measurement period .

KPI.name: 5G Maximum number of active UEs with data in the buffer for DRBs in UL
KPI.lformula: Max nr UEs data in buff DRBs UL = Maximum number of UEs with UL DRB data buffered
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the maximum number of PSCell or SCell UEs having data in buffers for DRBs in uplink direction during the measurement period.

KPI.name: 5G NSA Average number of NSA users in selected area
KPI.lformula: Avg nr NSA user = (Sum(Avg nr NSA user per sec))/ Time of reporting period in seconds
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the average number of NSA users, that is the number of users with at least one 5G DRB.KPI values are aggregated (sum) over the object dimension. Meaning that, if KPI is calculated over PLMN object, it shows the average number of users in all PLMN.

KPI.name: 5G NSA Maximum number of NSA users per cell
KPI.lformula: NSA Max nr user = Maximum number of NSA users
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the maximum number of NSA users per cell, that is, the number of users with at least one 5G DRB.

KPI.name: 5G NSA Average admission holding time of NSA users
KPI.lformula: NSA Avg hold t user = Cumulative admission holding time of NSA users / Denominator for calculation of average admission holding time of NSA users
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the average admission holding time of NSA users, counting from successful AC and stops in AC release for the UE in the DU.

KPI.name: 5G SA Average number of SA non-GBR users in selected area
KPI.lformula: Cumulative sum of users sampled / Time of reporting period in seconds
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the average number of non-GBR users having one or more DRBs in stand alone operation.KPI values are aggregated (sum) over the object dimension. Meaning that, if KPI is calculated over PLMN object, it shows the average number of users in all PLMN.

KPI.name: 5G SA Average number of SA RRC connected users in selected area
KPI.lformula: Cumulative sum of RRC conn users sampled / Time of reporting period in seconds
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the average number of RRC connected users in stand alone operation.KPI values are aggregated (sum) over the object dimension. Meaning that, if KPI is calculated over PLMN object, it shows the average number of users in all PLMN.

KPI.name: 5G SA Maximum number of SA RRC connected users
KPI.lformula: Maximum number of RRC connected users
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the maximum number of SA RRC connected users.

KPI.name: 5G NSA Downlink carrier aggregation reconfiguration success ratio
KPI.lformula: NSA DL CA reconf SR = 100 * Number of successful SgNB RRC Reconfiguration configuring x SCell in DL / Number of SgNB RRC Reconfiguration configuring x SCell in DL
KPI.nformula: (100 * Sum(RRC_RECONF_1_SCELL_DL_SUCC+ RRC_RECONF_2_SCELL_DL_SUCC+ RRC_RECONF_3_SCELL_DL_SUCC+ RRC_RECONF_4_SCELL_DL_SUCC+ RRC_RECONF_5_SCELL_DL_SUCC+ RRC_RECONF_6_SCELL_DL_SUCC+ RRC_RECONF_7_SCELL_DL_SUCC)/Sum(RRC_RECONF_1_SCELL_DL_ATT+ RRC_RECONF_2_SCELL_DL_ATT+ RRC_RECONF_3_SCELL_DL_ATT+ RRC_RECONF_4_SCELL_DL_ATT+ RRC_RECONF_5_SCELL_DL_ATT+ RRC_RECONF_6_SCELL_DL_ATT+ RRC_RECONF_7_SCELL_DL_ATT))
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the SgNB initiated RRC Reconfiguration success ratio for carrier aggregation in downlink.

KPI.name: 5G NSA Downlink carrier aggregation reconfiguration attempts
KPI.lformula: NSA DL CA reconf att = Number of SgNB RRC Reconfiguration configuring x SCell in DL
KPI.nformula: (Sum(RRC_RECONF_1_SCELL_DL_ATT+ RRC_RECONF_2_SCELL_DL_ATT+ RRC_RECONF_3_SCELL_DL_ATT+ RRC_RECONF_4_SCELL_DL_ATT+ RRC_RECONF_5_SCELL_DL_ATT+ RRC_RECONF_6_SCELL_DL_ATT+ RRC_RECONF_7_SCELL_DL_ATT))
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the SgNB initiated RRC Reconfiguration attempts for carrier aggregation in downlink.

KPI.name: 5G NSA Uplink carrier aggregation reconfiguration success ratio
KPI.lformula: NSA UL CA reconf SR = 100 * Number of successful SgNB RRC Reconfiguration configuring x SCell in UL / Number of SgNB RRC Reconfiguration configuring x SCell in UL
KPI.nformula: (100 * Sum(RRC_RECONF_1_SCELL_UL_SUCC+ RRC_RECONF_2_SCELL_UL_SUCC+ RRC_RECONF_3_SCELL_UL_SUCC+ RRC_RECONF_4_SCELL_UL_SUCC+ RRC_RECONF_5_SCELL_UL_SUCC+ RRC_RECONF_6_SCELL_UL_SUCC+ RRC_RECONF_7_SCELL_UL_SUCC)/Sum(RRC_RECONF_1_SCELL_UL_ATT+ RRC_RECONF_2_SCELL_UL_ATT+ RRC_RECONF_3_SCELL_UL_ATT+ RRC_RECONF_4_SCELL_UL_ATT+ RRC_RECONF_5_SCELL_UL_ATT+ RRC_RECONF_6_SCELL_UL_ATT+ RRC_RECONF_7_SCELL_UL_ATT))
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the SgNB initiated RRC Reconfiguration success ratio for carrier aggregation in uplink.

KPI.name: 5G NSA Uplink carrier aggregation reconfiguration attempts
KPI.lformula: NSA UL CA reconf att = Number of SgNB RRC Reconfiguration configuring x SCell in UL
KPI.nformula: Sum(RRC_RECONF_1_SCELL_UL_ATT+ RRC_RECONF_2_SCELL_UL_ATT+ RRC_RECONF_3_SCELL_UL_ATT+ RRC_RECONF_4_SCELL_UL_ATT+ RRC_RECONF_5_SCELL_UL_ATT+ RRC_RECONF_6_SCELL_UL_ATT+ RRC_RECONF_7_SCELL_UL_ATT)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the SgNB initiated RRC Reconfiguration attempts for carrier aggregation in uplink.

KPI.name: 5G Downlink only carrier aggregation activated to configured SCell ratio
KPI.lformula: DL only CA SCell activated to configured ratio = (number of users per CC combination with activated DL only SCells for SA and NSA) / (number of users per CC combination with configured DL only SCells for SA and NSA)
KPI.nformula: 100*(PSCELL_UE_1_ACT_SCELL_DL + PSCELL_UE_2_ACT_SCELL_DL + PSCELL_UE_3_ACT_SCELL_DL + PSCELL_UE_4_ACT_SCELL_DL + PSCELL_UE_5_ACT_SCELL_DL + PSCELL_UE_6_ACT_SCELL_DL + PSCELL_UE_7_ACT_SCELL_DL) / (UE_PSCELL_1_CONF_SCELL_DL + UE_PSCELL_2_CONF_SCELL_DL + UE_PSCELL_3_CONF_SCELL_DL + UE_PSCELL_4_CONF_SCELL_DL + UE_PSCELL_5_CONF_SCELL_DL + UE_PSCELL_6_CONF_SCELL_DL + UE_PSCELL_7_CONF_SCELL_DL+ UE_PCELL_1_CONF_SCELL_DL_SA+ UE_PCELL_2_CONF_SCELL_DL_SA+ UE_PCELL_3_CONF_SCELL_DL_SA+ UE_PCELL_4_CONF_SCELL_DL_SA+ UE_PCELL_5_CONF_SCELL_DL_SA+ UE_PCELL_6_CONF_SCELL_DL_SA+ UE_PCELL_7_CONF_SCELL_DL_SA)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the ratio of active DL only SCells compared to configured DL only SCells for carrier aggregation. DL only SCell can work only in a single mode direction towards a user.

KPI.name: 5G Downlink and uplink carrier aggregation activated to configured SCell ratio
KPI.lformula: DL and UL CA SCell activated to configured ratio = (number of users per CC combination with activated DL+UL SCells for SA and NSA) / (number of users per CC combination with configured DL and UL SCells for SA and NSA)
KPI.nformula: 100*(PSCELL_UE_1_ACT_SCELL_UL + PSCELL_UE_2_ACT_SCELL_UL + PSCELL_UE_3_ACT_SCELL_UL+ PSCELL_UE_4_ACT_SCELL_UL+ PSCELL_UE_5_ACT_SCELL_UL+ PSCELL_UE_6_ACT_SCELL_UL+ PSCELL_UE_7_ACT_SCELL_UL) / (UE_PSCELL_1_CONF_SCELL_UL+ UE_PSCELL_2_CONF_SCELL_UL+ UE_PSCELL_3_CONF_SCELL_UL+ UE_PSCELL_4_CONF_SCELL_UL+ UE_PSCELL_5_CONF_SCELL_UL+ UE_PSCELL_6_CONF_SCELL_UL+ UE_PSCELL_7_CONF_SCELL_UL+ UE_PCELL_1_CONF_SCELL_UL_SA+ UE_PCELL_2_CONF_SCELL_UL_SA+ UE_PCELL_3_CONF_SCELL_UL_SA)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the ratio of active DL and UL SCells compared to configured DL and UL SCells for carrier aggregation. DL and UL SCell can work in a dual mode direction towards and from a user.

KPI.name: 5G SA PDCP SDU transmitted data volume in downlink per slice
KPI.lformula: PDCP SDU vol DL slice
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the PDCP SDU data volume transmitted via gNB in downlink direction for the given Slice and PLMN. Discarded DL PDCP SDUs are not counted.

KPI.name: 5G SA PDCP SDU received data volume in uplink per slice
KPI.lformula: PDCP SDU vol UL slice
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the PDCP SDU data volume received at gNB in uplink direction for the given Slice and PLMN. Discarded UL PDCP SDUs are not counted.

KPI.name: 5G SA PDCP SDU average delay in downlink per slice
KPI.lformula: Sum PDCP SDU delay DL slice / Sum PDCP SDU pkt sent DL
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the downlink average delay for PDCP SDUs per slice, calculated as time difference between the reception of the PDCP SDU from NG-U and DL PDCP PDU is sent towards RLC layer.

KPI.name: 5G SA PDCP SDU average delay in uplink per slice
KPI.lformula: Sum PDCP SDU delay UL slice / Sum PDCP SDU pkt rcvd UL
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the uplink average delay for PDCP SDUs per slice, calculated as time difference between reception of UL PDCP PDU from RLC layer, and when the PDCP SDU is sent towards NG-U.

KPI.name: 5G F1 data split ratio in downlink
KPI.lformula: F1 data split R DL
KPI.nformula: 100 * Sum(DL_VOL_SNT_F1_QoS_GRP_01+ DL_VOL_SNT_F1_QoS_GRP_02+ DL_VOL_SNT_F1_QoS_GRP_03+ DL_VOL_SNT_F1_QoS_GRP_04+ DL_VOL_SNT_F1_QoS_GRP_05+ DL_VOL_SNT_F1_QoS_GRP_06+ DL_VOL_SNT_F1_QoS_GRP_07+ DL_VOL_SNT_F1_QoS_GRP_08+ DL_VOL_SNT_F1_QoS_GRP_09+ DL_VOL_SNT_F1_QoS_GRP_10+ DL_VOL_SNT_F1_QoS_GRP_11+ DL_VOL_SNT_F1_QoS_GRP_12+ DL_VOL_SNT_F1_QoS_GRP_13+ DL_VOL_SNT_F1_QoS_GRP_14+ DL_VOL_SNT_F1_QoS_GRP_15+ DL_VOL_SNT_F1_QoS_GRP_16+ DL_VOL_SNT_F1_QoS_GRP_17+ DL_VOL_SNT_F1_QoS_GRP_18+ DL_VOL_SNT_F1_QoS_GRP_19+ DL_VOL_SNT_F1_QoS_GRP_20)/Sum(DL_VOL_SNT_F1_QoS_GRP_01+ DL_VOL_SNT_F1_QoS_GRP_02+ DL_VOL_SNT_F1_QoS_GRP_03+ DL_VOL_SNT_F1_QoS_GRP_04+ DL_VOL_SNT_F1_QoS_GRP_05+ DL_VOL_SNT_F1_QoS_GRP_06+ DL_VOL_SNT_F1_QoS_GRP_07+ DL_VOL_SNT_F1_QoS_GRP_08+ DL_VOL_SNT_F1_QoS_GRP_09+ DL_VOL_SNT_F1_QoS_GRP_10+ DL_VOL_SNT_F1_QoS_GRP_11+ DL_VOL_SNT_F1_QoS_GRP_12+ DL_VOL_SNT_F1_QoS_GRP_13+ DL_VOL_SNT_F1_QoS_GRP_14+ DL_VOL_SNT_F1_QoS_GRP_15+ DL_VOL_SNT_F1_QoS_GRP_16+ DL_VOL_SNT_F1_QoS_GRP_17+ DL_VOL_SNT_F1_QoS_GRP_18+ DL_VOL_SNT_F1_QoS_GRP_19+ DL_VOL_SNT_F1_QoS_GRP_20+ DL_PDCP_VOL_SNT_X2_QOS_GRP_01+ DL_PDCP_VOL_SNT_X2_QOS_GRP_02+ DL_PDCP_VOL_SNT_X2_QOS_GRP_03+ DL_PDCP_VOL_SNT_X2_QOS_GRP_04+ DL_PDCP_VOL_SNT_X2_QOS_GRP_05+ DL_PDCP_VOL_SNT_X2_QOS_GRP_06+ DL_PDCP_VOL_SNT_X2_QOS_GRP_07+ DL_PDCP_VOL_SNT_X2_QOS_GRP_08+ DL_PDCP_VOL_SNT_X2_QOS_GRP_09+ DL_PDCP_VOL_SNT_X2_QOS_GRP_10+ DL_PDCP_VOL_SNT_X2_QOS_GRP_11+ DL_PDCP_VOL_SNT_X2_QOS_GRP_12+ DL_PDCP_VOL_SNT_X2_QOS_GRP_13+ DL_PDCP_VOL_SNT_X2_QOS_GRP_14+ DL_PDCP_VOL_SNT_X2_QOS_GRP_15+ DL_PDCP_VOL_SNT_X2_QOS_GRP_16+ DL_PDCP_VOL_SNT_X2_QOS_GRP_17+ DL_PDCP_VOL_SNT_X2_QOS_GRP_18+ DL_PDCP_VOL_SNT_X2_QOS_GRP_19+ DL_PDCP_VOL_SNT_X2_QOS_GRP_20)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the percentage of data volume sent over F1-U in downlink, compared with the total data volume transmitted via gNB or eNB in downlink.The formula gives an indication of the amount of traffic going through 5G gNB.

KPI.name: 5G F1 data split ratio in uplink
KPI.lformula: F1 data split R UL
KPI.nformula: 100 * Sum(UL_VOL_RCV_F1_QoS_GRP_01+ UL_VOL_RCV_F1_QoS_GRP_02+ UL_VOL_RCV_F1_QoS_GRP_03+ UL_VOL_RCV_F1_QoS_GRP_04+ UL_VOL_RCV_F1_QoS_GRP_05+ UL_VOL_RCV_F1_QoS_GRP_06+ UL_VOL_RCV_F1_QoS_GRP_07+ UL_VOL_RCV_F1_QoS_GRP_08+ UL_VOL_RCV_F1_QoS_GRP_09+ UL_VOL_RCV_F1_QoS_GRP_10+ UL_VOL_RCV_F1_QoS_GRP_11+ UL_VOL_RCV_F1_QoS_GRP_12+ UL_VOL_RCV_F1_QoS_GRP_13+ UL_VOL_RCV_F1_QoS_GRP_14+ UL_VOL_RCV_F1_QoS_GRP_15+ UL_VOL_RCV_F1_QoS_GRP_16+ UL_VOL_RCV_F1_QoS_GRP_17+ UL_VOL_RCV_F1_QoS_GRP_18+ UL_VOL_RCV_F1_QoS_GRP_19+ UL_VOL_RCV_F1_QoS_GRP_20)/Sum(UL_VOL_RCV_F1_QoS_GRP_01+ UL_VOL_RCV_F1_QoS_GRP_02+ UL_VOL_RCV_F1_QoS_GRP_03+ UL_VOL_RCV_F1_QoS_GRP_04+ UL_VOL_RCV_F1_QoS_GRP_05+ UL_VOL_RCV_F1_QoS_GRP_06+ UL_VOL_RCV_F1_QoS_GRP_07+ UL_VOL_RCV_F1_QoS_GRP_08+ UL_VOL_RCV_F1_QoS_GRP_09+ UL_VOL_RCV_F1_QoS_GRP_10+ UL_VOL_RCV_F1_QoS_GRP_11+ UL_VOL_RCV_F1_QoS_GRP_12+ UL_VOL_RCV_F1_QoS_GRP_13+ UL_VOL_RCV_F1_QoS_GRP_14+ UL_VOL_RCV_F1_QoS_GRP_15+ UL_VOL_RCV_F1_QoS_GRP_16+ UL_VOL_RCV_F1_QoS_GRP_17+ UL_VOL_RCV_F1_QoS_GRP_18+ UL_VOL_RCV_F1_QoS_GRP_19+ UL_VOL_RCV_F1_QoS_GRP_20+ UL_PDCP_VOL_RCV_X2_QOS_GRP_01+ UL_PDCP_VOL_RCV_X2_QOS_GRP_02+ UL_PDCP_VOL_RCV_X2_QOS_GRP_03+ UL_PDCP_VOL_RCV_X2_QOS_GRP_04+ UL_PDCP_VOL_RCV_X2_QOS_GRP_05+ UL_PDCP_VOL_RCV_X2_QOS_GRP_06+ UL_PDCP_VOL_RCV_X2_QOS_GRP_07+ UL_PDCP_VOL_RCV_X2_QOS_GRP_08+ UL_PDCP_VOL_RCV_X2_QOS_GRP_09+ UL_PDCP_VOL_RCV_X2_QOS_GRP_10+ UL_PDCP_VOL_RCV_X2_QOS_GRP_11+ UL_PDCP_VOL_RCV_X2_QOS_GRP_12+ UL_PDCP_VOL_RCV_X2_QOS_GRP_13+ UL_PDCP_VOL_RCV_X2_QOS_GRP_14+ UL_PDCP_VOL_RCV_X2_QOS_GRP_15+ UL_PDCP_VOL_RCV_X2_QOS_GRP_16+ UL_PDCP_VOL_RCV_X2_QOS_GRP_17+ UL_PDCP_VOL_RCV_X2_QOS_GRP_18+ UL_PDCP_VOL_RCV_X2_QOS_GRP_19+ UL_PDCP_VOL_RCV_X2_QOS_GRP_20)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the percentage of data volume received over F1-U in uplink, compared with the total data volume received via gNB or eNB in uplink.The formula gives an indication of the amount of traffic going through 5G gNB.

KPI.name: 5G SA Number of PDU session resource setup requests
KPI.lformula: Number of PDU session setup requests
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the number of NGAP: PDU SESSION RESOURCE SETUP REQUEST messages received at gNB-CU.

KPI.name: 5G SA PDU session resource setup success ratio
KPI.lformula: 100 * (Number of PDU session setup sent) / (Number of PDU session setup received)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the success ratio of the PDU session resource setup. The procedure is successful when the gNB-CU responds to 5GC with PDU SESSION RESOURCE SETUP RESPONSE message.

KPI.name: 5G SA Number of AMF selection attempted by gNB
KPI.lformula: AMF sel att gNB
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the number of AMF selections attempted by gNB for UE coming from idle.

KPI.name: 5G SA AMF selection by gNB success ratio
KPI.lformula: 100 * AMF sel succ gNB / AMF sel att gNB
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the success ratio of AMF selections by gNB for UE coming from idle.

KPI.name: 5G SA Number of AMF reselection attempted by gNB
KPI.lformula: AMF resel att gNB
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the number of AMF reselections attempted by gNB for connected UE.

KPI.name: 5G SA AMF reselection by gNB success ratio
KPI.lformula: 100 * AMF resel succ gNB / AMF resel att gNB
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the success ratio of AMF reselections by gNB-connected UE.

KPI.name: 5G SA Normal gNB-initiated release ratio - RAN view
KPI.lformula: SA Norm gNB init rel R = 100 * (Release Request due to Inactive + releases due to redirection + releases due to fallback + releases due to preemption + releases due to UE preference with UE Assisted Information + serving cell load reduction + UE not reachable in RRC_INACTIVE state + Number of suspended UE Contexts) / (Rel Request sent + Number of suspended UE Contexts)
KPI.nformula: 100 * Sum(NG_UE_CTXT_REL_GNB_REDIR + NNGCC_UE_CTXT_REL_REQ_INACTIVE + SA_UE_CTX_REL_PREEM + SA_UE_CTX_REL_UAI + INACT_UE_CTXT_REL_RED_LOAD + INACT_UE_CTXT_REL_NOT_REACH + NRRCC_RRC_REL_WITH_SUSP_NRNAU + NG_UE_CTXT_REL_GNB_FALLBACK) / Sum(NNGCC_UE_CTXT_REL_REQ_SENT + NRRCC_RRC_REL_WITH_SUSP_NRNAU)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the ratio of normal releases, due to inactivity, redirection, fallback, preemption, serving cell load reduction, UE not reachable in RRC_INACTIVE state and due to UE preference with UAI, initiated by gNB, compared to all releases, for SA access.

KPI.name: 5G Average PDCCH CCE starvation ratio in cell
KPI.lformula: 100 * number of slots with Uplink and Downlink CCE starvation cell BWP0-9 / number of slots with Uplink and Downlink grant capability cell BWP 0-9
KPI.nformula: 100 * Sum(SLT_UL_CCE_STARVATION_CBWP0+ SLT_DL_CCE_STARVATION_CBWP0+ SLT_UL_CCE_STARVATION_CBWP1+ SLT_DL_CCE_STARVATION_CBWP1+ SLT_UL_CCE_STARVATION_CBWP2+ SLT_DL_CCE_STARVATION_CBWP2+ SLT_UL_CCE_STARVATION_CBWP3+ SLT_DL_CCE_STARVATION_CBWP3+ SLT_UL_CCE_STARVATION_CBWP4+ SLT_DL_CCE_STARVATION_CBWP4+ SLT_UL_CCE_STARVATION_CBWP5+ SLT_DL_CCE_STARVATION_CBWP5+ SLT_UL_CCE_STARVATION_CBWP6+ SLT_DL_CCE_STARVATION_CBWP6+ SLT_UL_CCE_STARVATION_CBWP7+ SLT_DL_CCE_STARVATION_CBWP7+ SLT_UL_CCE_STARVATION_CBWP8+ SLT_DL_CCE_STARVATION_CBWP8+ SLT_UL_CCE_STARVATION_CBWP9+ SLT_DL_CCE_STARVATION_CBWP9)/(SLT_UL_GRANT_CAPABILITY_CBWP0+ SLT_DL_GRANT_CAPABILITY_CBWP0+ SLT_UL_GRANT_CAPABILITY_CBWP1+ SLT_DL_GRANT_CAPABILITY_CBWP1+ SLT_UL_GRANT_CAPABILITY_CBWP2+ SLT_DL_GRANT_CAPABILITY_CBWP2+ SLT_UL_GRANT_CAPABILITY_CBWP3+ SLT_DL_GRANT_CAPABILITY_CBWP3+ SLT_UL_GRANT_CAPABILITY_CBWP4+ SLT_DL_GRANT_CAPABILITY_CBWP4+ SLT_UL_GRANT_CAPABILITY_CBWP5+ SLT_DL_GRANT_CAPABILITY_CBWP5+ SLT_UL_GRANT_CAPABILITY_CBWP6+ SLT_DL_GRANT_CAPABILITY_CBWP6+ SLT_UL_GRANT_CAPABILITY_CBWP7+ SLT_DL_GRANT_CAPABILITY_CBWP7+ SLT_UL_GRANT_CAPABILITY_CBWP8+ SLT_DL_GRANT_CAPABILITY_CBWP8+ SLT_UL_GRANT_CAPABILITY_CBWP9+ SLT_DL_GRANT_CAPABILITY_CBWP9)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the average ratio of slots with DL and UL grant capability and CCE starvation involving a UE scheduling rejection whereas PDSCH or PUSCH resources are available in the cell. Value is calculated based on starvation ratio in the cell BWP 0-9.

KPI.name: 5G Cell availability ratio
KPI.lformula: Cell avail R = 100 * Samples when the cell is available / Cell availability denominator
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the ratio of time in which services in a cell are available for end users.

KPI.name: 5G SA Accessibility success ratio
KPI.lformula: SA access SR = 5G SA RRC connection establishment SR * 5G SA InitUeMessage SR * 5G SA NGAP connection establishment SR * 5G SA Initial context setup SR
KPI.nformula: 100 * (Sum(NRRCC_RRC_STPSUCC_TOT) / Sum(NRRCC_RRC_STPREQ_MO_SIGNALLING + NRRCC_RRC_STPREQ_MO_DATA + NRRCC_RRC_STPREQ_MT_ACCESS + NRRCC_RRC_STPREQ_EMERGENCY + NRRCC_RRC_STPREQ_HIPRIO_ACCESS + NRRCC_RRC_STPREQ_MO_VOICECALL + NRRCC_RRC_STPREQ_MO_SMS + NRRCC_RRC_STPREQ_MPS + NRRCC_RRC_STPREQ_MCS + NRRCC_RRC_STPREQ_MO_VIDEOCAL))*(Sum(NNGCC_INIT_UE_MSG_SENT) / Sum(NRRCC_RRC_STPSUCC_TOT + REESTAB_ACC_FALLBACK + NRRCC_RRC_RESUME_FALLBACK_SUCC))*(Sum(NNGCC_UE_LOGICAL_CONN_ESTAB) / Sum(NNGCC_INIT_UE_MSG_SENT))*(Sum(NNGCC_UE_CTXT_STP_RESP_SENT) / Sum(NNGCC_UE_CTXT_STP_REQ_RECD))
KPI.desc: This KPI measures the end-to-end success rate of a user establishing a connection in 5G Standalone (SA) mode without considering the impact of RRC Inactive state. It is a comprehensive metric that evaluates the successful completion of multiple sequential connection procedures for the different variations of RRC Setup. These procedures include:1) Radio Resource Control (RRC) Connection Setup: The success ratio of initial RRC setup requests across various service types, with exclusion of fallback procedures.2) Initial UE Message Transmission: The success in sending the initial UE message to the 5G Core Network following a successful RRC connection. Both fallbacks due to re-establishment and resume procedure are included to properly maintain the value proportion between Initial UE Message and preceeding procedures.3) Logical Connection Establishment: The success in establishing the higher-layer logical connection (e.g., PDU session) after initial core network communication.4) UE Context Setup without resumption of context due to RRC Inactive state: The success in establishing the user's context at the gNB.A higher KPI value indicates a more robust and efficient process for users to connect and access services within the 5G SA network.

KPI.name: 5G Cell availability ratio excluding planned unavailability periods
KPI.lformula: Cell avail exclud BLU = 100 * samples cell available / (denom cell avail - samples cell planned unavailable)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the ratio of time in which services in a cell are available for end users, excluding the periods that the cell unavailability is planned.

KPI.name: 5G SA 5QI1 QoS flow drop ratio per cell
KPI.lformula: SA 5QI1 QoS flow drop R per cell = 100 * (number of abnormally released 5QI1 QoS flows initiated by gNB and AMF)/ (Number of Normal 5QI1 QoS releases + Number of Abnormal 5QI1 QoS releases + Number of successful Intra-NR HO QoS flow releases)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the ratio of the number of abnormally released 5QI1 QoS flows initiated by gNB and AMF to total number of 5QI1 QoS flow release attempts (gNB and AMF initiated), including the releases due to Intra-NR successful handover.

KPI.name: 5G SA QoS flow drop ratio per cell
KPI.lformula: SA QoS flow drop R per cell = 100 * (All QoS flow releases - normal Qos flow releases)/ (All QoS flow releases + Number of successful Intra-NR HO QoS flow releases + Number of suspended QoS flows)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the ratio of the number of abnormally released QoS flows initiated by gNB and AMF to total number of QoS flow releases (gNB and AMF initiated), including the releases due to Intra-NR successful handover.

KPI.name: 5G SA PDU session setup success ratio for Emergency calls
KPI.lformula: SA PDU sess stp SR Emg = 100 * (PDU session setup succ for Emergency call) / (PDU session setup requests for Emergency call)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the ratio of successful PDU session setup procedures for Emergency Call.

KPI.name: 5G SA initial context setup success ratio for Emergency calls
KPI.lformula: SA init ctx stp SR Emg = 100 * (Init context setup succ for Emergency call) / (Init context setup requests for Emergency call)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the ratio of successful initial context setup procedures for Emergency Call.

KPI.name: 5G SA Total number of RRC connection establishment attempts
KPI.lformula: Sum for all causes (RRC setup request with cause x)
KPI.nformula: Sum(NRRCC_RRC_STPREQ_MO_SIGNALLING+ NRRCC_RRC_STPREQ_MO_DATA+ NRRCC_RRC_STPREQ_MT_ACCESS+ NRRCC_RRC_STPREQ_EMERGENCY+ NRRCC_RRC_STPREQ_HIPRIO_ACCESS+ NRRCC_RRC_STPREQ_MO_VOICECALL+ NRRCC_RRC_STPREQ_MO_SMS+ NRRCC_RRC_STPREQ_MPS+ NRRCC_RRC_STPREQ_MCS+ NRRCC_RRC_STPREQ_MO_VIDEOCAL)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the total number of RRC connection establishment attempts, calculated as the sum of all different establishment causes.

KPI.name: 5G SA Number of radio admission requests for SA users
KPI.lformula: Number of stand alone admission requests
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the total number of radio admission requests for Stand Alone users.

KPI.name: 5G SA Radio admission success ratio for SA users
KPI.lformula: 100 * (Number of Admission control successes forSA) / (Number of Admission control requests for SA)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the success ratio of radio admission for Stand Alone users.

KPI.name: 5G SA Radio admission success ratio in handover for SA users
KPI.lformula: 100 * HO Admissin success/HO admission request
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the radio admission success ratio for SA users in handover.

KPI.name: 5G SA Number of radio admission ho requests for SA users
KPI.lformula: HO admission requests
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the radio admission handover requests for SA user.

KPI.name: 5G SA Number of RRC reconfiguration attempts
KPI.lformula: Number of RRC reconfiguration attempts
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the number of RRC RECONFIGURATION messages sent from gNB-CU.

KPI.name: 5G SA RRC reconfiguration success ratio
KPI.lformula: 100*Number RRC reconfiguration received / Number of RRC reconfiguration sent
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the success ratio of the RRC reconfiguration.

KPI.name: 5G SA RRC connection establishment success ratio
KPI.lformula: 100* Sum (RRC connect estab sucess) / ( Sum for all causes (RRC setup request with cause x))
KPI.nformula: 100 * Sum(NRRCC_RRC_STPSUCC_TOT)/Sum(NRRCC_RRC_STPREQ_MO_SIGNALLING+ NRRCC_RRC_STPREQ_MO_DATA+ NRRCC_RRC_STPREQ_MT_ACCESS+ NRRCC_RRC_STPREQ_EMERGENCY+ NRRCC_RRC_STPREQ_HIPRIO_ACCESS+ NRRCC_RRC_STPREQ_MO_VOICECALL+ NRRCC_RRC_STPREQ_MO_SMS+ NRRCC_RRC_STPREQ_MPS+ NRRCC_RRC_STPREQ_MCS+ NRRCC_RRC_STPREQ_MO_VIDEOCAL)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the success ratio of RRC connection establishment procedure.

KPI.name: 5G SA Initial context setup success ratio
KPI.lformula: 100 * NGAP: INITIAL CONTEXT SETUP RESPONSE / NGAP: INITIAL CONTEXT SETUP REQUEST
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the success ratio of the initial context setup. The procedure is considered successful when the gNB-CU sends the message NGAP: INITIAL CONTEXT SETUP RESPONSE to 5G core.

KPI.name: 5G SA intra-cell handover preparation attempts
KPI.lformula: Intracell HO prep att= Intracell HO exec attempts + Intracell HO preprarion failures
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the number of intra-cell handover preparation attempts in stand alone operation. It is calculated from the number of successful preparations (that lead to an execution attempt) plus the failed preparations.

KPI.name: 5G SA intra-cell handover preparation success ratio
KPI.lformula: 100 * Intracell HO preparation success/ (Intracell HO preparation success + Intracell HO preparation failure)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the success ratio of the intra-cell handover preparation procedure in stand alone operation.

KPI.name: 5G SA intra-cell handover execution success ratio
KPI.lformula: 100 * Intracell HO execution success / Intracell HO execution attempts
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the success ratio of the intra-cell handover executions in standalone operation.

KPI.name: 5G SA intra-cell handover total success ratio
KPI.lformula: 100 * Intracell HO execution success/Intracell HO preparation attempts
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the total success ratio of the intra-cell handover procedure in standalone operation. It is calculated as the ratio of successful executions over the number of preparation attempts.

KPI.name: 5G SA intra-frequency intra-gNB intra-DU handover preparation attempts
KPI.lformula: IntraGNB IntraDU HO preparation successes + IntraGNB IntraDU HO preparation failures
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the number of intra-frequency intra-gNB intra-DU preparation attempts in stand alone operation. It is calculated from the number of successful preparations (that lead to an execution attempt) plus the failed preparations.

KPI.name: 5G SA intra-frequency intra-gNB intra-DU handover preparation success ratio
KPI.lformula: 100 * IntraGNB IntraDU HO preparation successes/(IntraGNB IntraDU HO preparation successes + IntraGNB IntraDU HO preparation failures)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the success ratio of the intra-frequency intra-gNB intra-DU preparation procedure in stand alone operation.

KPI.name: 5G SA intra-gNB intra-DU handover execution success ratio
KPI.lformula: 100 * IntraGNB IntraDU HO execution successes/IntraGNB IntraDU HO execution attempts
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the sucess ratio of the intra-gNB intra-DU executions in stand alone operation.

KPI.name: 5G SA intra-frequency intra-gNB intra-DU handover total success ratio
KPI.lformula: 100 * IntraGNB IntraDU HO executionsuccesses/IntraGNB IntraDU HO preparation attempts
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the total success ratio of the intra-frequency intra-gNB intra-DU procedure in standalone operation. It is calculated as the ratio of successful executions over the number of preparation attempts.

KPI.name: 5G SA Intra-Frequency Intra-gNB Inter-DU handover preparation attempts
KPI.lformula: intra-freq intra-gNB inter-DU preparation successes + intra-freq intra-gNB inter-DU preparation failures
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the number of Intra-Frequency Intra-gNB Inter-DU preparation attempts in standalone operation. It is calculated from the number of successful preparations (that lead to an execution attempt) plus the failed preparations.

KPI.name: 5G SA Intra-Frequency Intra-gNB Inter-DU handover preparation success ratio
KPI.lformula: 100 *intra-freq intra-gNB inter-DU preparation successes/(intra-freq intra-gNB inter-DU preparation successes + intra-freq intra-gNB inter-DU preparation failures)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the success ratio of the Intra-Frequency Intra-gNB Inter-DU preparation procedure in standalone operation.

KPI.name: 5G SA Intra-Frequency Intra-gNB Inter-DU handover execution success ratio
KPI.lformula: 100 * intra-freq intra-gNB inter-DU execution successes / intra-freq intra-gNB inter-DU execution attempts
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the success ratio of the Intra-Frequency Intra-gNB Inter-DU executions in standalone operation.

KPI.name: 5G SA HO total success ratio Intra-Frequency Intra-gNB Inter-DU
KPI.lformula: 100 * intra-freq intra-gNB inter-DU HO exec succ / (intra-freq intra-gNB inter-DU execution attempts + intra-freq intra-gNB inter-DU preparation failures)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the handover total success ratio for 5G SA Intra-Frequency Intra-gNB Inter-DU.

KPI.name: 5G SA intra-frequency Xn based inter-gNB handover execution attempts per PLMN
KPI.lformula: IntraFreq Xn based IntergNB HO execution attempts per PLMN
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the number of intra-frequency Xn based inter-gNB handover execution attempts per PLMN in stand alone operation, calculated on the source cell.

KPI.name: 5G SA intra-frequency Xn based inter-gNB handover execution success ratio per PLMN
KPI.lformula: 100 * IntraFreq Xn based IntergNB HO execution successes per PLMN / IntraFreq Xn based IntergNB HO execution attempts per PLMN
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the success ratio of the intra-frequency Xn based inter-gNB executions per PLMN in standalone operation, calculated on the source cell.

KPI.name: 5G NSA Number of inter-frequency intra-DU handover preparation attempts for NSA
KPI.lformula: Interfreq intraDU HO preparation successes + Interfreq intraDU HO preparation failures
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the number of inter-frequency intra-DU handover preparation attempts for NSA. It is calculated by the number of successful preparations (that lead to HO executions) plus the preparation failures.

KPI.name: 5G NSA Inter-frequency intra-DU handover preparation success ratio for NSA
KPI.lformula: 100 * Interfreq intraDU HO preparation successes/(Interfreq intraDU HO preparation successes + Interfreq intraDU HO preparation failures)
KPI.nformula: 100 * Sum(IF_INTRA_DU_HO_ATT_NSA_MNB + IF_INTRA_DU_HO_ATT_NSA_SRB3) / Sum(IF_INTRA_DU_HO_ATT_NSA_MNB + IF_INTRA_DU_HO_ATT_NSA_SRB3 + IF_INTRA_DU_HOPRE_FAI_RES_NSA + IF_INTRA_DU_HOPRE_E1_FAI_NSA + IF_INTRA_DU_HOPRE_F1_FAI_NSA)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the success ratio of the inter-frequency intra-DU handover preparation phase, for NSA.

KPI.name: 5G NSA Inter-frequency intra-DU handover execution success ratio for NSA
KPI.lformula: 100 * (Interfreq intraDU HO execution attempts - Interfreq intraDU HO execution failures)/(Interfreq intraDU HO execution attempts)
KPI.nformula: 100 * Sum(IF_INTRA_DU_HO_ATT_NSA_MNB + IF_INTRA_DU_HO_ATT_NSA_SRB3 - IF_INTRA_DU_HOPRE_FAI_MENB_REF - IF_INTRA_DU_HO_FAI_T304_EX_NSA - IF_INTRA_DU_HO_FAI_TDC_EXP) / Sum(IF_INTRA_DU_HO_ATT_NSA_MNB + IF_INTRA_DU_HO_ATT_NSA_SRB3)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the success ratio of the inter-frequency intra-DU handover execution phase, for NSA.

KPI.name: 5G NSA Inter-frequency intra-DU handover total success ratio for NSA
KPI.lformula: 100 * (Interfreq intraDU HO execution attempts - Interfreq intraDU HO execution failures)/(Interfreq intraDU HO preparation attempts)
KPI.nformula: 100 * Sum(IF_INTRA_DU_HO_ATT_NSA_MNB + IF_INTRA_DU_HO_ATT_NSA_SRB3 - IF_INTRA_DU_HOPRE_FAI_MENB_REF - IF_INTRA_DU_HO_FAI_T304_EX_NSA - IF_INTRA_DU_HO_FAI_TDC_EXP) / Sum(IF_INTRA_DU_HO_ATT_NSA_MNB + IF_INTRA_DU_HO_ATT_NSA_SRB3 + IF_INTRA_DU_HOPRE_FAI_RES_NSA + IF_INTRA_DU_HOPRE_E1_FAI_NSA + IF_INTRA_DU_HOPRE_F1_FAI_NSA)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the total inter-frequency intra-DU handover success ratio, covering the preparation and execution phases.

KPI.name: 5G NSA Number of inter-frequency inter-DU handover preparation attempts for NSA
KPI.lformula: Interfreq interDU HO preparation successes + Interfreq interDU HO preparation failures
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the number of inter-frequency inter-DU handover preparation attempts for NSA. It is calculated by the number of successful preparations (that lead to HO executions) plus the preparation failures.

KPI.name: 5G NSA Inter-frequency inter-DU handover preparation success ratio for NSA
KPI.lformula: 100 * Interfreq interDU HO preparation successes/(Interfreq interDU HO preparation successes + Interfreq interDU HO preparation failures)
KPI.nformula: 100 * Sum(IF_INTER_DU_HO_ATT_NSA_MNB + IF_INTER_DU_HO_ATT_NSA_SRB3) / Sum(IF_INTER_DU_HO_ATT_NSA_MNB + IF_INTER_DU_HO_ATT_NSA_SRB3 + IF_INTER_DU_HOPRE_FAI_RES_NSA + IF_INTER_DU_HOPRE_E1_FAI_NSA + IF_INTER_DU_HOPRE_F1_FAI_NSA)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the success ratio of the inter-frequency inter-DU handover execution phase, for NSA.

KPI.name: 5G NSA Inter-frequency inter-DU handover execution success ratio for NSA
KPI.lformula: 100 * (Interfreq interDU HO execution attempts - Interfreq interDU HO execution failures)/(Interfreq interDU HO execution attempts)
KPI.nformula: 100 * Sum(IF_INTER_DU_HO_ATT_NSA_MNB + IF_INTER_DU_HO_ATT_NSA_SRB3 - IF_INTER_DU_HOPRE_FAI_MENB_REF - IF_INTER_DU_HO_FAI_T304_EX_NSA - IF_INTER_DU_HO_FAI_TDC_EXP) / Sum(IF_INTER_DU_HO_ATT_NSA_MNB + IF_INTER_DU_HO_ATT_NSA_SRB3)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the success ratio of the inter-frequency inter-DU handover preparation phase, for NSA.

KPI.name: 5G NSA Inter-frequency inter-DU handover total success ratio for NSA
KPI.lformula: 100 * (Interfreq interDU HO execution attempts - Interfreq interDU HO execution failures)/(Interfreq interDU HO preparation attempts)
KPI.nformula: 100 * Sum(IF_INTER_DU_HO_ATT_NSA_MNB + IF_INTER_DU_HO_ATT_NSA_SRB3 - IF_INTER_DU_HOPRE_FAI_MENB_REF - IF_INTER_DU_HO_FAI_T304_EX_NSA - IF_INTER_DU_HO_FAI_TDC_EXP) / Sum(IF_INTER_DU_HO_ATT_NSA_MNB + IF_INTER_DU_HO_ATT_NSA_SRB3 + IF_INTER_DU_HOPRE_FAI_RES_NSA + IF_INTER_DU_HOPRE_E1_FAI_NSA + IF_INTER_DU_HOPRE_F1_FAI_NSA)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the total inter-frequency inter-DU handover success ratio, covering the preparation and execution phases.

KPI.name: 5G Average number of scheduled (FDM and MU-MIMO) UEs on PDSCH
KPI.lformula: Avg UEs per sl DL FDM MUMIMO = Accumulated number of scheduled (FDM and MU-MIMO) UEs on PDSCH per slot without paging / (Number of data slots used for PDSCH + number of SSB slot with PDSCH + number of TRS slot with PDSCH)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the average number of UEs scheduled per slot in DL. This includes both FDM and non-FDM UEs, and both MU-MIMO and non-MU-MIMO UEs.

KPI.name: 5G Average number of scheduled (FDM and MU-MIMO) UEs on PUSCH
KPI.lformula: Avg UEs per sl UL FDM MUMIMO = Accumulated number of UEs scheduled in PUSCH / Number of slots used for PUSCH
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the average number of UEs scheduled per slot in UL. This includes both FDM and MU-MIMO UEs.

KPI.name: 5G SA Number of inter-RAT handover preparation attempts
KPI.lformula: Nr IRAT HO prep att
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the number of handover preparations requested to the serving AMF for handover to LTE.

KPI.name: 5G SA Inter-RAT handover preparation success ratio
KPI.lformula: 100 * IRAT HO prep SR / IRAT HO prep att
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the success ratio of handover preparations requested to the serving AMF for handover to LTE.

KPI.name: 5G SA Number of inter-RAT handover execution attempts
KPI.lformula: Inter-RAT HO exec att = Inter-RAT HO prep succ
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the number handover execution attempts for 5G SA Inter-RAT handover to LTE.

KPI.name: 5G SA Inter-RAT handover execution success ratio
KPI.lformula: 100 * IRAT HO exec SR / IRAT HO exec att
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the success ratio of handover executions for handover to LTE.

KPI.name: 5G SA Inter-RAT handover total success ratio
KPI.lformula: 100 * IRAT HO exec SR / IRAT HO prep att
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the total success ratio of inter-RAT handover, covering the preparation and execution phases.

KPI.name: 5G SA intra-frequency intra-DU handover execution attempts for SA per PLMN
KPI.lformula: intrafreq intraDU HO exec att PLMN
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the SA intra-frequency intra-DU handover execution attempts for SA per PLMN

KPI.name: 5G SA intra-frequency intra-DU handover execution success ratio for SA per PLMN
KPI.lformula: 100 * Sum intrafreq intraDU HO exec succ PLMN / intrafreq intraDU HO exec att PLMN
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the success ratio of intra-frequency intra-DU handover execution procedure for SA, per PLMN.

KPI.name: 5G SA Inter-frequency intra-DU handover execution attempts per PLMN
KPI.lformula: interfreq intraDU HO exec att PLMN
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the SA inter-frequency intra-DU handover attempts for SA per PLMN

KPI.name: 5G SA Inter-frequency intra-DU handover execution success ratio per PLMN
KPI.lformula: 100 * Sum interfreq intraDU HO exec succ PLMN / interfreq intraDU HO exec att PLMN
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the success ratio of inter-frequency intra-DU handover execution procedure for SA, per PLMN.

KPI.name: 5G SA Xn based Inter-gNB inter-frequency HO execution attempts per PLMN
KPI.lformula: interfreq intergNB HO exec att PLMN
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the Xn based inter-gNB inter-frequency HO execution attempts per PLMN.

KPI.name: 5G SA Xn based Inter-gNB inter-frequency HO execution success ratio per PLMN
KPI.lformula: 100 * interfreq intergNB HO exec succ PLMN / interfreq intergNB HO exec att PLMN
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the Xn based inter-gNB inter-frequency HO execution success ratio per PLMN.

KPI.name: 5G SA Number of non-GBR DRB radio admission requests for SA user, per PLMN, per slice
KPI.lformula: Nr nonGBR DRB AC req PLMN slice
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the non-GBR DRB radio admission requests for SA user, for the given slice and PLMN.

KPI.name: 5G SA Non-GBR DRB admission control success ratio for SA user, per PLMN, per slice
KPI.lformula: 100 * Nr nonGBR DRB AC succ PLMN slice / Nr nonGBR DRB AC req PLMN slice
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the success ratio of non-GBR DRB radio admission for SA user, for the given slice and PLMN.

KPI.name: 5G SA Number of intra-frequency intra-gNB intra-DU handover execution attempts per PLMN, per slice
KPI.lformula: intraf intraDU HO att PLMN slice
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the number of intra-frequency intra-gNB intra-DU handover execution attempts for the given slice and PLMN.

KPI.name: 5G SA Intra-frequency intra-gNB intra-DU handover success ratio per PLMN, per slice
KPI.lformula: 100 * intraf intraDU HO succ PLMN slice / intraf intraDU HO att PLMN slice
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the success ratio of intra-frequency intra-gNB intra-DU handover for the given slice and PLMN.

KPI.name: 5G SA Number of intra-frequency intra-gNB inter-DU handover execution attempts per PLMN, per slice
KPI.lformula: intraf inagNB interDU HO att PLMN slice
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the number of intra-frequency intra-gNB inter-DU handover attempts for the given slice and PLMN.

KPI.name: 5G SA Intra-frequency intra-gNB inter-DU handover execution success ratio per PLMN, per slice
KPI.lformula: 100 * intraf inagNB interDU HO succ PLMN slice / intraf inagNB interDU HO att PLMN slice
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the success ratio of intra-frequency inter-gNB intra-DU handover for the given slice and PLMN.

KPI.name: 5G SA Number of intra-frequency inter-gNB outgoing handover execution attempts per PLMN, per slice
KPI.lformula: intraf intergNB out HO att PLMN slice
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the number of intra-frequency inter-gNB outgoing handover attempts for the given slice and PLMN.

KPI.name: 5G SA Intra-frequency inter-gNB outgoing handover execution success ratio per PLMN, per slice
KPI.lformula: 100 * intraf interNB out HO succ PLMN slice / intraf intergNB out HO att PLMN slice
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the success ratio of the intra-frequency inter-gNB outgoing handover for the given slice and PLMN.

KPI.name: 5G SA Number of inter-frequency intra-gNB intra-DU handover execution attempts per PLMN, per slice
KPI.lformula: interf intraDU HO att PLMN slice
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the number of inter-frequency intra-gNB intra-DU handover attempts for the given slice and PLMN.

KPI.name: 5G SA Inter-frequency intra-gNB intra-DU handover execution success ratio per PLMN, per slice
KPI.lformula: 100 * interf intraDU HO succ PLMN slice / interf intraDU HO att PLMN slice
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the success ratio of inter-frequency intra-gNB intra-DU handover for the given slice and PLMN.

KPI.name: 5G SA Number of inter-frequency intra-gNB inter-DU handover execution attempts per PLMN, per slice
KPI.lformula: interf intragNB interDU HO att PLMN slice
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the number of inter-frequency intra-gNB inter-DU handover attempts for the given slice and PLMN.

KPI.name: 5G SA Inter-frequency intra-gNB inter-DU handover execution success ratio per PLMN, per slice
KPI.lformula: 100 * interf intragNB interDU HO succ PLMN slice / interf intragNB interDU HO att PLMN slice
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the success ratio of inter-frequency intra-gNB inter-DU handover for the given slice and PLMN.

KPI.name: 5G SA Number of inter-frequency inter-gNB handover execution attempts, per PLMN, per slice
KPI.lformula: interf intergNB HO att PLMN slice
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the number of inter-frequency inter-gNB handover attempts for the given slice and PLMN.

KPI.name: 5G SA Inter-frequency inter-gNB handover success ratio, per PLMN, per slice
KPI.lformula: 100 * interf intergNB HO succ PLMN slice / interf intergNB HO att PLMN slice
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the success ratio of inter-frequency inter-gNB handover for the given slice and PLMN.

KPI.name: 5G SA Number of inter-RAT handover preparation attempts, per PLMN, per slice
KPI.lformula: IRAT HO prep att PLMN slice
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the number of inter-RAT handover to LTE preparation attempts for the given slice and PLMN.

KPI.name: 5G SA Inter-RAT handover preparation success ratio, per PLMN, per slice
KPI.lformula: 100 * IRAT HO prep succ PLMN slice / IRAT HO prep att PLMN slice
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the preparation success ratio of inter-RAT handover to LTE for the given slice and PLMN.

KPI.name: 5G SA Number of inter-RAT handover executions, per PLMN, per slice
KPI.lformula: IRAT HO exec att PLMN slice = IRAT HO prep succ PLMN slice
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the number of inter-RAT handover to LTE execution attempts for the given slice and PLMN.

KPI.name: 5G SA Inter-RAT handover execution success ratio, per PLMN, per slice
KPI.lformula: 100 * IRAT HO exec succ PLMN slice / IRAT HO exec att PLMN slice = 100 * IRAT HO exec succ PLMN slice / IRAT HO prep succ PLMN slice
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the execution success ratio of inter-RAT handover to LTE for the given slice and PLMN.

KPI.name: 5G SA Inter-RAT handover total success ratio, per PLMN, per slice
KPI.lformula: 100 * IRAT HO exec succ PLMN slice / IRAT HO prep att PLMN slice
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the success ratio of inter-RAT handover to LTE, covering the preparation and execution phases, for the given slice and PLMN.

KPI.name: 5G SA Number of inter-frequency intra-gNB inter-DU handover preparation attempts
KPI.lformula: Interfreq interDU HO prep att = Interfreq interDU HO prep succ + Interfreq interDU HO prep fail
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the number of inter-frequency intra-gNB inter-DU handover preparation attempts.It is calculated as the number of successful preparations (the ones that lead to a handover execution) plus the number of failed preparations.

KPI.name: 5G SA Inter-Frequency intra-gNB inter-DU handover preparation success ratio
KPI.lformula: Interfreq interDU HO prep SR = Interfreq interDU HO prep succ / Interfreq interDU HO prep att
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the success ratio of inter-frequency intra-gNB inter-DU handover preparations.It is calculated as the number of successful preparations (the ones that lead to a handover execution) divided by the total number of preparations (successful + failed).

KPI.name: 5G SA Inter-Frequency intra-gNB inter-DU handover execution success ratio
KPI.lformula: Inerfreq inerDU HO exe SR = Inerfreq inerDU HO exe succ / Inerfreq inerDU HO exe att
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the success ratio of inter-frequency intra-gNB inter-DU handover execution.

KPI.name: 5G SA Inter-Frequency intra-gNB inter-DU handover total success ratio
KPI.lformula: Inerfreq inerDU HO tot SR = Inerfreq inerDU HO exe succ / Inerfreq inerDU HO prep att
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the total success ratio of inter-frequency intra-gNB inter-DU handover. It covers both the preparation and the execution phases.

KPI.name: 5G SA Number of initial context setup requests received at gNB-CU
KPI.lformula: Init ctx stp req rcvd gNBCU = Number of INITIAL CONTEXT SETUP REQUEST received
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the number of NGAP: INITIAL CONTEXT SETUP REQUEST messages received at gNB-CU.

KPI.name: 5G DSS Allocation ratio of DL slots assigned to NR
KPI.lformula: 100% * sum slots assigned NR DL / total available slots DL
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the average ratio of downlink slots allocated to NR, in case of activated DSS.

KPI.name: 5G DSS Maximum allocation ratio of DL slots assigned to NR
KPI.lformula: 100% * number slots assigned NR DL with max share / sum slots assigned NR DL
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the share of NR allocated downlink slots which are allocated with maximum NR share, in case of activated DSS.

KPI.name: 5G DSS Minimum allocation ratio of DL slots assigned to NR
KPI.lformula: 100% * number slots assigned NR DL with min share / sum slots assigned NR DL
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the share of NR allocated downlink slots which are allocated with minimum NR share, in case of activated DSS.

KPI.name: 5G DSS Allocation ratio of UL PRBs assigned to NR
KPI.lformula: 100% * sum prbs assigned NR UL / total available prbs UL
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the average ratio of uplink PRBs assigned to NR, in case of activated DSS.

KPI.name: 5G DSS Maximum allocation ratio of UL PRBs assigned to NR
KPI.lformula: 100% * number prbs assigned NR UL with max share / sum prbs assigned NR UL
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the share of NR allocated uplink PRBs which are allocated to NR with maximum share, in case of activated DSS.

KPI.name: 5G DSS Minimum allocation ratio of UL PRBs share assigned to NR
KPI.lformula: 100% * number prbs assigned NR UL with min share / sum prbs assigned NR UL
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the share of NR allocated uplink PRBs which are allocated to NR with minimum share, in case of activated DSS.

KPI.name: 5G SA Number of GBR DRB radio admission requests
KPI.lformula: Nr radio AC req for GBR DRB sa user
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the number of GBR DRB radio admission requests for SA user.

KPI.name: 5G SA GBR DRB setup success ratio
KPI.lformula: 100 * (Nr GBR DRB setup sucesses / Nr radio AC req for GBR DRB sa user
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the success ratio of the setup of GBR DRB for SA users.

KPI.name: 5G SA GBR traffic load in Erlang
KPI.lformula: Nr of SA GBR (sampled every second) / 3600 seconds
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the traffic load of GBR DRBs expressed in Erlang. KPI uses a hard-coded time period of 60 minutes in the denominator.

KPI.name: 5G SA Average GBR call holding time per cell
KPI.lformula: Sum duration of the GBR admission / samples of duration of the GBR admission
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the average holding time of a GBR DRB, from successful AC until AC release.

KPI.name: 5G Number of UE redirections to E-UTRAN due to voice fallback to LTE
KPI.lformula: Nr of UE redirections to E-UTRAN due to voice fallback to LTE
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the number of RRC release messages due to voice fallback to LTE

PUSCH_CP_INI_VOL_LOWSE_MCS_28+ PUSCH_DFT_INI_VOL_64TBL_SAG_R2 + PUSCH_DFT_INI_VOL_64TBL_SAG_R4)/Sum(MEAS_PERIOD_NR_MAC_PDU_TPUT))/(Sum(PRB_USED_PUSCH) / Sum(PRB_AVAIL_PUSCH))/(Sum(ACC_SCHED_UE_PUSCH) / Sum(DATA_SLOT_PUSCH + PRACH_SLOTS_PUSCH)))
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the scheduled user throughput in uplink considering PRB utilization.

KPI.name: 5G SA Average Number of PCell UEs with Configured one SCell in DL
KPI.lformula: Avg PCell UE 1 SCell Conf = (Cumulative number of PCell CA UEs with one configured SCell in DL) / (number of samples the cumulative value was obtained)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the average number of CA UEs in the current cell configured as a PCell, which have one configured SCell in DL.

KPI.name: 5G Average number of RRC connected users per cell
KPI.lformula: Avg nr conn users per cell= NSA conn users per cell + SA users per cell
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the average number of RRC connected users per cell. It counts NSA users and SA users.

KPI.name: 5G Admission control rejection ratio due to lack of PUCCH capacity
KPI.lformula: 100 * (AC rejections due to lack PUCCH capacity) / (AC requests)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the admission control rejection ratio due to lack of PUCCH capacity.

KPI.name: 5G Average number of beam used in spatial domain per PDSCH slot
KPI.lformula: (Sum active beams per slot) / (Sum slots used for PDSCH)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the number of beams used for a same PRB, in a PDSCH slot.

KPI.name: 5G NSA Average Number of PSCELL UEs with Configured one SCell in DL
KPI.lformula: Avg PSCELL UE 1 SCell Conf= (Cumulative number of PSCell CA UEs with one configured SCell in DL) / (number of samples the cumulative value was obtained)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the average number of CA UEs in the current cell configured as a PSCell, which have one configured SCell in DL.

KPI.name: 5G Maximum MAC SDU Cell Throughput in DL on DTCH
KPI.lformula: Max MAC SDU Cell Thr DL DTCH = Max (MAC SDU DL volume on DTCH during 1 second)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the maximum MAC SDU cell throughput in DL on DTCH measured as the max MAC SDU cell volume in DL DTCH transmitted during 1 second in the observed measurement period.

KPI.name: 5G Maximum MAC SDU Cell Throughput in UL on DTCH
KPI.lformula: Max MAC SDU Cell Thr UL DTCH = Max (MAC SDU UL volume on DTCH during 1 second)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the maximum MAC SDU cell throughput in UL on DTCH measured as the max MAC SDU cell volume in UL DTCH transmitted during 1 second in the observed measurement period.

KPI.name: 5G DL PDCP SDU end user throughput per DRB per QoS group 1
KPI.lformula: Avg DL PDCP SDU Thr UE DRB QoS 01= (Total DL PDCP SDU Volume QoS group 01) / (Total QoS group 01 DRBs time with data in the buffer)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the average DL PDCP SDU end user throughput per DRB per QoS group 1. It is given as ratio of the total transmitted DL PDCP SDU volume (regardless if using only primary- or also supplemental aggregated carriers) over NR leg (SA or NSA option 3x) and LTE leg (NSA option 3x), and time interval with data in the buffer in gNB CU and gNB DU in case of NR leg (SA or NSA option 3x) and eNB in case of LTE leg (NSA option 3x) related to the QoS group 1 DRBs in the observed period.

KPI.desc: This KPI shows the average 5G UL RLC SDU throughput per DRB per QoS group 17 according to 3GPP TS 28.552 chapter 5.1.1.3.3.

KPI.name: 5G UL RLC SDU throughput per DRB per QoS group 18
KPI.lformula: Avg UL RLC SDU Thr DRB QoS 18= (Total UL RLC SDU Volume QoS group 18) / (Total QoS group 18 UL DRBs time with data in the buffer in DU)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the average 5G UL RLC SDU throughput per DRB per QoS group 18 according to 3GPP TS 28.552 chapter 5.1.1.3.3.

KPI.name: 5G UL RLC SDU throughput per DRB per QoS group 19
KPI.lformula: Avg UL RLC SDU Thr DRB QoS 19= (Total UL RLC SDU Volume QoS group 19) / (Total QoS group 19 UL DRBs time with data in the buffer in DU)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the average 5G UL RLC SDU throughput per DRB per QoS group 19 according to 3GPP TS 28.552 chapter 5.1.1.3.3.

KPI.name: 5G UL RLC SDU throughput per DRB per QoS group 20
KPI.lformula: Avg UL RLC SDU Thr DRB QoS 20= (Total UL RLC SDU Volume QoS group 20) / (Total QoS group 20 UL DRBs time with data in the buffer in DU)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the average 5G UL RLC SDU throughput per DRB per QoS group 20 according to 3GPP TS 28.552 chapter 5.1.1.3.3.

KPI.name: 5G Average number of scheduled UEs in DL per BWP1
KPI.lformula: Avg nr sched UE DL BWP1= Number of scheduled UEs in DL per BWP1/ (number of available DL slots for data transmission)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the average number of scheduled UEs per downlink slot per BWP1.

KPI.name: 5G Average number of scheduled UEs in DL per BWP2
KPI.lformula: Avg nr sched UE DL BWP2= Number of scheduled UEs in DL per BWP2/ (number of available DL slots for data transmission)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the average number of scheduled UEs per downlink slot per BWP2.

KPI.name: 5G Average number of scheduled UEs in UL per BWP1
KPI.lformula: Avg nr sched UE UL BWP1= Number of scheduled UEs in UL per BWP1/ (number of available UL slots for data transmission)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the average number of scheduled UEs per uplink slot per BWP1.

KPI.name: 5G Average number of scheduled UEs in UL per BWP2
KPI.lformula: Avg nr sched UE UL BWP2= Number of scheduled UEs in UL per BWP2/ (number of available UL slots for data transmission)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the average number of scheduled UEs per uplink slot per BWP2.

KPI.name: 5G Maximum number of scheduled UEs in DL per BWP1
KPI.lformula: Max nr sched UE DL BWP1= Max number of scheduled UEs in DL per BWP1
KPI.desc: This KPI shows maximum number of scheduled UEs per downlink slot per BWP1.

KPI.name: 5G Maximum number of scheduled UEs in DL per BWP2
KPI.lformula: Max nr sched UE DL BWP2= Max number of scheduled UEs in DL per BWP2
KPI.desc: This KPI shows maximum number of scheduled UEs per downlink slot per BWP2.

KPI.name: 5G Maximum number of scheduled UEs in UL per BWP1
KPI.lformula: Max nr sched UE UL BWP1= Max number of scheduled UEs in UL per BWP1
KPI.desc: This KPI shows maximum number of scheduled UEs per uplink slot per BWP1.

KPI.name: 5G Maximum number of scheduled UEs in UL per BWP2
KPI.lformula: Max nr sched UE UL BWP2= Max number of scheduled UEs in UL per BWP2
KPI.desc: This KPI shows maximum number of scheduled UEs per uplink slot per BWP2.

KPI.name: 5G NSA A1 based HO preparation attempts for 5G NSA Intra-gNB Intra-DU inter-frequency per PLMN
KPI.lformula: A1 Intra-gNB intra-DU inter-freq HO prep att PLMN = A1 Intra-gNB Intra-DU inter-freq HO exec att MeNB PLMN + A1 Intra-gNB Intra-DU inter-freq HO exec att SRB3 PLMN + A1 Intra-gNB intra-DU inter-freq HO prep fail AC PLMN + A1 Intra-gNB intra-DU inter-freq HO prep fail due to E1 PLMN + A1 Intra-gNB intra-DU inter-freq HO prep fail due to F1 PLMN
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the A1 based handover preparation attempts for 5G NSA Intra-gNB Intra-DU inter-frequency per PLMN.

KPI.name: 5G NSA A1 based HO preparation success ratio for 5G NSA Intra-gNB Intra-DU inter-frequency per PLMN
KPI.lformula: 100 * A1 Intra-gNB Intra-DU HO exec att PLMN / (A1 Intra-gNB Intra-DU inter-freq HO exec att MeNB PLMN + A1 Intra-gNB Intra-DU inter-freq HO exec att SRB3 PLMN + A1 Intra-gNB intra-DU inter-freq HO prep fail AC PLMN + A1 Intra-gNB intra-DU inter-freq HO prep fail due to E1 PLMN + A1 Intra-gNB intra-DU inter-freq HO prep fail due to F1 PLMN)
KPI.nformula: 100 * Sum(ATT_A1_IF_INTRA_DU_HO_NSA_MNB + ATT_A1_IF_INTRA_DU_HO_NSA_SRB3) / Sum(ATT_A1_IF_INTRA_DU_HO_NSA_MNB + ATT_A1_IF_INTRA_DU_HO_NSA_SRB3 + FAI_A1_IF_INTRADU_HOPR_RES_NSA + FAI_A1_IF_INTRADU_HOPRE_E1_NSA + FAI_A1_IF_INTRADU_HOPRE_F1_NSA)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the A1 based handover preparation success ratio for 5G NSA Intra-gNB Intra-DU inter-frequency per PLMN.

KPI.name: 5G NSA A1 based HO execution attempts for 5G NSA Intra-gNB Intra-DU inter-frequency per PLMN
KPI.lformula: A1 Intra-gNB intra-DU inter-freq HO exec att PLMN = A1 Intra-gNB Intra-DU inter-freq HO exec att MeNB PLMN + A1 Intra-gNB Intra-DU inter-freq HO exec att SRB3 PLMN
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the A1 based handover execution attempts for 5G NSA Intra-gNB Intra-DU inter-frequency per PLMN.

KPI.name: 5G NSA A1 based HO execution success ratio for 5G NSA Intra-gNB Intra-DU inter-frequency per PLMN
KPI.lformula: 100 * (A1 Intra-gNB Intra-DU HO exec att PLMN - A1 Intra-gNB Intra-DU HO exec fail PLMN) / A1 Intra-gNB Intra-DU HO exec att PLMN
KPI.nformula: 100 * Sum(ATT_A1_IF_INTRA_DU_HO_NSA_MNB + ATT_A1_IF_INTRA_DU_HO_NSA_SRB3 - FAI_A1_IF_INTRADU_HOPRE_ENBREF - FAI_A1_IF_INTRA_DU_HO_T304_NSA - FAI_A1_IF_INTRA_DU_HO_TDC_EXP) / Sum(ATT_A1_IF_INTRA_DU_HO_NSA_MNB + ATT_A1_IF_INTRA_DU_HO_NSA_SRB3)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the A1 based handover execution success ratio for 5G NSA Intra-gNB Intra-DU inter-frequency per PLMN.

KPI.name: 5G NSA A1 based HO total success ratio for 5G NSA Intra-gNB Intra-DU inter-frequency per PLMN
KPI.lformula: 100 * (A1 Intra-gNB Intra-DU inter-freq HO exec att PLMN - A1 Intra-gNB Intra-DU HO exec fail PLMN) / (A1 Intra-gNB Intra-DU inter-freq HO exec att MeNB PLMN + A1 Intra-gNB Intra-DU inter-freq HO exec att SRB3 PLMN + A1 Intra-gNB intra-DU inter-freq HO prep fail AC PLMN + A1 Intra-gNB intra-DU inter-freq HO prep fail due to E1 PLMN + A1 Intra-gNB intra-DU inter-freq HO prep fail due to F1 PLMN)
KPI.nformula: 100 * Sum(ATT_A1_IF_INTRA_DU_HO_NSA_MNB + ATT_A1_IF_INTRA_DU_HO_NSA_SRB3 - FAI_A1_IF_INTRADU_HOPRE_ENBREF - FAI_A1_IF_INTRA_DU_HO_T304_NSA - FAI_A1_IF_INTRA_DU_HO_TDC_EXP) / Sum(ATT_A1_IF_INTRA_DU_HO_NSA_MNB + ATT_A1_IF_INTRA_DU_HO_NSA_SRB3 + FAI_A1_IF_INTRADU_HOPR_RES_NSA + FAI_A1_IF_INTRADU_HOPRE_E1_NSA + FAI_A1_IF_INTRADU_HOPRE_F1_NSA)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the A1 based handover total success ratio for 5G NSA Intra-gNB Intra-DU inter-frequency per PLMN.

KPI.name: 5G SA A2 based HO preparation attempts for 5G SA Intra-gNB Intra-DU inter-frequency per PLMN
KPI.lformula: A2 Intra-gNB intra-DU inter-freq HO prep att PLMN = A2 Intra-gNB Intra-DU inter-freq HO exec att PLMN + A2 Intra-gNB intra-DU inter-freq HO prep fail AC PLMN + A2 Intra-gNB intra-DU inter-freq HO prep fail due to other PLMN
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the A2 based handover preparation attempts for 5G SA Intra-gNB Intra-DU inter-frequency per PLMN.

KPI.name: 5G SA A2 based HO preparation success ratio for 5G SA Intra-gNB Intra-DU inter-frequency per PLMN
KPI.lformula: 100 * A2 Intra-gNB Intra-DU inter-freq HO exec att PLMN / (A2 Intra-gNB Intra-DU inter-freq HO exec att PLMN + A2 Intra-gNB intra-DU inter-freq HO prep fail AC PLMN + A2 Intra-gNB intra-DU inter-freq HO prep fail due to other PLMN)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the A2 based handover preparation success ratio for 5G SA Intra-gNB Intra-DU inter-frequency per PLMN.

KPI.name: 5G SA A2 based HO execution attempts for 5G SA Intra-gNB Intra-DU inter-frequency per PLMN
KPI.lformula: A2 Intra-gNB intra-DU inter-freq HO exec att PLMN
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the A2 based handover execution attempts for 5G SA Intra-gNB Intra-DU inter-frequency per PLMN.

KPI.name: 5G SA A2 based HO execution success ratio for 5G SA Intra-gNB Intra-DU inter-frequency per PLMN
KPI.lformula: 100 * A2 Intra-gNB Intra-DU inter-freq HO exec succ PLMN / A2 Intra-gNB Intra-DU inter-freq HO exec att PLMN
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the A2 based handover execution success ratio for 5G SA Intra-gNB Intra-DU inter-frequency per PLMN.

KPI.name: 5G SA A2 based HO total success ratio for 5G SA Intra-gNB Intra-DU per PLMN
KPI.lformula: 100 * A2 Intra-gNB Intra-DU HO tot succ PLMN / (A2 Intra-gNB Intra-DU HO exec att PLMN + A2 Intra-gNB intra-DU HO prep fail AC PLMN + A2 Intra-gNB intra-DU HO prep fail due to other PLMN)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the A2 based handover total success ratio for 5G SA Intra-gNB Intra-DU inter-frequency per PLMN.

KPI.name: 5G SA A2 based HO execution attempts for 5G SA Intra-gNB Intra-DU inter-frequency per PLMN and per SLICE
KPI.lformula: A2 Intra-gNB intra-DU inter-freq HO exec att PLMN SLICE
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the A2 based handover execution attempts for 5G SA Intra-gNB Intra-DU inter-frequency per PLMN and per SLICE.

KPI.name: 5G SA A2 based HO execution success ratio for 5G SA Intra-gNB Intra-DU inter-frequency per PLMN and per SLICE
KPI.lformula: 100 * A2 Intra-gNB Intra-DU inter-freq HO exec succ PLMN SLICE / A2 Intra-gNB Intra-DU inter-freq HO exec att PLMN SLICE
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the A2 based handover execution success ratio for 5G SA Intra-gNB Intra-DU inter-frequency per PLMN and per SLICE.

KPI.name: 5G NSA SCell admission success ratio for SCell(s) in PCell (NSA, CU level)
KPI.lformula: NSA SC adm SR CU in PCell =100 * (SGNB_SCELL_1_ADMISSION_SUCC + ... +SGNB_SCELL_7_ADMISSION_SUCC)/(SGNB_SCELL_1_ADMISSION_REQ + ... + SGNB_SCELL_7_ADMISSION_REQ)
KPI.nformula: 100 * Sum(SGNB_SCELL_1_ADMISSION_SUCC+ SGNB_SCELL_2_ADMISSION_SUCC+ SGNB_SCELL_3_ADMISSION_SUCC+ SGNB_SCELL_4_ADMISSION_SUCC+ SGNB_SCELL_5_ADMISSION_SUCC+ SGNB_SCELL_6_ADMISSION_SUCC+ SGNB_SCELL_7_ADMISSION_SUCC)/Sum(SGNB_SCELL_1_ADMISSION_REQ+ SGNB_SCELL_2_ADMISSION_REQ+ SGNB_SCELL_3_ADMISSION_REQ+ SGNB_SCELL_4_ADMISSION_REQ+ SGNB_SCELL_5_ADMISSION_REQ+ SGNB_SCELL_6_ADMISSION_REQ+ SGNB_SCELL_7_ADMISSION_REQ)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the success ratio of a SCell(s) admission (CU level) in PCell for NSA access. Incremented in PCell.

KPI.name: 5G NSA SCell admission success ratio for SCell(s) in PCell (NSA, DU level)
KPI.lformula: NSA SC adm SR DU in PCell =100 * (SGNB_DU_SCELL_1_ADMISSION_SUCC + ... + SGNB_DU_SCELL_7_ADMISSION_SUCC)/(SGNB_DU_SCELL_1_ADMISSION_REQ + ... + SGNB_DU_SCELL_7_ADMISSION_REQ)
KPI.nformula: 100 * Sum(SGNB_DU_SCELL_1_ADMISSION_SUCC+ SGNB_DU_SCELL_2_ADMISSION_SUCC+ SGNB_DU_SCELL_3_ADMISSION_SUCC+ SGNB_DU_SCELL_4_ADMISSION_SUCC+ SGNB_DU_SCELL_5_ADMISSION_SUCC+ SGNB_DU_SCELL_6_ADMISSION_SUCC+ SGNB_DU_SCELL_7_ADMISSION_SUCC)/Sum(SGNB_DU_SCELL_1_ADMISSION_REQ+ SGNB_DU_SCELL_2_ADMISSION_REQ+ SGNB_DU_SCELL_3_ADMISSION_REQ+ SGNB_DU_SCELL_4_ADMISSION_REQ+ SGNB_DU_SCELL_5_ADMISSION_REQ+ SGNB_DU_SCELL_6_ADMISSION_REQ+ SGNB_DU_SCELL_7_ADMISSION_REQ)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the success ratio for SCell(s) admission (DU level) in PCell, for NSA mode. Incremented in PCell.

KPI.name: 5G Average UE power headroom for PUSCH calculated from histogram counters
KPI.lformula: Avg UE pwr hr PUSCH = average of measured PWR HR values
KPI.nformula: Sum(-33 * UE_PWR_HEADROOM_PUSCH_LEV_1- 31 * UE_PWR_HEADROOM_PUSCH_LEV_2- 29 * UE_PWR_HEADROOM_PUSCH_LEV_3- 27 * UE_PWR_HEADROOM_PUSCH_LEV_4- 25 * UE_PWR_HEADROOM_PUSCH_LEV_5- 23 * UE_PWR_HEADROOM_PUSCH_LEV_6- 21 * UE_PWR_HEADROOM_PUSCH_LEV_7- 19 * UE_PWR_HEADROOM_PUSCH_LEV_8- 17 * UE_PWR_HEADROOM_PUSCH_LEV_9- 15 * UE_PWR_HEADROOM_PUSCH_LEV_10- 13 * UE_PWR_HEADROOM_PUSCH_LEV_11- 11 * UE_PWR_HEADROOM_PUSCH_LEV_12- 9 * UE_PWR_HEADROOM_PUSCH_LEV_13- 7 * UE_PWR_HEADROOM_PUSCH_LEV_14- 5 * UE_PWR_HEADROOM_PUSCH_LEV_15- 3 * UE_PWR_HEADROOM_PUSCH_LEV_16- 1 * UE_PWR_HEADROOM_PUSCH_LEV_17+ 1 * UE_PWR_HEADROOM_PUSCH_LEV_18+ 3 * UE_PWR_HEADROOM_PUSCH_LEV_19+ 5 * UE_PWR_HEADROOM_PUSCH_LEV_20+ 7 * UE_PWR_HEADROOM_PUSCH_LEV_21+ 9 * UE_PWR_HEADROOM_PUSCH_LEV_22+ 11 * UE_PWR_HEADROOM_PUSCH_LEV_23+ 13 * UE_PWR_HEADROOM_PUSCH_LEV_24+ 15 * UE_PWR_HEADROOM_PUSCH_LEV_25+ 17 * UE_PWR_HEADROOM_PUSCH_LEV_26+ 19 * UE_PWR_HEADROOM_PUSCH_LEV_27+ 21 * UE_PWR_HEADROOM_PUSCH_LEV_28+ 23 * UE_PWR_HEADROOM_PUSCH_LEV_29+ 25 * UE_PWR_HEADROOM_PUSCH_LEV_30+ 27 * UE_PWR_HEADROOM_PUSCH_LEV_31+ 29 * UE_PWR_HEADROOM_PUSCH_LEV_32+ 31 * UE_PWR_HEADROOM_PUSCH_LEV_33+ 33 * UE_PWR_HEADROOM_PUSCH_LEV_34+ 35 * UE_PWR_HEADROOM_PUSCH_LEV_35+ 37 * UE_PWR_HEADROOM_PUSCH_LEV_36+ 39 * UE_PWR_HEADROOM_PUSCH_LEV_37)/Sum(UE_PWR_HEADROOM_PUSCH_LEV_1+ UE_PWR_HEADROOM_PUSCH_LEV_2+ UE_PWR_HEADROOM_PUSCH_LEV_3+ UE_PWR_HEADROOM_PUSCH_LEV_4+ UE_PWR_HEADROOM_PUSCH_LEV_5+ UE_PWR_HEADROOM_PUSCH_LEV_6+ UE_PWR_HEADROOM_PUSCH_LEV_7+ UE_PWR_HEADROOM_PUSCH_LEV_8+ UE_PWR_HEADROOM_PUSCH_LEV_9+ UE_PWR_HEADROOM_PUSCH_LEV_10+ UE_PWR_HEADROOM_PUSCH_LEV_11+ UE_PWR_HEADROOM_PUSCH_LEV_12+ UE_PWR_HEADROOM_PUSCH_LEV_13+ UE_PWR_HEADROOM_PUSCH_LEV_14+ UE_PWR_HEADROOM_PUSCH_LEV_15+ UE_PWR_HEADROOM_PUSCH_LEV_16+ UE_PWR_HEADROOM_PUSCH_LEV_17+ UE_PWR_HEADROOM_PUSCH_LEV_18+ UE_PWR_HEADROOM_PUSCH_LEV_19+ UE_PWR_HEADROOM_PUSCH_LEV_20+ UE_PWR_HEADROOM_PUSCH_LEV_21+ UE_PWR_HEADROOM_PUSCH_LEV_22+ UE_PWR_HEADROOM_PUSCH_LEV_23+ UE_PWR_HEADROOM_PUSCH_LEV_24+ UE_PWR_HEADROOM_PUSCH_LEV_25+ UE_PWR_HEADROOM_PUSCH_LEV_26+ UE_PWR_HEADROOM_PUSCH_LEV_27+ UE_PWR_HEADROOM_PUSCH_LEV_28+ UE_PWR_HEADROOM_PUSCH_LEV_29+ UE_PWR_HEADROOM_PUSCH_LEV_30+ UE_PWR_HEADROOM_PUSCH_LEV_31+ UE_PWR_HEADROOM_PUSCH_LEV_32+ UE_PWR_HEADROOM_PUSCH_LEV_33+ UE_PWR_HEADROOM_PUSCH_LEV_34+ UE_PWR_HEADROOM_PUSCH_LEV_35+ UE_PWR_HEADROOM_PUSCH_LEV_36+ UE_PWR_HEADROOM_PUSCH_LEV_37)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the average UE power headroom for PUSCH, calculated from histogram counters.
