KPI.desc: This KPI shows the UE pathloss measured on SSB 0-7. Pathloss is calculated from histogram counters.

KPI.name: 5G SA Number of 5QI-1 QoS Flows Setup Attempts
KPI.lformula: Num of 5QI-1 QoS Flows Set Att = Number of Setup Attempts for 5QI-1 QoS Flows
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the number of 5QI-1 QoS Flows Setup attempts

KPI.name: 5G SA 5QI-1 QoS Flows Setup Success Ratio
KPI.lformula: Num of 5QI-1 QoS Flows set SR = (Num of 5QI-1 Flows Setup Succ) / (Num of Setup Att for 5QI-1 QoS Flows)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the Success Ratio for 5QI-1 QoS Flows setup

KPI.name: 5G SA 5QI-1 QoS Flow Setup Failure Ratio
KPI.lformula: Num of 5QI-1 QoS Flow set FR = 100*(Num of 5QI-1 Flow Setup Fail) / (Num of Setup Att for 5QI-1 QoS Flows)
KPI.nformula: (100 * Sum(NG_FLOW_STP_FAIL_FALBACK_5QI1 + NG_FLOW_STP_FAIL_UE_LOST_5QI1 + NG_FLOW_STP_FAIL_RAD_PROC_5QI1 + NG_FLOW_SETUP_FAIL_UNSPC_5QI1 + NG_FLOW_STP_FAIL_WRG_MSG_5QI1 + NG_FLOW_SETUP_FAIL_RRNA_5QI1 + NG_FLOW_STP_FAIL_HO_5QI1 + NG_FLOW_SETUP_FAIL_UPIP_5QI1 + NG_FLOW_SETUP_FAIL_TRSRES_5QI1 + NG_FLOW_STP_F_MISC_UP_5QI1) / Sum(NG_FLOW_SETUP_ATT_TOT_5QI1))
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the Failure Ratio for 5QI-1 QoS Flow setups

KPI.name: 5G SA Average number of active VoNR UEs in selected area
KPI.lformula: Avg num RRC conn VoNR UEs = (Cumulative sum of RRC conn VoNR UEs / Time of reporting period in seconds)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the average number of RRC connected VoNR UEs.KPI values are aggregated (sum) over the object dimension. Meaning that, if KPI is calculated over PLMN object, it shows the average number of users in all PLMN.

KPI.name: 5G SA Maximum number of active VoNR UEs
KPI.lformula: Max num RRC conn VoNR UEs = Maximum number of RRC connected VoNR UEs
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the maximum number of RRC connected VoNR UEs.

KPI.name: 5G SA Average in-session time for QoS flows
KPI.lformula: Avg in-session time = (cumulative in-session time of QoS Flows) / ((Tot num of QoS Flows releases) + (QoS Flows releases via successful handover))
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the in-session time for QoS flows. Session time of a QoS Flow is measured from establishment to release from radio cell perspective.

KPI.name: 5G NSA Initial E-RAB Setup Attempts
KPI.lformula: 5G NSA Init E-RAB Setup Att = Num of Init E-RAB Setup Att
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the number of initial E-RAB setup attempts

KPI.name: 5G NSA Initial E-RAB Setup Success Ratio
KPI.lformula: 5G NSA Init E-RAB Setup SR = 100 * (Num of Init E-RAB Setup Succ) / (Num of Init E-RAB Setup Att)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the Success Ratio for Initial E-RAB setup

KPI.name: 5G SA QoS Flow Setup Attempts
KPI.lformula: 5G SA QoS Flow Setup Att = Num of QoS Flow Att
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the number of QoS Flow Setup Attempts

KPI.name: 5G SA QoS Flow Setup Success Ratio
KPI.lformula: 5G SA QoS Flow Setup SR = 100 * (Num of QoS Flow Setup Succ) / (Num of QoS Flow Att)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the Success Ratio for QoS Flow setup

KPI.name: 5G SA QoS Flow Setup Failure Ratio
KPI.lformula: 5G SA QoS Flow Setup FR = 100 * (Num of QoS Flow Setup Fail) / (Num of QoS Flow Att)
KPI.nformula: (100 * Sum(NG_FLOW_SETUP_FAIL_FALLBACK + NG_FLOW_SETUP_FAIL_UE_LOST + NG_FLOW_SETUP_FAIL_RADIO_PROC + NG_FLOW_SETUP_FAIL_UNSPECIFIED + NG_FLOW_SETUP_FAIL_WRONG_MSG + NG_FLOW_SETUP_FAIL_RRNA + NG_FLOW_SETUP_FAIL_UPIP + NG_FLOW_SETUP_FAIL_TRSRES + NG_FLOW_STP_F_MISC_UP + NG_FLOW_STP_FAIL_HO) / Sum(NG_FLOW_SETUP_ATT_TOT))
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the Failure Ratio for QoS Flow setup

KPI.name: 5G SA QoS Flow Setup Failure Ratio per cause: Fallback
KPI.lformula: 5G SA QoS Flow Setup FR cause Fallback = 100 * (Num of QoS Flow Setup Fail due to Fallback) / (Num of QoS Flow Att)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the Failure Ratio for QoS Flow setup per cause: Fallback:IMS voice EPS fallback or RAT fallback triggered or Redirection.

KPI.name: 5G SA QoS Flow Setup Failure Ratio per cause: Lost connection to UE
KPI.lformula: 5G SA QoS Flow Setup FR cause UE conn lost = 100 * (Num of QoS Flow Setup Fail due to UE conn lost) / (Num of QoS Flow Att)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the Failure Ratio for QoS Flow setup per cause: Radio Connection With UE Lost.

KPI.name: 5G SA QoS Flow Setup Failure Ratio per cause: Failure in radio interface procedure
KPI.lformula: 5G SA QoS Flow Setup FR cause Fail in radio int proced = 100 * (Num of QoS Flow Setup Fail due to Fail in radio int proced) / (Num of QoS Flow Att)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the Failure Ratio for QoS Flow setup per cause: Failure in the radio interface procedure.

KPI.name: 5G SA QoS Flow Setup Failure Ratio per cause: Unspecified
KPI.lformula: 5G SA QoS Flow Setup FR cause Unspec = 100 * (Num of QoS Flow Setup Fail due to Unspec) / (Num of QoS Flow Att)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the Failure Ratio for QoS Flow setup per cause: Various unspecified reasons.

KPI.name: 5G SA QoS Flow Setup Failure Ratio per cause: Wrong parameter in message
KPI.lformula: 5G SA QoS Flow Setup FR cause Wrong param in msg = 100 * (Num of QoS Flow Setup Fail due to Wrong parm in msg) / (Num of QoS Flow Att)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the Failure Ratio for QoS Flow setup per cause: Wrong parameter in message.

KPI.name: 5G NSA Contention free RACH setup SR for initial access
KPI.lformula: 5G NSA CF RA setup SR init acc = 100 * (Num of msg2 ack init acc) / (Num msg1 init acc received by gNB in NSA cell)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows contention free RACH setup success ratio for initial access for NSA cell.It is considered successful when first UL transmission containing CRC OK (msg2 ack), sent by the UE over PUSCH, is received during a contention-free RA procedure

KPI.name: 5G NSA Contention free RACH setup SR for non-initial access
KPI.lformula: 5G NSA CF RA setup SR non init acc = 100 * (Num of msg2 ack) / (Num msg1 non init acc received by gNB in NSA cell)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows contention free RACH setup success ratio for non-initial access (HO or other reason) for NSA cell.It is considered successful when first UL transmission containing CRC OK (msg2 ack), sent by the UE over PUSCH, is received during a contention-free RA procedure.

KPI.name: 5G NSA E-RAB Drop Ratio - SgNB view
KPI.lformula: NSA ERAB drop SgNBR = (([number of abnormally released E-RABs initiated by gNB] - [Number of NSA ERABs Releases initiated by SgNB due to preemption])/(Total number of E-RAB release)) *100
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the ratio of the number of abnormally released E-RAB (SCG split bearers) initiated by gNB to total number of E-RAB releases (SgNB and MeNB initiated).

KPI.name: 5G NSA E-RAB Drop Ratio - User view
KPI.lformula: NSA ERAB drop UserR = ((number of abnormally released E-RAB attempts initiated by SgNB and MeNB)/(Total number of E-RAB release attempts)) *100
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the ratio of the number of abnormally released E-RAB (SCG split bearers) attempts initiated by SgNB and MeNB to total number of E-RAB release attempts (SgNB and MeNB initiated).

KPI.name: 5G SA QoS Flow Drop Ratio - User view
KPI.lformula: SA QoS flow drop UserR = ((number of abnormally released QoS flow attempts initiated by gNB and AMF)/(Total number of QoS release attempts + Number of suspended QoS flows)) *100
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the ratio of the number of abnormally released QoS flow (5QI flows) attempts initiated by gNB and AMF to total number of QoS flow release attempts (gNB and AMF initiated).

KPI.name: 5G SA 5QI1 QoS Flow Drop Ratio - User view
KPI.lformula: SA 5QI1 QoS flow drop UserR = ((number of abnormally released 5QI1 QoS flow attempts initiated by gNB and AMF)/(Total number of 5QI1 QoS release attempts)) *100
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the ratio of the number of abnormally released 5QI1 QoS flow attempts initiated by gNB and AMF to total number of 5QI1 QoS flow release attempts (gNB and AMF initiated).

KPI.name: 5G SA QoS Flow Drop Ratio - RAN view
KPI.lformula: SA QoS flow drop gNBR = ((number of abnormally released QoS flow attempts initiated by gNB)/(Total number of QoS release attempts + Number of suspended QoS flows)) *100
KPI.nformula: (100*(NG_FLOW_REL_GNB_NG_RESET + NG_FLOW_REL_GNB_RLF + NG_FLOW_REL_GNB_UE_LOST + NG_FLOW_REL_GNB_UNSPECIFIED - NG_FLOW_REL_GNB_PLMN_DIFF + NG_FLOW_REL_GNB_TRS + NG_FLOW_REL_PART_HO + NG_FLOW_GNB_REL_RADIO_PROCD_FL + NG_FLOW_MOD_FAIL_REL + NG_FLOW_REL_GNB_TXNRELOC + NG_FLOW_REL_GNB_TNGRELOC) / (NG_FLOW_REL + NG_FLOW_SUSP_RRC_CONN_INACTIVE))
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the ratio of the number of abnormally released QoS flow (5QI flows) attempts initiated by gNB to total number of QoS flow release attempts (gNB and AMF initiated).

KPI.name: 5G SA 5QI1 QoS Flow Drop Ratio - RAN view
KPI.lformula: SA 5QI1 QoS flow drop gNBR = ((number of abnormally released 5QI1 QoS flow attempts initiated by gNB)/(Total number of 5QI1 QoS release attempts)) *100
KPI.nformula: 100*(NG_FLOW_REL_GNB_NG_RESET_5QI1 + NG_FLOW_REL_GNB_RLF_5QI1 + NG_FLOW_REL_GNB_UE_LOST_5QI1 + NG_FLOW_REL_GNB_UNSPEC_5QI1 + NG_FLOW_REL_GNB_TRS_5QI1 + NG_FLOW_REL_PART_HO_5QI1 + NG_FLOW_GNB_REL_RDPRCDFL_5QI1 + NG_FLOW_REL_GNB_TXNRELOC_5QI1 + NG_FLOW_REL_GNB_TNGRELOC_5QI1) / (NG_FLOW_REL_NORMAL_5QI1 + NG_FLOW_REL_ABNORMAL_5QI1)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the ratio of the number of abnormally released 5QI1 QoS flow attempts initiated by gNB to total number of 5QI1 QoS flow release attempts (gNB and AMF initiated).

KPI.name: 5G SA QoS Flow Drop Ratio due to NG Reset Cause Initiated by gNB
KPI.lformula: SA QoS flow drop NG Reset gNBR = ((number of abnormally released QoS flow attempts due to NG Reset cause Initiated by gNB)/(Total number of QoS release attempts)) *100
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the ratio of the number of abnormally released QoS flow (5QI flows) attempts due to NG Reset cause initiated by gNB to total number of QoS flow release attempts (gNB and AMF initiated).

KPI.name: 5G SA QoS Flow Drop Ratio due to RNL Unspecified Cause Initiated by gNB
KPI.lformula: SA QoS flow drop RNL Unsp gNBR = ((number of abnormally released QoS flow attempts due to RNL unspecified cause initiated by gNB)/(Total number of QoS release attempts)) *100
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the ratio of the number of abnormally released QoS flow (5QI flows) attempts due to RNL unspecified cause initiated by gNB to total number of QoS flow release attempts (gNB and AMF initiated).

KPI.name: 5G SA QoS Flow Drop Ratio due to RNL Radio Connection with UE Lost Cause Initiated by gNB
KPI.lformula: SA QoS flow drop RNL UE Lost gNBR = ((number of abnormally released QoS flow attempts due to RNL Radio connection with UE lost cause initiated by gNB)/(Total number of QoS release attempts)) *100
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the ratio of the number of abnormally released QoS flow (5QI flows) attempts due to RNL Radio connection with UE lost cause initiated by gNB to total number of QoS flow release attempts (gNB and AMF initiated).

KPI.name: 5G SA QoS Flow Drop Ratio due to Unspecified Cause Initiated by gNB
KPI.lformula: SA QoS flow drop Unspec gNBR = ((number of abnormally released QoS flow attempts due to Unspecified cause initiated by gNB)/(Total number of QoS release attempts)) *100
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the ratio of the number of abnormally released QoS flow (5QI flows) attempts due to Unspecified cause initiated by gNB to total number of QoS flow release attempts (gNB and AMF initiated).

KPI.name: 5G SA QoS Flow Drop Ratio due to TNL Unspecified Cause Initiated by gNB
KPI.lformula: SA QoS flow drop TNL Unsp gNBR = ((number of abnormally released QoS flow attempts due to TNL Unspecified cause initiated by gNB)/(Total number of QoS release attempts)) *100
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the ratio of the number of abnormally released QoS flow (5QI flows) attempts due to TNL Unspecified cause initiated by gNB to total number of QoS flow release attempts (gNB and AMF initiated).

KPI.name: 5G SA QoS Flow Drop Ratio due to NG Reset Cause Initiated by AMF
KPI.lformula: SA QoS flow drop NG Reset AMFR = ((number of abnormally released QoS flow attempts due to NG Reset cause initiated by AMF)/(Total number of QoS release attempts)) *100
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the ratio of the number of abnormally released QoS flow (5QI flows) attempts due to NG Reset cause initiated by AMF to total number of QoS flow release attempts (gNB and AMF initiated).

KPI.name: 5G SA QoS Flow Drop Ratio due to RNL connection-to-ue-lost Cause Initiated by AMF
KPI.lformula: SA QoS flow RNL UE Lost AMFR = ((number of abnormally released QoS flow attempts due to RNL connection-to-ue-lost cause initiated by gNB and AMF)/(Total number of QoS release attempts)) *100
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the ratio of the number of abnormally released QoS flow (5QI flows) attempts due to RNL connection-to-ue-lost cause initiated by AMF to total number of QoS flow release attempts (gNB and AMF initiated).

KPI.name: 5G SA QoS Flow Drop Ratio due to Other Cause Initiated by AMF
KPI.lformula: SA QoS flow drop Other AMFR = ((number of abnormally released QoS flow attempts due to Other cause initiated by AMF)/(Total number of QoS release attempts)) *100
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the ratio of the number of abnormally released QoS flow (5QI flows) attempts due to Other cause initiated by AMF to total number of QoS flow release attempts (gNB and AMF initiated).

KPI.name: 5G SA Average Normally Released Call (5QI 1 QoS Flow) Duration
KPI.lformula: SA 5QI1 Avg QoS flow Norm Rel Duration = ((cumulative in-session time of 5QI-1 QoS Flows released due to normal cause in ms)/(Total number of normal 5QI1 QoS release attempts))
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the ratio of the cumulative in-session time of 5QI-1 QoS Flows released during the measurement interval due to causes considered to be normal cause to total number of normal 5QI1 QoS flow release attempts (including also releases due to successful intra NR HOs).

KPI.name: 5G SA Average Abnormally Released Call (5QI 1 QoS Flow) Duration
KPI.lformula: SA 5QI1 Avg QoS flow Abnorm Rel Duration = ((cumulative in-session time of 5QI-1 QoS Flows released due to abnormal cause in ms)/(Total number of abnormal 5QI1 QoS release attempts))
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the ratio of the cumulative in-session time of 5QI-1 QoS Flows released during the measurement interval due to causes considered to be abnormal cause to total number of abnormal 5QI1 QoS flow release attempts.

KPI.name: 5G mean value of Channel Quality Indicator (CQI) for SA VoNR UEs with 64QAM table configured
KPI.lformula: (sum of N*(BIN for a VoNR UE CQI N value)) / (sum of all BINs for a VoNR UE CQI value)
KPI.nformula: Sum(1*WB_CQI_64TBL_5QI1_CQI_01 + 2*WB_CQI_64TBL_5QI1_CQI_02 + 3*WB_CQI_64TBL_5QI1_CQI_03 + 4*WB_CQI_64TBL_5QI1_CQI_04 + 5*WB_CQI_64TBL_5QI1_CQI_05 + 6*WB_CQI_64TBL_5QI1_CQI_06 + 7*WB_CQI_64TBL_5QI1_CQI_07 + 8*WB_CQI_64TBL_5QI1_CQI_08 + 9*WB_CQI_64TBL_5QI1_CQI_09 + 10*WB_CQI_64TBL_5QI1_CQI_10 + 11*WB_CQI_64TBL_5QI1_CQI_11 + 12*WB_CQI_64TBL_5QI1_CQI_12 + 13*WB_CQI_64TBL_5QI1_CQI_13 + 14*WB_CQI_64TBL_5QI1_CQI_14 + 15*WB_CQI_64TBL_5QI1_CQI_15) / Sum(WB_CQI_64TBL_5QI1_CQI_00 + WB_CQI_64TBL_5QI1_CQI_01 + WB_CQI_64TBL_5QI1_CQI_02 + WB_CQI_64TBL_5QI1_CQI_03 + WB_CQI_64TBL_5QI1_CQI_04 + WB_CQI_64TBL_5QI1_CQI_05 + WB_CQI_64TBL_5QI1_CQI_06 + WB_CQI_64TBL_5QI1_CQI_07 + WB_CQI_64TBL_5QI1_CQI_08 + WB_CQI_64TBL_5QI1_CQI_09 + WB_CQI_64TBL_5QI1_CQI_10 + WB_CQI_64TBL_5QI1_CQI_11 + WB_CQI_64TBL_5QI1_CQI_12 + WB_CQI_64TBL_5QI1_CQI_13 + WB_CQI_64TBL_5QI1_CQI_14 + WB_CQI_64TBL_5QI1_CQI_15)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows a mean value of Channel Quality Indicator (CQI) for SA VoNR UEs with 64QAM table configured.

KPI.name: 5G mean value of Channel Quality Indicator (CQI) for SA VoNR UEs with 256QAM table configured
KPI.lformula: (sum of N*(BIN for a VoNR UE CQI N value)) / (sum of all BINs for a VoNR UE CQI value)
KPI.nformula: Sum(1*WB_CQI_256TBL_5QI1_CQI_01 + 2*WB_CQI_256TBL_5QI1_CQI_02 + 3*WB_CQI_256TBL_5QI1_CQI_03 + 4*WB_CQI_256TBL_5QI1_CQI_04 + 5*WB_CQI_256TBL_5QI1_CQI_05 + 6*WB_CQI_256TBL_5QI1_CQI_06 + 7*WB_CQI_256TBL_5QI1_CQI_07 + 8*WB_CQI_256TBL_5QI1_CQI_08 + 9*WB_CQI_256TBL_5QI1_CQI_09 + 10*WB_CQI_256TBL_5QI1_CQI_10 + 11*WB_CQI_256TBL_5QI1_CQI_11 + 12*WB_CQI_256TBL_5QI1_CQI_12 + 13*WB_CQI_256TBL_5QI1_CQI_13 + 14*WB_CQI_256TBL_5QI1_CQI_14 + 15*WB_CQI_256TBL_5QI1_CQI_15) / Sum(WB_CQI_256TBL_5QI1_CQI_00 + WB_CQI_256TBL_5QI1_CQI_01 + WB_CQI_256TBL_5QI1_CQI_02 + WB_CQI_256TBL_5QI1_CQI_03 + WB_CQI_256TBL_5QI1_CQI_04 + WB_CQI_256TBL_5QI1_CQI_05 + WB_CQI_256TBL_5QI1_CQI_06 + WB_CQI_256TBL_5QI1_CQI_07 + WB_CQI_256TBL_5QI1_CQI_08 + WB_CQI_256TBL_5QI1_CQI_09 + WB_CQI_256TBL_5QI1_CQI_10 + WB_CQI_256TBL_5QI1_CQI_11 + WB_CQI_256TBL_5QI1_CQI_12 + WB_CQI_256TBL_5QI1_CQI_13 + WB_CQI_256TBL_5QI1_CQI_14 + WB_CQI_256TBL_5QI1_CQI_15)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows a mean value of Channel Quality Indicator (CQI) for SA VoNR UEs with 256QAM table configured.

KPI.name: 5G NR-CGI report configuration Success Ratio for an unknown PCI
KPI.lformula: NR-CGI rep conf SR unknown PCI = (number of measurement report received for NR CGI) / (number of RRC Reconf sent for NR CGI)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the NR CGI report configuration Success Ratio for an unknown PCI, which is given as received measurement report with NR-CGI to previously sent measurement configuration (RRC Reconfiguration message) for this purpose.

KPI.name: 5G Number of neighbor relations added by Intra-NR ANR per cell
KPI.lformula: Number of NRREL added by Intra-NR ANR per cell
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the number of neighbor relations added by Intra-NR ANR per cell. A new neighbor is added after first handover procedure is successfully completed.

KPI.name: 5G Number of neighbor relation managed objects that are not able to be created in a plan by Intra-NR ANR due to configured limit for the given carrier in a cell
KPI.lformula: Number of NRREL not added by Intra-NR ANR per cell due to configuration limit
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the number of neighbor relation managed objects (NRREL) that are not able to be created in a plan by Intra-NR ANR due to configured limit for the given carrier in a cell.

KPI.name: 5G SA Intra-freq Intra-gNB Inter-DU HO preparation attempts per PLMN-ID
KPI.lformula: SA Intra-freq Intra-gNB Inter-DU HO Prep att per PLMN-ID
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the SA Intra-freq Intra-gNB Inter-DU HO preparation attempts per PLMN-ID.

KPI.name: 5G SA Intra-freq Intra-gNB Inter-DU HO preparation Success Ratio per PLMN-ID
KPI.lformula: SA Intra-freq Intra-gNB Inter-DU HO Prep SR per PLMN-ID
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the SA Intra-freq Intra-gNB Inter-DU HO preparation Success Ratio per PLMN-ID.

KPI.name: 5G SA Intra-freq Intra-gNB Inter-DU HO execution Success Ratio per PLMN-ID
KPI.lformula: SA Intra-freq Intra-gNB Inter-DU HO Exec SR per PLMN-ID
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the SA Intra-freq Intra-gNB Inter-DU HO execution Success Ratio per PLMN-ID.

KPI.name: 5G SA Intra-freq Intra-gNB Inter-DU HO Total Success Ratio per PLMN-ID
KPI.lformula: SA Intra-freq Intra-gNB Inter-DU HO Tot SR per PLMN-ID
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the SA Intra-freq Intra-gNB Inter-DU HO Total Success Ratio per PLMN-ID.

KPI.name: 5G SA Inter-freq Intra-gNB Inter-DU HO preparation attempts per PLMN-ID
KPI.lformula: SA Inter-freq Intra-gNB Inter-DU HO Prep att per PLMN-ID
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the SA Inter-freq Intra-gNB Inter-DU HO preparation attempts per PLMN-ID.

KPI.name: 5G SA Inter-freq Intra-gNB Inter-DU HO preparation Success Ratio per PLMN-ID
KPI.lformula: SA Inter-freq Intra-gNB Inter-DU HO Prep SR per PLMN-ID
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the SA Inter-freq Intra-gNB Inter-DU HO preparation Success Ratio per PLMN-ID.

KPI.name: 5G SA Inter-freq Intra-gNB Inter-DU HO execution Success Ratio per PLMN-ID
KPI.lformula: SA Inter-freq Intra-gNB Inter-DU HO Exec SR per PLMN-ID
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the SA Inter-freq Intra-gNB Inter-DU HO execution Success Ratio per PLMN-ID.

KPI.name: 5G SA Inter-freq Intra-gNB Inter-DU HO Total Success Ratio per PLMN-ID
KPI.lformula: SA Inter-freq Intra-gNB Inter-DU HO Tot SR per PLMN-ID
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the SA Inter-freq Intra-gNB Inter-DU HO Total Success Ratio per PLMN-ID.

KPI.name: 5G NSA Intra-freq Intra-gNB Inter-DU HO (PSCell Change) preparation attempts per PLMN-ID
KPI.lformula: NSA Intra-freq Intra-gNB Inter-DU HO (PSCell Change) Prep att per PLMN-ID
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the NSA Intra-freq Intra-gNB Inter-DU HO (PSCell Change) preparation attempts per PLMN-ID.

KPI.name: 5G NSA Intra-freq Intra-gNB Inter-DU HO (PSCell Change) preparation Success Ratio per PLMN-ID
KPI.lformula: NSA Intra-freq Intra-gNB Inter-DU HO (PSCell Change) Prep SR per PLMN-ID
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the NSA Intra-freq Intra-gNB Inter-DU HO (PSCell Change) preparation Success Ratio per PLMN-ID.

KPI.name: 5G NSA Intra-freq Intra-gNB Inter-DU HO (PSCell Change) execution Success Ratio per PLMN-ID
KPI.lformula: NSA Intra-freq Intra-gNB Inter-DU HO (PSCell Change) Exec SR per PLMN-ID
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the NSA Intra-freq Intra-gNB Inter-DU HO (PSCell Change) execution Success Ratio per PLMN-ID.

KPI.name: 5G NSA Intra-freq Intra-gNB Inter-DU HO (PSCell Change) Total Success Ratio per PLMN-ID
KPI.lformula: NSA Intra-freq Intra-gNB Inter-DU HO (PSCell Change) Tot SR per PLMN-ID
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the NSA Intra-freq Intra-gNB Inter-DU HO (PSCell Change) Total Success Ratio per PLMN-ID.

KPI.name: 5G NSA Inter-freq Intra-gNB Inter-DU HO (PSCell Change) preparation attempts per PLMN-ID
KPI.lformula: NSA Inter-freq Intra-gNB Inter-DU HO (PSCell Change) Prep att per PLMN-ID
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the NSA Inter-freq Intra-gNB Inter-DU HO (PSCell Change) preparation attempts per PLMN-ID.

KPI.name: 5G NSA Inter-freq Intra-gNB Inter-DU HO (PSCell Change) preparation Success Ratio per PLMN-ID
KPI.lformula: NSA Inter-freq Intra-gNB Inter-DU HO (PSCell Change) Prep SR per PLMN-ID
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the NSA Inter-freq Intra-gNB Inter-DU HO (PSCell Change) preparation Success Ratio per PLMN-ID.

KPI.name: 5G NSA Inter-freq Intra-gNB Inter-DU HO (PSCell Change) execution Success Ratio per PLMN-ID
KPI.lformula: NSA Inter-freq Intra-gNB Inter-DU HO (PSCell Change) Exec SR per PLMN-ID
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the NSA Inter-freq Intra-gNB Inter-DU HO (PSCell Change) execution Success Ratio per PLMN-ID.

KPI.name: 5G NSA Inter-freq Intra-gNB Inter-DU HO (PSCell Change) Total Success Ratio per PLMN-ID
KPI.lformula: NSA Inter-freq Intra-gNB Inter-DU HO (PSCell Change) Tot SR per PLMN-ID
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the NSA Inter-freq Intra-gNB Inter-DU HO (PSCell Change) Total Success Ratio per PLMN-ID.

KPI.name: 5G Slot5 Scheduling Request period pool resources utilization ratio
KPI.lformula: Slot5 SR Pool UtiR = ((Sum of used slot5 SR period pool resources)/(sum of available slot5 SR period pool resources)) *100
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the ratio of the sum of used slot5 scheduling request period pool resources to the sum of available slot5 scheduling request (SR) period pool resources.

KPI.name: 5G Slot10 Scheduling Request period pool resources utilization ratio
KPI.lformula: Slot10 SR Pool UtiR = ((Sum of used slot10 SR period pool resources)/(sum of available slot10 SR period pool resources)) *100
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the ratio of the sum of used slot10 scheduling request period pool resources to the sum of available slot10 scheduling request (SR) period pool resources.

KPI.name: 5G Slot20 Scheduling Request period pool resources utilization ratio
KPI.lformula: Slot20 SR Pool UtiR = ((Sum of used slot20 SR period pool resources)/(sum of available slot20 SR period pool resources)) *100
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the ratio of the sum of used slot20 scheduling request period pool resources to the sum of available slot20 scheduling request (SR) period pool resources.

KPI.name: 5G Slot160 Scheduling Request period pool resources utilization ratio
KPI.lformula: Slot160 SR Pool UtiR = ((Sum of used slot160 SR period pool resources)/(sum of available slot160 SR period pool resources)) *100
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the ratio of the sum of used slot160 scheduling request period pool resources to the sum of available slot160 scheduling request (SR) period pool resources.

KPI.name: 5G Percentage of expired proactive UL grants non-skippable sequences
KPI.lformula: ULProNonSkipExpR = ((Number of expired proactive UL grants non-skippable sequences)/ (number of started proactive UL grants non-skippable sequences)) *100
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the ratio of the number of expired proactive UL grants non-skippable sequences to total number of started proactive UL grants non-skippable sequences. Having the KPI on high value may indicate low efficiency of using the proactive UL grants non-skippable sequences in the observed area.

KPI.name: 5G Percentage of expired proactive UL grants skippable sequences
KPI.lformula: ULProSkipExpR = ((Number of expired proactive UL grants skippable sequences)/ (number of started proactive UL grants skippable sequences)) *100
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the ratio of the number of expired proactive UL grants skippable sequences to total number of started proactive UL grants skippable sequences. Having the KPI on high value may indicate low efficiency of using the proactive UL grants skippable sequences in the observed area.

KPI.name: 5G SA Number of RRC re-establishment requests for VoNR per CU
KPI.lformula: SA Number of Reestablishment Requests for VoNR for any cause
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the SA total number of RRC re-establishment requests for VoNR per CU, with exclusion of those events which have undergone fallback procedure.

KPI.name: 5G SA Number of Fallback RRC re-establishment requests per CU
KPI.lformula: SA Number of Fallback Reestablishment Requests for any cause
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the SA total number of Fallback RRC re-establishment requests per CU. In case of fallback the RRC Setup procedure is performed as a successful response for RRC Reestablishment Request.

KPI.name: 5G SA Number of RRC re-establishment requests per CU
KPI.lformula: SA Number of Reestablishment Requests per cause
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the SA total number of RRC re-establishment requests per CU.

KPI.name: 5G SA RRC re-establishment Success Ratio per CU
KPI.lformula: 100* (SA Number of Reestablishment Completes per cause) / (SA Number of Reestablishment Requests per cause)
KPI.nformula: (100* Sum(REESTAB_ACC_RECONF_FAIL + REESTAB_ACC_HO_FAIL + REESTAB_ACC_OTHER_FAIL + REESTAB_ACC_FALLBACK) / Sum(RRC_REESTAB_RECONF_FAILURE + RRC_REESTAB_HO_FAILURE + RRC_REESTAB_OTHER_FAILURE))
KPI.desc: This KPI shows SA the RRC re-establishment Success Ratio per CU.

KPI.name: 5G SA RRC re-establishment Reconfiguration Success Ratio per CU
KPI.lformula: 100* (SA Number of Reestablishment Reconf successes) / (SA Number of Reestablishment Reconf attempts)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the SA RRC re-establishment Reconfiguration Success Ratio per CU, which happens after gNB receives RRC Reestablishment Complete message from the UE.

KPI.name: 5G SA RRC re-establishment for VoNR distribution ratio per CU
KPI.lformula: 100* (SA Number of Reestablishment Completes for VoNR for any cause) / (SA Number of Reestablishment Completes per cause)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the SA RRC re-establishment for VoNR Distribution Ratio per CU, which is given as the number of successful RRC Reestablishment procedures for VoNR for all reestablishment causes to all successful RRC re-establishments for any cause.

KPI.name: 5G SA RRC re-establishment for VoNR Success Ratio per CU
KPI.lformula: 100* (SA Number of Reestablishment Completes for VoNR for any cause) / (SA Number of Reestablishment Requests for VoNR for any cause)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the SA RRC re-establishment for VoNR Success Ratio per CU, with exclusion of those events which have undergone fallback procedure.

KPI.name: 5G SA Fallback RRC re-establishment distribution ratio per CU
KPI.lformula: 100* (SA Number of Fallback Reestablishment Completes for any cause) / (SA Number of Reestablishment Completes per cause + SA Number of Fallback Reestablishment Completes for any cause)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the SA Fallback RRC re-establishment distribution ratio per CU, which is given as the number of successful Fallback RRC Reestablishment procedures for all reestablishment causes to all successful RRC re-establishments for any cause.

KPI.name: 5G SA Fallback RRC re-establishment Success Ratio per CU
KPI.lformula: 100* (SA Number of Fallback Reestablishment Completes for any cause) / (SA Number of Fallback Reestablishment Requests for any cause)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the SA Fallback RRC re-establishment Success Ratio per CU. In case of fallback the RRC Setup procedure is performed as a successful response for RRC Reestablishment Request.

KPI.name: 5G SA NG based handover preparation attempts on the target cell
KPI.lformula: NG HO Prep att on target
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the SA NG based handover preparation attempts on the target cell.

KPI.name: 5G SA NG based handover preparation failure ratio on the target cell due to admission control reasons
KPI.lformula: NG HO Prep FR on target = (NG HO Prep fail cause / NG HO Prep att)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the SA NG based handover preparation failure ratio on the target cell due to admission control reasons.

KPI.name: 5G SA NG based handover preparation failure ratio on the target cell due to control processing overload reasons
KPI.lformula: NG HO Prep FR on target = (NG HO Prep fail cause / NG HO Prep att)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the SA NG based handover preparation failure ratio on the target cell due to control processing overload reasons.

KPI.name: 5G SA NG based handover preparation failure ratio on the target cell due to other reasons
KPI.lformula: NG HO Prep FR on target = (NG HO Prep fail cause / NG HO Prep att)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the SA NG based handover preparation failure ratio on the target cell due to other reasons.

KPI.name: 5G SA NG based handover preparation success ratio on the target cell
KPI.lformula: NG HO Prep SR on target
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the SA NG based handover preparation success ratio on the target cell.

KPI.name: 5G SA NG based handover execution failure ratio on the target cell due TNGRELOCexec guard timer expiry
KPI.lformula: NG HO Exec FR on target
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the SA NG based handover execution failure ratio on the target cell due TNGRELOCexec guard timer expiry.

KPI.name: 5G SA NG based handover execution success ratio on the target cell
KPI.lformula: NG HO Exec SR on target
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the SA NG based handover execution success ratio on the target cell.

KPI.name: 5G SA NG based handover total success ratio on the target cell
KPI.lformula: NG HO tot SR on target = 100* NG HO exec succ / NG HO prep att
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the SA NG based handover total success ratio on the target cell. It covers both the preparation and execution phases.

KPI.name: 5G SA Average number of UEs working in full power mode for FR1
KPI.lformula: 5G SA Avg nr full pwr mod UEs = (Cumulative sum of full pwr mode users sampled / Number of samples)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the average number of UEs working in full power mode for FR1.

KPI.name: 5G Average number of active UEs with data in the buffer for DRBs in DL (excluding DRX)
KPI.lformula: Avg nr act UEs data buff DRBs DL excl DRX = (Cumulative sum UEs with data in the buffer in DL excl DRX / Number of samples)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the average number of PSCell or SCell UEs which have buffered data in any DRB in downlink direction (excluding DRX).

KPI.name: 5G NSA Intra-gNB Intra-DU inter-frequency PSCell Change execution attempts
KPI.lformula: Intra-gNB intra-DU inter-freq PSCELL CHANGE exec att = Intra-gNB Intra-DU inter-freq PSCELL CHANGE exec att MeNB + Intra-gNB Intra-DU inter-freq PSCELL CHANGE exec att SRB3
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the Intra-gNB Intra-DU inter-frequency PSCell Change execution attempts.

KPI.name: 5G NSA Intra-gNB inter-DU inter-frequency PSCell Change execution attempts
KPI.lformula: Intra-gNB Inter-DU inter-freq PSCELL CHANGE exec att = Intra-gNB Inter-DU inter-freq PSCELL CHANGE exec att MeNB + Intra-gNB Inter-DU inter-freq PSCELL CHANGE exec att SRB3
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the Intra-gNB inter-DU inter-frequency PSCell Change execution attempts.

KPI.name: 5G SA Intra-cell HO execution attempts
KPI.lformula: Intra-cell HO exec att
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the handover execution attempts for 5G SA intra-cell.

KPI.name: 5G SA Intra-Frequency Intra-gNB Inter-DU HO execution attempts
KPI.lformula: intra-freq intra-gNB inter-DU HO exec att
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the handover execution attempts for 5G SA Intra-Frequency Intra-gNB Inter-DU.

KPI.name: 5G SA Intra-gNB inter-DU inter-frequency HO execution attempts
KPI.lformula: Intra-gNB Inter-DU inter-frequency HO exec att
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the handover execution attempts for 5G SA Intra-gNB Inter-DU inter-frequency.

KPI.name: 5G SA Inter-gNB Xn based HO preparation attempts
KPI.lformula: Inter-gNB Xn based HO prep att
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the handover preparation attempts for 5G SA Inter-gNB via Xn interface

KPI.name: 5G SA Inter-gNB Xn based HO preparation success ratio
KPI.lformula: Inter-gNB Xn based HO prep SR = Num of Inter-gNB Xn HO prep succ / Inter-gNB Xn HO prep att
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the handover preparation success ratio for 5G SA Inter-gNB via Xn interface

KPI.name: 5G SA Inter-RAT HO preparation failure ratio due to radio resources not available
KPI.lformula: 100 * Inter-RAT HO prep FR = Inter-RAT prep fail due to radio resources not available / Inter-RAT prep attempts
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the handover preparation failure ratio for 5G SA Inter-RAT due to radio resources not available.

KPI.name: 5G SA Inter-RAT HO preparation failure ratio due to timer expiry
KPI.lformula: 100 * Inter-RAT HO prep FR = Inter-RAT prep fail due to timer expiry / Inter-RAT prep attempts
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the handover preparation failure ratio for 5G SA Inter-RAT due to timer expiry.

KPI.name: 5G SA Inter-RAT HO preparation failure ratio due to other reasons
KPI.lformula: 100 * Inter-RAT HO prep FR = Inter-RAT prep fail due to other reasons / Inter-RAT prep attempts
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the handover preparation failure ratio for 5G SA Inter-RAT due to other reasons.

KPI.name: 5G SA Inter-RAT HO execution failure ratio due to timer expiry
KPI.lformula: 100 * Inter-RAT HO exec fail due to timer expiry / Inter-RAT HO exec att
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the handover execution failure ratio for 5G SA Inter-RAT due to timer expiry.

KPI.name: 5G SA Intra-gNB intra-DU inter-frequency HO preparation attempts per PLMN
KPI.lformula: Intra-gNB intra-DU inter-freq HO prep att PLMN = Intra-gNB Intra-DU inter-freq HO exec att PLMN + Intra-gNB intra-DU inter-freq HO prep fail AC PLMN + Intra-gNB intra-DU inter-freq HO prep fail due to other PLMN
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the handover preparation attempts for 5G SA Intra-gNB Intra-DU inter-frequency per PLMN.

KPI.name: 5G SA Intra-gNB intra-DU inter-frequency HO preparation success ratio per PLMN
KPI.lformula: 100 * Intra-gNB Intra-DU inter-freq HO exec att PLMN / (Intra-gNB Intra-DU inter-freq HO exec att PLMN + Intra-gNB intra-DU inter-freq HO prep fail AC PLMN + Intra-gNB intra-DU inter-freq HO prep fail due to other PLMN)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the handover preparation success ratio for 5G SA Intra-gNB Intra-DU inter-frequency per PLMN.

KPI.name: 5G SA Intra-gNB intra-DU inter-frequency HO total success ratio per PLMN
KPI.lformula: 100 * Intra-gNB Intra-DU HO tot succ PLMN / (Intra-gNB Intra-DU HO exec att PLMN + Intra-gNB intra-DU HO prep fail AC PLMN + Intra-gNB intra-DU HO prep fail due to other PLMN)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the handover total success ratio for 5G SA Intra-gNB Intra-DU inter-frequency per PLMN.

KPI.name: 5G Slot40 Scheduling Request pool resources utilization ratio
KPI.lformula: Slot40 SR Pool UtiR = ((Sum of used slot40 SR period pool resources)/(sum of available slot40 SR period pool resources)) *100
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the ratio of the sum of used slot40 scheduling request period pool resources to the sum of available slot40 scheduling request (SR) period pool resources.

KPI.name: 5G Slot80 Scheduling Request pool resources utilization ratio
KPI.lformula: Slot80 SR Pool UtiR = ((Sum of used slot80 SR period pool resources)/(sum of available slot80 SR period pool resources)) *100
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the ratio of the sum of used slot80 scheduling request period pool resources to the sum of available slot80 scheduling request (SR) period pool resources.

KPI.name: 5G Average aggregation level used on PDCCH uplink grants
KPI.lformula: Sum(x * UL PDCCH grants with ALx for all BWP)/Sum(UL PDCCH grants with ALx for all BWP)
KPI.nformula: (Sum((UL_GRANT_AL1_CBWP0 + UL_GRANT_AL1_CBWP1 + UL_GRANT_AL1_CBWP2 + UL_GRANT_AL1_CBWP3 + UL_GRANT_AL1_CBWP4 + UL_GRANT_AL1_CBWP5 +UL_GRANT_AL1_CBWP6 + UL_GRANT_AL1_CBWP7 + UL_GRANT_AL2_CBWP7 + UL_GRANT_AL2_CBWP8 + UL_GRANT_AL2_CBWP9)+ 4 * (UL_GRANT_AL4_CBWP0 + UL_GRANT_AL4_CBWP1 + UL_GRANT_AL4_CBWP2 + UL_GRANT_AL4_CBWP3 + UL_GRANT_AL4_CBWP4 + UL_GRANT_AL4_CBWP5 +UL_GRANT_AL4_CBWP6 + UL_GRANT_AL4_CBWP7 + UL_GRANT_AL4_CBWP8 + UL_GRANT_AL4_CBWP9)+ 8* (UL_GRANT_AL8_CBWP0 + UL_GRANT_AL8_CBWP1 + UL_GRANT_AL8_CBWP2 + UL_GRANT_AL8_CBWP3 + UL_GRANT_AL8_CBWP4 + UL_GRANT_AL8_CBWP5 +UL_GRANT_AL8_CBWP6 + UL_GRANT_AL8_CBWP7 + UL_GRANT_AL8_CBWP8 + UL_GRANT_AL8_CBWP9)+ 16 * (UL_GRANT_AL16_CBWP0 + UL_GRANT_AL16_CBWP1 + UL_GRANT_AL16_CBWP2 + UL_GRANT_AL16_CBWP3 + UL_GRANT_AL16_CBWP4 + UL_GRANT_AL16_CBWP5 +UL_GRANT_AL16_CBWP6 + UL_GRANT_AL16_CBWP7 + UL_GRANT_AL16_CBWP8 + UL_GRANT_AL16_CBWP9)+ (UL_GRANT_HR_AL1_CBWP0 + UL_GRANT_HR_AL1_CBWP1 + UL_GRANT_HR_AL1_CBWP2 + UL_GRANT_HR_AL1_CBWP3 + UL_GRANT_HR_AL1_CBWP4 + UL_GRANT_HR_AL1_CBWP5 +UL_GRANT_HR_AL1_CBWP6 + UL_GRANT_HR_AL1_CBWP7 + UL_GRANT_HR_AL1_CBWP8 + UL_GRANT_HR_AL1_CBWP9)+ 2 * (UL_GRANT_HR_AL2_CBWP0 + UL_GRANT_HR_AL2_CBWP1 + UL_GRANT_HR_AL2_CBWP2 + UL_GRANT_HR_AL2_CBWP3 + UL_GRANT_HR_AL2_CBWP4 + UL_GRANT_HR_AL2_CBWP5 +UL_GRANT_HR_AL2_CBWP6 + UL_GRANT_HR_AL2_CBWP7 + UL_GRANT_HR_AL2_CBWP8 + UL_GRANT_HR_AL2_CBWP9)+ 4 * (UL_GRANT_HR_AL4_CBWP0 + UL_GRANT_HR_AL4_CBWP1 + UL_GRANT_HR_AL4_CBWP2 + UL_GRANT_HR_AL4_CBWP3 + UL_GRANT_HR_AL4_CBWP4 + UL_GRANT_HR_AL4_CBWP5 +UL_GRANT_HR_AL4_CBWP6 + UL_GRANT_HR_AL4_CBWP7 + UL_GRANT_HR_AL4_CBWP8 + UL_GRANT_HR_AL4_CBWP9)+ 8* (UL_GRANT_HR_AL8_CBWP0 + UL_GRANT_HR_AL8_CBWP1 + UL_GRANT_HR_AL8_CBWP2 + UL_GRANT_HR_AL8_CBWP3 + UL_GRANT_HR_AL8_CBWP4 + UL_GRANT_HR_AL8_CBWP5 +UL_GRANT_HR_AL8_CBWP6 + UL_GRANT_HR_AL8_CBWP7 + UL_GRANT_HR_AL8_CBWP8 + UL_GRANT_HR_AL8_CBWP9))/Sum(UL_GRANT_AL1_CBWP0 + UL_GRANT_AL1_CBWP1 + UL_GRANT_AL1_CBWP2 + UL_GRANT_AL1_CBWP3 + UL_GRANT_AL1_CBWP4 + UL_GRANT_AL1_CBWP5 +UL_GRANT_AL1_CBWP6 + UL_GRANT_AL1_CBWP7 + UL_GRANT_AL1_CBWP8 + UL_GRANT_AL1_CBWP9+ UL_GRANT_AL2_CBWP0 + UL_GRANT_AL2_CBWP1 + UL_GRANT_AL2_CBWP2 + UL_GRANT_AL2_CBWP3 + UL_GRANT_AL2_CBWP4 + UL_GRANT_AL2_CBWP5 +UL_GRANT_AL2_CBWP6 + UL_GRANT_AL2_CBWP7 + UL_GRANT_AL2_CBWP8 + UL_GRANT_AL2_CBWP9+ UL_GRANT_AL4_CBWP0 + UL_GRANT_AL4_CBWP1 + UL_GRANT_AL4_CBWP2 + UL_GRANT_AL4_CBWP3 + UL_GRANT_AL4_CBWP4 + UL_GRANT_AL4_CBWP5 +UL_GRANT_AL4_CBWP6 + UL_GRANT_AL4_CBWP7 + UL_GRANT_AL4_CBWP8 + UL_GRANT_AL4_CBWP9+ UL_GRANT_AL8_CBWP0 + UL_GRANT_AL8_CBWP1 + UL_GRANT_AL8_CBWP2 + UL_GRANT_AL8_CBWP3 + UL_GRANT_AL8_CBWP4 + UL_GRANT_AL8_CBWP5 +UL_GRANT_AL8_CBWP6 + UL_GRANT_AL8_CBWP7 + UL_GRANT_AL8_CBWP8 + UL_GRANT_AL8_CBWP9+ UL_GRANT_AL16_CBWP0 + UL_GRANT_AL16_CBWP1 + UL_GRANT_AL16_CBWP2 + UL_GRANT_AL16_CBWP3 + UL_GRANT_AL16_CBWP4 + UL_GRANT_AL16_CBWP5 +UL_GRANT_AL16_CBWP6 + UL_GRANT_AL16_CBWP7 + UL_GRANT_AL16_CBWP8 + UL_GRANT_AL16_CBWP9 + UL_GRANT_HR_AL1_CBWP0 + UL_GRANT_HR_AL1_CBWP1 + UL_GRANT_HR_AL1_CBWP2 + UL_GRANT_HR_AL1_CBWP3 + UL_GRANT_HR_AL1_CBWP4 + UL_GRANT_HR_AL1_CBWP5 +UL_GRANT_HR_AL1_CBWP6 + UL_GRANT_HR_AL1_CBWP7 + UL_GRANT_HR_AL1_CBWP8 + UL_GRANT_HR_AL1_CBWP9+ UL_GRANT_HR_AL2_CBWP0 + UL_GRANT_HR_AL2_CBWP1 + UL_GRANT_HR_AL2_CBWP2 + UL_GRANT_HR_AL2_CBWP3 + UL_GRANT_HR_AL2_CBWP4 + UL_GRANT_HR_AL2_CBWP5 +UL_GRANT_HR_AL2_CBWP6 + UL_GRANT_HR_AL2_CBWP7 + UL_GRANT_HR_AL2_CBWP8 + UL_GRANT_HR_AL2_CBWP9+ UL_GRANT_HR_AL4_CBWP0 + UL_GRANT_HR_AL4_CBWP1 + UL_GRANT_HR_AL4_CBWP2 + UL_GRANT_HR_AL4_CBWP3 + UL_GRANT_HR_AL4_CBWP4 + UL_GRANT_HR_AL4_CBWP5 +UL_GRANT_HR_AL4_CBWP6 + UL_GRANT_HR_AL4_CBWP7 + UL_GRANT_HR_AL4_CBWP8 + UL_GRANT_HR_AL4_CBWP9+ UL_GRANT_HR_AL8_CBWP0 + UL_GRANT_HR_AL8_CBWP1 + UL_GRANT_HR_AL8_CBWP2 + UL_GRANT_HR_AL8_CBWP3 + UL_GRANT_HR_AL8_CBWP4 + UL_GRANT_HR_AL8_CBWP5 +UL_GRANT_HR_AL8_CBWP6 + UL_GRANT_HR_AL8_CBWP7 + UL_GRANT_HR_AL8_CBWP8 + UL_GRANT_HR_AL8_CBWP9))
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the average aggregation level used on PDCCH uplink grants.

KPI.name: 5G Average aggregation level used on PDCCH downlink grants
KPI.lformula: Sum(x * DL PDCCH grants with ALx for all BWP)/Sum(DL PDCCH grants with ALx for all BWP)
KPI.nformula: (Sum((DL_GRANT_AL1_CBWP0 + DL_GRANT_AL1_CBWP1 + DL_GRANT_AL1_CBWP2 + DL_GRANT_AL1_CBWP3 + DL_GRANT_AL1_CBWP4 + DL_GRANT_AL1_CBWP5 +DL_GRANT_AL1_CBWP6 + DL_GRANT_AL1_CBWP7 + DL_GRANT_AL1_CBWP8 + DL_GRANT_AL1_CBWP9)+ 2 * (DL_GRANT_AL2_CBWP0 + DL_GRANT_AL2_CBWP1 + DL_GRANT_AL2_CBWP2 + DL_GRANT_AL2_CBWP3 + DL_GRANT_AL2_CBWP4 + DL_GRANT_AL2_CBWP5 +DL_GRANT_AL2_CBWP6 + DL_GRANT_AL2_CBWP7 + DL_GRANT_AL2_CBWP8 + DL_GRANT_AL2_CBWP9)+ 4 * (DL_GRANT_AL4_CBWP0 + DL_GRANT_AL4_CBWP1 + DL_GRANT_AL4_CBWP2 + DL_GRANT_AL4_CBWP3 + DL_GRANT_AL4_CBWP4 + DL_GRANT_AL4_CBWP5 +DL_GRANT_AL4_CBWP6 + DL_GRANT_AL4_CBWP7 + DL_GRANT_AL4_CBWP8 + DL_GRANT_AL4_CBWP9)+ 8* (DL_GRANT_AL8_CBWP0 + DL_GRANT_AL8_CBWP1 + DL_GRANT_AL8_CBWP2 + DL_GRANT_AL8_CBWP3 + DL_GRANT_AL8_CBWP4 + DL_GRANT_AL8_CBWP5 +DL_GRANT_AL8_CBWP6 + DL_GRANT_AL8_CBWP7 + DL_GRANT_AL8_CBWP8 + DL_GRANT_AL8_CBWP9)+ 16 * (DL_GRANT_AL16_CBWP0 + DL_GRANT_AL16_CBWP1 + DL_GRANT_AL16_CBWP2 + DL_GRANT_AL16_CBWP3 + DL_GRANT_AL16_CBWP4 + DL_GRANT_AL16_CBWP5 +DL_GRANT_AL16_CBWP6 + DL_GRANT_AL16_CBWP7 + DL_GRANT_AL16_CBWP8 + DL_GRANT_AL16_CBWP9)+ (DL_GRANT_HR_AL1_CBWP0 + DL_GRANT_HR_AL1_CBWP1 + DL_GRANT_HR_AL1_CBWP2 + DL_GRANT_HR_AL1_CBWP3 + DL_GRANT_HR_AL1_CBWP4 + DL_GRANT_HR_AL1_CBWP5 +DL_GRANT_HR_AL1_CBWP6 + DL_GRANT_HR_AL1_CBWP7 + DL_GRANT_HR_AL1_CBWP8 + DL_GRANT_HR_AL1_CBWP9)+ 2 * (DL_GRANT_HR_AL2_CBWP0 + DL_GRANT_HR_AL2_CBWP1 + DL_GRANT_HR_AL2_CBWP2 + DL_GRANT_HR_AL2_CBWP3 + DL_GRANT_HR_AL2_CBWP4 + DL_GRANT_HR_AL2_CBWP5 +DL_GRANT_HR_AL2_CBWP6 + DL_GRANT_HR_AL2_CBWP7 + DL_GRANT_HR_AL2_CBWP8 + DL_GRANT_HR_AL2_CBWP9)+ 4 * (DL_GRANT_HR_AL4_CBWP0 + DL_GRANT_HR_AL4_CBWP1 + DL_GRANT_HR_AL4_CBWP2 + DL_GRANT_HR_AL4_CBWP3 + DL_GRANT_HR_AL4_CBWP4 + DL_GRANT_HR_AL4_CBWP5 +DL_GRANT_HR_AL4_CBWP6 + DL_GRANT_HR_AL4_CBWP7 + DL_GRANT_HR_AL4_CBWP8 + DL_GRANT_HR_AL4_CBWP9)+ 8* (DL_GRANT_HR_AL8_CBWP0 + DL_GRANT_HR_AL8_CBWP1 + DL_GRANT_HR_AL8_CBWP2 + DL_GRANT_HR_AL8_CBWP3 + DL_GRANT_HR_AL8_CBWP4 + DL_GRANT_HR_AL8_CBWP5 +DL_GRANT_HR_AL8_CBWP6 + DL_GRANT_HR_AL8_CBWP7 + DL_GRANT_HR_AL8_CBWP8 + DL_GRANT_HR_AL8_CBWP9))/Sum(DL_GRANT_AL1_CBWP0 + DL_GRANT_AL1_CBWP1 + DL_GRANT_AL1_CBWP2 + DL_GRANT_AL1_CBWP3 + DL_GRANT_AL1_CBWP4 + DL_GRANT_AL1_CBWP5 +DL_GRANT_AL1_CBWP6 + DL_GRANT_AL1_CBWP7 + DL_GRANT_AL1_CBWP8 + DL_GRANT_AL1_CBWP9+ DL_GRANT_AL2_CBWP0 + DL_GRANT_AL2_CBWP1 + DL_GRANT_AL2_CBWP2 + DL_GRANT_AL2_CBWP3 + DL_GRANT_AL2_CBWP4 + DL_GRANT_AL2_CBWP5 +DL_GRANT_AL2_CBWP6 + DL_GRANT_AL2_CBWP7 + DL_GRANT_AL2_CBWP8 + DL_GRANT_AL2_CBWP9+ DL_GRANT_AL4_CBWP0 + DL_GRANT_AL4_CBWP1 + DL_GRANT_AL4_CBWP2 + DL_GRANT_AL4_CBWP3 + DL_GRANT_AL4_CBWP4 + DL_GRANT_AL4_CBWP5 +DL_GRANT_AL4_CBWP6 + DL_GRANT_AL4_CBWP7 + DL_GRANT_AL4_CBWP8 + DL_GRANT_AL4_CBWP9+ DL_GRANT_AL8_CBWP0 + DL_GRANT_AL8_CBWP1 + DL_GRANT_AL8_CBWP2 + DL_GRANT_AL8_CBWP3 + DL_GRANT_AL8_CBWP4 + DL_GRANT_AL8_CBWP5 +DL_GRANT_AL8_CBWP6 + DL_GRANT_AL8_CBWP7 + DL_GRANT_AL8_CBWP8 + DL_GRANT_AL8_CBWP9+ DL_GRANT_AL16_CBWP0 + DL_GRANT_AL16_CBWP1 + DL_GRANT_AL16_CBWP2 + DL_GRANT_AL16_CBWP3 + DL_GRANT_AL16_CBWP4 + DL_GRANT_AL16_CBWP5 +DL_GRANT_AL16_CBWP6 + DL_GRANT_AL16_CBWP7 + DL_GRANT_AL16_CBWP8 + DL_GRANT_AL16_CBWP9 + DL_GRANT_HR_AL1_CBWP0 + DL_GRANT_HR_AL1_CBWP1 + DL_GRANT_HR_AL1_CBWP2 + DL_GRANT_HR_AL1_CBWP3 + DL_GRANT_HR_AL1_CBWP4 + DL_GRANT_HR_AL1_CBWP5 +DL_GRANT_HR_AL1_CBWP6 + DL_GRANT_HR_AL1_CBWP7 + DL_GRANT_HR_AL1_CBWP8 + DL_GRANT_HR_AL1_CBWP9+ DL_GRANT_HR_AL2_CBWP0 + DL_GRANT_HR_AL2_CBWP1 + DL_GRANT_HR_AL2_CBWP2 + DL_GRANT_HR_AL2_CBWP3 + DL_GRANT_HR_AL2_CBWP4 + DL_GRANT_HR_AL2_CBWP5 +DL_GRANT_HR_AL2_CBWP6 + DL_GRANT_HR_AL2_CBWP7 + DL_GRANT_HR_AL2_CBWP8 + DL_GRANT_HR_AL2_CBWP9+ DL_GRANT_HR_AL4_CBWP0 + DL_GRANT_HR_AL4_CBWP1 + DL_GRANT_HR_AL4_CBWP2 + DL_GRANT_HR_AL4_CBWP3 + DL_GRANT_HR_AL4_CBWP4 + DL_GRANT_HR_AL4_CBWP5 +DL_GRANT_HR_AL4_CBWP6 + DL_GRANT_HR_AL4_CBWP7 + DL_GRANT_HR_AL4_CBWP8 + DL_GRANT_HR_AL4_CBWP9+ DL_GRANT_HR_AL8_CBWP0 + DL_GRANT_HR_AL8_CBWP1 + DL_GRANT_HR_AL8_CBWP2 + DL_GRANT_HR_AL8_CBWP3 + DL_GRANT_HR_AL8_CBWP4 + DL_GRANT_HR_AL8_CBWP5 +DL_GRANT_HR_AL8_CBWP6 + DL_GRANT_HR_AL8_CBWP7 + DL_GRANT_HR_AL8_CBWP8 + DL_GRANT_HR_AL8_CBWP9))
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the average aggregation level used on PDCCH downlink grants.

KPI.name: 5G Number of UE redirections to E-UTRAN due to an emergency fallback to LTE
KPI.lformula: Nr UE redir LTE emg FB = Number of RRC Releases with LTE frequency redirection information for emergency fallback
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the 5G Number of UE redirections to E-UTRAN due to an emergency fallback to LTE.

KPI.name: 5G Number of UE redirections to E-UTRAN due to IMS Emergency call voice fallback to LTE
KPI.lformula: Nr UE redir LTE IMS voice emg FB = Number of IMS Emergency Call attempts redirected to LTE
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the 5G Number of UE redirections to E-UTRAN due to IMS Emergency call voice fallback to LTE.

KPI.name: 5G SA Percentage of DL inactivity time of VoNR calls
KPI.lformula: 100 * (Inact_time_i * dl_inact_vonr_bin_i)/(NG flow duration norm rel + NG flow duration abnorm rel)
KPI.nformula: 100 * Sum(DL_INACT_VONR_BIN_01 * 0.75+ DL_INACT_VONR_BIN_02 * 1.25+ DL_INACT_VONR_BIN_03 * 1.75+ DL_INACT_VONR_BIN_04 * 2.25+ DL_INACT_VONR_BIN_05 * 2.75+ DL_INACT_VONR_BIN_06 * 3.25+ DL_INACT_VONR_BIN_07 * 3.75+ DL_INACT_VONR_BIN_08 * 4.25+ DL_INACT_VONR_BIN_09 * 4.75+ DL_INACT_VONR_BIN_10 * 5.25)/(Sum(NG_FLOW_SESSION_DUR_NORM_5QI1 + NG_FLOW_SESSION_DUR_ABNRM_5QI1) / 1000)
KPI.desc: This KPI calculates percentage of DL inactivity time from all VoNR time.Only inactivity times longer than 0.5 sec are considered.

KPI.name: 5G SA Percentage of UL inactivity time of VoNR calls
KPI.lformula: 100 * (Inact_time_i * ul_inact_vonr_bin_i)/(NG flow duration norm rel + NG flow duration abnorm rel)
KPI.nformula: 100 * Sum(UL_INACT_VONR_BIN_01 * 0.75+ UL_INACT_VONR_BIN_02 * 1.25+ UL_INACT_VONR_BIN_03 * 1.75+ UL_INACT_VONR_BIN_04 * 2.25+ UL_INACT_VONR_BIN_05 * 2.75+ UL_INACT_VONR_BIN_06 * 3.25+ UL_INACT_VONR_BIN_07 * 3.75+ UL_INACT_VONR_BIN_08 * 4.25+ UL_INACT_VONR_BIN_09 * 4.75+ UL_INACT_VONR_BIN_10 * 5.25)/(Sum(NG_FLOW_SESSION_DUR_NORM_5QI1 + NG_FLOW_SESSION_DUR_ABNRM_5QI1) / 1000)
KPI.desc: This KPI calculates percentage of UL inactivity time from all VoNR time.Only inactivity times longer than 0.5 sec are considered.

KPI.name: 5G NSA Average Number of PSCell UEs with Configured one SCell in UL
KPI.lformula: Avg PSCell UE 1 SCell Conf UL = (Cumulative number of PSCell CA UEs with one configured SCell in UL) / (number of samples)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the average number of PSCell UEs with Configured one SCell in UL.

KPI.name: 5G NSA Average Number of PSCell UEs with Configured two SCells in UL
KPI.lformula: Avg PSCell UE 2 SCell Conf UL = (Cumulative number of PSCell CA UEs with two configured SCell in UL) / (number of samples)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the average number of PSCell UEs with Configured two SCells in UL.

KPI.name: 5G NSA Average Number of PSCell UEs with Configured three SCells in UL
KPI.lformula: Avg PSCell UE 3 SCell Conf UL = (Cumulative number of PSCell CA UEs with three configured SCell in UL) / (number of samples)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the average number of PSCell UEs with Configured three SCells in UL.

KPI.name: 5G NSA Average Number of PSCell UEs with Configured four SCells in UL
KPI.lformula: Avg PSCell UE 4 SCell Conf UL = (Cumulative number of PSCell CA UEs with four configured SCell in UL) / (number of samples)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the average number of PSCell UEs with Configured four SCells in UL.

KPI.name: 5G NSA Average Number of PSCell UEs with Configured five SCells in UL
KPI.lformula: Avg PSCell UE 5 SCell Conf UL = (Cumulative number of PSCell CA UEs with five configured SCell in UL) / (number of samples)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the average number of PSCell UEs with Configured five SCells in UL.

KPI.name: 5G NSA Average Number of PSCell UEs with Configured six SCells in UL
KPI.lformula: Avg PSCell UE 6 SCell Conf UL = (Cumulative number of PSCell CA UEs with six configured SCell in UL) / (number of samples)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the average number of PSCell UEs with Configured six SCells in UL.

KPI.name: 5G Maximum Number of PSCell UEs with Activated six SCells in UL

KPI.name: 5G Maximum Number of PSCell UEs with Activated seven SCells in UL

KPI.desc: This KPI shows the Maximum number of PSCell UEs with Activated seven SCells in UL.

KPI.name: 5G SA Average Number of PCell UEs with Configured two SCells in DL
KPI.lformula: Avg PCell UE 2 SCells Conf DL = (Cumulative number of PCell CA UEs with two configured SCells in DL) / (number of samples)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the average number of PCell UEs with Configured two SCells in DL.

KPI.name: 5G SA QoS Flow Setup Failure Ratio per cause: Radio Resource Not Available
KPI.lformula: 5G SA QoS Flow Setup FR cause RRNA = 100 * (Num of QoS Flow Setup Fail due to RRNA) / (Num of QoS Flow Att)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the Failure Ratio for QoS Flow setup per cause: Radio Resource Not Available.

KPI.name: 5G SA Radio admission success ratio for GBR type of 5QIs for full bandwidth part (BWP)
KPI.lformula: SA AC SR GBR full BWP = 100 * (Number of Admission control successes for SA) / (Number of Admission control requests for SA)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the success ratio of radio admission for Stand Alone GBR type of 5QIs for full bandwidth part (BWP).

KPI.name: 5G SA Number of radio admission requests for GBR type of 5QIs for full bandwidth part (BWP)
KPI.lformula: SA Nr AC req GBR full BWP = Number of Admission control requests for SA
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the total number of radio admission requests for Stand Alone GBR type of 5QIs for full bandwidth part (BWP).

KPI.name: 5G SA Radio admission success ratio for GBR type of 5QIs for partial bandwidth part (BWP)
KPI.lformula: SA AC SR GBR partial BWP = 100 * (Number of Admission control successes for SA) / (Number of Admission control requests for SA)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the success ratio of radio admission for Stand Alone GBR type of 5QIs for partial bandwidth part (BWP).

KPI.name: 5G SA Number of radio admission requests for GBR type of 5QIs for partial bandwidth part (BWP)
KPI.lformula: SA Nr AC req GBR partial BWP = Number of Admission control requests for SA
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the total number of radio admission requests for Stand Alone GBR type of 5QIs for partial bandwidth part (BWP).

KPI.name: 5G NSA successful radio admissions for SCell addition having at least one SCell with smaller bandwidth part (BWP).
KPI.lformula: Succ radio AC for SCell Add with 1+ SCell with smaller BWP
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the NSA successful radio admissions for SCell addition having at least one SCell with smaller bandwidth part (BWP).

KPI.name: 5G NSA successful radio admissions for SCell addition having all SCells with large bandwidth part (BWP).
KPI.lformula: Succ radio AC for SCell Add with all SCells with large BWP
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the NSA successful radio admissions for SCell addition having all SCells with large bandwidth part (BWP).

KPI.name: 5G SA QoS Flow Drop Ratio due to partial handover
KPI.lformula: SA QoS flow drop partial HO = ((number of abnormally released QoS flow attempts due to partial HO)/(Total number of QoS release attempts)) *100
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the ratio of the number of abnormally released QoS flow (5QI flows) attempts due to partial handover to total number of QoS flow release attempts (gNB and AMF initiated).
