KPI.name: 5G Average number of CA UEs having at least 1 SCell configured with smaller BWP
KPI.lformula: Avg CA UEs with 1+ SCell configured with smaller BWP
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the average number of CA UEs having at least 1 SCell configured with smaller BWP.

KPI.name: 5G Average number of CA UEs having all SCells configured with large BWP
KPI.lformula: Avg CA UEs with all SCells configured with large BWP
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the average number of CA UEs having all SCells configured with large BWP.

KPI.name: 5G Average number of UEs scheduled in DL per slot per Power Saving BWP
KPI.lformula: Avg sched UEs in DL per slot per power saving BWP
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the average number of UEs scheduled in DL per slot per Power Saving BWP.

KPI.name: 5G Maximum number of UEs scheduled in DL per slot per Power Saving BWP
KPI.lformula: Max sched UEs in DL per slot per power saving BWP
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the Maximum number of UEs scheduled in DL per slot per Power Saving BWP.

KPI.name: 5G Average number of UEs scheduled in UL per slot per Power Saving BWP
KPI.lformula: Avg sched UEs in UL per slot per power saving BWP
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the average number of UEs scheduled in UL per slot per Power Saving BWP.

KPI.name: 5G Maximum number of UEs scheduled in UL per slot per Power Saving BWP
KPI.lformula: Max sched UEs in UL per slot per power saving BWP
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the Maximum number of UEs scheduled in UL per slot per Power Saving BWP.

KPI.name: 5G NSA A2 Intra-gNB Intra-DU inter-frequency PSCell Change preparation attempts per PLMN
KPI.lformula: Intra-gNB intra-DU inter-freq PSCELL CHANGE prep att = Intra-gNB Intra-DU inter-freq PSCELL CHANGE exec att + Intra-gNB intra-DU inter-freq PSCELL CHANGE prep fail AC + Intra-gNB intra-DU inter-freq PSCELL CHANGE prep fail due to other reasons
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the A2 Intra-gNB Intra-DU inter-frequency PSCell Change preparation attempts per PLMN.

KPI.name: 5G NSA A2 Intra-gNB Intra-DU inter-frequency PSCell Change preparation success ratio per PLMN
KPI.lformula: 100 * Intra-gNB Intra-DU PSCELL CHANGE exec att PLMN / (Intra-gNB Intra-DU inter-freq PSCELL CHANGE exec att + Intra-gNB intra-DU inter-freq PSCELL CHANGE prep fail AC + Intra-gNB intra-DU inter-freq PSCELL CHANGE prep fail due to other reasons)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the A2 Intra-gNB Intra-DU inter-frequency PSCell Change preparation success ratio per PLMN.

KPI.name: 5G NSA A2 Intra-gNB Intra-DU inter-frequency PSCell Change execution attempts per PLMN
KPI.lformula: Intra-gNB intra-DU inter-freq PSCELL CHANGE exec att
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the A2 Intra-gNB Intra-DU inter-frequency PSCell Change execution attempts per PLMN.

KPI.name: 5G NSA A2 Intra-gNB Intra-DU inter-frequency PSCell Change execution success ratio per PLMN
KPI.lformula: Intra-gNB intra-DU inter-freq PSCELL CHANGE exec SR = Intra-gNB intra-DU inter-freq PSCELL CHANGE exec succ / Intra-gNB intra-DU inter-freq PSCELL CHANGE exec att
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the A2 Intra-gNB Intra-DU inter-frequency PSCell Change execution success ratio per PLMN.

KPI.name: 5G NSA A2 Intra-gNB Intra-DU inter-frequency PSCell Change total success ratio per PLMN
KPI.lformula: Intra-gNB intra-DU inter-freq PSCELL CHANGE total SR = Intra-gNB intra-DU inter-freq PSCELL CHANGE exec succ / (Intra-gNB Intra-DU inter-freq PSCELL CHANGE exec att + Intra-gNB intra-DU inter-freq PSCELL CHANGE prep fail AC + Intra-gNB intra-DU inter-freq PSCELL CHANGE prep fail due to other reasons)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the A2 Intra-gNB Intra-DU inter-frequency PSCell Change total success ratio per PLMN.

KPI.name: 5G SA Xn based Inter-gNB HO preparation failure ratio on the target cell due to admission control reasons
KPI.lformula: Xn HO Prep FR on target = (Xn HO Prep fail cause / Xn HO Prep att)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the SA Xn based Inter-gNB HO preparation failure ratio on the target cell due to admission control reasons.

KPI.name: 5G SA Xn based Inter-gNB HO preparation failure ratio on the target cell due to C-Plane overload reasons
KPI.lformula: Xn HO Prep FR on target = (Xn HO Prep fail cause / Xn HO Prep att)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the SA Xn based Inter-gNB HO preparation failure ratio on the target cell mode due to C-plane overload. Handover Attempts for 'emergency' or 'Priority Access' are not rejected due to C-Plane overload. Priority Access can be of three types - High Priority Access (HPA), Multimedia Priority Service (MPS) and Mission Critical Service (MCS).

KPI.name: 5G SA Xn based Inter-gNB HO preparation failure ratio on the target cell due to Insufficient UE Capabilities reasons
KPI.lformula: Xn HO Prep FR on target = (Xn HO Prep fail cause / Xn HO Prep att)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the SA Xn based Inter-gNB HO preparation failure ratio on the target cell due to Insufficient UE Capabilities reasons.

KPI.name: 5G SA Xn based Inter-gNB HO preparation failure ratio on the target cell due to other reasons
KPI.lformula: Xn HO Prep FR on target = (Xn HO Prep fail cause / Xn HO Prep att)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the SA Xn based Inter-gNB HO preparation failure ratio on the target cell due to other reasons.

KPI.name: 5G SA Xn based Inter-gNB HO Cancel ratio on the target cell
KPI.lformula: Xn HO Prep FR on target = (Xn HO Cancel / Xn HO Prep att)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the SA Xn based Inter-gNB HO Cancel ratio on the target cell.

KPI.name: 5G SA NG based Inter-frequency handover preparation attempts on the source cell
KPI.lformula: NG HO Prep att inter-freq
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the SA NG based Inter-frequency handover preparation attempts on the source cell.

KPI.name: 5G SA NG based Intra-frequency handover preparation attempts on the source cell
KPI.lformula: NG HO Prep att intra-freq
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the SA NG based Intra-frequency handover preparation attempts on the source cell.

KPI.name: 5G SA Average number of UEs configured to provide release preference with UE Assistance Information
KPI.lformula: 5G SA Avg num UEs rel pref UAI conf = (Acc num of UEs rel pref UAI conf / Num of samples)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the average number of UEs configured to provide release preference with UE Assistance Information

KPI.name: 5G SA Ratio of Releases to RRC Idle state due to UE preference to all releases to RRC Idle state
KPI.lformula: 5G SA Ratio of Rel RRC Idle due to UE pref to all RRC rel to Idle = 100 * (Rel RRC Idle due to UE pref / All RRC rel to idle)
KPI.nformula: 100 * Sum(UAI_RRC_REL_IDLE_PREF_IDLE + UAI_RRC_REL_IDLE_PREF_INACT + UAI_RRC_REL_IDLE_PREF_OUTCONN) / Sum(NRRCC_RRC_RELEASE_SENT - NRRCC_RRC_REL_WITH_SUSP_NRNAU - NRRCC_RRC_REL_WITH_SUSP_RNAU)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the ratio between releases to RRC Idle due to UE preference to all releases to RRC Idle

KPI.name: 5G SA Normal UAI triggered UE Context Release Ratio
KPI.lformula: 5G SA Norm UAI trig UE Ctx RR = 100 * (Num of UAI trig UE Ctx Rel Reqs) / (Total num of sent UE Ctx Rel Reqs)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the ratio of normal UE Context releases initiated by gNB due to UE Assisted Information, compared to all releases, for SA access.

KPI.name: 5G Average value of scheduled MIMO layers per PRB in the UL
KPI.lformula: 5G Avg value of scheduled MIMO layers per PRB UL =Num of all scheduled layers for all used PRBs for UL MIMO /Num of all used PRBs for UL MIMO
KPI.nformula: (Sum(1* PRB_UL_SU_MIMO_1LAYER +2* (PRB_UL_SU_MIMO_2LAYER + PRB_UL_MU_MIMO_2LAYER) +3* PRB_UL_MU_MIMO_3LAYER +4* PRB_UL_MU_MIMO_4LAYER +5* PRB_UL_MU_MIMO_5LAYER +6* PRB_UL_MU_MIMO_6LAYER +7* PRB_UL_MU_MIMO_7LAYER +8* PRB_UL_MU_MIMO_8LAYER)/Sum(PRB_UL_SU_MIMO_1LAYER +PRB_UL_SU_MIMO_2LAYER +PRB_UL_MU_MIMO_2LAYER +PRB_UL_MU_MIMO_3LAYER +PRB_UL_MU_MIMO_4LAYER +PRB_UL_MU_MIMO_5LAYER +PRB_UL_MU_MIMO_6LAYER +PRB_UL_MU_MIMO_7LAYER +PRB_UL_MU_MIMO_8LAYER))
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the average value of scheduled MIMO layers per PRB in the UL

KPI.name: 5G Average number of co-scheduled UEs in UL per data slot
KPI.lformula: Avg num co-scheduled UE UL = Num of co-scheduled UEs UL / Num of PUSCH slots
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the average number of co-scheduled UEs per uplink data slots.

KPI.name: 5G Average ratio of co-scheduled UEs to scheduled MU MIMO eligible UEs in UL
KPI.lformula: Num of co-scheduled MU MIMO UEs UL / Num of scheduled MU MIMO eligible UEs UL
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the average ratio of co-scheduled UEs to scheduled MU MIMO eligible UEs in UL

KPI.name: 5G Average ratio of co-scheduled UEs to scheduled MU MIMO eligible UEs in DL
KPI.lformula: Num of co-scheduled MU MIMO UEs DL / Num of scheduled MU MIMO eligible UEs DL
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the average ratio of co-scheduled UEs to scheduled MU MIMO eligible UEs in DL

KPI.name: 5G SA NG based handover preparation success ratio on the source cell
KPI.lformula: NG HO Prep SR = (NG HO Prep succ / NG HO Prep att)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the SA NG based handover preparation success ratio on the source cell.

KPI.name: 5G SA NG based Inter-frequency handover execution attempts on the source cell
KPI.lformula: NG HO Exec att inter-freq
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the SA NG based Inter-frequency handover execution attempts on the source cell.

KPI.name: 5G SA NG based Intra-frequency handover execution attempts on the source cell
KPI.lformula: NG HO Exec att intra-freq
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the SA NG based Intra-frequency handover execution attempts on the source cell.

KPI.name: 5G Average value of scheduled MIMO layers per PRB in the DL
KPI.lformula: 5G Avg value of scheduled MIMO layers per PRB DL =Num of all scheduled layers for all used PRBs /Num of all used PRBs
KPI.nformula: Sum(1* PRB_DL_SU_MIMO_1LAYER +2* (PRB_DL_SU_MIMO_2LAYER + PRB_DL_MU_MIMO_2LAYER) +3* (PRB_DL_SU_MIMO_3LAYER + PRB_DL_MU_MIMO_3LAYER) +4* (PRB_DL_SU_MIMO_4LAYER + PRB_DL_MU_MIMO_4LAYER) + 5* PRB_DL_MU_MIMO_5LAYER + 6* PRB_DL_MU_MIMO_6LAYER + 7*PRB_DL_MU_MIMO_7LAYER + 8* PRB_DL_MU_MIMO_8LAYER +9* PRB_DL_MU_MIMO_9LAYER + 10* PRB_DL_MU_MIMO_10LAYER + 11* PRB_DL_MU_MIMO_11LAYER + 12* PRB_DL_MU_MIMO_12LAYER + 13* PRB_DL_MU_MIMO_13LAYER + 14* PRB_DL_MU_MIMO_14LAYER + 15* PRB_DL_MU_MIMO_15LAYER + 16* PRB_DL_MU_MIMO_16LAYER)/Sum(PRB_DL_SU_MIMO_1LAYER +PRB_DL_SU_MIMO_2LAYER +PRB_DL_SU_MIMO_3LAYER +PRB_DL_SU_MIMO_4LAYER +PRB_DL_MU_MIMO_2LAYER +PRB_DL_MU_MIMO_3LAYER +PRB_DL_MU_MIMO_4LAYER +PRB_DL_MU_MIMO_5LAYER +PRB_DL_MU_MIMO_6LAYER +PRB_DL_MU_MIMO_7LAYER +PRB_DL_MU_MIMO_8LAYER + PRB_DL_MU_MIMO_9LAYER +PRB_DL_MU_MIMO_10LAYER +PRB_DL_MU_MIMO_11LAYER +PRB_DL_MU_MIMO_12LAYER +PRB_DL_MU_MIMO_13LAYER +PRB_DL_MU_MIMO_14LAYER +PRB_DL_MU_MIMO_15LAYER +PRB_DL_MU_MIMO_16LAYER)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the average value of scheduled MIMO layers per PRB in the DL

KPI.name: 5G SA NG based intra-frequency handover execution success ratio on the source cell
KPI.lformula: NG IAF HO Exec SR = (NG IAF HO Exec succ / NG IAF HO Exec att)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the SA NG based intra-frequency handover execution success ratio on the source cell.

KPI.name: 5G SA mean time of requested handover execution attempts for NG based handover on source cell
KPI.lformula: NG HO Exec avg time
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the mean time of requested handover execution attempts for NG based handover on source cell.

KPI.name: 5G SA max time of requested handover execution attempts for NG based handover on source cell
KPI.lformula: NG HO Exec max time
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the max time of requested handover execution attempts for NG based handover on source cell.

KPI.name: 5G SA NG based intra-frequency handover complete success ratio on the source cell
KPI.lformula: NG IAF HO Exec SR = (NG IAF HO Exec succ / NG IAF HO Prep att)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the SA NG based intra-frequency handover complete success ratio on the source cell.

KPI.name: 5G SA NG based handover preparation failure ratio on the target cell due to insufficient UE capabilities
KPI.lformula: NG HO Prep FR on target = (NG HO Prep fail cause / NG HO Prep att)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the SA NG based handover preparation failure ratio on the target cell due to insufficient UE capabilities.

KPI.name: 5G SA NG based intra-frequency handover preparation attempts on the source cell per BTS per PLMN per SLICE
KPI.lformula: NG IAF HO Prep att
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the SA NG based intra-frequency handover preparation attempts on the source cell per BTS per PLMN per SLICE.

KPI.name: 5G SA NG based intra-frequency handover preparation success ratio on the source cell per BTS per PLMN per SLICE
KPI.lformula: NG IAF HO Prep SR = (NG IAF HO Exec att / NG IAF HO Prep att)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the SA NG based intra-frequency handover preparation success ratio on the source cell per BTS per PLMN per SLICE.

KPI.name: 5G SA NG based intra-frequency handover execution success ratio on the source cell per BTS per PLMN per SLICE
KPI.lformula: NG IAF HO Exec SR = (NG IAF HO Exec succ / NG IAF HO Exec att)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the SA NG based intra-frequency handover execution success ratio on the source cell per BTS per PLMN per SLICE.

KPI.name: 5G SA SCell admission success ratio for SCell(s) in PCell (CU level)
KPI.lformula: 5G SA SCell admission SR in PCell (CU) = 100 * (successful SCell admission requests in PCell (CU)) / (SCell admission requests in PCell (CU))
KPI.nformula: (100*Sum(GNB_SCELL_1_ADMI_SUCC_SA + GNB_SCELL_2_ADMI_SUCC_SA + GNB_SCELL_3_ADMI_SUCC_SA + GNB_SCELL_4_ADMI_SUCC_SA + GNB_SCELL_5_ADMI_SUCC_SA + GNB_SCELL_6_ADMI_SUCC_SA + GNB_SCELL_7_ADMI_SUCC_SA)/Sum(GNB_SCELL_1_ADMI_REQ_SA + GNB_SCELL_2_ADMI_REQ_SA + GNB_SCELL_3_ADMI_REQ_SA + GNB_SCELL_4_ADMI_REQ_SA + GNB_SCELL_5_ADMI_REQ_SA + GNB_SCELL_6_ADMI_REQ_SA + GNB_SCELL_7_ADMI_REQ_SA))
KPI.desc: This KPI provides success ratio of SCell admission (CU level) in PCell SA. Incremented in PCell.

KPI.name: 5G SA SCell admission success ratio for SCell(s) in PCell (DU level)
KPI.lformula: 5G SA SCell admission SR in PCell (DU) = 100 * (successful SCell admission requests in PCell (DU)) / (SCell admission requests in PCell (DU))
KPI.nformula: (100*Sum(GNB_DU_SCELL_1_ADMI_SUCC_SA + GNB_DU_SCELL_2_ADMI_SUCC_SA + GNB_DU_SCELL_3_ADMI_SUCC_SA + GNB_DU_SCELL_4_ADMI_SUCC_SA + GNB_DU_SCELL_5_ADMI_SUCC_SA + GNB_DU_SCELL_6_ADMI_SUCC_SA + GNB_DU_SCELL_7_ADMI_SUCC_SA)/Sum(GNB_DU_SCELL_1_ADMI_REQ_SA + GNB_DU_SCELL_2_ADMI_REQ_SA + GNB_DU_SCELL_3_ADMI_REQ_SA + GNB_DU_SCELL_4_ADMI_REQ_SA + GNB_DU_SCELL_5_ADMI_REQ_SA + GNB_DU_SCELL_6_ADMI_REQ_SA + GNB_DU_SCELL_7_ADMI_REQ_SA))
KPI.desc: This KPI provides success ratio of SCell admission (DU level) in PCell SA. Incremented in PCell.

KPI.name: 5G SA Average Number of PCell UEs with Configured three SCells in DL
KPI.lformula: Avg PCell UE 3 SCell Conf DL = (Cumulative number of PCell CA UEs with three configured SCell in DL) / (number of samples)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the average number of PCell UEs with Configured three SCells in DL.

KPI.name: 5G SA CA SCell Addition Success Ratio for 1 SCell in DL in PCell
KPI.lformula: SA CA SCell Addition SR 1 SCell = 100*(SA CA SCell Addition successes 1 SCell) / (SA CA SCell Addition attempts 1 SCell)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the SA Carrier Aggregation (CA) SCell Addition Success Ratio for 1 SCell in DL, measured by request and acknowledge messages sent over RRC protocol in PCell.

KPI.name: 5G SA CA SCell Addition attempts for 1 SCell in DL in PCell
KPI.lformula: SA CA SCell Addition attempts 1 SCell = (SA CA SCell Addition attempts 1 SCell)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the SA Carrier Aggregation (CA) SCell Addition attempts for 1 SCell in DL, measured by request messages sent over RRC protocol in PCell.

KPI.name: 5G SA CA SCell Addition Success Ratio for 2 SCell in DL in PCell
KPI.lformula: SA CA SCell Addition SR 2 SCell = 100*(SA CA SCell Addition successes 2 SCells) / (SA CA SCell Addition attempts 2 SCells)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the SA Carrier Aggregation (CA) SCell Addition Success Ratio for 2 SCell in DL, measured by request and acknowledge messages sent over RRC protocol in PCell.

KPI.name: 5G SA CA SCell Addition attempts for 2 SCell in DL in PCell
KPI.lformula: SA CA SCell Addition attempts 2 SCells = (SA CA SCell Addition attempts 2 SCells)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the SA Carrier Aggregation (CA) SCell Addition attempts for 2 SCell in DL, measured by request messages sent over RRC protocol in PCell.

KPI.name: 5G SA CA SCell Addition Success Ratio for 3 SCell in DL in PCell
KPI.lformula: SA CA SCell Addition SR 3 SCell = 100*(SA CA SCell Addition successes 3 SCells) / (SA CA SCell Addition attempts 3 SCells)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the SA Carrier Aggregation (CA) SCell Addition Success Ratio for 3 SCell in DL, measured by request and acknowledge messages sent over RRC protocol in PCell.

KPI.name: 5G SA CA SCell Addition attempts for 3 SCell in DL in PCell
KPI.lformula: SA CA SCell Addition attempts 3 SCells = (SA CA SCell Addition attempts 3 SCells)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the SA Carrier Aggregation (CA) SCell Addition attempts for 3 SCell in DL, measured by request messages sent over RRC protocol in PCell.

KPI.name: 5G SA Total number of RRC connection establishment attempts per DU
KPI.lformula: Tot RRC conn att (msg3) DU
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the total number of RRC connection establishment attempts regardless of the cause for SA per cell at DU side

KPI.name: 5G SA Number of RRC re-establishment requests per DU
KPI.lformula: Num RRC reestab att DU
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the total number of RRC Reestablishment attempts regardless of the cause for SA per cell at DU side.

KPI.name: 5G SA RRC re-establishment Success Ratio per DU
KPI.lformula: RRC conn reestab SR DU = 100 * (Tot num conn reestab succ DU) / (Tot num conn reestab att DU)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the success ratio of RRC connection re-establishment procedure, regardless of the cause for SA per cell at DU side.

KPI.name: 5G Average utilization of PDSCH PRBs per cell per slice
KPI.lformula: Avg util ratio PDSCH PRBs per cell per slice = 100 * (Num used PDSCH PRBs per cell per slice) / (Num of avail PDSCH PRBs for slice-aware traffic per cell)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the average utilization of available for slice-aware traffic PRBs on PDSCH per cell per slice.

KPI.name: 5G NSA Average utilization of PDSCH PRBs per PLMN
KPI.lformula: Avg util ratio PDSCH PRBs per PLMN = 100 * (Num used PDSCH PRBs per PLMN) / (Num of avail PDSCH PRBs per PLMN)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the average utilization of PDSCH PRBs per PLMN.

KPI.name: 5G Maximum utilization ratio of PDSCH PRBs per cell per slice
KPI.lformula: Max util ratio PDSCH PRBs per cell per slice
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the maximum utilization ratio of PDSCH PRBs per cell per slice.

KPI.name: 5G SA Average number of UEs configured for overheating reporting
KPI.lformula: Avg num UEs OAI conf = (Acc num of UEs OAI conf / Num of samples) * Number of NRCells
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the average number of UEs configured to provide Overheating Assistance Information for SA.

KPI.name: 5G SA Maximum number of UEs configured for overheating reporting
KPI.lformula: Max num UEs OAI conf
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the maximum number of UEs configured to provide Overheating Assistance Information for SA.

KPI.name: 5G SA successful radio admissions for SCell addition having at least one SCell with small bandwidth part (BWP).
KPI.lformula: Succ radio admissions for SCell Addition with 1+ SCell with small BWP
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the SA successful radio admissions for SCell addition having at least one SCell with small bandwidth part (BWP).

KPI.name: 5G SA successful radio admissions for SCell addition having at least one SCell with large bandwidth part (BWP).
KPI.lformula: Succ radio admissions for SCell Addition with 1+ SCell with large BWP
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the SA successful radio admissions for SCell addition having at least one SCell with large bandwidth part (BWP).

KPI.name: 5G SA NG based inter-frequency handover execution success ratio on the source cell
KPI.lformula: NG IEF HO Exec SR = (NG IEF HO Exec succ / NG IEF HO Exec att)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the SA NG based inter-frequency handover execution success ratio on the source cell.

KPI.name: 5G SA NG based inter-frequency handover complete success ratio on the source cell
KPI.lformula: NG IEF HO Exec SR = (NG IEF HO Exec succ / NG IEF HO Prep att)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the SA NG based inter-frequency handover complete success ratio on the source cell.

KPI.name: 5G SA NG based inter-frequency handover preparation attempts on the source cell per BTS per PLMN per SLICE
KPI.lformula: NG IEF HO Prep att
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the SA NG based inter-frequency handover preparation attempts on the source cell per BTS per PLMN per SLICE.

KPI.name: 5G SA NG based inter-frequency handover preparation success ratio on the source cell per BTS per PLMN per SLICE
KPI.lformula: NG IEF HO Prep SR = (NG IEF HO Exec att / NG IEF HO Prep att)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the SA NG based inter-frequency handover preparation success ratio on the source cell per BTS per PLMN per SLICE.

KPI.name: 5G SA NG based inter-frequency handover execution success ratio on the source cell per BTS per PLMN per SLICE
KPI.lformula: NG IEF HO Exec SR = (NG IEF HO Exec succ / NG IEF HO Exec att)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the SA NG based inter-frequency handover execution success ratio on the source cell per BTS per PLMN per SLICE.

KPI.name: 5G SA NG based handover preparation failure ratio on the source cell
KPI.lformula: NG HO Prep FR = (NG HO Prep fail cause / NG HO Prep att)
KPI.nformula: 100 * Sum(NG_HO_PREP_FAIL_RRL_SRC + NG_HO_PREP_FAIL_BNS_SRC + NG_HO_PREP_FAIL_CNA_SRC + NG_HO_FAIL_REVD_INSUF_UE_CAP + NG_HO_PREP_FAIL_OTH_SRC + NG_HO_PREP_CNC_SRC) / Sum(NG_HO_PREP_ATT_SRC_IAF + NG_HO_PREP_ATT_SRC_IEF)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the SA NG based handover preparation failure ratio on the source cell due multiple different reasons, including cancellation and timer expiry.

KPI.name: 5G SA NG based intra-frequency handover preparation success ratio on the source cell
KPI.lformula: NG IAF HO Prep SR = (NG IAF HO Exec att / NG IAF HO Prep att)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the SA NG based intra-frequency handover preparation success ratio on the source cell. In addition to NR_5509a, this KPI includes also issues between reception of Handover Command message and sending of RRC Reconfiguration over radio interface.

KPI.name: 5G SA NG based inter-frequency handover preparation success ratio on the source cell
KPI.lformula: NG IEF HO Prep SR = (NG IEF HO Exec att / NG IEF HO Prep att)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the SA NG based inter-frequency handover preparation success ratio on the source cell. In addition to NR_5509a, this KPI includes also issues between reception of Handover Command message and sending of RRC Reconfiguration over radio interface.

KPI.name: 5G NSA E-RAB Release ratio due to Pre-emption
KPI.lformula: NSA ERAB Rel ratio Preemption = ((Number of NSA ERABs Releases initiated by SgNB due to preemption)/(Total number of E-RAB release attempts)) *100
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the ratio of the number of released E-RABs (SCG split bearers) initiated by SgNB due to Pre-emption to total number of E-RAB release attempts (SgNB and MeNB initiated).

KPI.name: 5G NSA Ratio of SgNB releases initiated by SgNB due to Pre-emption
KPI.lformula: SgNB rel R Preemption = 100 * SgNB releases initiated by SgNB due to Pre-emption / (All releases, exclu X2 reset - releases before RACH)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the ratio of SgNB releases initiated by SgNB due to Pre-emption, among all releases excluding X2 reset.RLF_INITIATED_UE_RACH_FAIL and RLF_INITIATED_UE_SCG_CHGE_FAIL are excluded as they happen before RACH success.

KPI.name: 5G SA gNB-initiated release ratio due to Pre-emption
KPI.lformula: SA Norm gNB init rel R = 100 * (Release Request due to pre-emption and pre-emption with redirection) / (Rel Request sent)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the ratio of releases due to pre-emption and pre-emption with redirection, initiated by gNB compared to all releases, for SA access.

KPI.name: 5G SA QoS Flow Release due to 'RNL Release due to pre-emption' and due to Pre-emption with 'Redirection' causes Initiated by gNB
KPI.lformula: SA QoS flow RNL Pre-emption = ((number of released QoS flow attempts due to 'RNL Release due to pre-emption' and due to Pre-emption with 'RNL Redirection' causes initiated by gNB)/(Total number of QoS release attempts)) *100
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the ratio of the number of released QoS flow (5QI flows) attempts due to 'RNL Release due to pre-emption' and due to Pre-emption with 'Redirection' causes initiated by gNB to total number of QoS flow release attempts (gNB and AMF initiated).

KPI.name: 5G SA QoS Flow Release (5QI 1 QoS Flow) due to 'RNL Release due to pre-emption' and due to Pre-emption with 'Redirection' causes Initiated by gNB
KPI.lformula: SA QoS flow RNL Pre-emption = ((number of released QoS flow attempts due to 'RNL Release due to pre-emption' and due to Pre-emption with 'RNL Redirection' causes initiated by gNB)/(Total number of QoS release attempts)) *100
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the ratio of the number of released QoS flow (5QI 1 QoS Flow) attempts due to 'RNL Release due to pre-emption' and due to Pre-emption with 'Redirection' causes initiated by gNB to total number of QoS flow release attempts (gNB and AMF initiated).

KPI.name: 5G E2 interface setup requests
KPI.lformula: E2 int setup req msgs
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the number of E2 interface setup requests sent by gNB-CU.

KPI.name: 5G Success Ratio of E2 interface setup
KPI.lformula: E2 int setup SR = 100 * Num of E2 setup resp msgs / Num of E2 setup req msgs
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the success ratio of E2 interface establishment procedure.

KPI.name: 5G RIC Service Update Attempts
KPI.lformula: 5G RIC Srvc Updt Att = Num of sent RIC Srvc Updt msgs
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the number of RIC Service Update messages sent by gNB.

KPI.name: 5G Success Ratio of RIC Service Update
KPI.lformula: 5G RIC Srvc Updt SR = 100 * Num of sent RIC Srvc Updt Ack msgs / Num of sent RIC Srvc Updt msgs
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the Success Ratio of RIC Service Update procedure.

KPI.name: 5G RIC Subscription Requests with IMLB RAN Function
KPI.lformula: Num of RIC Subscr Req msgs IMLB RAN Funct
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the number of RIC Subscription Request messages received by gNB with Idle Mode Load Balancing RAN Function.

KPI.name: 5G Success Ratio of RIC Subscription with IMLB RAN Function
KPI.lformula: 5G RIC Subscr SR IMLB RAN Funct = Num of RIC Subscr Resp msgs IMLB RAN Funct / Num of RIC Subscr Req msgs IMLB RAN Funct
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the Success Ratio of RIC Subscription procedure for Idle Mode Load Balancing RAN Function.

KPI.name: 5G Failure Ratio of RIC Subscription with IMLB RAN Function
KPI.lformula: 5G RIC Subscr FR IMLB RAN Funct = Num of RIC Subscr Fail IMLB RAN Funct / Num of RIC Subscr Req msgs IMLB RAN Funct
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the Failure Ratio of RIC Subscription procedure for Idle Mode Load Balancing RAN Function. It is the ratio of RIC Subscription Failure messages, compared to the total number of RIC Subscription Request messages.

KPI.name: 5G RIC Subscription Deletion Requests with IMLB RAN Function
KPI.lformula: Num of RIC Subscr Del Req msgs IMLB RAN Funct
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the number of RIC Subscription Deletion Request messages received by gNB with Idle Mode Load Balancing RAN Function.

KPI.name: 5G Success Ratio of RIC Subscription Deletion with IMLB RAN Function
KPI.lformula: 5G RIC Subscr Del SR IMLB RAN Funct = Num of RIC Subscr Del Resp msgs IMLB RAN Funct / Num of RIC Subscr Del Req msgs IMLB RAN Funct
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the Success Ratio of RIC Subscription Deletion procedure for Idle Mode Load Balancing RAN Function.

KPI.name: 5G RIC Subscription Requests with CA RAN Function
KPI.lformula: Num of RIC Subscr Req msgs CA RAN Funct
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the number of RIC Subscription Request messages received by gNB with Carrier Aggregation RAN Function.

KPI.name: 5G Success Ratio of RIC Subscription with CA RAN Function
KPI.lformula: 5G RIC Subscr SR CA RAN Funct = Num of RIC Subscr Resp msgs CA RAN Funct / Num of RIC Subscr Req msgs CA RAN Funct
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the Success Ratio of RIC Subscription procedure for Carrier Aggregation RAN Function.

KPI.name: 5G Failure Ratio of RIC Subscription with CA RAN Function
KPI.lformula: 5G RIC Subscr FR CA RAN Funct = Num of RIC Subscr Fail CA RAN Funct / Num of RIC Subscr Req msgs CA RAN Funct
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the Failure Ratio of RIC Subscription procedure for Carrier Aggregation RAN Function. It is the ratio of RIC Subscription Failure messages, compared to the total number of RIC Subscription Request messages.

KPI.name: 5G RIC Subscription Deletion Requests with CA RAN Function
KPI.lformula: Num of RIC Subscr Del Req msgs CA RAN Funct
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the number of RIC Subscription Deletion Request messages received by gNB with Carrier Aggregation RAN Function.

KPI.name: 5G Success Ratio of RIC Subscription Deletion with CA RAN Function
KPI.lformula: 5G RIC Subscr Del SR CA RAN Funct = Num of RIC Subscr Del Resp msgs CA RAN Funct / Num of RIC Subscr Del Req msgs CA RAN Funct
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the Success Ratio of RIC Subscription Deletion procedure for Carrier Aggregation RAN Function.

KPI.name: 5G EUTRA-CGI report Configuration Success Ratio for an unknown PCI
KPI.lformula: EUTRA-CGI rep conf SR unknown PCI = 100 * ((Number of RRC Measurement report with EUTRA-CGI received by gNB-CU)/(Number of RRC Reconfiguration with report EUTRA-CGI configuration messages sent))
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the EUTRA CGI report configuration Success Ratio for an unknown PCI, which is given as received measurement report with EUTRA-CGI to previously sent measurement configuration (RRC Reconfiguration message) for this purpose.

KPI.name: 5G Number of EUTRA neighbor relations NRRELE added by Inter-RAT ANR per cell
KPI.lformula: Number of NRRELE added by INTER-RAT ANR per cell
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the number of EUTRA neighbor relations (NRRELE) added by Inter-RAT ANR per cell. A new neighbor is added after first handover procedure is successfully completed.

KPI.name: 5G Number of EUTRA neighbor relation managed objects NRRELE that are not able to be created in a plan by Inter-RAT ANR due to configured limit for the given carrier in a cell
KPI.lformula: Number of NRRELE not added by Inter-RAT ANR per cell due to configuration limit
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the number of EUTRA neighbor relation managed objects (NRRELE) that are not able to be created in a plan by Inter-RAT ANR due to configured limit for the given carrier in a cell.

KPI.name: 5G Inter-RAT ANR Neighbor Relation Addition Success Ratio
KPI.lformula: NRRELE addn SR Inter-RAT ANR = 100 * ((Number of EUTRA Neighbor Relations added by Inter-RAT ANR for NRCELL)/ (Number of RRC Measurement report with EUTRA-CGI received by gNB-CU))
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the ratio of the number of EUTRA neighbor relations (NRRELE) added by Inter-RAT ANR, to the number of received measurement reports with EUTRA-CGI resolution for unknown cell.A new neighbor is added after first handover procedure is successfully completed.

KPI.name: 5G Maximum utilization ratio of PDSCH PRBs used for NSA traffic per cell per PLMN
KPI.lformula: Max util ratio PDSCH PRBs used for NSA traffic per cell per PLMN
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the maximum utilization ratio of PDSCH PRBs used for NSA traffic per cell per PLMN

KPI.name: 5G Intra-NR ANR Neighbor Relation Addition Success Ratio
KPI.lformula: NRREL addn SR Intra-NR ANR = ((Number of neighbor relations added by ANR for NRCELL)/ (Number of RRC Measurement reports with NR-CGI received by gNB-CU)) *100
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the ratio of the number of neighbor relations (NRREL) added by for Intra-NR ANR, to the number of received measurement reports with NR-CGI resolution for unknown cell.A new neighbor is added after first handover procedure is successfully completed.

KPI.name: 5G SA 5QI-1 QoS flow setup success ratio excluding fallback
KPI.lformula: SA 5QI1 QoS fl stp SR excl fallb = 100 * (5QI1 QoS flow successful setups) / (5QI1 QoS flow setup attempts - 5QI1 QoS flow setup attempts that initiated a fallback)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the success ratio for 5QI-1 QoS flow setup, excluding the cases when fallback procedure is initiated. Formula excludes fallback cases to exclude impact of UEs not supporting VoNR and UEs not configured for VoNR.

KPI.name: 5G SA Number of 5QI-1 QoS flow setup attempts excluding fallback
KPI.lformula: SA 5QI1 QoS fl stp att excl fallb = (5QI1 QoS flow setup attempts - 5QI1 QoS flow setup attempts that initiated a fallback)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the number of setup attempts for 5QI-1 QoS flows, excluding the cases when fallback procedure is initiated. Formula excludes fallback cases to exclude impact of UEs not supporting VoNR and UEs not configured for VoNR.

KPI.name: 5G SA Maximum time of successful PDU Session Resource establishment procedure
KPI.lformula: 5G Max time PDU Session Resource = (max time of PDU Session Resource establishment procedure)
KPI.desc: This KPI describes the maximum time of successful PDU Session Resource establishment during the measurement time period. It is measured only when new QoS Flows are being setup via Setup or Modify procedures.

KPI.name: 5G SA Average time of successful PDU Session Resource establishment procedure
KPI.lformula: 5G Avg time PDU Session Resource = (Avg time of PDU Session Resource establishment procedure)
KPI.desc: This KPI describes the Average time of successful PDU Session Resource establishment during the measurement time period. It is measured only when new QoS Flows are being setup via Setup or Modify procedures.

KPI.name: 5G SA Maximum time of successful Initial Context Setup procedure
KPI.lformula: 5G Max time ICS = (max time of Initial Context Setup procedure)
KPI.desc: This KPI describes the maximum time of successful Initial Context Setup (ICS) procedure during the measurement time period.

KPI.name: 5G SA Average time of successful Initial Context Setup procedure
KPI.lformula: 5G Avg time ICS = (Avg time of Initial Context Setup procedure)
KPI.desc: This KPI describes the Average time of successful Initial Context Setup (ICS) procedure during the measurement time period.

KPI.name: 5G SA Segmentation of UE radio capability information Success Ratio
KPI.lformula: 5G Segmentation UE capability SR = 100*(successful segmentations / all attempted segmentations)
KPI.desc: This KPI describes how successful the segmentation of UE Capability Information is over RRC protocol. The procedure is only successful when all segments have been received by the gNB for a given UE. If even one segment is missing the procedure is considered as failed.

KPI.name: 5G SA SCell Swap Success Ratio in PCell
KPI.lformula: 100 * SCell Swap success / SCell Swap attempt
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the SA SCell Swap Success Ratio, counted in the PCell.

KPI.name: 5G SA SCell Swap Attempts in PCell
KPI.lformula: SCell Swap attempt
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the SA SCell Swap Attempts, counted in the PCell.

KPI.name: 5G SA Maximum number of segments for UE Capability Information
KPI.lformula: 5G Max Segments UE capability = (max num of segments for UE Capability Information)
KPI.desc: This KPI describes the maximum number of segments used for UE Capability Information over RRC protocol during the measurement time period.

KPI.name: 5G SA Average number of segments for UE Capability Information
KPI.lformula: 5G Avg Segments UE capability = (avg num of segments for UE Capability Information)
KPI.desc: This KPI describes the Average number of segments used for UE Capability Information over RRC protocol during the measurement time period.

KPI.name: 5G Average number of MU-MIMO eligible UEs per DL PRB
KPI.lformula: ((number of MU MIMO eligible non-paired DL PRBs) + (n*number of MU MIMO eligible n-paired DL PRBs)) / (sum of MU MIMO eligible non-paired and paired DL PRBs)
KPI.nformula: Sum(1* PRB_DL_MU_MIMO_NOPAIR_UE + 2* PRB_DL_MU_MIMO_2PAIR_UE+ 3* PRB_DL_MU_MIMO_3PAIR_UE+ 4* PRB_DL_MU_MIMO_4PAIR_UE+ 5* PRB_DL_MU_MIMO_5PAIR_UE+ 6* PRB_DL_MU_MIMO_6PAIR_UE+ 7* PRB_DL_MU_MIMO_7PAIR_UE+ 8* PRB_DL_MU_MIMO_8PAIR_UE) / Sum(PRB_DL_MU_MIMO_NOPAIR_UE + PRB_DL_MU_MIMO_2PAIR_UE + PRB_DL_MU_MIMO_3PAIR_UE + PRB_DL_MU_MIMO_4PAIR_UE+ PRB_DL_MU_MIMO_5PAIR_UE+ PRB_DL_MU_MIMO_6PAIR_UE+ PRB_DL_MU_MIMO_7PAIR_UE+ PRB_DL_MU_MIMO_8PAIR_UE)
KPI.desc: This KPI calculates the average number of MU-MIMO eligible UEs per DL PRB. It is measured by a number of scheduled DL PRBs with and without paired MU-MIMO users and multiplied by a normalization factor depending on the paired user number in respective PRB. This KPI shall take values between 1 and 8 if MU-MIMO feature is active and there are eligible MU-MIMO users.

KPI.name: 5G DRX sleep time ratio
KPI.lformula: DRX sleep R = 100* (Number of slots when UE is in DRX sleep time)/ ((Number of slots when UE is in DRX sleep time) + (Number of slots when UE is in DRX active time))
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the ratio of slots in which the UE was in DRX Sleep Mode.

KPI.name: 5G Ratio of time NR cell being in the reduced TX power saving mode to NR cell availability time
KPI.lformula: Percentage of time NR cell reduced TX power saving mode state = 100 * (Time when the cell is in reduced TX power saving mode) / (NR cell availability time)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows percentage of time when the cell's 'Energy State is reducedEnergySaving or switchingOnTX'.

KPI.name: 5G SA Average duration of QoS Flow suspension time
KPI.lformula: Avg duration of QoS Flow suspension time = (Cumulative QoS Flow suspension time) / (Number of successful QoS Flows resumes related to UE transition from RRC_INACTIVE to RRC_CONNECTED + Number of suspended QoS Flows releases)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the average duration of QoS Flow suspension time. Suspension time of a QoS Flow is measured from suspend to resume or release to idle from radio cell perspective.Note: QoS Flow is suspended, when it belongs to inactive UE context (UE is in RRC_INACTIVE state).

KPI.name: 5G Average UE distance in RACH setup
KPI.lformula: 5G avg UE distance RACH stp
KPI.nformula: If Bins for the TA counters are based on SCS(EXP_CELL_SIZE_CFG= 99):Case: SCS=15kHz, 78,0709526 SCS=30kHz, 39,0354763 SCS=60kHz, 19,51773815 SCS=120kHz, 9,758869076 SCS=240kHz, 4,879434538 *Sum(4*TA_RACH_RESP_BIN_01+12*TA_RACH_RESP_BIN_02+20*TA_RACH_RESP_BIN_03+28*TA_RACH_RESP_BIN_04+36*TA_RACH_RESP_BIN_05+44*TA_RACH_RESP_BIN_06+52*TA_RACH_RESP_BIN_07+60*TA_RACH_RESP_BIN_08+68*TA_RACH_RESP_BIN_09+76*TA_RACH_RESP_BIN_10+84*TA_RACH_RESP_BIN_11+92*TA_RACH_RESP_BIN_12+100*TA_RACH_RESP_BIN_13+108*TA_RACH_RESP_BIN_14+116*TA_RACH_RESP_BIN_15+124*TA_RACH_RESP_BIN_16+132*TA_RACH_RESP_BIN_17+140*TA_RACH_RESP_BIN_18+148*TA_RACH_RESP_BIN_19+156*TA_RACH_RESP_BIN_20+164*TA_RACH_RESP_BIN_21+172*TA_RACH_RESP_BIN_22+180*TA_RACH_RESP_BIN_23+188*TA_RACH_RESP_BIN_24+196*TA_RACH_RESP_BIN_25+204*TA_RACH_RESP_BIN_26+212*TA_RACH_RESP_BIN_27+220*TA_RACH_RESP_BIN_28+228*TA_RACH_RESP_BIN_29+236*TA_RACH_RESP_BIN_30+244*TA_RACH_RESP_BIN_31+248*TA_RACH_RESP_BIN_32)/Sum(TA_RACH_RESP_BIN_01+TA_RACH_RESP_BIN_02+TA_RACH_RESP_BIN_03+TA_RACH_RESP_BIN_04+TA_RACH_RESP_BIN_05+TA_RACH_RESP_BIN_06+TA_RACH_RESP_BIN_07+TA_RACH_RESP_BIN_08+TA_RACH_RESP_BIN_09+TA_RACH_RESP_BIN_10+TA_RACH_RESP_BIN_11+TA_RACH_RESP_BIN_12+TA_RACH_RESP_BIN_13+TA_RACH_RESP_BIN_14+TA_RACH_RESP_BIN_15+TA_RACH_RESP_BIN_16+TA_RACH_RESP_BIN_17+TA_RACH_RESP_BIN_18+TA_RACH_RESP_BIN_19+TA_RACH_RESP_BIN_20+TA_RACH_RESP_BIN_21+TA_RACH_RESP_BIN_22+TA_RACH_RESP_BIN_23+TA_RACH_RESP_BIN_24+TA_RACH_RESP_BIN_25+TA_RACH_RESP_BIN_26+TA_RACH_RESP_BIN_27+TA_RACH_RESP_BIN_28+TA_RACH_RESP_BIN_29+TA_RACH_RESP_BIN_30+TA_RACH_RESP_BIN_31+TA_RACH_RESP_BIN_32)Else (Bins for the TA counters are based on expectedCellSize) :Case: EXP_CELL_SIZE_CFG= 1, 1EXP_CELL_SIZE_CFG= 2, 2EXP_CELL_SIZE_CFG= 3, 4EXP_CELL_SIZE_CFG= 4, 6EXP_CELL_SIZE_CFG= 5, 12EXP_CELL_SIZE_CFG= 6, 24EXP_CELL_SIZE_CFG= 7, 40*Sum(39.04*TA_RACH_RESP_BIN_01+117.11*TA_RACH_RESP_BIN_02+195.18*TA_RACH_RESP_BIN_03+273.25*TA_RACH_RESP_BIN_04+351.32*TA_RACH_RESP_BIN_05+429.39*TA_RACH_RESP_BIN_06+507.46*TA_RACH_RESP_BIN_07+585.53*TA_RACH_RESP_BIN_08+663.6*TA_RACH_RESP_BIN_09+741.67*TA_RACH_RESP_BIN_10+819.75*TA_RACH_RESP_BIN_11+897.82*TA_RACH_RESP_BIN_12+975.89*TA_RACH_RESP_BIN_13+1053.96*TA_RACH_RESP_BIN_14+1132.03*TA_RACH_RESP_BIN_15+1210.1*TA_RACH_RESP_BIN_16+1288.17*TA_RACH_RESP_BIN_17+1366.24*TA_RACH_RESP_BIN_18+1444.31*TA_RACH_RESP_BIN_19+1522.38*TA_RACH_RESP_BIN_20+1600.45*TA_RACH_RESP_BIN_21+1678.53*TA_RACH_RESP_BIN_22+1756.6*TA_RACH_RESP_BIN_23+1834.67*TA_RACH_RESP_BIN_24+1912.74*TA_RACH_RESP_BIN_25+1990.81*TA_RACH_RESP_BIN_26+2068.88*TA_RACH_RESP_BIN_27+2146.95*TA_RACH_RESP_BIN_28+2225.02*TA_RACH_RESP_BIN_29+2303.09*TA_RACH_RESP_BIN_30+2381.16*TA_RACH_RESP_BIN_31+2420.2*TA_RACH_RESP_BIN_32)/Sum(TA_RACH_RESP_BIN_01+TA_RACH_RESP_BIN_02+TA_RACH_RESP_BIN_03+TA_RACH_RESP_BIN_04+TA_RACH_RESP_BIN_05+TA_RACH_RESP_BIN_06+TA_RACH_RESP_BIN_07+TA_RACH_RESP_BIN_08+TA_RACH_RESP_BIN_09+TA_RACH_RESP_BIN_10+TA_RACH_RESP_BIN_11+TA_RACH_RESP_BIN_12+TA_RACH_RESP_BIN_13+TA_RACH_RESP_BIN_14+TA_RACH_RESP_BIN_15+TA_RACH_RESP_BIN_16+TA_RACH_RESP_BIN_17+TA_RACH_RESP_BIN_18+TA_RACH_RESP_BIN_19+TA_RACH_RESP_BIN_20+TA_RACH_RESP_BIN_21+TA_RACH_RESP_BIN_22+TA_RACH_RESP_BIN_23+TA_RACH_RESP_BIN_24+TA_RACH_RESP_BIN_25+TA_RACH_RESP_BIN_26+TA_RACH_RESP_BIN_27+TA_RACH_RESP_BIN_28+TA_RACH_RESP_BIN_29+TA_RACH_RESP_BIN_30+TA_RACH_RESP_BIN_31+TA_RACH_RESP_BIN_32)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the average UE distance measured in Random Access procedure. The KPI value depends on NRPMCCP.cfgTAcounters, NRCELL.expectedCellSize and NRCELLGRP.scs.This KPI is supposed to cover both SCS based & expectedCellSize configuration for TA Bin counter calculation.

KPI.name: 5G Average UE distance during RRC connected
KPI.lformula: 5G Avg UE distance RRC
KPI.nformula: If Bins for the TA counters are based on SCS(EXP_CELL_SIZE_CFG= 99) :Case: SCS=15kHz, 78,0709526 SCS=30kHz, 39,0354763 SCS=60kHz, 19,51773815 SCS=120kHz, 9,758869076 SCS=240kHz, 4,879434538 *Sum(4*TA_RRC_CON_BIN_01+12*TA_RRC_CON_BIN_02+20*TA_RRC_CON_BIN_03+28*TA_RRC_CON_BIN_04+36*TA_RRC_CON_BIN_05+44*TA_RRC_CON_BIN_06+52*TA_RRC_CON_BIN_07+60*TA_RRC_CON_BIN_08+68*TA_RRC_CON_BIN_09+76*TA_RRC_CON_BIN_10+84*TA_RRC_CON_BIN_11+92*TA_RRC_CON_BIN_12+100*TA_RRC_CON_BIN_13+108*TA_RRC_CON_BIN_14+116*TA_RRC_CON_BIN_15+124*TA_RRC_CON_BIN_16+132*TA_RRC_CON_BIN_17+140*TA_RRC_CON_BIN_18+148*TA_RRC_CON_BIN_19+156*TA_RRC_CON_BIN_20+164*TA_RRC_CON_BIN_21+172*TA_RRC_CON_BIN_22+180*TA_RRC_CON_BIN_23+188*TA_RRC_CON_BIN_24+196*TA_RRC_CON_BIN_25+204*TA_RRC_CON_BIN_26+212*TA_RRC_CON_BIN_27+220*TA_RRC_CON_BIN_28+228*TA_RRC_CON_BIN_29+236*TA_RRC_CON_BIN_30+244*TA_RRC_CON_BIN_31+248*TA_RRC_CON_BIN_32)/Sum(TA_RRC_CON_BIN_01+TA_RRC_CON_BIN_02+TA_RRC_CON_BIN_03+TA_RRC_CON_BIN_04+TA_RRC_CON_BIN_05+TA_RRC_CON_BIN_06+TA_RRC_CON_BIN_07+TA_RRC_CON_BIN_08+TA_RRC_CON_BIN_09+TA_RRC_CON_BIN_10+TA_RRC_CON_BIN_11+TA_RRC_CON_BIN_12+TA_RRC_CON_BIN_13+TA_RRC_CON_BIN_14+TA_RRC_CON_BIN_15+TA_RRC_CON_BIN_16+TA_RRC_CON_BIN_17+TA_RRC_CON_BIN_18+TA_RRC_CON_BIN_19+TA_RRC_CON_BIN_20+TA_RRC_CON_BIN_21+TA_RRC_CON_BIN_22+TA_RRC_CON_BIN_23+TA_RRC_CON_BIN_24+TA_RRC_CON_BIN_25+TA_RRC_CON_BIN_26+TA_RRC_CON_BIN_27+TA_RRC_CON_BIN_28+TA_RRC_CON_BIN_29+TA_RRC_CON_BIN_30+TA_RRC_CON_BIN_31+TA_RRC_CON_BIN_32)Else 6, 24EXP_CELL_SIZE_CFG= 7, 40*Sum(39.04*TA_RRC_CON_BIN_01+117.11*TA_RRC_CON_BIN_02+195.18*TA_RRC_CON_BIN_03+273.25*TA_RRC_CON_BIN_04+351.32*TA_RRC_CON_BIN_05+429.39*TA_RRC_CON_BIN_06+507.46*TA_RRC_CON_BIN_07+585.53*TA_RRC_CON_BIN_08+663.6*TA_RRC_CON_BIN_09+741.67*TA_RRC_CON_BIN_10+819.75*TA_RRC_CON_BIN_11+897.82*TA_RRC_CON_BIN_12+975.89*TA_RRC_CON_BIN_13+1053.96*TA_RRC_CON_BIN_14+1132.03*TA_RRC_CON_BIN_15+1210.1*TA_RRC_CON_BIN_16+1288.17*TA_RRC_CON_BIN_17+1366.24*TA_RRC_CON_BIN_18+1444.31*TA_RRC_CON_BIN_19+1522.38*TA_RRC_CON_BIN_20+1600.45*TA_RRC_CON_BIN_21+1678.53*TA_RRC_CON_BIN_22+1756.6*TA_RRC_CON_BIN_23+1834.67*TA_RRC_CON_BIN_24+1912.74*TA_RRC_CON_BIN_25+1990.81*TA_RRC_CON_BIN_26+2068.88*TA_RRC_CON_BIN_27+2146.95*TA_RRC_CON_BIN_28+2225.02*TA_RRC_CON_BIN_29+2303.09*TA_RRC_CON_BIN_30+2381.16*TA_RRC_CON_BIN_31+2420.2*TA_RRC_CON_BIN_32)/Sum(TA_RRC_CON_BIN_01+TA_RRC_CON_BIN_02+TA_RRC_CON_BIN_03+TA_RRC_CON_BIN_04+TA_RRC_CON_BIN_05+TA_RRC_CON_BIN_06+TA_RRC_CON_BIN_07+TA_RRC_CON_BIN_08+TA_RRC_CON_BIN_09+TA_RRC_CON_BIN_10+TA_RRC_CON_BIN_11+TA_RRC_CON_BIN_12+TA_RRC_CON_BIN_13+TA_RRC_CON_BIN_14+TA_RRC_CON_BIN_15+TA_RRC_CON_BIN_16+TA_RRC_CON_BIN_17+TA_RRC_CON_BIN_18+TA_RRC_CON_BIN_19+TA_RRC_CON_BIN_20+TA_RRC_CON_BIN_21+TA_RRC_CON_BIN_22+TA_RRC_CON_BIN_23+TA_RRC_CON_BIN_24+TA_RRC_CON_BIN_25+TA_RRC_CON_BIN_26+TA_RRC_CON_BIN_27+TA_RRC_CON_BIN_28+TA_RRC_CON_BIN_29+TA_RRC_CON_BIN_30+TA_RRC_CON_BIN_31+TA_RRC_CON_BIN_32)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the average UE distance measured during the RRC connected time. The KPI value depends on NRPMCCP.cfgTAcounters, NRCELL.expectedCellSize and NRCELLGRP.scs.This KPI is supposed to cover both SCS based & expectedCellSize configuration for TA Bin counter calculation.

KPI.name: 5G SA Ratio of SCell activations based on AI/ML activation algorithm to all SCell activations
KPI.lformula: SA AIML SCell activations ratio = 100 * (Num of AIML SCell activations) / (Total num of SCell activations)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the Ratio of SCell activations based on AI/ML activation algorithm to all SCell activations.

KPI.name: 5G SA Inference Success Ratio for Inference engine for AI/ML based SCell activation
KPI.lformula: SA Inference SR for AI/ML SCell activation = 100 * (Num of succ inference responses for AI/ML SCell activation) / Num of inference requests for AI/ML SCell activation)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the 5G SA Inference Success Ratio for Inference Engine for SEs (Spectral Efficiencies) of SCell candidate list for AI/ML based SCell activation.

KPI.name: 5G NSA Mean number of non-GBR bearers with configured NBR in DL
KPI.lformula: 5G NSA Mean number of non-GBR bearers with configured NBR in DL = (Accumulated number of non-GBR bearers with configured NBR in DL) / (Number of DL samples)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows for NSA the mean number of non-GBR bearers with configured NBR in DL.

KPI.name: 5G NSA Mean number of non-GBR bearers with configured NBR in UL
KPI.lformula: 5G NSA Mean number of non-GBR bearers with configured NBR in UL = (Accumulated number of non-GBR bearers with configured NBR in UL) / (Number of UL samples)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows for NSA the mean number of non-GBR bearers with configured NBR in UL.

KPI.name: 5G NSA Non-GBR bearers with configured NBR radio admission Success Ratio in DL
KPI.lformula: 5G NSA Non-GBR bearers with configured NBR radio admission Success Ratio in DL =100 * (Number of non-GBR bearers with configured NBR successfully admitted with applying NBR + Number of non-GBR bearers with configured NBR admitted without applying NBR) /(Number of admission requests for non-GBR bearers with configured NBR)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows for NSA the Success Ratio of radio admission for non-GBR bearers with configured NBR in DL.

KPI.name: 5G NSA Ratio of successfully admitted non-GBR bearers with applied NBR to all admitted non-GBR bearers with configured NBR
KPI.lformula: 5G NSA Ratio of successfully admitted non-GBR bearers with applied NBR to all admitted non-GBR bearers with configured NBR =100 * (Number of non-GBR bearers with configured NBR successfully admitted with applying NBR) /(Number of non-GBR bearers with configured NBR successfully admitted with applying NBR + Number of non-GBR bearers with configured NBR admitted without applying NBR)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows for NSA the ratio of successfully admitted non-GBR bearers with applied NBR to all admitted non-GBR bearers with configured NBR.

KPI.name: 5G SA Mean number of non-GBR bearers with configured NBR in DL
KPI.lformula: 5G SA Mean number of non-GBR bearers with configured NBR in DL = (Accumulated number of non-GBR bearers with configured NBR in DL) / (Number of DL samples)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows for SA the mean number of non-GBR bearers with configured NBR in DL.

KPI.name: 5G SA Mean number of non-GBR bearers with configured NBR in UL
KPI.lformula: 5G SA Mean number of non-GBR bearers with configured NBR in UL = (Accumulated number of non-GBR bearers with configured NBR in UL) / (Number of UL samples)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows for SA the mean number of non-GBR bearers with configured NBR in UL.

KPI.name: 5G SA Non-GBR bearers with configured NBR radio admission Success Ratio in DL
KPI.lformula: 5G SA Non-GBR bearers with configured NBR radio admission Success Ratio in DL =100 * (Number of non-GBR bearers with configured NBR successfully admitted with applying NBR + Number of non-GBR bearers with configured NBR admitted without applying NBR) /(Number of admission requests for non-GBR bearers with configured NBR)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows for SA the Success Ratio of radio admission for non-GBR bearers with configured NBR in DL.

KPI.name: 5G SA Ratio of successfully admitted non-GBR bearers with applied NBR to all admitted non-GBR bearers with configured NBR
KPI.lformula: 5G SA Ratio of successfully admitted non-GBR bearers with applied NBR to all admitted non-GBR bearers with configured NBR =100 * (Number of non-GBR bearers with configured NBR successfully admitted with applying NBR) /(Number of non-GBR bearers with configured NBR successfully admitted with applying NBR + Number of non-GBR bearers with configured NBR admitted without applying NBR)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows for SA the ratio of successfully admitted non-GBR bearers with applied NBR to all admitted non-GBR bearers with configured NBR.

KPI.name: 5G Average number of SA RRC Connected users with 1Rx RedCap in CU
KPI.lformula: 5G Avg number of SA RRC Conn 1Rx RedCap users = (Number of RRC Connected 1Rx RedCap users accumulated from all samples) / (Number of samples)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the number of SA RRC Connected users with RedCap capability and 1Rx in CU

KPI.name: 5G SA Peak number of RRC Connected users with 1Rx RedCap in CU
KPI.lformula: 5G Peak number of SA RRC Conn 1Rx RedCap users
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the peak number of SA RRC Connected users with RedCap capability and 1Rx in CU

KPI.name: 5G SA Average wideband CQI for RedCap UEs, 64QAM table
KPI.lformula: 5G SA Avg wb CQI RedCap 64QAM = Sum(n * RedCap 64QAM CQI level n) / Sum(RedCap 64QAM CQI level n), where n = 1 to 15
KPI.nformula: Sum(0 * WB_CQI_64TBL_CQI_REDCAP_00+ 1 * WB_CQI_64TBL_CQI_REDCAP_01+ 2 * WB_CQI_64TBL_CQI_REDCAP_02+ 3 * WB_CQI_64TBL_CQI_REDCAP_03+ 4 * WB_CQI_64TBL_CQI_REDCAP_04+ 5 * WB_CQI_64TBL_CQI_REDCAP_05+ 6 * WB_CQI_64TBL_CQI_REDCAP_06+ 7 * WB_CQI_64TBL_CQI_REDCAP_07+ 8 * WB_CQI_64TBL_CQI_REDCAP_08+ 9 * WB_CQI_64TBL_CQI_REDCAP_09+ 10 * WB_CQI_64TBL_CQI_REDCAP_10+ 11 * WB_CQI_64TBL_CQI_REDCAP_11+ 12 * WB_CQI_64TBL_CQI_REDCAP_12+ 13 * WB_CQI_64TBL_CQI_REDCAP_13+ 14 * WB_CQI_64TBL_CQI_REDCAP_14+ 15 * WB_CQI_64TBL_CQI_REDCAP_15)/Sum(WB_CQI_64TBL_CQI_REDCAP_00+ WB_CQI_64TBL_CQI_REDCAP_01+ WB_CQI_64TBL_CQI_REDCAP_02+ WB_CQI_64TBL_CQI_REDCAP_03+ WB_CQI_64TBL_CQI_REDCAP_04+ WB_CQI_64TBL_CQI_REDCAP_05+ WB_CQI_64TBL_CQI_REDCAP_06+ WB_CQI_64TBL_CQI_REDCAP_07+ WB_CQI_64TBL_CQI_REDCAP_08+ WB_CQI_64TBL_CQI_REDCAP_09+ WB_CQI_64TBL_CQI_REDCAP_10+ WB_CQI_64TBL_CQI_REDCAP_11+ WB_CQI_64TBL_CQI_REDCAP_12+ WB_CQI_64TBL_CQI_REDCAP_13+ WB_CQI_64TBL_CQI_REDCAP_14+ WB_CQI_64TBL_CQI_REDCAP_15)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the average reported Channel Quality Indicator (CQI) value when RedCap UE reports wideband CQI related to 64QAM table.

KPI.name: 5G SA Average wideband CQI for RedCap UEs, 256QAM table
KPI.lformula: 5G SA Avg wb CQI RedCap 64QAM = Sum(n * RedCap 256QAM CQI level n) / Sum(RedCap 64QAM CQI level n), where n = 1 to 15
KPI.nformula: Sum(0 * WB_CQI_256TBL_CQI_REDCAP_00+ 1 * WB_CQI_256TBL_CQI_REDCAP_01+ 2 * WB_CQI_256TBL_CQI_REDCAP_02+ 3 * WB_CQI_256TBL_CQI_REDCAP_03+ 4 * WB_CQI_256TBL_CQI_REDCAP_04+ 5 * WB_CQI_256TBL_CQI_REDCAP_05+ 6 * WB_CQI_256TBL_CQI_REDCAP_06+ 7 * WB_CQI_256TBL_CQI_REDCAP_07+ 8 * WB_CQI_256TBL_CQI_REDCAP_08+ 9 * WB_CQI_256TBL_CQI_REDCAP_09+ 10 * WB_CQI_256TBL_CQI_REDCAP_10+ 11 * WB_CQI_256TBL_CQI_REDCAP_11+ 12 * WB_CQI_256TBL_CQI_REDCAP_12+ 13 * WB_CQI_256TBL_CQI_REDCAP_13+ 14 * WB_CQI_256TBL_CQI_REDCAP_14+ 15 * WB_CQI_256TBL_CQI_REDCAP_15)/Sum(WB_CQI_256TBL_CQI_REDCAP_00+ WB_CQI_256TBL_CQI_REDCAP_01+ WB_CQI_256TBL_CQI_REDCAP_02+ WB_CQI_256TBL_CQI_REDCAP_03+ WB_CQI_256TBL_CQI_REDCAP_04+ WB_CQI_256TBL_CQI_REDCAP_05+ WB_CQI_256TBL_CQI_REDCAP_06+ WB_CQI_256TBL_CQI_REDCAP_07+ WB_CQI_256TBL_CQI_REDCAP_08+ WB_CQI_256TBL_CQI_REDCAP_09+ WB_CQI_256TBL_CQI_REDCAP_10+ WB_CQI_256TBL_CQI_REDCAP_11+ WB_CQI_256TBL_CQI_REDCAP_12+ WB_CQI_256TBL_CQI_REDCAP_13+ WB_CQI_256TBL_CQI_REDCAP_14+ WB_CQI_256TBL_CQI_REDCAP_15)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the average reported Channel Quality Indicator (CQI) value when RedCap UE reports wideband CQI related to 256QAM table.

KPI.name: 5G SA Total number of RRC Resume attempts
KPI.lformula: Number of RRC Resume attempts
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the number of RRC Resume attempts.

KPI.name: 5G SA RRC Resume Success Ratio excluding fallback attempts
KPI.lformula: 5G SA RRC Resume SR exc fallback att = 100 * (Number of RRC Resume Complete) / (Number of RRC Resume attempts excluding attempts related to fallback to RRC Setup)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the Success Ratio for RRC Resume excluding fallback attempts.

KPI.name: 5G SA Number of transitions to RRC Inactive state
KPI.lformula: Number of transitions to RRC Inactive state
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the number of UE transitions to RRC Inactive state.

KPI.name: 5G SA QoS Flow Drop Ratio due to UE in RRC_INACTIVE state not reachable Cause Initiated by gNB
KPI.lformula: SA QoS flow due to RNL RRC Inactive state not reachable DR = 100 * (number of abnormal QoS flow releases due to RNL RRC Inactive state not reachable cause initiated by gNB) / (Total number of QoS flow releases))
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the ratio of the number of abnormally released QoS flows (5QI flows) due to UE in RRC_INACTIVE state not reachable cause initiated by gNB, to total number of QoS flow releases (gNB and AMF initiated).

KPI.name: 5G SA Average number of SA RRC inactive users in selected area
KPI.lformula: SA Avg nr RRC inactive UEs = Cumulative sum of RRC inactive users sampled / PERIOD_DURATION*60
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the average number of RRC inactive users in stand alone operation.KPI values are aggregated (summed) over the object dimension. Meaning that, if KPI is calculated over PLMN object, it shows the average number of users in all PLMN.

KPI.name: 5G SA Maximum number of SA RRC inactive users
KPI.lformula: SA Maximum number of RRC inactive users
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the maximum number of SA RRC inactive users.

KPI.name: 5G SA Ratio of RRC state changes to inactive due to UE preference to all RRC state changes to inactive
KPI.lformula: 5G SA RRC state changes to Inactive due to UE pref to all RRC state changes to Inactive = 100 * (RRC state changes to Inactive due to UE pref) / (All RRC state changes to Inactive)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the ratio between state changes to RRC Inactive due to UE preference to all RRC state changes to inactive.

KPI.name: 5G SA Average in-session time for QoS flows excluding suspension time
KPI.lformula: Avg QoS flows in-session time excluding suspension time = (Cumulative in-session time of QoS Flows excluding suspension time) / (Total nr of QoS Flow releases)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the in-session time for QoS flows, excluding QoS Flows suspension time. Session is defined from QoS flow establishment to its release. Session time of a QoS Flow (excluding suspension time) is a sum of periods measured from establishment/resume to suspend/release from radio cell perspective.Note 1: QoS Flow suspension relates to UE transition from RRC_CONNECTED to RRC_INACTIVE state.Note 2: QoS Flow resume relates to UE transition from RRC_INACTIVE to RRC_CONNECTED state.

KPI.name: 5G RRC Resume fallback attempts
KPI.lformula: Nr of RRC Resume fallback attempts
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the number RRC Resume fallback attempts

KPI.name: 5G RRC Resume fallback Success Ratio
KPI.lformula: RRC Resume fallback SR = 100 * (Nr of RRC Resume fallback Succ) / (Nr of RRC Resume fallback attempts)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the Success Ratio of RRC Resume fallback procedures.

KPI.name: 5G SA QoS Flow Setup Success Ratio for High Priority Access
KPI.lformula: 5G SA QoS Flow Setup SR hiprio = 100 *((Number of successful QoS Flow Setups for High Priority Access)/ (Number of QoS Flow Setup attempts for High Priority Access))
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the for QoS Flow setup Success Ratio for High Priority Access

KPI.name: 5G SA QoS Flow Setup Success Ratio for Multimedia Priority Service
KPI.lformula: 5G SA QoS Flow Setup SR MultiM prio = 100 *((Number of successful QoS Flow Setups for Multimedia Priority Service)/ (Number of QoS Flow Setup attempts for Multimedia Priority Service))
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the for QoS Flow setup Success Ratio for Multimedia Priority Service

KPI.name: 5G SA Average Number of PCell UEs with Configured one SCell in UL
KPI.lformula: Avg PCell UE 1 SCell Conf UL = (Cumulative number of PCell CA UEs with one configured SCell in UL) / (number of samples)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the average number of PCell UEs with Configured one SCell in UL.

KPI.name: 5G SA Maximum Number of PCell UEs with Configured one SCell in UL
KPI.lformula: Max PCell UE 1 SCell Conf UL
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the maximum number of PCell UEs with Configured one SCell in UL.

KPI.name: 5G SA CA SCell Addition Success Ratio for 1 SCell in UL in PCell
KPI.lformula: SA UL CA SCell Addition SR 1 SCell = (SA UL CA SCell Addition successes 1 SCell) / (SA UL CA SCell Addition attempts 1 SCell)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the SA Carrier Aggregation (CA) SCell Addition Success Ratio for 1 SCell in UL, measured by request and acknowledge messages sent over RRC protocol in PCell.

KPI.name: 5G SA CA SCell Addition attempts for 1 SCell in UL in PCell
KPI.lformula: SA UL CA SCell Addition attempts 1 SCell = (SA UL CA SCell Addition attempts 1 SCell)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the SA Carrier Aggregation (CA) SCell Addition attempts for 1 SCell in UL, measured by request messages sent over RRC protocol in PCell.

KPI.name: 5G SA CA SCell Release Success Ratio for 1 SCell in UL in PCell due to A2 measurements
KPI.lformula: SA UL CA SCell Release SR 1 SCell due to A2 meas = (SA UL CA SCell Release successes 1 SCell) / (SA UL CA SCell Release attempts 1 SCell)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the SA Carrier Aggregation (CA) SCell Release Success Ratio for 1 SCell in UL due to A2 measurements, measured by request and acknowledge messages sent over RRC protocol in PCell.

KPI.name: 5G SA CA SCell Release attempts for 1 SCell in UL in PCell due to A2 measurements
KPI.lformula: SA UL CA SCell Release attempts 1 SCell due to A2 meas = (SA UL CA SCell Release attempts 1 SCell)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the SA Carrier Aggregation (CA) SCell Release attempts for 1 SCell in UL due to A2 measurements, measured by request messages sent over RRC protocol in PCell.

KPI.name: 5G Average number of UEs per UL PRB (MU-MIMO)
KPI.lformula: Number PRBs used by UEs (with pairing PRBs can be used several times) / number PRBs used
KPI.nformula: (Sum(1* PRB_UL_MU_MIMO_NOPAIR_UE+ 2* PRB_UL_MU_MIMO_2PAIR_UE+ 3* PRB_UL_MU_MIMO_3PAIR_UE+ 4* PRB_UL_MU_MIMO_4PAIR_UE+ 5* PRB_UL_MU_MIMO_5PAIR_UE+ 6* PRB_UL_MU_MIMO_6PAIR_UE+ 7* PRB_UL_MU_MIMO_7PAIR_UE+ 8* PRB_UL_MU_MIMO_8PAIR_UE)/Sum(PRB_UL_MU_MIMO_NOPAIR_UE+ PRB_UL_MU_MIMO_2PAIR_UE+ PRB_UL_MU_MIMO_3PAIR_UE+ PRB_UL_MU_MIMO_4PAIR_UE+ PRB_UL_MU_MIMO_5PAIR_UE+ PRB_UL_MU_MIMO_6PAIR_UE+ PRB_UL_MU_MIMO_7PAIR_UE+ PRB_UL_MU_MIMO_8PAIR_UE))
KPI.desc: This KPI calculated the average number of UEs per UL PRB.

KPI.name: 5G SA 5QI1 QoS Flow Drop Ratio - User view (double-Ng mapped to 'UE lost')
KPI.lformula: SA 5QI1 QoS flow drop UserR = ((number of abnormally released 5QI1 QoS flow attempts initiated by gNB and AMF)/(Total number of 5QI1 QoS release attempts)) *100
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the ratio of the number of abnormally released 5QI1 QoS flow attempts initiated by gNB and AMF to total number of 5QI1 QoS flow release attempts (gNB and AMF initiated).

KPI.name: 5G SA QoS Flow Drop Ratio - User view (double-Ng mapped to 'UE lost')
KPI.lformula: SA QoS flow drop UserR = ((number of abnormally released QoS flow attempts initiated by gNB and AMF)/(Total number of QoS release attempts + Number of suspended QoS flows)) *100
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the ratio of the number of abnormally released QoS flow (5QI flows) attempts initiated by gNB and AMF to total number of QoS flow release attempts (gNB and AMF initiated).

KPI.name: 5G SA Ratio of suspended QoS Flow Releases due to Reduce load in serving cell cause initiated by gNB to all QoS Flow Releases
KPI.lformula: SA QoS flows RNL Reduce load in serving cell = ((number of released QoS flows due to Reduce load in serving cell) / (Total number of QoS flow releases)) *100
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the ratio of the number of released QoS flows (5QI flows) due to Reduce load in serving cell cause initiated by gNB to total number of QoS flow releases (gNB and AMF initiated).

KPI.name: 5G SA Number of QoS Flows suspensions due to UE transition to RRC Inactive state
KPI.lformula: Number of QoS Flows suspensions
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the number of QoS Flows suspensions due to UE transition to RRC Inactive state

KPI.name: 5G SA Average number of SA users in selected area
KPI.lformula: SA Avg nr UEs = Cumulative sum of users sampled / PERIOD_DURATION*60
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the average number of users in standalone operation.KPI values are aggregated (summed) over the object dimension. Meaning that, if KPI is calculated over PLMN object, it shows the average number of users in all PLMN.

KPI.name: 5G SA Silently removed Inactive UE Contexts due serving cell load reduction
KPI.lformula: Nr of inactive UE Contexts silently removed from CU due to serving cell load reduction
KPI.desc: This KPI shows number of inactive UE Contexts removed silently from gNB-CU due to serving cell load reduction.

KPI.name: 5G SA Incoming HO preparation attempts Inter-RAT
KPI.lformula: Inc Inter-RAT HO prep att
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the incoming handover preparation attempts for 5G SA Inter-RAT.

KPI.name: 5G SA Incoming HO preparation success ratio Inter-RAT
KPI.lformula: 100 * Inc Inter-RAT HO prep SR = Inc Inter-RAT prep succ / Inc Inter-RAT prep att
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the incoming handover preparation success ratio for 5G SA Inter-RAT.

KPI.name: 5G SA HO execution success ratio Inter-RAT
KPI.lformula: 100 * Inc Inter-RAT HO exec succ / Inc Inter-RAT HO prep succ
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the incoming handover execution success ratio for 5G SA Inter-RAT. The denominator is counted from point of time when target cell accepts the preparation of incoming handover, while the numerator when target cell receives the RRC Reconfiguration Complete message and sends NGAP: Handover Notify message to AMF (to inform about successful completion of execution phase).

KPI.name: 5G SA Incoming HO preparation attempts for Inter-RAT for VoNR
KPI.lformula: Inc Inter-RAT HO prep att for VoNR
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the incoming handover preparation attempts for 5G SA Inter-RAT for VoNR.

KPI.name: 5G SA Incoming HO preparation success ratio for Inter-RAT for VoNR
KPI.lformula: 100 * Inc Inter-RAT HO prep SR for VoNR = Inc Inter-RAT prep succ for VoNR / Inc Inter-RAT prep att for VoNR
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the incoming handover preparation success ratio for 5G SA Inter-RAT for VoNR.

KPI.name: 5G SA HO execution success ratio for Inter-RAT for VoNR
KPI.lformula: 100 * Inc Inter-RAT HO exec succ for VoNR / Inc Inter-RAT HO prep succ for VoNR
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the incoming handover execution success ratio for 5G SA Inter-RAT for VoNR. The denominator is counted from point of time when target cell accepts the preparation of incoming handover, while the numerator when target cell receives the RRC Reconfiguration Complete message and sends NGAP: Handover Notify message to AMF (to inform about successful completion of execution phase).

KPI.name: 5G NSA NR Cell activation due to MeNB request preparation success ratio
KPI.lformula: 5G NSA NR Cell activ due to MeNB req prep SR =100 * (Number of accepted NR cell activation requests from MeNB) /(Number of all NR cell activation requests from MeNB)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the preparation Success Ratio of NR Cell activation due to MeNB request

KPI.name: 5G NSA NR Cell activation due to MeNB request execution success ratio
KPI.lformula: 5G NSA NR Cell activ due to MeNB req exec SR = 100 * (Number of successful NR cell activations) / (Number of NR cell activation requests)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the execution Success Ratio of NR Cell activation due to MeNB request

KPI.name: 5G NSA NR Cell activation due to MeNB request total success ratio
KPI.lformula: 5G NSA NR Cell activ due to MeNB req total SR = 100 * (Number of successful NR cell activations) / (Number of all NR cell activation requests from MeNB)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the total Success Ratio of NR Cell activation due to MeNB request

KPI.name: 5G SA Intra-gNB Intra-DU Inter-frequency Handover Preparation Success Ratio for VoNR
KPI.lformula: 100*(handover execution attempts / (handover AC failures + handover internal failures + handover preparation attempts))
KPI.desc: This KPI describes how successful handover preparation phase is for 5G SA Intra-gNB Intra-DU Inter-frequency for VoNR services, considering internal failures or admission control issues on CU.

KPI.name: 5G SA Intra-gNB Intra-DU Inter-frequency Handover Execution Success Ratio for VoNR
KPI.lformula: 100*(successful handover execution attempts / handover execution attempts)
KPI.desc: This KPI describes how successful handover execution phase is for 5G SA Intra-gNB Intra-DU Inter-frequency for VoNR services, considering internal failures or admission control issues on CU.

KPI.name: 5G SA Intra-gNB Intra-DU Inter-frequency Total Handover Success Ratio for VoNR
KPI.lformula: 100*(successful handover execution attempts / (handover AC failures + handover internal failures + handover preparation attempts))
KPI.desc: This KPI describes how successful handover preparation and execution phases are for 5G SA Intra-gNB Intra-DU Inter-frequency for VoNR services, considering internal failures or admission control issues on CU.

KPI.name: 5G SA Intra-gNB Intra-DU Inter-frequency Handover Execution attempts for VoNR
KPI.lformula: handover execution attempts
KPI.desc: This KPI measures the number of execution attempts for 5G SA Intra-gNB Intra-DU Inter-frequency for VoNR services.

KPI.name: 5G SA Intra-gNB Intra-DU Inter-frequency Handover Preparation attempts for VoNR
KPI.lformula: handover AC failures + handover internal failures + handover preparation attempts
KPI.desc: This KPI measures the number of preparation attempts for 5G SA Intra-gNB Intra-DU Inter-frequency for VoNR services, considering internal failures or admission control issues on CU.

KPI.name: 5G SA Intra-gNB Intra-DU Intra-frequency Handover Preparation Success Ratio for VoNR
KPI.lformula: 100*(handover execution attempts / (handover AC failures + handover internal failures + handover preparation attempts))
KPI.desc: This KPI describes how successful handover preparation phase is for 5G SA Intra-gNB Intra-DU Intra-frequency for VoNR services, considering internal failures or admission control issues on CU.

KPI.name: 5G SA Intra-gNB Intra-DU Intra-frequency Handover Execution Success Ratio for VoNR
KPI.lformula: 100*(successful handover execution attempts / handover execution attempts)
KPI.desc: This KPI describes how successful handover execution phase is for 5G SA Intra-gNB Intra-DU Intra-frequency for VoNR services, considering internal failures or admission control issues on CU.

KPI.name: 5G SA Intra-gNB Intra-DU Intra-frequency Total Handover Success Ratio for VoNR
KPI.lformula: 100*(successful handover execution attempts / (handover AC failures + handover internal failures + handover preparation attempts))
KPI.desc: This KPI describes how successful handover preparation and execution phases are for 5G SA Intra-gNB Intra-DU Intra-frequency for VoNR services, considering internal failures or admission control issues on CU.

KPI.name: 5G SA Intra-gNB Intra-DU Intra-frequency Handover Execution attempts for VoNR
KPI.lformula: handover execution attempts
KPI.desc: This KPI measures the number of execution attempts for 5G SA Intra-gNB Intra-DU Intra-frequency for VoNR services.

KPI.name: 5G SA Intra-gNB Intra-DU Intra-frequency Handover Preparation attempts for VoNR
KPI.lformula: handover AC failures + handover internal failures + handover preparation attempts
KPI.desc: This KPI measures the number of preparation attempts for 5G SA Intra-gNB Intra-DU Intra-frequency for VoNR services, considering internal failures or admission control issues on CU.

KPI.name: 5G SA average time of Intra-gNB Intra-DU Handover Execution phase for VoNR
KPI.lformula: The average time of Intra-gNB Intra-DU handover for SA for VoNR
KPI.desc: This KPI measures the average time of Intra-gNB Intra-DU handover execution phase for VoNR on source cell.

KPI.name: 5G SA max time of Intra-gNB Intra-DU Handover Execution phase for VoNR
KPI.lformula: The max time of Intra-gNB Intra-DU handover for SA for VoNR
KPI.desc: This KPI measures the max time of Intra-gNB Intra-DU handover execution phase for VoNR on source cell.

KPI.name: 5G SA Xn based Inter-gNB Inter-frequency Handover Preparation Success Ratio for VoNR
KPI.lformula: 100*(handover execution attempts / (handover preparation attempts))
KPI.desc: This KPI describes how successful handover preparation phase is for 5G SA Xn based Inter-gNB Inter-frequency for VoNR services, considering internal failures or admission control issues on CU.

KPI.name: 5G SA Xn based Inter-gNB Inter-frequency Handover Execution Success Ratio for VoNR
KPI.lformula: 100*(successful handover execution attempts / handover execution attempts)
KPI.desc: This KPI describes how successful handover execution phase is for 5G SA Xn based Inter-gNB Inter-frequency for VoNR services, considering internal failures or admission control issues on CU.

KPI.name: 5G SA Xn based Inter-gNB Inter-frequency Total Handover Success Ratio for VoNR
KPI.lformula: 100*(successful handover execution attempts / (handover preparation attempts))
KPI.desc: This KPI describes how successful handover preparation and execution phases are for 5G SA Xn based Inter-gNB Inter-frequency for VoNR services, considering internal failures or admission control issues on CU.

KPI.name: 5G SA Xn based Inter-gNB Inter-frequency Handover Execution attempts for VoNR
KPI.lformula: handover execution attempts
KPI.desc: This KPI measures the number of execution attempts for 5G SA Xn based Inter-gNB Inter-frequency for VoNR services.

KPI.name: 5G SA Xn based Inter-gNB Inter-frequency Handover Preparation attempts for VoNR
KPI.lformula: handover preparation attempts
KPI.desc: This KPI measures the number of preparation attempts for 5G SA Xn based Inter-gNB Inter-frequency for VoNR services, considering internal failures or admission control issues on CU.

KPI.name: 5G SA Xn based Inter-gNB Intra-frequency Handover Preparation Success Ratio for VoNR
KPI.lformula: 100*(handover execution attempts / (handover preparation attempts))
KPI.desc: This KPI describes how successful handover preparation phase is for 5G SA Xn based Inter-gNB Intra-frequency for VoNR services, considering internal failures or admission control issues on CU.

KPI.name: 5G SA Xn based Inter-gNB Intra-frequency Handover Execution Success Ratio for VoNR
KPI.lformula: 100*(successful handover execution attempts / handover execution attempts)
KPI.desc: This KPI describes how successful handover execution phase is for 5G SA Xn based Inter-gNB Intra-frequency for VoNR services, considering internal failures or admission control issues on CU.

KPI.name: 5G SA Xn based Inter-gNB Intra-frequency Total Handover Success Ratio for VoNR
KPI.lformula: 100*(successful handover execution attempts / (handover preparation attempts))
KPI.desc: This KPI describes how successful handover preparation and execution phases are for 5G SA Xn based Inter-gNB Intra-frequency for VoNR services, considering internal failures or admission control issues on CU.

KPI.name: 5G SA Xn based Inter-gNB Intra-frequency Handover Execution attempts for VoNR
KPI.lformula: handover execution attempts
KPI.desc: This KPI measures the number of execution attempts for 5G SA Xn based Inter-gNB Intra-frequency for VoNR services.

KPI.name: 5G SA Xn based Inter-gNB Intra-frequency Handover Preparation attempts for VoNR
KPI.lformula: handover preparation attempts
KPI.desc: This KPI measures the number of preparation attempts for 5G SA Xn based Inter-gNB Intra-frequency for VoNR services, considering internal failures or admission control issues on CU.

KPI.name: 5G SA average time of Xn based Inter-gNB Handover Execution phase for VoNR
KPI.lformula: The average time of Xn based Inter-gNB handover for SA for VoNR
KPI.desc: This KPI measures the average time of Xn based Inter-gNB handover execution phase for VoNR on source cell.

KPI.name: 5G SA max time of Xn based Inter-gNB Handover Execution phase for VoNR
KPI.lformula: The max time of Xn based Inter-gNB handover for SA for VoNR
KPI.desc: This KPI measures the max time of Xn based Inter-gNB handover execution phase for VoNR on source cell.

KPI.name: 5G SA NG based Inter-gNB Inter-frequency Handover Preparation Success Ratio for VoNR
KPI.lformula: 100*(handover execution attempts / (handover preparation attempts))
KPI.desc: This KPI describes how successful handover preparation phase is for 5G SA NG based Inter-gNB Inter-frequency for VoNR services, considering internal failures or admission control issues on CU.

KPI.name: 5G SA NG based Inter-gNB Inter-frequency Handover Execution Success Ratio for VoNR
KPI.lformula: 100*(successful handover execution attempts / handover execution attempts)
KPI.desc: This KPI describes how successful handover execution phase is for 5G SA NG based Inter-gNB Inter-frequency for VoNR services, considering internal failures or admission control issues on CU.

KPI.name: 5G SA NG based Inter-gNB Inter-frequency Total Handover Success Ratio for VoNR
KPI.lformula: 100*(successful handover execution attempts / (handover preparation attempts))
KPI.desc: This KPI describes how successful handover preparation and execution phases are for 5G SA NG based Inter-gNB Inter-frequency for VoNR services, considering internal failures or admission control issues on CU.

KPI.name: 5G SA NG based Inter-gNB Inter-frequency Handover Execution attempts for VoNR
KPI.lformula: handover execution attempts
KPI.desc: This KPI measures the number of execution attempts for 5G SA NG based Inter-gNB Inter-frequency for VoNR services.

KPI.name: 5G SA NG based Inter-gNB Inter-frequency Handover Preparation attempts for VoNR
