KPI.desc: This KPI measures the number of preparation attempts for 5G SA NG based Inter-gNB Inter-frequency for VoNR services, considering internal failures or admission control issues on CU.

KPI.name: 5G SA NG based Inter-gNB Intra-frequency Handover Preparation Success Ratio for VoNR
KPI.lformula: 100*(handover execution attempts / (handover preparation attempts))
KPI.desc: This KPI describes how successful handover preparation phase is for 5G SA NG based Inter-gNB Intra-frequency for VoNR services, considering internal failures or admission control issues on CU.

KPI.name: 5G SA NG based Inter-gNB Intra-frequency Handover Execution Success Ratio for VoNR
KPI.lformula: 100*(successful handover execution attempts / handover execution attempts)
KPI.desc: This KPI describes how successful handover execution phase is for 5G SA NG based Inter-gNB Intra-frequency for VoNR services, considering internal failures or admission control issues on CU.

KPI.name: 5G SA NG based Inter-gNB Intra-frequency Total Handover Success Ratio for VoNR
KPI.lformula: 100*(successful handover execution attempts / (handover preparation attempts))
KPI.desc: This KPI describes how successful handover preparation and execution phases are for 5G SA NG based Inter-gNB Intra-frequency for VoNR services, considering internal failures or admission control issues on CU.

KPI.name: 5G SA NG based Inter-gNB Intra-frequency Handover Execution attempts for VoNR
KPI.lformula: handover execution attempts
KPI.desc: This KPI measures the number of execution attempts for 5G SA NG based Inter-gNB Intra-frequency for VoNR services.

KPI.name: 5G SA NG based Inter-gNB Intra-frequency Handover Preparation attempts for VoNR
KPI.lformula: handover preparation attempts
KPI.desc: This KPI measures the number of preparation attempts for 5G SA NG based Inter-gNB Intra-frequency for VoNR services, considering internal failures or admission control issues on CU.

KPI.name: 5G SA average time of NG based Inter-gNB Handover Execution phase for VoNR
KPI.lformula: The average time of NG based Inter-gNB handover for SA for VoNR
KPI.desc: This KPI measures the average time of NG based Inter-gNB handover execution phase for VoNR on source cell.

KPI.name: 5G SA max time of NG based Inter-gNB Handover Execution phase for VoNR
KPI.lformula: The max time of NG based Inter-gNB handover for SA for VoNR
KPI.desc: This KPI measures the max time of NG based Inter-gNB handover execution phase for VoNR on source cell.

KPI.name: 5G SA NG based Outgoing Inter-RAT Handover Preparation Success Ratio for VoNR
KPI.lformula: 100*(handover execution attempts / (handover preparation attempts))
KPI.desc: This KPI describes how successful handover preparation phase is for 5G SA NG based Outgoing Inter-RAT for VoNR services, considering internal failures or admission control issues on CU.

KPI.name: 5G SA NG based Outgoing Inter-RAT Handover Execution Success Ratio for VoNR
KPI.lformula: 100*(successful handover execution attempts / handover execution attempts)
KPI.desc: This KPI describes how successful handover execution phase is for 5G SA NG based Outgoing Inter-RAT for VoNR services, considering internal failures or admission control issues on CU.

KPI.name: 5G SA NG based Outgoing Inter-RAT Total Handover Success Ratio for VoNR
KPI.lformula: 100*(successful handover execution attempts / (handover preparation attempts))
KPI.desc: This KPI describes how successful handover preparation and execution phases are for 5G SA NG based Outgoing Inter-RAT for VoNR services, considering internal failures or admission control issues on CU.

KPI.name: 5G SA NG based Outgoing Inter-RAT Handover Execution attempts for VoNR
KPI.lformula: handover execution attempts
KPI.desc: This KPI measures the number of execution attempts for 5G SA NG based Outgoing Inter-RAT for VoNR services.

KPI.name: 5G SA NG based Outgoing Inter-RAT Handover Preparation attempts for VoNR
KPI.lformula: handover preparation attempts
KPI.desc: This KPI measures the number of preparation attempts for 5G SA NG based Outgoing Inter-RAT for VoNR services, considering internal failures or admission control issues on CU.

KPI.name: 5G SA average time of NG based Outgoing Inter-RAT Handover Execution phase for VoNR
KPI.lformula: The average time of NG based Outgoing Inter-RAT handover for SA for VoNR
KPI.desc: This KPI measures the average time of NG based Outgoing Inter-RAT handover execution phase for VoNR on source cell.

KPI.name: 5G SA max time of NG based Outgoing Inter-RAT Handover Execution phase for VoNR
KPI.lformula: The max time of NG based Outgoing Inter-RAT handover for SA for VoNR
KPI.desc: This KPI measures the max time of NG based Outgoing Inter-RAT handover execution phase for VoNR on source cell.

KPI.name: 5G NSA Inter-gNB Inter-Frequency PSCell Change on source gNB (SN Initiated Change)
KPI.lformula: SN Init Change Inter-Freq att on src gNB = SgNB Change Required
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the SgNB Change attempts for 5G NSA Inter-gNB Inter-Frequency PSCell Change on source gNB (SN Initiated Change).

KPI.name: 5G NSA Inter-gNB Inter-Frequency PSCell Change Success Ratio on source gNB (SN Initiated Change)
KPI.lformula: SN Init Change Inter-Freq SR on src gNB = 100 * SgNB CHANGE CONFIRM / SGNB CHANGE REQUIRED
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the SgNB Change success ratio for 5G NSA Inter-gNB Inter-Frequency PSCell Change on source gNB (SN Initiated Change).

KPI.name: 5G NSA Inter-gNB Inter-Frequency PSCell Change Total Success Ratio on source gNB (SN Initiated Change)
KPI.lformula: SN Init Change Inter-Freq Tot SR on src gNB = 100 * UE Ctx Release / SGNB CHANGE REQUIRED
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the SgNB Change total success ratio for 5G NSA Inter-gNB Inter-Frequency PSCell Change on source gNB (SN Initiated Change).

KPI.name: 5G NSA Inter-gNB Intra-Frequency PSCell Change Total Success Ratio on source gNB (SN Initiated Change)
KPI.lformula: SN Init Change Intra-Freq Tot SR on src gNB = 100 * UE Ctx Release / SGNB CHANGE REQUIRED
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the SgNB Change total success ratio for 5G NSA Inter-gNB Intra-Frequency PSCell Change on source gNB (SN Initiated Change).

KPI.name: 5G SA average time of NG based Outgoing Inter-RAT Handover Preparation phase
KPI.lformula: The average time of NG based Outgoing Inter-RAT handover for SA
KPI.desc: This KPI measures the average time of NG based Outgoing Inter-RAT handover Preparation phase on source cell.

KPI.name: 5G SA max time of NG based Outgoing Inter-RAT Handover Preparation phase
KPI.lformula: The max time of NG based Outgoing Inter-RAT handover for SA
KPI.desc: This KPI measures the max time of NG based Outgoing Inter-RAT handover Preparation phase on source cell.

KPI.name: 5G SA average time of NG based Outgoing Inter-RAT Handover Execution phase
KPI.lformula: The average time of NG based Outgoing Inter-RAT handover for SA
KPI.desc: This KPI measures the average time of NG based Outgoing Inter-RAT handover execution phase on source cell.

KPI.name: 5G SA max time of NG based Outgoing Inter-RAT Handover Execution phase
KPI.lformula: The max time of NG based Outgoing Inter-RAT handover for SA
KPI.desc: This KPI measures the max time of NG based Outgoing Inter-RAT handover execution phase on source cell.

KPI.name: 5G SA QoS Flow Drop Ratio due to Xn based handover failures during completion phase on target side
KPI.lformula: SA QoS flow drop Xn based handover failures during completion phase on target side = ((number of abnormally released QoS flow attempts due to Xn based handover failures during completion phase on target side)/(Total number of QoS release attempts)) *100
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the ratio of the number of abnormally released QoS flow (5QI flows) attempts due to Xn based handover failures during completion phase on target side.

KPI.name: 5G SA Handover with full config Success Ratio on target cell
KPI.lformula: 5G SA HO RRC Reconfig SR on target = 100*(RRC Reconfig Complete received / RRC Reconfig sent)
KPI.desc: This KPI describes how successful RRC Reconfiguration procedure on target cell is for 5G SA mobility when fullConfig IE is set to value true. It consists of Inter-DU, Xn based and NG based mobility.

KPI.name: 5G Ratio of PDSCH allocation attempts blocked due to lack of F1 HARQ A/N PUCCH resources to all F1 PDSCH allocation attempts
KPI.lformula: 5G PDSCH allocation attempts blocked due to lack of F1 PUCCH to all PDSCH allocation attempts ratio = 100 * (Number of PDSCH allocation attempts blocked due to lack of F1 PUCCH resources) / (all F1 PDSCH allocation attempts)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the Ratio of PDSCH allocation attempts blocked due to lack of F1 HARQ A/N PUCCH resources to all F1 PDSCH allocation attempts

KPI.name: 5G Ratio of PDSCH allocation attempts blocked due to lack of F3 HARQ A/N PUCCH resources to all F3 PDSCH allocation attempts
KPI.lformula: 5G PDSCH allocation attempts blocked due to lack of F3 PUCCH to all PDSCH allocation attempts ratio = 100 * (Number of PDSCH allocation attempts blocked due to lack of F1 PUCCH resources) / (all F3 PDSCH allocation attempts)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the Ratio of PDSCH allocation attempts blocked due to lack of F3 HARQ A/N PUCCH resources to all F3 PDSCH allocation attempts

KPI.name: 5G Average number of Resources used for PUCCH Format 1
KPI.lformula: 5G Average number of Resources used for PUCCH Format 1 = (Cumulative sum of Resources used for PUCCH F1) / (Number of slots with allocated PUCCH F1)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the average number of Resources used for PUCCH Format 1

KPI.name: 5G Average number of Resources used for PUCCH Format 3
KPI.lformula: 5G Average number of Resources used for PUCCH Format 3 = (Cumulative sum of Resources used for PUCCH F3) / (Number of slots with allocated PUCCH F3)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the average number of Resources used for PUCCH Format 3

KPI.name: 5G Maximum number of Resources used for PUCCH Format 1
KPI.lformula: 5G Maximum number of Resources used for PUCCH Format 1
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the maximum number of Resources used for PUCCH Format 1

KPI.name: 5G Maximum number of Resources used for PUCCH Format 3
KPI.lformula: 5G Maximum number of Resources used for PUCCH Format 3
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the maximum number of Resources used for PUCCH Format 3

KPI.name: 5G Share of CQI reports indicating use of 256QAM modulation in downlink
KPI.lformula: 5G CQI share of 256QAM in DL = 100*(CQI reports related to 256QAM / all CQI reports)
KPI.nformula: 100*Sum(WB_CQI_256TBL_CQI_12+ WB_CQI_256TBL_CQI_13+ WB_CQI_256TBL_CQI_14+ WB_CQI_256TBL_CQI_15)/Sum(WB_CQI_64TBL_CQI_01+ WB_CQI_64TBL_CQI_02+ WB_CQI_64TBL_CQI_03+ WB_CQI_64TBL_CQI_04+ WB_CQI_64TBL_CQI_05+ WB_CQI_64TBL_CQI_06+ WB_CQI_64TBL_CQI_07+ WB_CQI_64TBL_CQI_08+ WB_CQI_64TBL_CQI_09+ WB_CQI_64TBL_CQI_10+ WB_CQI_64TBL_CQI_11+ WB_CQI_64TBL_CQI_12+ WB_CQI_64TBL_CQI_13+ WB_CQI_64TBL_CQI_14+ WB_CQI_64TBL_CQI_15+ WB_CQI_256TBL_CQI_01+ WB_CQI_256TBL_CQI_02+ WB_CQI_256TBL_CQI_03+ WB_CQI_256TBL_CQI_04+ WB_CQI_256TBL_CQI_05+ WB_CQI_256TBL_CQI_06+ WB_CQI_256TBL_CQI_07+ WB_CQI_256TBL_CQI_08+ WB_CQI_256TBL_CQI_09+ WB_CQI_256TBL_CQI_10+ WB_CQI_256TBL_CQI_11+ WB_CQI_256TBL_CQI_12+ WB_CQI_256TBL_CQI_13+ WB_CQI_256TBL_CQI_14+ WB_CQI_256TBL_CQI_15)
KPI.desc: This KPI describes what is the share in percentage of 256QAM modulation in downlink based on CQI reports delivered by the UE. It may not correspond to the actual modulation used in transmission because, in certain conditions (small amounts of data to transmit), a lower MCS can be selected.

KPI.name: 5G SA Xn based Inter-gNB HO preparation failure ratio on the target cell due to the U-plane Integrity Protection reasons
KPI.lformula: Xn HO Prep FR on target = (Xn HO Prep fail cause / Xn HO Prep att)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the SA Xn based Inter-gNB HO preparation failure ratio on the target cell mode due to the U-plane Integrity Protection reasons.

KPI.name: 5G SA NG based handover preparation failure ratio on the target cell due to the U-plane Integrity Protection reasons
KPI.lformula: NG HO Prep FR on target = (NG HO Prep fail cause / NG HO Prep att)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the SA NG based handover preparation failure ratio on the target cell due to the U-plane Integrity Protection reasons.

KPI.name: 5G NSA Inter-gNB Intra-Frequency PSCell Change on source gNB (SN Initiated Change)
KPI.lformula: SN Init Change Intra-freq att on src gNB = SgNB Change Required
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the SgNB Change attempts for 5G NSA Inter-gNB Intra-Frequency PSCell Change on source gNB (SN Initiated Change).

KPI.name: 5G NSA Inter-gNB Intra-Frequency PSCell Change Success Ratio on source gNB (SN Initiated Change)
KPI.lformula: SN Init Change Intra-freq SR on src gNB = 100 * SgNB CHANGE CONFIRM / SGNB CHANGE REQUIRED
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the SgNB Change success ratio for 5G NSA Inter-gNB Intra-Frequency PSCell Change on source gNB (SN Initiated Change).

KPI.name: 5G SA Overall SCell Release Success Ratio
KPI.lformula: 5G SA SCell Release SR = 100*(sum of RRC Reconfig Complete received for SCell Release due to specific reasons / sum of RRC Reconfig sent for SCell Release due to specific reasons)
KPI.nformula: (100*(A2MEAS_REL1DLSCELL_SUCC_SA + A2MEAS_REL1ULSCELL_SUCC_SA + INA_PRO_REL_SCELL_SUC_SA + INA_OVHT_REL_SCELL_SUC_SA + BAD_RLQ_REL_SCELL_SUC_SA + INCMP_DRB_STP_REL_SCELL_SUC_SA + ELIGIBLE_DRB_REL_SCELL_SUC_SA + HRDRB_TRIGG_REL_SCELL_SUC_SA) / (A2MEAS_REL1DLSCELL_ATT_SA + A2MEAS_REL1ULSCELL_ATT_SA + INA_PRO_REL_SCELL_ATT_SA + INA_OVHT_REL_SCELL_ATT_SA + BAD_RLQ_REL_SCELL_ATT_SA + INCMP_DRB_STP_REL_SCELL_ATT_SA + ELIGIBLE_DRB_REL_SCELL_ATT_SA + HRDRB_TRIGG_REL_SCELL_ATT_SA))
KPI.desc: This KPI describes how successful RRC Reconfiguration procedure is in PCell for SCell Release for both DL and UL. The KPI is built based on possible SCell Releases due to specific reasons. Each SCell is counted separately.

KPI.name: 5G NSA Overall SCell Release Success Ratio
KPI.lformula: 5G NSA SCell Release SR = 100*(sum of RRC Reconfig Complete received for SCell Release due to specific reasons / sum of RRC Reconfig sent for SCell Release due to specific reasons)
KPI.nformula: (100*(A2MEAS_REL1DLSCELL_SUCC_NSA + INA_PRO_REL_SCELL_SUC_NSA + BAD_RLQ_REL_SCELL_SUC_NSA + HRDRB_TRIGG_REL_SCELL_SUC_NSA) / (A2MEAS_REL1DLSCELL_ATT_NSA + INA_PRO_REL_SCELL_ATT_NSA + BAD_RLQ_REL_SCELL_ATT_NSA+ HRDRB_TRIGG_REL_SCELL_ATT_NSA))
KPI.desc: This KPI describes how successful RRC Reconfiguration procedure is in PSCell for SCell Release for both DL and UL. The KPI is built based on possible SCell Releases due to specific reasons. Each SCell is counted separately.

KPI.name: 5G SA SCell Release Distribution Ratio due to A2 measurement report of SCell
KPI.lformula: 5G SA SCell Release SR A2 = 100*(RRC Reconfig Complete received for SCell Release due to specific reason / RRC Reconfig Complete received for SCell Release due to all reasons)
KPI.nformula: (100*(A2MEAS_REL1DLSCELL_SUCC_SA + A2MEAS_REL1ULSCELL_SUCC_SA) / (A2MEAS_REL1DLSCELL_SUCC_SA + A2MEAS_REL1ULSCELL_SUCC_SA + INA_PRO_REL_SCELL_SUC_SA + INA_OVHT_REL_SCELL_SUC_SA + BAD_RLQ_REL_SCELL_SUC_SA + INCMP_DRB_STP_REL_SCELL_SUC_SA + ELIGIBLE_DRB_REL_SCELL_SUC_SA + HRDRB_TRIGG_REL_SCELL_SUC_SA))
KPI.desc: This KPI describes distribution ratio of SCell Releases in PCell due to A2 measurement report of SCell for both DL and UL. The KPI is built based on possible SCell Releases due to specific reasons. Each SCell is counted separately.

KPI.name: 5G SA SCell Release Distribution Ratio due to prolonged inactivity in the PCell
KPI.lformula: 5G SA SCell Release SR inact = 100*(RRC Reconfig Complete received for SCell Release due to specific reason / RRC Reconfig Complete received for SCell Release due to all reasons)
KPI.nformula: (100*(INA_PRO_REL_SCELL_SUC_SA) / (A2MEAS_REL1DLSCELL_SUCC_SA + A2MEAS_REL1ULSCELL_SUCC_SA + INA_PRO_REL_SCELL_SUC_SA + INA_OVHT_REL_SCELL_SUC_SA + BAD_RLQ_REL_SCELL_SUC_SA + INCMP_DRB_STP_REL_SCELL_SUC_SA + ELIGIBLE_DRB_REL_SCELL_SUC_SA + HRDRB_TRIGG_REL_SCELL_SUC_SA))
KPI.desc: This KPI describes distribution ratio of SCell Releases in PCell due to prolonged inactivity in the PCell. The KPI is built based on possible SCell Releases due to specific reasons. Each SCell is counted separately.

KPI.name: 5G SA SCell Release Distribution Ratio due to inactivity while UE is overheating in the PCell
KPI.lformula: 5G SA SCell Release SR overheat = 100*(RRC Reconfig Complete received for SCell Release due to specific reason / RRC Reconfig Complete received for SCell Release due to all reasons)
KPI.nformula: (100*(INA_OVHT_REL_SCELL_SUC_SA) / (A2MEAS_REL1DLSCELL_SUCC_SA + A2MEAS_REL1ULSCELL_SUCC_SA + INA_PRO_REL_SCELL_SUC_SA + INA_OVHT_REL_SCELL_SUC_SA + BAD_RLQ_REL_SCELL_SUC_SA + INCMP_DRB_STP_REL_SCELL_SUC_SA + ELIGIBLE_DRB_REL_SCELL_SUC_SA + HRDRB_TRIGG_REL_SCELL_SUC_SA))
KPI.desc: This KPI describes distribution ratio of SCell Releases in PCell due to inactivity while UE is overheating in the PCell. The KPI is built based on possible SCell Releases due to specific reasons. Each SCell is counted separately.

KPI.name: 5G SA SCell Release Distribution Ratio due to bad SCell radio link quality in the PCell
KPI.lformula: 5G SA SCell Release SR bad quality = 100*(RRC Reconfig Complete received for SCell Release due to specific reason / RRC Reconfig Complete received for SCell Release due to all reasons)
KPI.nformula: (100*(BAD_RLQ_REL_SCELL_SUC_SA) / (A2MEAS_REL1DLSCELL_SUCC_SA + A2MEAS_REL1ULSCELL_SUCC_SA + INA_PRO_REL_SCELL_SUC_SA + INA_OVHT_REL_SCELL_SUC_SA + BAD_RLQ_REL_SCELL_SUC_SA + INCMP_DRB_STP_REL_SCELL_SUC_SA + ELIGIBLE_DRB_REL_SCELL_SUC_SA + HRDRB_TRIGG_REL_SCELL_SUC_SA))
KPI.desc: This KPI describes distribution ratio of SCell Releases in PCell due to bad SCell radio link quality in the PCell. The KPI is built based on possible SCell Releases due to specific reasons. Each SCell is counted separately.

KPI.name: 5G SA UL 1 SCell Release Success Ratio
KPI.lformula: 5G SA UL 1 SCell Release SR = 100*(sum of RRC Reconfig Complete received for SCell Release in UL / sum of RRC Reconfig sent for SCell Release in UL)
KPI.desc: This KPI describes how successful RRC Reconfiguration procedure is in PCell for 1 SCell Release in UL.

KPI.name: 5G SA Average Number of PCell UEs with Configured four SCells in DL
KPI.lformula: Avg PCell UE 4 SCell Conf DL = (Cumulative number of PCell CA UEs with four configured SCell in DL) / (number of samples)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the average number of PCell UEs with Configured four SCells in DL.

KPI.name: 5G SA CA SCell Addition Success Ratio for 4 SCell in DL in PCell
KPI.lformula: SA CA SCell Addition SR 4 SCell = (SA CA SCell Addition successes 4 SCells) / (SA CA SCell Addition attempts 4 SCells)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the SA Carrier Aggregation (CA) SCell Addition Success Ratio for 4 SCell in DL, measured by request and acknowledge messages sent over RRC protocol in PCell.

KPI.name: 5G SA CA SCell Addition attempts for 4 SCell in DL in PCell
KPI.lformula: SA CA SCell Addition attempts 4 SCells = (SA CA SCell Addi-tion attempts 4 SCells)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the SA Carrier Aggregation (CA) SCell Addition attempts for 4 SCell in DL, measured by request messages sent over RRC protocol in PCell.

KPI.name: 5G SA RAN Paging Success Ratio
KPI.lformula: RAN Paging SR = 1 - Failure Ratio =1 - ((Nr of inactive UE Contexts silently removed from CU due to UE not reachable) / (Nr of UEs paged with full I-RNTI IE))
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the Success Ratio for RAN Paging.

KPI.name: 5G SA RRC re-establishment Success Ratio per CU excluding fallback cases
KPI.lformula: 100* (SA Number of Reestablishment Completes per cause) / (SA Number of Reestablishment Requests per cause)
KPI.nformula: ((100* Sum(REESTAB_ACC_RECONF_FAIL + REESTAB_ACC_HO_FAIL + REESTAB_ACC_OTHER_FAIL) / Sum(RRC_REESTAB_RECONF_FAILURE + RRC_REESTAB_HO_FAILURE + RRC_REESTAB_OTHER_FAILURE -RRC_REESTAB_FALLBACK)))
KPI.desc: This KPI shows SA the RRC re-establishment Success Ratio per CU excluding fallback cases.

KPI.name: 5G NSA SCell Release Distribution Ratio due to A2 measurement report of SCell
KPI.lformula: 5G NSA SCell Release SR A2 = 100*(RRC Reconfig Complete received for SCell Release due to specific reason / RRC Reconfig Complete received for SCell Release due to all reasons)
KPI.desc: This KPI describes distribution ratio of SCell Releases in PSCell due to A2 measurement report of SCell for both DL and UL. The KPI is built based on possible SCell Releases due to specific reasons. Each SCell is counted separately.

KPI.name: 5G NSA SCell Release Distribution Ratio due to prolonged inactivity in the PSCell
KPI.lformula: 5G NSA SCell Release SR inact = 100*(RRC Reconfig Complete received for SCell Release due to specific reason / RRC Reconfig Complete received for SCell Release due to all reasons)
KPI.desc: This KPI describes distribution ratio of SCell Releases in PSCell due to prolonged inactivity in the PSCell. The KPI is built based on possible SCell Releases due to specific reasons. Each SCell is counted separately.

KPI.name: 5G NSA SCell Release Distribution Ratio due to bad SCell radio link quality in the PSCell
KPI.lformula: 5G NSA SCell Release SR bad quality = 100*(RRC Reconfig Complete received for SCell Release due to specific reason / RRC Reconfig Complete received for SCell Release due to all reasons)
KPI.desc: This KPI describes distribution ratio of SCell Releases in PSCell due to bad SCell radio link quality in the PSCell. The KPI is built based on possible SCell Releases due to specific reasons. Each SCell is counted separately.

KPI.name: 5G SA DL 1 SCell Release Success Ratio
KPI.lformula: 5G SA DL 1 SCell Release SR = 100*(sum of RRC Reconfig Complete received for SCell Release in DL / sum of RRC Reconfig sent for SCell Release in DL)
KPI.desc: This KPI describes how successful RRC Reconfiguration procedure is in PCell for 1 SCell Release in DL.

KPI.name: 5G average CFRA setup time
KPI.lformula: 5G average CFRA setup time = CFRA setup time/RA setup completions for dedicated preambles
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the average time taken for a successful Contention Free random access procedure.

KPI.name: 5G average CBRA setup time
KPI.lformula: 5G average CBRA setup time = CBRA setup time/RA msg3 receptions
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the average time taken for a successful Contention Based random access procedure.

KPI.name: 5G SA QoS flow setup success ratio excluding EPS fallback
KPI.lformula: 5G SA QoS Flow Setup SR excl EPS fallback = 100 * (QoS flow successful setups) / (QoS flow setup attempts - QoS flow setup attempts that initiated EPS fallback)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the success ratio for QoS flow setup, excluding the cases when EPS fallback procedure is initiated.

KPI.name: 5G NSA call accessibility, until successful 5G RACH
KPI.lformula: NSA call access until successful 5G RACH = Successful 5G random access / SgNB addition requests
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the Non-Standalone call accessibility on 5G perspective. The formula monitors the call setup procedure from SgNB addition request until successful random access procedure.

KPI.name: 5G SA Intra-gNB Handover Preparation attempts for RedCap UEs
KPI.lformula: (handover AC failures + handover internal failures + handover preparation attempts)
KPI.desc: This KPI measures the number of preparation attempts for 5G SA Intra-gNB for RedCap UEs, considering internal failures or admission control issues on CU.

KPI.name: 5G SA Intra-gNB Handover Preparation Success Ratio for RedCap UEs
KPI.lformula: 100*(handover execution attempts) / (handover AC failures + handover internal failures + handover preparation attempts)
KPI.desc: This KPI measures how successful handover preparation phase is for 5G SA Intra-gNB for RedCap UEs, considering internal failures or admission control issues on CU.

KPI.name: 5G SA Intra-gNB Handover Execution attempts for RedCap UEs
KPI.lformula: (handover execution attempts)
KPI.desc: This KPI measures the number of execution attempts for 5G SA Intra-gNB for RedCap UEs.

KPI.name: 5G SA Intra-gNB handover execution success ratio for RedCap UEs
KPI.lformula: 100*(successful handover execution attempts / handover execution attempts)
KPI.desc: This KPI measures how successful handover execution phase is for 5G SA Intra-gNB for RedCap UEs.

KPI.name: 5G SA Total Intra-gNB handover success ratio for RedCap UEs
KPI.lformula: 100*(successful handover execution attempts / (handover AC failures + handover internal failures + handover preparation attempts))
KPI.desc: This KPI measures how successful in total the whole handover procedure is for 5G SA Intra-gNB for RedCap UEs, considering internal failures or admission control issues on CU.

KPI.name: 5G SA Inter-gNB Handover Preparation attempts for RedCap UEs
KPI.lformula: (handover preparation attempts)
KPI.desc: This KPI measures the number of preparation attempts for 5G SA Inter-gNB for RedCap UEs.

KPI.name: 5G SA Inter-gNB Handover Preparation Success Ratio for RedCap UEs
KPI.lformula: 100*(handover execution attempts) / (handover preparation attempts)
KPI.desc: This KPI measures how successful handover preparation phase is for 5G SA Inter-gNB for RedCap UEs.

KPI.name: 5G SA Inter-gNB Handover Execution attempts for RedCap UEs
KPI.lformula: (handover execution attempts)
KPI.desc: This KPI measures the number of execution attempts for 5G SA Inter-gNB for RedCap UEs.

KPI.name: 5G SA Inter-gNB handover execution success ratio for RedCap UEs
KPI.lformula: 100*(successful handover execution attempts / handover execution attempts)
KPI.desc: This KPI measures how successful handover execution phase is for 5G SA Inter-gNB for RedCap UEs.

KPI.name: 5G SA Total Inter-gNB handover success ratio for RedCap UEs
KPI.lformula: 100*(successful handover execution attempts) / (handover preparation attempts)
KPI.desc: This KPI measures how successful in total the whole handover procedure is for 5G SA Inter-gNB for RedCap UEs.

KPI.name: 5G SA outgoing Inter-RAT Handover Preparation attempts for RedCap UEs
KPI.lformula: (handover preparation attempts)
KPI.desc: This KPI measures the number of preparation attempts for 5G SA outgoing Inter-RAT for RedCap UEs.

KPI.name: 5G SA outgoing Inter-RAT Handover Preparation Success Ratio for RedCap UEs
KPI.lformula: 100*(handover execution attempts) / (handover preparation attempts)
KPI.desc: This KPI measures how successful handover preparation phase is for 5G SA outgoing Inter-RAT for RedCap UEs.

KPI.name: 5G SA outgoing Inter-RAT Handover Execution attempts for RedCap UEs
KPI.lformula: (handover execution attempts)
KPI.desc: This KPI measures the number of execution attempts for 5G SA outgoing Inter-RAT for RedCap UEs.

KPI.name: 5G SA Outgoing Inter-RAT handover execution success ratio for RedCap UEs
KPI.lformula: 100*(successful handover execution attempts / handover execution attempts)
KPI.desc: This KPI measures how successful handover execution phase is for 5G SA outgoing Inter-RAT for RedCap UEs.

KPI.name: 5G SA Total outgoing Inter-RAT handover success ratio for RedCap UEs
KPI.lformula: 100*(successful handover execution attempts) / (handover preparation attempts)
KPI.desc: This KPI measures how successful in total the whole handover procedure is for 5G SA outgoing Inter-RAT for RedCap UEs.

KPI.name: 5G SA incoming Inter-RAT Handover Preparation attempts for RedCap UEs
KPI.lformula: (handover preparation attempts)
KPI.desc: This KPI measures the number of preparation attempts for 5G SA incoming Inter-RAT for RedCap UEs.

KPI.name: 5G SA incoming Inter-RAT Handover Preparation Success Ratio for RedCap UEs
KPI.lformula: 100*(handover execution attempts) / (handover preparation attempts)
KPI.desc: This KPI measures how successful handover preparation phase is for 5G SA incoming Inter-RAT for RedCap UEs.

KPI.name: 5G SA incoming Inter-RAT Handover Execution attempts for RedCap UEs
KPI.lformula: (handover execution attempts)
KPI.desc: This KPI measures the number of execution attempts for 5G SA incoming Inter-RAT for RedCap UEs.

KPI.name: 5G SA Incoming Inter-RAT handover execution success ratio for RedCap UEs
KPI.lformula: 100*(successful handover execution attempts / handover execution attempts)
KPI.desc: This KPI measures how successful handover execution phase is for 5G SA incoming Inter-RAT for RedCap UEs.

KPI.name: 5G SA Total incoming Inter-RAT handover success ratio for RedCap UEs
KPI.lformula: 100*(successful handover execution attempts) / (handover preparation attempts)
KPI.desc: This KPI measures how successful in total the whole handover procedure is for 5G SA incoming Inter-RAT for RedCap UEs.

KPI.name: 5G SA NG based handover preparation failure ratio on the target cell due to the lack of support for RedCap UE
KPI.lformula: 100* (NG HO Prep fail cause / NG HO Prep att)
KPI.desc: This KPI measures the SA NG based handover preparation failure ratio on the target cell due to the lack of support for RedCap UE.

KPI.name: 5G SA Xn based Inter-gNB HO preparation failure ratio on the target cell due to the lack of support for RedCap UE
KPI.lformula: 100* (Xn HO Prep fail cause / Xn HO Prep att)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the SA Xn based Inter-gNB HO preparation failure ratio on the target cell mode due to the lack of support for RedCap UE.

KPI.name: 5G SA Fallback RRC re-establishment Success Ratio per CU for RedCap UEs
KPI.lformula: 100* (SA Number of Fallback Reestablishment Completes for any cause) / (SA Number of Fallback Reestablishment Re-quests for any cause)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the SA Fallback RRC re-establishment Success Ratio per CU for RedCap UEs. In case of fallback the RRC Setup procedure is performed as a successful response for RRC Reestablishment Request.

KPI.name: 5G SA Number of Fallback RRC re-establishment attempts per CU for RedCap UEs
KPI.lformula: SA Number of Fallback Reestablishment Requests for any cause
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the SA total number of Fallback RRC re-establishment attempts per CU for RedCap UEs. In case of fallback the RRC Setup procedure is performed as a successful response for RRC Reestablishment Request.

KPI.name: 5G SA Total number of RRC connection establishment attempts for initial access for RedCap UEs
KPI.lformula: SA Number of RRC Setup Requests for initial access
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the total number of RRC connection establishment attempts for initial access for SA per cell for RedCap UEs.

KPI.name: 5G SA Total number of RRC connection establishment Success Ratio for initial access for RedCap UEs
KPI.lformula: 100 * (SA Number of RRC Setup Complete for initial access) / (SA Number of RRC Setup Requests for initial access)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the total number of RRC connection establishment Success Ratio for initial access for SA per cell for RedCap UEs.

KPI.name: 5G SA Total number of RRC re-establishment attempts for RedCap UEs
KPI.lformula: SA Number of RRC Re-establishment Requests
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the total number of RRC re-establishment attempts for SA per cell for RedCap UEs.

KPI.name: 5G SA Total number of RRC re-establishment Success Ratio for RedCap UEs
KPI.lformula: 100 * (SA Number of successful RRC Re-establishment Requests) / (SA Number of RRC Re-establishment Requests)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the total number of RRC re-establishment Success Ratio for SA per cell for RedCap UEs.

KPI.name: 5G SA Average number of SA RRC connected RedCap users in selected area
KPI.lformula: Cumulative sum of RRC connected RedCap UEs / Time of reporting period in seconds
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the average number of SA RRC connected RedCap users.KPI values are aggregated (sum) over the object dimension. Meaning that, if KPI is calculated over PLMN object, it shows the average number of users in all PLMN.

KPI.name: 5G SA Maximum number of SA RRC connected RedCap users
KPI.lformula: Maximum number of RRC connected RedCap UEs
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the maximum number of SA RRC connected RedCap users.

KPI.name: 5G SA DL 1 ext-SCell Release Success Ratio
KPI.lformula: 5G SA DL 1 ext-SCell Release SR = 100*(sum of RRC Reconfig Complete received for ext-SCell Release in DL / sum of RRC Reconfig sent for ext-SCell Release in DL)
KPI.desc: This KPI describes how successful RRC Reconfiguration procedure is in PCell for 1 ext-SCell Release in DL.

KPI.name: 5G NSA DL 1 SCell Release Success Ratio
KPI.lformula: 5G NSA DL 1 SCell Release SR = 100*(sum of RRC Reconfig Complete received for SCell Release in DL / sum of RRC Reconfig sent for SCell Release in DL)
KPI.desc: This KPI describes how successful RRC Reconfiguration procedure is in PSCell for 1 SCell Release in DL.

KPI.name: 5G SA QoS Flow Setup Failure Ratio per cause: user plane Integrity Protection reasons
KPI.lformula: 5G SA QoS Flow Setup FR cause UPIP = 100 * (Num of QoS Flow Setup Fail due to UPIP) / (Num of QoS Flow Att)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the Failure Ratio for QoS Flow setup per cause: user plane Integrity Protection reasons.

KPI.name: 5G SA Inter-gNB Xn based handover preparation success ratio on the target cell
KPI.lformula: Inter-gNB Xn based HO Prep SR on target = (Number of outgoing Inter-gNB Xn based HANDOVER REQUEST ACKNOWLEDGE messages sent by the target gNB) / (Number of incoming Inter-gNB Xn based HANDOVER REQUEST messages received by the gNB)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the SA Inter-gNB Xn based handover preparation success ratio on the target cell.

KPI.name: 5G Average number of Resources used for HARQ A/N for PUCCH Format 1
KPI.lformula: 5G Average number of Resources used for HARQ A/N for PUCCH Format 1 = (Cumulative sum of Resources used for HARQ A/N for PUCCH F1) / (Number of slots with allocated PUCCH F1)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the average number of Resources used for HARQ A/N for PUCCH Format 1

KPI.name: 5G Average number of Resources used for HARQ A/N for PUCCH Format 3
KPI.lformula: 5G Average number of Resources used for HARQ A/N for PUCCH Format 3 = (Cumulative sum of Resources used for HARQ A/N for PUCCH F3) / (Number of slots with allocated PUCCH F3)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the average number of Resources used for HARQ A/N for PUCCH Format 3

KPI.name: 5G Maximum number of Resources used for HARQ A/N for PUCCH Format 1
KPI.lformula: 5G Maximum number of Resources used for HARQ A/N for PUCCH Format 1
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the maximum number of Resources used for HARQ A/N for PUCCH Format 1

KPI.name: 5G Maximum number of Resources used for HARQ A/N for PUCCH Format 3
KPI.lformula: 5G Maximum number of Resources used for HARQ A/N for PUCCH Format 3
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the maximum number of Resources used for HARQ A/N for PUCCH Format 3

KPI.name: 5G Initial BLER in PUSCH for VoNR
KPI.lformula: 5G Initial BLER in PUSCH for VoNR = 100 * (initial transmissions sent - initial transmissions success) / (initial transmissions sent)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the failure ratio for the first HARQ transmission for PUSCH for VoNR.

KPI.name: 5G Residual BLER in PUSCH for VoNR
KPI.lformula: 5G Residual BLER in PUSCH for VoNR = 100 * (transmissions failed after max retry) / (successful transmissions + transmissions failed after max retry)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the failure ratio for the last retry of HARQ transmission for PUSCH for VoNR. Residual BLER is defined as the ratio between the number of failed transmissions after the MAX HARQ retransmission reached and the number of packets to transmit, that is, the 1st HARQ transmissions. In real-time monitoring, the HARQ feedback might be received in a different measurement period than the initial transmission. For that reason, the initial transmissions in the formula are calculated as the successful transmissions plus the unsuccessful transmissions.

KPI.name: 5G Initial BLER in PUSCH for VoNR per repetition bundle 1 (no repetition)
KPI.lformula: 5G Initial BLER in PUSCH for VoNR per repetition bundle 1 (no repetition) = 100 * (initial transmissions sent for bundle rep1 - initial transmissions success for bundle rep1) / (initial transmissions sent for bundle rep1)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the failure ratio for the first HARQ transmission for PUSCH for VoNR per repetition bundle 1 (no repetition).

KPI.name: 5G Residual BLER in PUSCH for VoNR per repetition bundle 1 (no repetition)
KPI.lformula: 5G Residual BLER in PUSCH for VoNR per repetition bundle 1 (no repetition) = 100 * (transmissions failed after max retry for bundle rep1) / (successful transmissions for bundle rep1 + transmissions failed after max retry for bundle rep1)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the failure ratio for the last retry of HARQ transmission for PUSCH for VoNR per repetition bundle 1 (no repetition). Residual BLER is defined as the ratio between the number of failed transmissions after the MAX HARQ retransmission reached and the number of packets to transmit, that is, the 1st HARQ transmissions. In real-time monitoring, the HARQ feedback might be received in a different measurement period than the initial transmission. For that reason, the initial transmissions in the formula are calculated as the successful transmissions plus the unsuccessful transmissions.

KPI.name: 5G Initial BLER in PUSCH for VoNR per repetition bundle 2
KPI.lformula: 5G Initial BLER in PUSCH for VoNR per repetition bundle 2 = 100 * (initial transmissions sent for bundle rep2 - initial transmissions success for bundle rep2) / (initial transmissions sent for bundle rep2)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the failure ratio for the first HARQ transmission for PUSCH for VoNR per repetition bundle 2.

KPI.name: 5G Residual BLER in PUSCH for VoNR per repetition bundle 2
KPI.lformula: 5G Residual BLER in PUSCH for VoNR per repetition bundle 2 = 100 * (transmissions failed after max retry for bundle rep2) / (successful transmissions for bundle rep2 + transmissions failed after max retry for bundle rep2)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the failure ratio for the last retry of HARQ transmission for PUSCH for VoNR per repetition bundle 2. Residual BLER is defined as the ratio between the number of failed transmissions after the MAX HARQ retransmission reached and the number of packets to transmit, that is, the 1st HARQ transmissions. In real-time monitoring, the HARQ feedback might be received in a different measurement period than the initial transmission. For that reason, the initial transmissions in the formula are calculated as the successful transmissions plus the unsuccessful transmissions.

KPI.name: 5G Initial BLER in PUSCH for VoNR per repetition bundle 4
KPI.lformula: 5G Initial BLER in PUSCH for VoNR per repetition bundle 4 = 100 * (initial transmissions sent for bundle rep4 - initial transmissions success for bundle rep4) / (initial transmissions sent for bundle rep4)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the failure ratio for the first HARQ transmission for PUSCH for VoNR per repetition bundle 4.

KPI.name: 5G Residual BLER in PUSCH for VoNR per repetition bundle 4
KPI.lformula: 5G Residual BLER in PUSCH for VoNR per repetition bundle 4 = 100 * (transmissions failed after max retry for bundle rep4) / (successful transmissions for bundle rep4 + transmissions failed after max retry for bundle rep4)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the failure ratio for the last retry of HARQ transmission for PUSCH for VoNR per repetition bundle 4. Residual BLER is defined as the ratio between the number of failed transmissions after the MAX HARQ retransmission reached and the number of packets to transmit, that is, the 1st HARQ transmissions. In real-time monitoring, the HARQ feedback might be received in a different measurement period than the initial transmission. For that reason, the initial transmissions in the formula are calculated as the successful transmissions plus the unsuccessful transmissions.

KPI.name: 5G SA Average number of UEs capable of SAg mode Repetition Type A (per cell)
KPI.lformula: Avg UE cap of SAg mode Rep A
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the average number of UEs which are capable of slot aggregation mode Repetition Type A in a cell.

KPI.name: 5G SA Maximum number of UEs capable of SAg mode Repetition Type A (per cell)
KPI.lformula: Max UE cap of SAg mode Rep A
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the maximum number of UEs which are capable of slot aggregation mode Repetition Type A in a cell.

KPI.name: 5G SA Average number of active UEs in SAg mode (per cell)
KPI.lformula: Avg act UE SAg mode
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the average number of active UEs in slot aggregation mode in a cell.

KPI.name: 5G SA Maximum number of active UEs in SAg mode (per cell)
KPI.lformula: Max act UE SAg mode
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the maximum number of active UEs in slot aggregation mode in a cell.

KPI.name: 5G SA Average number of configured SCells in downlink
KPI.lformula: Sum x(1 to 7) (x * Number of UEs with x SCell configured in DL) /(Number of UEs with x SCell configured in DL)
KPI.nformula: (Sum(UE_PCELL_1_CONF_SCELL_DL_SA + 2*UE_PCELL_2_CONF_SCELL_DL_SA + 3*UE_PCELL_3_CONF_SCELL_DL_SA + 4*UE_PCELL_4_CONF_SCELL_DL_SA + 5*UE_PCELL_5_CONF_SCELL_DL_SA + 6*UE_PCELL_6_CONF_SCELL_DL_SA + 7*UE_PCELL_7_CONF_SCELL_DL_SA) / Sum(UE_PCELL_1_CONF_SCELL_DL_SA + UE_PCELL_2_CONF_SCELL_DL_SA + UE_PCELL_3_CONF_SCELL_DL_SA + UE_PCELL_4_CONF_SCELL_DL_SA + UE_PCELL_5_CONF_SCELL_DL_SA + UE_PCELL_6_CONF_SCELL_DL_SA + UE_PCELL_7_CONF_SCELL_DL_SA))
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the average number of configured SCells in downlink. Incremented in SA PCell.

KPI.name: 5G SA Downlink Inter-gNB Carrier Aggregation Addition success ratio
KPI.lformula: SA DL Inter-gNB CA Add SR = (100 * Sum([N S-Cell Inter gNB CA addition successes]) / Sum([N S-Cell Inter gNB CA addition attempts]))
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the SA Downlink Inter-gNB Carrier Aggregation Addition success ratio with one or more SCells (from secondary gNB), counted in prime-gNB in PCell.

KPI.name: 5G SA Downlink Inter-gNB Carrier Aggregation Addition attempts
KPI.lformula: SA DL Inter-gNB CA Add att = Sum([N S-Cell Inter gNB CA addition attempts]))
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the SA Downlink Inter-gNB Carrier Aggregation Addition attempts with one or more SCells (from secondary gNB), counted in prime-gNB in PCell.

KPI.name: 5G SA Downlink Inter-gNB Carrier Aggregation Addition rejection ratio
KPI.lformula: SA DL Inter-gNB CA Add RR = (100 * Sum([N S-Cell Inter gNB CA addition rejections]) / Sum([N S-Cell Inter gNB CA addition attempts]))
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the SA Downlink Inter-gNB Carrier Aggregation Addition rejection ratio with one or more SCells (from secondary gNB), counted in prime-gNB in PCell.

KPI.name: 5G SA Downlink Inter-gNB Carrier Aggregation releases
KPI.lformula: SA DL Inter-gNB CA rel = prime-CU initiated releases + ext-CU initiated releases
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the SA Downlink Inter-gNB Carrier Aggregation releases, counted in prime-gNB in PCell. Consisting of prime-CU and ext-CU initiated releases.

KPI.name: 5G SA Downlink Inter-gNB CA SCell admission success ratio in SCell at exterior-gNB (CU level)
KPI.lformula: 5G SA DL Inter-gNB CA SCell admission SR in ext-SCell (CU) =100 * (Num of succ SCell adm in ext-SCell (CU)) /(Num of SCell adm req in ext-SCell (CU))
KPI.desc: This KPI provides success ratio of SA Downlink Inter-gNB CA SCell admission in SCell at exterior-gNB (CU level).

KPI.name: 5G SA Downlink Inter-gNB CA SCell admission attempts in SCell at exterior-gNB (CU level)
KPI.lformula: 5G SA DL Inter-gNB CA SCell admission att in ext-SCell (CU) =(Num of SCell adm req in ext-SCell (CU))
KPI.desc: This KPI provides attempts of SA Downlink Inter-gNB CA SCell admission in SCell at exterior-gNB (CU level).

KPI.name: 5G SA Downlink Inter-gNB CA RLC data volume from PCell
KPI.lformula: 5G SA DL Inter-gNB CA RLC data volume PCell
KPI.desc: This KPI provides the RLC PDU data volume sent to MAC layer by the monitored cell as PCell data for Inter-gNB CA for SA.

KPI.name: 5G SA Downlink Inter-gNB CA RLC data volume from SCell
KPI.lformula: 5G SA DL Inter-gNB CA RLC data volume SCell
KPI.desc: This KPI provides the RLC PDU data volume sent to MAC layer by the monitored cell as SCell data for Inter-gNB CA for SA.

KPI.name: 5G SA and NSA Downlink Intra/Inter-gNB CA RLC data volume from PCell
KPI.lformula: 5G SA and NSA DL Intra/Inter-gNB CA RLC data volume PCell
KPI.desc: This KPI provides the RLC PDU data volume sent to MAC layer by the monitored cell as PCell data for both Intra/Inter-gNB CA.

KPI.name: 5G SA and NSA Downlink Intra/Inter-gNB CA RLC data volume from SCell
KPI.lformula: 5G SA and NSA DL Intra/Inter-gNB CA RLC data volume SCell
KPI.desc: This KPI provides the RLC PDU data volume sent to MAC layer by the monitored cell as SCell data for both Intra/Inter-gNB CA.

KPI.name: 5G SA RRC paging message drop ratio due to excess of paging records
KPI.lformula: SA Paging DR due max limit of paging records = (dropped paging messages due to exceeding the max limit of paging records) / (paging messages scheduled + dropped paging messages due to exceeding the max limit of paging records)
KPI.desc: This KPI measures the RRC Paging Drop Ratio due to exceeding the max limit of paging records in DU.

KPI.name: 5G SA Average UL Scheduling delay for VoNR
KPI.lformula: SA avg UL sched delay 5QI1 = (sum of delay) / (number of samples)
KPI.desc: This KPI measures the average scheduling delay for 5QI voice packet transmissions, in the uplink direction.

KPI.name: 5G DL PDCP SDU end user throughput per DRB for QoS group 5 to 20
KPI.lformula: Avg DL PDCP SDU Thr UE DRB QoS 5 to 20 = (volume per burst) / (time per burst)
KPI.nformula: Sum(DL_PDCP_VOL_UE_TPUT_QOS_05 + DL_PDCP_VOL_UE_TPUT_QOS_06+ DL_PDCP_VOL_UE_TPUT_QOS_07+ DL_PDCP_VOL_UE_TPUT_QOS_08+ DL_PDCP_VOL_UE_TPUT_QOS_09+ DL_PDCP_VOL_UE_TPUT_QOS_10+ DL_PDCP_VOL_UE_TPUT_QOS_11+ DL_PDCP_VOL_UE_TPUT_QOS_12+ DL_PDCP_VOL_UE_TPUT_QOS_13+ DL_PDCP_VOL_UE_TPUT_QOS_14+ DL_PDCP_VOL_UE_TPUT_QOS_15+ DL_PDCP_VOL_UE_TPUT_QOS_16+ DL_PDCP_VOL_UE_TPUT_QOS_17+ DL_PDCP_VOL_UE_TPUT_QOS_18+ DL_PDCP_VOL_UE_TPUT_QOS_19+ DL_PDCP_VOL_UE_TPUT_QOS_20) / Sum(DL_PDCP_TIME_UE_TPUT_QOS_05 + DL_PDCP_TIME_UE_TPUT_QOS_06+ DL_PDCP_TIME_UE_TPUT_QOS_07+ DL_PDCP_TIME_UE_TPUT_QOS_08+ DL_PDCP_TIME_UE_TPUT_QOS_09+ DL_PDCP_TIME_UE_TPUT_QOS_10+ DL_PDCP_TIME_UE_TPUT_QOS_11+ DL_PDCP_TIME_UE_TPUT_QOS_12+ DL_PDCP_TIME_UE_TPUT_QOS_13+ DL_PDCP_TIME_UE_TPUT_QOS_14+ DL_PDCP_TIME_UE_TPUT_QOS_15+ DL_PDCP_TIME_UE_TPUT_QOS_16+ DL_PDCP_TIME_UE_TPUT_QOS_17+ DL_PDCP_TIME_UE_TPUT_QOS_18+ DL_PDCP_TIME_UE_TPUT_QOS_19+ DL_PDCP_TIME_UE_TPUT_QOS_20)
KPI.desc: This KPI measures the average DL PDCP SDU end user throughput per DRB for QoS groups 5 to 20. If only non-GBR connections are mapped to QoS groups 5 to 20, this KPI represents the non-GBR throughput. KPI is given as ratio of the total transmitted DL PDCP SDU volume (regardless if using only primary- or also supplemental aggregated carriers) over NR leg (SA or NSA option 3x) and LTE leg (NSA option 3x), and time interval with data in the buffer in gNB CU and gNB DU in case of NR leg (SA or NSA option 3x) and eNB in case of LTE leg (NSA option 3x) related to QoS groups 5 to 20 DRBs in the observed period.

KPI.name: 5G UL RLC SDU throughput per DRB for QoS groups 5 to 20
KPI.lformula: Avg UL RLC SDU Thr DRB QoS 5 to 20 = (volume per burst) / (time per burst)
KPI.nformula: Sum(UL_RLC_VOL_UE_TPUT_QOS_05 + UL_RLC_VOL_UE_TPUT_QOS_06+ UL_RLC_VOL_UE_TPUT_QOS_07+ UL_RLC_VOL_UE_TPUT_QOS_08+ UL_RLC_VOL_UE_TPUT_QOS_09+ UL_RLC_VOL_UE_TPUT_QOS_10+ UL_RLC_VOL_UE_TPUT_QOS_11+ UL_RLC_VOL_UE_TPUT_QOS_12+ UL_RLC_VOL_UE_TPUT_QOS_13+ UL_RLC_VOL_UE_TPUT_QOS_14+ UL_RLC_VOL_UE_TPUT_QOS_15+ UL_RLC_VOL_UE_TPUT_QOS_16+ UL_RLC_VOL_UE_TPUT_QOS_17+ UL_RLC_VOL_UE_TPUT_QOS_18+ UL_RLC_VOL_UE_TPUT_QOS_19+ UL_RLC_VOL_UE_TPUT_QOS_20) / Sum(UL_RLC_TIME_UE_TPUT_QOS_05 + UL_RLC_TIME_UE_TPUT_QOS_06+ UL_RLC_TIME_UE_TPUT_QOS_07+ UL_RLC_TIME_UE_TPUT_QOS_08+ UL_RLC_TIME_UE_TPUT_QOS_09+ UL_RLC_TIME_UE_TPUT_QOS_10+ UL_RLC_TIME_UE_TPUT_QOS_11+ UL_RLC_TIME_UE_TPUT_QOS_12+ UL_RLC_TIME_UE_TPUT_QOS_13+ UL_RLC_TIME_UE_TPUT_QOS_14+ UL_RLC_TIME_UE_TPUT_QOS_15+ UL_RLC_TIME_UE_TPUT_QOS_16+ UL_RLC_TIME_UE_TPUT_QOS_17+ UL_RLC_TIME_UE_TPUT_QOS_18+ UL_RLC_TIME_UE_TPUT_QOS_19+ UL_RLC_TIME_UE_TPUT_QOS_20)
KPI.desc: This KPI measures the average 5G UL RLC SDU throughput per DRB for QoS groups 5 to 20 according to 3GPP TS 28.552 chapter 5.1.1.3.3. If only non-GBR connections are mapped to QoS groups 5 to 20, this KPI represents the non-GBR throughput

KPI.name: 5G SA PUSCH PRB usage ratio for 5QI1
KPI.lformula: PUSCH PRB use 5QI1 = (5QI-1 PUSCH PRBs used) / (PUSCH PRBs used)
KPI.desc: This KPI measures the percentage of used PUSCH PRBs that are allocated for 5QI1 transmissions.

KPI.name: 5G SA abnormal releases per connected hour
KPI.lformula: 5G SA QoS Flow Drop per con hour = (1000 * 3600)*(number of abnormally released QoS flow attempts initiated by gNB and AMF)/(In-session connected time for QoS flows)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the number of abnormally released QoS flows per hour of connected time.

KPI.name: 5G SA abnormal releases per connected hour (double-Ng mapped to 'UE lost')
KPI.lformula: 5G SA QoS Flow Drop per con hour excl double-Ng = (1000 * 3600)*(number of abnormally released QoS flow attempts initiated by gNB and AMF - Number of QosFlows releases initiated by AMF due to double-Ng)/(In-session connected time for QoS flows)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the number of abnormally released QoS flows per hour of connected time excluding QoS flows releases initiated by AMF due to double-Ng.

KPI.name: 5G SA 5QI-1 QoS Flow Setup Failure Ratio excluding fallback and ongoing handover.
KPI.lformula: 5QI-1 QoS Flow FR excl fallb and HO = 100*(Num of 5QI-1 Flow Setup Fail) / (Num of Setup Att for 5QI-1 QoS Flows - 5QI1 QoS flow setup attempts that initiated a fallback - Number of 5QI-1 QoS Flow setup failures due to ongoing handover)
KPI.nformula: (100 * Sum(NG_FLOW_STP_FAIL_UE_LOST_5QI1 + NG_FLOW_STP_FAIL_RAD_PROC_5QI1 + NG_FLOW_SETUP_FAIL_UNSPC_5QI1 + NG_FLOW_STP_FAIL_WRG_MSG_5QI1 + NG_FLOW_SETUP_FAIL_RRNA_5QI1 + NG_FLOW_SETUP_FAIL_UPIP_5QI1 + NG_FLOW_SETUP_FAIL_TRSRES_5QI1 + NG_FLOW_STP_F_MISC_UP_5QI1) / Sum(NG_FLOW_SETUP_ATT_TOT_5QI1 -NG_FLOW_STP_FAIL_FALBACK_5QI1 - NG_FLOW_STP_FAIL_HO_5QI1))
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the Failure Ratio for 5QI-1 QoS Flow setup.Two cases are excluded from this KPI :1. When fallback procedure is initiated2. 5QI-1 QoS Flows that failed to set up due to an ongoing handover.

KPI.name: 5G SA 5QI-1 QoS flow setup success ratio excluding fallback and ongoing handover.
KPI.lformula: SA 5QI1 QoS fl stp SR excl fallb and HO = 100 * (5QI1 QoS flow successful setups) / (5QI1 QoS flow setup attempts - 5QI1 QoS flow setup attempts that initiated a fallback - Number of 5QI-1 QoS Flow setup failures due to ongoing handover)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the success ratio for 5QI-1 QoS flow setup.Two cases are excluded from this KPI :1. When fallback procedure is initiated2. 5QI-1 QoS Flows that failed to set up due to an ongoing handover.

KPI.name: 5G Average MCS used in downlink for PDSCH with LowSE MCS table
KPI.lformula: Sum for all MCS(MCSx number * packets sent in DL with MCS x and LowSE table)/ All packets sent in DL with LowSE MCS table

KPI.name: 5G Initial BLER for High Reliability downlink transmissions in PDSCH
KPI.lformula: Init BLER HR DL PDSCH tx = 100*(Number of unsuccessful initial DL TB transmissions)/ (Total number of initial DL TB transmissions) =100 * (Total number of initial DL TB transmissions - Number of successful initial DL TB transmissions) / (Total number of initial DL TB transmission)
KPI.nformula: ((100*Sum(PDSCH_INITX_64TBL_HRD_PRFL1+ PDSCH_INITX_64TBL_HRD_PRFL2+ PDSCH_INITX_LOWSE_HRD_PRFL1+ PDSCH_INITX_LOWSE_HRD_PRFL2- (PDSCH_SUCC_INI_64TBL_HRD_PRFL1+ PDSCH_SUCC_INI_64TBL_HRD_PRFL2+ PDSCH_SUCC_INI_LOWSE_HRD_PRFL1+ PDSCH_SUCC_INI_LOWSE_HRD_PRFL2))/Sum(PDSCH_INITX_64TBL_HRD_PRFL1+ PDSCH_INITX_64TBL_HRD_PRFL2+ PDSCH_INITX_LOWSE_HRD_PRFL1+ PDSCH_INITX_LOWSE_HRD_PRFL2)))
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the Initial Block Error Ratio calculated as the failure ratio for the first High Reliability HARQ transmission in PDSCH. HARQ feedback DTX is considered as unsuccessful.

KPI.name: 5G Residual BLER for High Reliability downlink transmissions in PDSCH
KPI.lformula: Resid BLER HR DL PDSCH tx = 100 * (transmissions failed after max retry) / (successful transmissions + transmissions failed after max retry)
KPI.nformula: (((100*Sum(PDSCH_UNSUCC_64TBL_HRD_PRFL1+ PDSCH_UNSUCC_64TBL_HRD_PRFL2+ PDSCH_UNSUCC_LOWSE_HRD_PRFL1+ PDSCH_UNSUCC_LOWSE_HRD_PRFL2)/Sum(PDSCH_SUCC_ANY_64TBL_HRD_PRFL1+ PDSCH_SUCC_ANY_64TBL_HRD_PRFL2+ PDSCH_SUCC_ANY_LOWSE_HRD_PRFL1+ PDSCH_SUCC_ANY_LOWSE_HRD_PRFL2+ PDSCH_UNSUCC_64TBL_HRD_PRFL1+ PDSCH_UNSUCC_64TBL_HRD_PRFL2+ PDSCH_UNSUCC_LOWSE_HRD_PRFL1+ PDSCH_UNSUCC_LOWSE_HRD_PRFL2))))
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the residual Block Error Ratio (BLER) for High Reliability downlink transmissions in PDSCH. HARQ feedback DTX is considered as unsuccessful.

KPI.name: 5G Initial BLER for High Reliability uplink transmissions in PUSCH
KPI.lformula: Init BLER HR UL PUSCH tx = 100 * (initial transmissions failed) / (initial transmissions sent) =100 * (initial transmissions sent - initial transmissions success) / (initial transmissions sent)
KPI.nformula: (100 * Sum(PUSCH_INITX_64TBL_HRD_PRFL1+ PUSCH_INITX_64TBL_HRD_PRFL2+ PUSCH_INITX_LOWSE_HRD_PRFL1+ PUSCH_INITX_LOWSE_HRD_PRFL2-(PUSCH_SUCC_INI_64TBL_HRD_PRFL1+ PUSCH_SUCC_INI_64TBL_HRD_PRFL2+ PUSCH_SUCC_INI_LOWSE_HRD_PRFL1+ PUSCH_SUCC_INI_LOWSE_HRD_PRFL2))/Sum(PUSCH_INITX_64TBL_HRD_PRFL1+ PUSCH_INITX_64TBL_HRD_PRFL2+ PUSCH_INITX_LOWSE_HRD_PRFL1+ PUSCH_INITX_LOWSE_HRD_PRFL2))
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the failure ratio for the first High Reliability HARQ transmission for PUSCH.

KPI.name: 5G Residual BLER for High Reliability uplink transmissions in PUSCH
KPI.lformula: Resid BLER HR UL PUSCH tx = 100 * (transmissions failed after max retry) / (successful transmissions + transmissions failed after max retry)
KPI.nformula: (((100*Sum(PUSCH_UNSUCC_64TBL_HRD_PRFL1+ PUSCH_UNSUCC_64TBL_HRD_PRFL2+ PUSCH_UNSUCC_LOWSE_HRD_PRFL1+ PUSCH_UNSUCC_LOWSE_HRD_PRFL2)/Sum(PUSCH_SUCC_ANY_64TBL_HRD_PRFL1+ PUSCH_SUCC_ANY_64TBL_HRD_PRFL2+ PUSCH_SUCC_ANY_LOWSE_HRD_PRFL1+ PUSCH_SUCC_ANY_LOWSE_HRD_PRFL2+ PUSCH_UNSUCC_64TBL_HRD_PRFL1+ PUSCH_UNSUCC_64TBL_HRD_PRFL2+ PUSCH_UNSUCC_LOWSE_HRD_PRFL1+ PUSCH_UNSUCC_LOWSE_HRD_PRFL2))))
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the residual Block Error Ratio (BLER) for High Reliability uplink transmissions in PUSCH.

KPI.desc: This KPI shows the failure ratio for the first Basic Reliability HARQ transmission for PUSCH.
