KPI.desc: This KPI shows the residual Block Error Ratio (BLER) for Basic Reliability uplink transmissions in PUSCH.

KPI.name: 5G DL MAC SDU UE Throughput at P(S)Cell for FR1
KPI.lformula: Avg DL MAC SDU UE Thr P(S)Cell FR1 = ThpVolDl DL UE throughput volume at RLC PDU (MAC SDU) level for FR1 / ThpTimeDl DL UE throughput time at RLC PDU (MAC SDU) level for FR1
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the average DL RLC PDU (MAC SDU) level end-user throughput at P(S)Cell for FR1. It is given as ratio of the total transmitted DL RLC PDU volume (regardless if using only primary- or also supplemental aggregated carriers) and time interval with data in the buffer in gNB DU related to the DRBs in the observed period.

KPI.name: 5G DL MAC SDU UE Throughput at serving cell
KPI.lformula: Avg DL MAC SDU UE Thr Cell = (ThpVolUl DL UE Throughput Volume at MAC SDU Level) / (ThpTimeDl DL UE Throughput Time at MAC SDU Level)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the average DL MAC SDU level end-user throughput at NR serving cell. It is given as the ratio of the total transmitted DL MAC SDU volume in the serving cell and time interval with data in the MAC buffer related to the DRBs in the observed period.

KPI.name: 5G Average delay DL air-interface for AM RLC per cell
KPI.lformula: sum of (delay DL air-interface for AM RLC per cell) / (total number of RLC SDUs transmitted to UE successfully)
KPI.desc: This KPI provides the average (arithmetic mean) time it takes for RLC SDU packet from MAC in DU to the UE and back from the UE to DU, in the downlink direction for AM RLC per cell.The exact time span is measured as difference between:- the point in time when an RLC SDU packet arrives to MAC layer,- the point in time when the reception of RLC ACK for AM mode for the corresponding RLC SDU packet is confirmed in DU in the same component.

KPI.name: 5G Average delay DL in CU-UP per cell
KPI.lformula: Sum of (time when sending a PDCP SDU to the gNB-DU at the egress PDCP layer on F1-U/Xn-U, minus time of arrival of the same packet at NG-U ingress IP termination) / (total number of PDCP SDUs arriving at NG-U ingress IP termination)
KPI.desc: This KPI provides the average (arithmetic mean) PDCP SDU delay on the downlink within the gNB-CU-UP per cell, for all PDCP packets.

KPI.name: 5G Average PDCP re-ordering delay in the UL per cell
KPI.lformula: Sum of (time when sending a PDCP SDU to the core at the egress PDCP layer on NG-U IP termination, minus time of arrival of the same packet at F1-U/Xn-U ingress) / (total number of PDCP SDUs leaving the NG-U egress)
KPI.desc: This KPI provides the average (arithmetic mean) PDCP re-ordering delay on the uplink within the gNB-CU-UP per cell.

KPI.name: 5G Average DL scheduling delay in MAC with UE in DRX with active time of DRX Cycle per cell
KPI.lformula: sum of DL initial scheduling delay when UE is in DRX with active time of DRX Cycle / number of samples
KPI.desc: This KPI provides the average (arithmetic mean) MAC scheduling delay in the downlink within L2-PS while the UE monitors the PDCCH. The UE monitors the PDCCH if it is configured without DRX or when it is configured with DRX and the DRX Cycle is within active time. DRX Cycle consists of active and sleep time, where active time means that UE monitors PDCCH, while sleep time means that UE neither performs any monitoring on PDCCH nor any reporting on PUCCH. DRX inactive phase is when UE monitors PDCCH and is equal to active time of DRX Cycle.

KPI.name: 5G Average DL scheduling delay in MAC with UE in DRX with inactive time of DRX Cycle per cell
KPI.lformula: sum of DL initial scheduling delay when UE is in DRX with inactive time of DRX Cycle / number of samples
KPI.desc: This KPI provides the average (arithmetic mean) MAC scheduling delay in the downlink within L2-PS when UE is configured with DRX and when the DRX Cycle is within sleep time (data are pending during that time). DRX Cycle consists of active and sleep time, where active time means that UE monitors PDCCH, while sleep time means that UE neither performs any monitoring on PDCCH nor any reporting on PUCCH. DRX active phase is when UE does not monitor PDCCH and is equal to sleep/inactive time of DRX Cycle.

KPI.name: 5G Average Initial Burst scheduling delay in DL per cell
KPI.lformula: sum of gNB DL initial burst scheduling delay / number of DL initial bursts in PDCP
KPI.desc: This KPI provides the average (arithmetic mean) Initial Burst scheduling delay in DL per cell.

KPI.name: 5G Average UL Grant delay after SR reception per cell
KPI.lformula: sum of UL Grant delay after SR reception / number of SR receptions
KPI.desc: This KPI provides the average (arithmetic mean) UL Grant delay in MAC after SR reception per cell.

KPI.name: 5G Average UL MAC contention delay after BSR reception per cell
KPI.lformula: sum of MAC contention delay after BSR reception / number of BSR receptions
KPI.nformula: (UL_MAC_CONT_DLY_LCG0 + UL_MAC_CONT_DLY_LCG1 + UL_MAC_CONT_DLY_LCG2 + UL_MAC_CONT_DLY_LCG3 + UL_MAC_CONT_DLY_LCG4 + UL_MAC_CONT_DLY_LCG5 + UL_MAC_CONT_DLY_LCG6 + UL_MAC_CONT_DLY_LCG7) / (1000*(TOT_UL_BURST_MAC_LCG0 + TOT_UL_BURST_MAC_LCG1 + TOT_UL_BURST_MAC_LCG2 + TOT_UL_BURST_MAC_LCG3 + TOT_UL_BURST_MAC_LCG4 + TOT_UL_BURST_MAC_LCG5 + TOT_UL_BURST_MAC_LCG6 + TOT_UL_BURST_MAC_LCG7))
KPI.desc: This KPI provides the average (arithmetic mean) UL MAC contention delay after BSR reception per cell.

KPI.name: 5G PDCP SDU discard ratio in UL per BTS
KPI.lformula: Percentage of discarded UL PDCP SDU packets per BTS = 100* (discarded UL PDCP SDU packets due to different reasons) / (all received UL PDCP SDU packets in gNB)
KPI.nformula: 100*Sum(UL_SDU_DISC_OTHER_QOS_GRP_01 + UL_SDU_DISC_OTHER_QOS_GRP_02 + UL_SDU_DISC_OTHER_QOS_GRP_03 + UL_SDU_DISC_OTHER_QOS_GRP_04 + UL_SDU_DISC_OTHER_QOS_GRP_05 + UL_SDU_DISC_OTHER_QOS_GRP_06 + UL_SDU_DISC_OTHER_QOS_GRP_07 + UL_SDU_DISC_OTHER_QOS_GRP_08 + UL_SDU_DISC_OTHER_QOS_GRP_09 + UL_SDU_DISC_OTHER_QOS_GRP_10 + UL_SDU_DISC_OTHER_QOS_GRP_11 + UL_SDU_DISC_OTHER_QOS_GRP_12 + UL_SDU_DISC_OTHER_QOS_GRP_13 + UL_SDU_DISC_OTHER_QOS_GRP_14 + UL_SDU_DISC_OTHER_QOS_GRP_15 + UL_SDU_DISC_OTHER_QOS_GRP_16 + UL_SDU_DISC_OTHER_QOS_GRP_17 + UL_SDU_DISC_OTHER_QOS_GRP_18 + UL_SDU_DISC_OTHER_QOS_GRP_19 + UL_SDU_DISC_OTHER_QOS_GRP_20)/ Sum(UL_SDU_RX_NSA_QOS_GRP_01 + UL_SDU_RX_NSA_QOS_GRP_02 + UL_SDU_RX_NSA_QOS_GRP_03 + UL_SDU_RX_NSA_QOS_GRP_04 + UL_SDU_RX_NSA_QOS_GRP_05 + UL_SDU_RX_NSA_QOS_GRP_06 + UL_SDU_RX_NSA_QOS_GRP_07 + UL_SDU_RX_NSA_QOS_GRP_08 + UL_SDU_RX_NSA_QOS_GRP_09 + UL_SDU_RX_NSA_QOS_GRP_10 + UL_SDU_RX_NSA_QOS_GRP_11 + UL_SDU_RX_NSA_QOS_GRP_12 + UL_SDU_RX_NSA_QOS_GRP_13 + UL_SDU_RX_NSA_QOS_GRP_14 + UL_SDU_RX_NSA_QOS_GRP_15 + UL_SDU_RX_NSA_QOS_GRP_16 + UL_SDU_RX_NSA_QOS_GRP_17 + UL_SDU_RX_NSA_QOS_GRP_18 + UL_SDU_RX_NSA_QOS_GRP_19 + UL_SDU_RX_NSA_QOS_GRP_20 + UL_SDU_RX_SA_QOS_GRP_01 + UL_SDU_RX_SA_QOS_GRP_02 + UL_SDU_RX_SA_QOS_GRP_03 + UL_SDU_RX_SA_QOS_GRP_04 + UL_SDU_RX_SA_QOS_GRP_05 + UL_SDU_RX_SA_QOS_GRP_06 + UL_SDU_RX_SA_QOS_GRP_07 + UL_SDU_RX_SA_QOS_GRP_08 + UL_SDU_RX_SA_QOS_GRP_09 + UL_SDU_RX_SA_QOS_GRP_10 + UL_SDU_RX_SA_QOS_GRP_11 + UL_SDU_RX_SA_QOS_GRP_12 + UL_SDU_RX_SA_QOS_GRP_13 + UL_SDU_RX_SA_QOS_GRP_14 + UL_SDU_RX_SA_QOS_GRP_15 + UL_SDU_RX_SA_QOS_GRP_16 + UL_SDU_RX_SA_QOS_GRP_17 + UL_SDU_RX_SA_QOS_GRP_18 + UL_SDU_RX_SA_QOS_GRP_19 + UL_SDU_RX_SA_QOS_GRP_20 + UL_SDU_DISC_OTHER_QOS_GRP_01 + UL_SDU_DISC_OTHER_QOS_GRP_02 + UL_SDU_DISC_OTHER_QOS_GRP_03 + UL_SDU_DISC_OTHER_QOS_GRP_04 + UL_SDU_DISC_OTHER_QOS_GRP_05 + UL_SDU_DISC_OTHER_QOS_GRP_06 + UL_SDU_DISC_OTHER_QOS_GRP_07 + UL_SDU_DISC_OTHER_QOS_GRP_08 + UL_SDU_DISC_OTHER_QOS_GRP_09 + UL_SDU_DISC_OTHER_QOS_GRP_10 + UL_SDU_DISC_OTHER_QOS_GRP_11 + UL_SDU_DISC_OTHER_QOS_GRP_12 + UL_SDU_DISC_OTHER_QOS_GRP_13 + UL_SDU_DISC_OTHER_QOS_GRP_14 + UL_SDU_DISC_OTHER_QOS_GRP_15 + UL_SDU_DISC_OTHER_QOS_GRP_16 + UL_SDU_DISC_OTHER_QOS_GRP_17 + UL_SDU_DISC_OTHER_QOS_GRP_18 + UL_SDU_DISC_OTHER_QOS_GRP_19 + UL_SDU_DISC_OTHER_QOS_GRP_20)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the PDCP SDU discard ratio in the uplink direction measured per BTS.

KPI.name: 5G DL RLC PDU retransmission ratio requested by High RLC per DU
KPI.lformula: Percentage of retransmitted DL RLC PDU packets in L2-Hi per DU = 100 * (retransmitted packets / all packets)
KPI.nformula: 100*Sum(DL_RLC_PDU_RETX_H_QOS_GRP_01 + DL_RLC_PDU_RETX_H_QOS_GRP_02 + DL_RLC_PDU_RETX_H_QOS_GRP_03 + DL_RLC_PDU_RETX_H_QOS_GRP_04 + DL_RLC_PDU_RETX_H_QOS_GRP_05 + DL_RLC_PDU_RETX_H_QOS_GRP_06 + DL_RLC_PDU_RETX_H_QOS_GRP_07 + DL_RLC_PDU_RETX_H_QOS_GRP_08 + DL_RLC_PDU_RETX_H_QOS_GRP_09 + DL_RLC_PDU_RETX_H_QOS_GRP_10 + DL_RLC_PDU_RETX_H_QOS_GRP_11 + DL_RLC_PDU_RETX_H_QOS_GRP_12 + DL_RLC_PDU_RETX_H_QOS_GRP_13 + DL_RLC_PDU_RETX_H_QOS_GRP_14 + DL_RLC_PDU_RETX_H_QOS_GRP_15 + DL_RLC_PDU_RETX_H_QOS_GRP_16 + DL_RLC_PDU_RETX_H_QOS_GRP_17 + DL_RLC_PDU_RETX_H_QOS_GRP_18 + DL_RLC_PDU_RETX_H_QOS_GRP_19 + DL_RLC_PDU_RETX_H_QOS_GRP_20) / Sum(DL_RLC_PDU_TX_H_QOS_GRP_01 + DL_RLC_PDU_TX_H_QOS_GRP_02 + DL_RLC_PDU_TX_H_QOS_GRP_03 + DL_RLC_PDU_TX_H_QOS_GRP_04 + DL_RLC_PDU_TX_H_QOS_GRP_05 + DL_RLC_PDU_TX_H_QOS_GRP_06 + DL_RLC_PDU_TX_H_QOS_GRP_07 + DL_RLC_PDU_TX_H_QOS_GRP_08 + DL_RLC_PDU_TX_H_QOS_GRP_09 + DL_RLC_PDU_TX_H_QOS_GRP_10 + DL_RLC_PDU_TX_H_QOS_GRP_11 + DL_RLC_PDU_TX_H_QOS_GRP_12 + DL_RLC_PDU_TX_H_QOS_GRP_13 + DL_RLC_PDU_TX_H_QOS_GRP_14 + DL_RLC_PDU_TX_H_QOS_GRP_15 + DL_RLC_PDU_TX_H_QOS_GRP_16 + DL_RLC_PDU_TX_H_QOS_GRP_17 + DL_RLC_PDU_TX_H_QOS_GRP_18 + DL_RLC_PDU_TX_H_QOS_GRP_19 + DL_RLC_PDU_TX_H_QOS_GRP_20 + DL_RLC_PDU_RETX_H_QOS_GRP_01 + DL_RLC_PDU_RETX_H_QOS_GRP_02 + DL_RLC_PDU_RETX_H_QOS_GRP_03 + DL_RLC_PDU_RETX_H_QOS_GRP_04 + DL_RLC_PDU_RETX_H_QOS_GRP_05 + DL_RLC_PDU_RETX_H_QOS_GRP_06 + DL_RLC_PDU_RETX_H_QOS_GRP_07 + DL_RLC_PDU_RETX_H_QOS_GRP_08 + DL_RLC_PDU_RETX_H_QOS_GRP_09 + DL_RLC_PDU_RETX_H_QOS_GRP_10 + DL_RLC_PDU_RETX_H_QOS_GRP_11 + DL_RLC_PDU_RETX_H_QOS_GRP_12 + DL_RLC_PDU_RETX_H_QOS_GRP_13 + DL_RLC_PDU_RETX_H_QOS_GRP_14 + DL_RLC_PDU_RETX_H_QOS_GRP_15 + DL_RLC_PDU_RETX_H_QOS_GRP_16 + DL_RLC_PDU_RETX_H_QOS_GRP_17 + DL_RLC_PDU_RETX_H_QOS_GRP_18 + DL_RLC_PDU_RETX_H_QOS_GRP_19 + DL_RLC_PDU_RETX_H_QOS_GRP_20)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the retransmission ratio of the RLC Data PDUs in the downlink direction requested by High RLC measured in DU.

KPI.name: 5G UL RLC PDU retransmission ratio requested by High RLC per DU
KPI.lformula: Percentage of retransmitted UL RLC PDU packets in L2-Hi per DU = 100 * (retransmitted packets / all packets)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the retransmission ratio of the RLC Data PDUs in the uplink direction requested by High RLC measured in DU.

KPI.name: 5G SA Active QoS Flow Drop Ratio
KPI.lformula: SA Active QoS flow drop Ratio = ((number of abnormally released in-session QoS flow attempts initiated by gNB and AMF)/(Total number of QoS release attempts + Number of suspended QoS flows)) *100
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the ratio of QoS flows with data in a buffer that were abnormally released to the total number of QoS flow release attempts (gNB and AMF initiated).

KPI.name: 5G SA Active QoS Flow Drop Ratio (double-Ng mapped to 'UE lost')
KPI.lformula: SA Active QoS flow drop Ratio excl double-Ng = ((number of abnormally released in-session QoS flow attempts initiated by gNB - Number of in-session QosFlow releases initiated by AMF due to double-Ng)/(Total number of QoS release attempts + Number of suspended QoS flows)) *100
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the ratio of QoS flows with data in a buffer that were abnormally released excluding active QoS flow releases initiated by AMF due to double-Ng to the total number of QoS flow release attempts (gNB and AMF initiated).

KPI.name: 5G SA Average Active time for QoS flows
KPI.lformula: SA QoS flow Avg Active time = (cumulative in-session state time of QoS Flows) / Tot num of QoS Flows releases + Number of suspended UE Contexts)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the duration a QoS Flow is active with data in a buffer.

KPI.name: 5G SA Average Time to setup VoNR (5QI1) QoS Flow
KPI.lformula: SA Avg 5QI1 QoS setup time = Time to setup 5QI QoS Flow/Number of 5QI-1 QoS FlowIdentifiers Setup Successfully
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the average time needed to setup a 5QI1 QoS Flow.

KPI.name: 5G SA Max Time to setup VoNR (5QI1) QoS Flow
KPI.lformula: SA Max 5QI1 QoS setup time = The maximum time needed to setup a 5QI1 QoS Flow
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the maximum time needed to setup a 5QI1 QoS Flow.

KPI.name: 5G SA Active QoS flow Retainability Rate
KPI.lformula: SA Active QoS flow Retainability Rate = Number of abnormally released QoS flow with data in any of the buffers / Active QoS flow Time
KPI.desc: This KPI shows how often an end-user abnormally loses a QoS flow during the time the QoS flow is used. It is obtained by number of QoS flows with data in a buffer that was abnormally released, normalized with number of data session time units.

KPI.name: 5G SA Active QoS flow Retainability Rate (double-Ng mapped to 'UE lost')
KPI.lformula: SA Active QoS flow Retainability Rate excl double-Ng = Number of abnormally released QoS flow with data in any of the buffers excluding QoS flows releases initiated by AMF due to double-Ng / Active QoS flow Time
KPI.desc: This KPI shows how often an end-user abnormally loses a QoS flow during the time the QoS flow is used, excluding QoS flows releases initiated by AMF due to double-Ng. It is obtained by number of QoS flows with data in a buffer that was abnormally released, normalized with number of data session time units.

KPI.name: 5G NSA ERAB accessibility
KPI.lformula: NSA ERAB Accessibility = (Number of ERAB Setups via SgNB Addition Request or in SgNB Modification Request) / Number of ERAB Setups completing SN Status Transfer)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the Non Stand Alone call accessibility on 5G perspective. The formula monitors the call setup procedure from reception of SgNB Addition Request at SgNB until the X2AP SN Status Transfer is received by SgNB.ERAB addition to an existing ENDC connection via SgNB modification procedure is also considered.

KPI.name: 5G SA Downlink carrier aggregation reconfiguration success ratio
KPI.lformula: SA DL CA reconf SR = 100 * Number of successful RRC Reconfiguration attempts configuring x SCells in DL for SA mode / Number of RRC Reconfiguration attempts with x SCells in DL for SA mode
KPI.nformula: (100 * Sum(RRC_RECONF_ADD1DLSCELL_SUCC_SA+ RRC_RECONF_ADD2DLSCELL_SUCC_SA+ RRC_RECONF_ADD3DLSCELL_SUCC_SA+ RRC_RECONF_ADD5DLSCELL_SUCC_SA+ RRC_RECONF_ADD6DLSCELL_SUCC_SA+ RRC_RECONF_ADD7DLSCELL_SUCC_SA+ RRC_RECONF_ADD4DLSCELL_SUCC_SA)/Sum(RRC_RECONF_ADD1DLSCELL_ATT_SA+ RRC_RECONF_ADD2DLSCELL_ATT_SA+ RRC_RECONF_ADD3DLSCELL_ATT_SA+ RRC_RECONF_ADD4DLSCELL_ATT_SA+ RRC_RECONF_ADD5DLSCELL_ATT_SA+ RRC_RECONF_ADD6DLSCELL_ATT_SA+ RRC_RECONF_ADD7DLSCELL_ATT_SA))
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the SA RRC Reconfiguration success ratio for carrier aggregation in downlink.

KPI.name: 5G SA Downlink carrier aggregation reconfiguration attempts
KPI.lformula: SA DL CA reconf att = Number of RRC Reconfiguration attempts with x SCells in DL for SA mode
KPI.nformula: (Sum(RRC_RECONF_ADD1DLSCELL_ATT_SA+ RRC_RECONF_ADD2DLSCELL_ATT_SA+ RRC_RECONF_ADD3DLSCELL_ATT_SA+ RRC_RECONF_ADD4DLSCELL_ATT_SA+ RRC_RECONF_ADD5DLSCELL_ATT_SA+ RRC_RECONF_ADD6DLSCELL_ATT_SA+ RRC_RECONF_ADD7DLSCELL_ATT_SA))
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the SA RRC Reconfiguration attempts for carrier aggregation in downlink.

KPI.name: 5G SA Uplink carrier aggregation reconfiguration success ratio
KPI.lformula: SA UL CA reconf SR = 100 * Successful RRC Reconfigurations attempts for x SCells Addition in UL for SA mode / RRC Reconfigurations attempts for x SCells Addition in UL for SA mode
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the SA RRC Reconfiguration success ratio for carrier aggregation in uplink.

KPI.name: 5G SA Uplink carrier aggregation reconfiguration attempts
KPI.lformula: SA UL CA reconf att = RRC Reconfigurations attempts for x SCells Addition in UL for SA mode
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the SA RRC Reconfiguration attempts for carrier aggregation in uplink.

KPI.name: 5G SA Average number of configured SCells in uplink
KPI.lformula: SA avg conf SCells in UL = Sum x(1 to 3) (x * Number of UEs with x SCell configured in UL) /(Number of UEs with x SCell configured in UL)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the average number of configured SCells in uplink. Incremented in SA PCell.

KPI.name: 5G Average number of Resources used for PUCCH Format 1 per uplink slots
KPI.lformula: 5G Average number of Resources used for PUCCH Format 1 per UL slots = (Cumulative sum of Resources used for PUCCH F1) / (Number of uplink slots)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the average number of Resources used for PUCCH Format 1 per uplink slots.

KPI.name: 5G Average number of Resources used for PUCCH Format 3 per uplink slots
KPI.lformula: 5G Average number of Resources used for PUCCH Format 3 per UL slots = (Cumulative sum of Resources used for PUCCH F3) / (Number of uplink slots)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the average number of Resources used for PUCCH Format 3 per uplink slots.

KPI.name: 5G Average number of Resources used for HARQ A/N for PUCCH Format 1 per uplink slots
KPI.lformula: 5G Average number of Resources used for HARQ A/N for PUCCH Format 1 per UL slots = (Cumulative sum of Resources used for HARQ A/N for PUCCH F1) / (Number of uplink slots)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the average number of Resources used for HARQ A/N for PUCCH Format 1 per uplink slots.

KPI.name: 5G Average number of Resources used for HARQ A/N for PUCCH Format 3 per uplink slots
KPI.lformula: 5G Average number of Resources used for HARQ A/N for PUCCH Format 3 per UL slots = (Cumulative sum of Resources used for HARQ A/N for PUCCH F3) / (Number of uplink slots)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the average number of Resources used for HARQ A/N for PUCCH Format 3 per uplink slots.

KPI.name: 5G SA QoS Flow setup success ratio for incoming handovers
KPI.lformula: SA QoS fl stp SR inc HO = 100 * (Number of QoS flows during successful setup attempts for incoming handover in target cell) / (Number of QoS flows during setup attempt for incoming handover in target cell)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the success ratio of QoS Flow setup procedure for incoming handovers.

KPI.name: 5G SA PDU session resource modification success ratio
KPI.lformula: PDU ses rsrc mod SR = 100 * (Number of PDU SESSION RESOURCE MODIFICATION RESPONSE Success sent) / (Number of PDU SESSION RESOURCE MODIFICATION REQUEST received)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the success ratio of the PDU session resource modification, that is when all the requested PDU sessions have been successfully modified.

KPI.name: 5G SA Number of QoS Flow setup attempts for incoming handovers
KPI.lformula: SA QoS fl stp att inc HO = Number of QoS flows during setup attempt for incoming handover in target cell
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the number of QoS Flow setup attempts for incoming handovers.

KPI.name: 5G SA Number of PDU session resource modification requests received
KPI.lformula: PDU ses rsrc mod req recvd = Number of PDU SESSION RESOURCE MODIFICATION REQUEST received
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the number of NGAP: 'PDU session resource modification request' messages received at gNB-CU.

KPI.name: 5G BWP3 Configuration Success Ratio
KPI.lformula: BWP3 Conf SuccR= 100* (Number of RRC RECONFIGURATION COMPLETE messages received confirming configuration of third bandwidth part (BWP3))/ (number of RRC RECONFIGURATION messages sent for configuring third bandwidth part (BWP3))
KPI.desc: This KPI shows success ratio of RRC RECONFIGURATION procedure initiated configuring third bandwidth part (BWP3) on P(S)Cell.

KPI.name: 5G SA Radio admission success ratio for GBR type of 5QIs for BWP1
KPI.lformula: SA AC SR GBR BWP1 = 100 * (The number admission control success in BWP1 for GBR) / (The number admission control attempt in BWP1 for GBR)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the success ratio of radio admission for Stand Alone GBR type of 5QIs for first dedicated bandwidth part (BWP1).

KPI.name: 5G SA Radio admission success ratio for GBR type of 5QIs for BWP2
KPI.lformula: SA AC SR GBR BWP2 = 100 * (The number admission control success in BWP2 for GBR) / (The number admission control attempt in BWP2 for GBR)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the success ratio of radio admission for Stand Alone GBR type of 5QIs for second dedicated bandwidth part (BWP2).

KPI.name: 5G SA Radio admission success ratio for GBR type of 5QIs for BWP3
KPI.lformula: SA AC SR GBR BWP3 = 100 * (The number admission control success in BWP3 for GBR) / (The number admission control attempt in BWP3 for GBR)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the success ratio of radio admission for Stand Alone GBR type of 5QIs for third dedicated bandwidth part (BWP3).

KPI.name: 5G Average number of scheduled UEs in DL per BWP3
KPI.lformula: Avg nr sched UE DL BWP3= Number of scheduled UEs in DL per BWP3/ (number of available DL slots for data transmission)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the average number of scheduled UEs per downlink slot per BWP3.

KPI.name: 5G Maximum number of scheduled UEs in DL per BWP3
KPI.lformula: Max nr sched UE DL BWP3= Max number of scheduled UEs in DL per BWP3
KPI.desc: This KPI shows maximum number of scheduled UEs per downlink slot per BWP3.

KPI.name: 5G Average number of scheduled UEs in UL per BWP3
KPI.lformula: Avg nr sched UE UL BWP3= Number of scheduled UEs in UL per BWP3/ (number of available UL slots for data transmission)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the average number of scheduled UEs per uplink slot per BWP3.

KPI.name: 5G Maximum number of scheduled UEs in UL per BWP3
KPI.lformula: Max nr sched UE UL BWP3= Max number of scheduled UEs in UL per BWP3
KPI.desc: This KPI shows maximum number of scheduled UEs per uplink slot per BWP3.

KPI.name: 5G NSA SgNB addition preparation success ratio upon Inter-MeNB HO trigger
KPI.lformula: NSA SgNB add prep SR Inter-MeNB HO trigger = 100 * (Number of X2AP: SGNB ADDITION ACKNOWLEDGE sent by gNB to target LTE eNB upon Inter-MeNB HO trigger) / (Number of SGNB ADDITION REQUEST received from target LTE eNB upon Inter-MeNB HO trigger)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the 5G NSA SgNB addition preparation success ratio upon Inter-MeNB HO trigger. The preparation attempts are the number of X2AP: SGNB ADDITION REQUEST messages received from target LTE eNB, upon Inter-MeNB HO trigger. The successful preparations are given by the number of X2AP: SGNB ADDITION ACKNOWLEDGE sent by gNB to target LTE eNB, upon Inter-MeNB HO trigger.

KPI.name: 5G Maximum utilization ratio of PDSCH PRBs per cell per resource group
KPI.lformula: Max util ratio PDSCH PRBs per cell per resource group
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the maximum utilization ratio of PDSCH PRBs per cell per resource group.

KPI.name: 5G Maximum utilization ratio of PUSCH PRBs per cell per resource group
KPI.lformula: Max util ratio PUSCH PRBs per cell per resource group
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the maximum utilization ratio of PUSCH PRBs per cell per resource group.

KPI.name: 5G Average utilization of PDSCH PRBs for slice-aware traffic
KPI.lformula: Avg util ratio PDSCH PRBs for slice-aware traffic = 100 * (DL PRBs used for slice-aware scheduling per resource group) / (Number of DL PRBs available for slice-aware scheduling in the cell)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the average utilization of PDSCH PRBs for slice-aware traffic per cell.

KPI.name: 5G Average utilization of PUSCH PRBs for slice-aware traffic
KPI.lformula: Avg util ratio PUSCH PRBs for slice-aware traffic = 100 * (UL PRBs used for slice-aware scheduling per resource group) / (Number of UL PRBs available for slice-aware scheduling in the cell)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the average utilization of PUSCH PRBs for slice-aware traffic per cell.

KPI.name: 5G SA Number of radio admission requests for GBR type of 5QIs for bandwidth part1 (BWP1)
KPI.lformula: SA Nr AC req GBR BWP1 = Number of admission control requests for GBR in BWP1
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the total number of radio admission requests for Stand Alone GBR type of 5QIs for bandwidth part1 (BWP1).

KPI.name: 5G SA Number of radio admission requests for GBR type of 5QIs for bandwidth part2 (BWP2)
KPI.lformula: SA Nr AC req GBR BWP2 = Number of admission control requests for GBR in BWP2
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the total number of radio admission requests for Stand Alone GBR type of 5QIs for bandwidth part2 (BWP2).

KPI.name: 5G SA Number of radio admission requests for GBR type of 5QIs for bandwidth part3 (BWP3)
KPI.lformula: SA Nr AC req GBR BWP3 = Number of admission control requests for GBR in BWP3
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the total number of radio admission requests for Stand Alone GBR type of 5QIs for bandwidth part3 (BWP3).

KPI.name: 5G SA Intra-gNB Intra-DU Handover Preparation attempts for VoNR
KPI.lformula: Sum(Intra-gNB handover AC failures + Intra-gNB handover internalfailures + Intra-gNB handover preparation attempts))
KPI.desc: This KPI measures the number of preparation attempts for 5G SA Intra-gNB Intra-DU for VoNR services, considering internal failures or admission control issues on CU.

KPI.name: 5G SA Intra-gNB Intra-DU Total Handover Success Ratio for VoNR
KPI.lformula: 100*(successful Intra-gNB handover execution / (Intra-gNB handover AC failures + Intra-gNB handover internalfailures + Intra-gNB handover preparation attempts))
KPI.desc: This KPI describes how successful handover preparation and execution phases are for 5G SA Intra-gNB Intra-DU for VoNR services, considering internal failures or admission control issues on CU.

KPI.name: 5G SA Inter-gNB Handover Preparation attempts for VoNR
KPI.lformula: Sum(Inter-gNB handover AC failures + Inter-gNB handover internalfailures + Inter-gNB handover preparation attempts))
KPI.desc: This KPI measures the number of handover preparation attempts for 5G Inter-gNB for VoNR services, considering internal failures or admission control issues on CU.

KPI.name: 5G SA Inter-gNB Total Handover Success Ratio for VoNR
KPI.lformula: 100*(successful Inter-gNB handover execution / (Inter-gNB handover AC failures + Inter-gNB handover internalfailures + Inter-gNB handover preparation attempts))
KPI.desc: This KPI describes how successful handover preparation and execution phases are for 5G SA Inter-gNB for VoNR services, considering internal failures or admission control issues on CU.

KPI.name: 5G NSA Active E-RAB Drop Ratio - SgNB view
KPI.lformula: NSA Active ERAB drop SgNBR = ((Number of abnormal NSA in-session ERAB releases initiated by SgNB after successful RACH)/((Total number of E-RAB release))) *100
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the ratio of the number of in-session E-RAB (SCG split bearers) abnormal releases initiated by gNB to the total number of E-RAB releases (SgNB and MeNB initiated).

KPI.name: 5G NSA Active E-RAB Drop Ratio - User view
KPI.lformula: NSA Active ERAB drop UserR = ((number of abnormal NSA in-session ERAB releases initiated by SgNB and MeNB)/(Total number of E-RAB release attempts)) *100
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the ratio of the number of in-session E-RAB (SCG split bearers) abnormal releases to the total number of E-RAB releases (SgNB and MeNB initiated).

KPI.name: 5G NSA E-RAB Avg Active time
KPI.lformula: NSA E-RAB Avg Active time = (Duration for which ERAB is considered to be in-session) / Total number of E-RAB release)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the duration an E-RAB is active with data in a buffer.

KPI.name: 5G NSA Active E-RAB Retainability Rate
KPI.lformula: NSA Active E-RAB Retainability Rate = number of abnormal NSA in-session ERAB releases initiated by SgNB and MeNB / Duration for which ERAB is considered to be in-session
KPI.desc: This KPI shows how often an end-user abnormally loses an E-RAB flow during the time the E-RAB is used. It is obtained by the number of E-RABs with data in a buffer that was abnormally released, normalized with number of data session time units.

KPI.name: 5G SA SCell Release Distribution Ratio due to addition of CA-incompatible DRB in the PCell
KPI.lformula: 5G SA SCell Release CA Incompatible DRB Setup = 100*(RRC Reconfig Complete received for SCell Release due to specific reason / RRC Reconfig Complete received for SCell Release due to all reasons)
KPI.nformula: (100*(INCMP_DRB_STP_REL_SCELL_SUC_SA) / (A2MEAS_REL1DLSCELL_SUCC_SA + A2MEAS_REL1ULSCELL_SUCC_SA + INA_PRO_REL_SCELL_SUC_SA + INA_OVHT_REL_SCELL_SUC_SA + BAD_RLQ_REL_SCELL_SUC_SA + INCMP_DRB_STP_REL_SCELL_SUC_SA + ELIGIBLE_DRB_REL_SCELL_SUC_SA + HRDRB_TRIGG_REL_SCELL_SUC_SA))
KPI.desc: This KPI describes distribution ratio of SCell Releases in PCell due to addition of CA-incompatible SA DRB in the PCell. The KPI is built based on possible SCell Releases due to specific reasons. Each SCell is counted separately.

KPI.name: 5G SA SCell Release Distribution Ratio due to release of the last CA-eligible DRB in the PCell
KPI.lformula: 5G SA SCell Release last CA Eligible DRB Release = 100*(RRC Reconfig Complete received for SCell Release due to specific reason / RRC Reconfig Complete received for SCell Release due to all reasons)
KPI.nformula: 100*(ELIGIBLE_DRB_REL_SCELL_ATT_SA) / (A2MEAS_REL1DLSCELL_SUCC_SA + A2MEAS_REL1ULSCELL_SUCC_SA + INA_PRO_REL_SCELL_SUC_SA + INA_OVHT_REL_SCELL_SUC_SA + BAD_RLQ_REL_SCELL_SUC_SA + INCMP_DRB_STP_REL_SCELL_SUC_SA + ELIGIBLE_DRB_REL_SCELL_SUC_SA + HRDRB_TRIGG_REL_SCELL_SUC_SA)
KPI.desc: This KPI describes distribution ratio of SCell Releases in PCell due to the release of the last CA-eligible DRB in the PCell. The KPI is built based on possible SCell Releases due to specific reasons. Each SCell is counted separately.

KPI.name: 5G SA SCell Release Distribution Ratio in the PCell due to High-Reliability reasons
KPI.lformula: 5G SA SCell Release High-Reliability reasons = 100*(RRC Reconfig Complete received for SCell Release due to specific reason / RRC Reconfig Complete received for SCell Release due to all reasons)
KPI.nformula: 100*(HRDRB_TRIGG_REL_SCELL_SUC_SA) / (A2MEAS_REL1DLSCELL_SUCC_SA + A2MEAS_REL1ULSCELL_SUCC_SA + INA_PRO_REL_SCELL_SUC_SA + INA_OVHT_REL_SCELL_SUC_SA + BAD_RLQ_REL_SCELL_SUC_SA + INCMP_DRB_STP_REL_SCELL_SUC_SA + ELIGIBLE_DRB_REL_SCELL_SUC_SA + HRDRB_TRIGG_REL_SCELL_SUC_SA)
KPI.desc: This KPI describes distribution ratio of SCell Releases in PCell due to High-Reliability reasons. The KPI is built based on possible SCell Releases due to specific reasons. Each SCell is counted separately.

KPI.name: 5G NSA SCell Release Distribution Ratio in the PSCell due to High-Reliability reasons
KPI.lformula: 5G NSA SCell Release High-Reliability reasons = 100*(RRC Reconfig Complete received for SCell Release due to specific reason / RRC Reconfig Complete received for SCell Release due to all reasons)
KPI.desc: This KPI describes distribution ratio of SCell Releases in PSCell due to High-Reliability reasons. The KPI is built based on possible SCell Releases due to specific reasons. Each SCell is counted separately.

KPI.name: 5G SA DL Full SCell Release Success Ratio
KPI.lformula: 5G SA DL Full SCell Release SR = 100*(The number of successful DL Full SCell Release attempts on PCell for SA / The number of DL Full SCell Release attempts on PCell for SA)
KPI.desc: This KPI describes how successful RRC Reconfiguration procedure is in PCell for Full SCell Release in DL.

KPI.name: 5G SA DL Full ext-SCell Release Success Ratio
KPI.lformula: 5G SA DL Full ext-SCell Release SR = 100*(The number of successful DL Full ext-SCell Release attempts on PCell for SA / The number of DL Full ext-SCell Release attempts on PCell for SA)
KPI.desc: This KPI describes how successful RRC Reconfiguration procedure is in PCell for Full ext-SCell Release in DL.

KPI.name: 5G NSA Radio admission control success ratio
KPI.lformula: NSA RAC SR = 100 * (NSA RAC success / NSA RAC request)
KPI.desc: This KPI measures the success ratio of Radio Admission Control process in CU-CP.

KPI.name: 5G SA RRC Resume Success Ratio excluding rna-update and fallback attempts
KPI.lformula: 5G SA RRC Resume SR exc rna-update and fallback attempts = 100 * (Number of RRC Resume Complete) / (Number of RRC Resume attempts excluding attempts related to RNA update and fallback to RRC Setup)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the Success Ratio for RRC Resume excluding rna-update and fallback attempts.

KPI.name: 5G SA Success Ratio of UE Reconfiguration from 256QAM to 64QAM DL MCS table based on channel quality monitoring
KPI.lformula: (UE reconfiguration success for switching from 256QAM to 64QAM table / UE reconfiguration attempts fo switching from 256QAM to 64QAM table) * 100%
KPI.desc: The KPI shows the success rate of UE reconfiguration for the transition from 256QAM table to 64QAM table in DL based on channel quality monitoring for 256QAM capable UEs.

KPI.name: 5G SA Success Ratio of UE Reconfiguration from 64QAM to 256QAM DL MCS table based on channel quality monitoring
KPI.lformula: (UE reconfiguration success for switching from 64QAM to 256QAM table / UE reconfiguration attempts fo switching from 64QAM to 256QAM table) * 100%
KPI.desc: The KPI shows the success rate of UE reconfiguration for the transition from 64QAM table to 256QAM table in DL based on channel quality monitoring for 256QAM capable UEs.

KPI.name: 5G NSA DL CA configuration success ratio in CU
KPI.lformula: NSA DL CA config SR = (all CC successful configuration attempts) / (all CC configuration attempts)
KPI.nformula: 100* (SGNB_DL_SCELL_1_CONFIG_SUCC + SGNB_DL_SCELL_2_CONFIG_SUCC + SGNB_DL_SCELL_3_CONFIG_SUCC + SGNB_DL_SCELL_4_CONFIG_SUCC + SGNB_DL_SCELL_5_CONFIG_SUCC + SGNB_DL_SCELL_6_CONFIG_SUCC + SGNB_DL_SCELL_7_CONFIG_SUCC) /(SGNB_DL_SCELL_1_CONFIG_REQ + SGNB_DL_SCELL_2_CONFIG_REQ + SGNB_DL_SCELL_3_CONFIG_REQ + SGNB_DL_SCELL_4_CONFIG_REQ + SGNB_DL_SCELL_5_CONFIG_REQ + SGNB_DL_SCELL_6_CONFIG_REQ + SGNB_DL_SCELL_7_CONFIG_REQ)
KPI.desc: This KPI describes the complete configuration success ratio for DL CA for NSA in CU. It includes every CC configuration. It indicates the outcome of CA configuration process between successful SCell selection and execution phase, after RRC Reconfiguration Complete has been received from the UE in CU.

KPI.name: 5G NSA UL CA configuration success ratio in CU
KPI.lformula: NSA UL CA config SR = (all CC successful configuration attempts) / (all CC successful admission control attempts)
KPI.desc: This KPI describes the complete configuration success ratio for UL CA for NSA in CU. It includes every CC configuration. It indicates the outcome of CA configuration process between successful SCell selection and execution phase, after RRC Reconfiguration Complete has been received from the UE in CU.

KPI.name: 5G NSA DL CA admission control success ratio in CU
KPI.lformula: NSA DL CA AC SR CU = (all CC successful admission control attempts) / (all CC admission control attempts)
KPI.nformula: 100* (SGNB_DL_SCELL_1_ADMI_SUCC + SGNB_DL_SCELL_2_ADMI_SUCC + SGNB_DL_SCELL_3_ADMI_SUCC + SGNB_DL_SCELL_4_ADMI_SUCC + SGNB_DL_SCELL_5_ADMI_SUCC + SGNB_DL_SCELL_6_ADMI_SUCC + SGNB_DL_SCELL_7_ADMI_SUCC) / (SGNB_DL_SCELL_1_ADMI_REQ + SGNB_DL_SCELL_2_ADMI_REQ + SGNB_DL_SCELL_3_ADMI_REQ + SGNB_DL_SCELL_4_ADMI_REQ + SGNB_DL_SCELL_5_ADMI_REQ + SGNB_DL_SCELL_6_ADMI_REQ + SGNB_DL_SCELL_7_ADMI_REQ)
KPI.desc: This KPI describes the admission control success ratio in CU for DL CA for NSA. It includes every CC event. It indicates the outcome of internal CA admission control process in CU.

KPI.name: 5G NSA UL CA admission control success ratio in CU
KPI.lformula: NSA UL CA AC SR CU = (all CC successful admission control attempts) / (all CC admission control attempts)
KPI.desc: This KPI describes the admission control success ratio in CU for UL CA for NSA. It includes every CC event. It indicates the outcome of internal CA admission control process in CU.

KPI.name: 5G NSA DL CA admission control success ratio in DU
KPI.lformula: NSA DL CA AC SR DU = (all CC successful admission control attempts) / (all CC admission control attempts)
KPI.nformula: 100* (SGNB_DU_DL_SCELL_1_ADMI_SUCC + SGNB_DU_DL_SCELL_2_ADMI_SUCC + SGNB_DU_DL_SCELL_3_ADMI_SUCC + SGNB_DU_DL_SCELL_4_ADMI_SUCC + SGNB_DU_DL_SCELL_5_ADMI_SUCC + SGNB_DU_DL_SCELL_6_ADMI_SUCC + SGNB_DU_DL_SCELL_7_ADMI_SUCC) / (SGNB_DU_DL_SCELL_1_ADMI_REQ + SGNB_DU_DL_SCELL_2_ADMI_REQ + SGNB_DU_DL_SCELL_3_ADMI_REQ + SGNB_DU_DL_SCELL_4_ADMI_REQ + SGNB_DU_DL_SCELL_5_ADMI_REQ + SGNB_DU_DL_SCELL_6_ADMI_REQ + SGNB_DU_DL_SCELL_7_ADMI_REQ)
KPI.desc: This KPI describes the admission control success ratio in DU for DL CA for NSA. It includes every CC event. It indicates the outcome of internal CA admission control process in DU.

KPI.name: 5G NSA UL CA admission control success ratio in DU
KPI.lformula: NSA UL CA AC SR DU = (all CC successful admission control attempts) / (all CC admission control attempts)
KPI.desc: This KPI describes the admission control success ratio in DU for UL CA for NSA. It includes every CC event. It indicates the outcome of internal CA admission control process in DU.

KPI.name: 5G NSA DL CA SCell Release with causes Success Ratio
KPI.lformula: NSA DL SCell Release SR = 100*(sum of RRC Reconfig Complete received for SCell Release due to specific reasons / sum of RRC Reconfig sent for SCell Release due to specific reasons)
KPI.nformula: 100*(A2MEAS_REL1DLSCELL_SUCC_NSA + DL_INA_PRO_REL_SCELL_SUC_NSA + DL_BAD_RLQ_REL_SCELL_SUC_NSA + DL_HRDRB_REL_SCELL_SUC_NSA + DL_CFGRSTC_SCELL_REL_SUC_NSA+DL_PREEM_REL_SCELL_SUC_NSA) / (A2MEAS_REL1DLSCELL_ATT_NSA + DL_INA_PRO_REL_SCELL_ATT_NSA + DL_BAD_RLQ_REL_SCELL_ATT_NSA + DL_HRDRB_REL_SCELL_ATT_NSA + DL_CFGRSTC_SCELL_REL_ATT_NSA+DL_PREEM_REL_SCELL_ATT_NSA)
KPI.desc: This KPI describes how successful RRC Reconfiguration procedure is in PSCell for SCell Release with causes for DL CA for NSA. The KPI is built based on possible SCell Releases due to specific reasons. Each SCell is counted separately.

KPI.name: 5G SA Sparse SSSG time ratio
KPI.lformula: 5G SA Sparse SSSG time ratio = (Total number of slots for all UEs assigned to sparse SSSG) / (Total number of slots for all UEs assigned to sparse SSSG + Total number of slots for all UEs assigned to dense SSSG)
KPI.desc: This KPI provides the ratio between total time UEs spent in sparse SSSG to total time UEs spent in sparse and dense SSSGs combined.

KPI.name: 5G NSA DL CA Full SCell Release Success Ratio
KPI.lformula: NSA DL full SCell Release SR = 100*(sum of RRC Reconfig Complete received for SCell Release in DL / sum of RRC Reconfig sent for SCell Release in DL)
KPI.desc: This KPI describes how successful RRC Reconfiguration procedure is in PSCell for full SCell Release in DL for NSA.

KPI.name: 5G NSA UL CA Full SCell Release Success Ratio
KPI.lformula: NSA UL full SCell Release SR = 100*(sum of RRC Reconfig Complete received for SCell Release in UL / sum of RRC Reconfig sent for SCell Release in UL)
KPI.desc: This KPI describes how successful RRC Reconfiguration procedure is in PSCell for full SCell Release in UL for NSA.

KPI.name: 5G SA DL CA configuration success ratio in CU
KPI.lformula: SA DL CA config SR = (all CC successful configuration attempts) / (all CC configuration attempts)
KPI.nformula: 100* (GNB_DL_SCELL_1_CONFIG_SUCC_SA + GNB_DL_SCELL_2_CONFIG_SUCC_SA + GNB_DL_SCELL_3_CONFIG_SUCC_SA + GNB_DL_SCELL_4_CONFIG_SUCC_SA + GNB_DL_SCELL_5_CONFIG_SUCC_SA + GNB_DL_SCELL_6_CONFIG_SUCC_SA + GNB_DL_SCELL_7_CONFIG_SUCC_SA) /(GNB_DL_SCELL_1_CONFIG_REQ_SA + GNB_DL_SCELL_2_CONFIG_REQ_SA + GNB_DL_SCELL_3_CONFIG_REQ_SA + GNB_DL_SCELL_4_CONFIG_REQ_SA + GNB_DL_SCELL_5_CONFIG_REQ_SA + GNB_DL_SCELL_6_CONFIG_REQ_SA + GNB_DL_SCELL_7_CONFIG_REQ_SA)
KPI.desc: This KPI describes the complete configuration success ratio for DL CA for SA in CU. It includes every CC configuration. It indicates the outcome of CA configuration process between successful SCell selection and execution phase, after RRC Reconfiguration Complete has been received from the UE in CU.

KPI.name: 5G SA UL CA configuration success ratio in CU
KPI.lformula: SA UL CA config SR = (all CC successful configuration successes) / (all CC successful configuration attempts)
KPI.desc: This KPI describes the complete configuration success ratio for UL CA for SA in CU. It includes every CC configuration. It indicates the outcome of CA configuration process between successful SCell selection and execution phase, after RRC Reconfiguration Complete has been received from the UE in CU.

KPI.name: 5G SA DL CA admission control success ratio in CU
KPI.lformula: SA DL CA AC SR CU = (all CC successful admission control attempts) / (all CC admission control attempts)
KPI.nformula: 100* (GNB_DL_SCELL_1_ADMI_SUCC_SA + GNB_DL_SCELL_2_ADMI_SUCC_SA + GNB_DL_SCELL_3_ADMI_SUCC_SA + GNB_DL_SCELL_4_ADMI_SUCC_SA + GNB_DL_SCELL_5_ADMI_SUCC_SA + GNB_DL_SCELL_6_ADMI_SUCC_SA + GNB_DL_SCELL_7_ADMI_SUCC_SA) / (GNB_DL_SCELL_1_ADMI_REQ_SA + GNB_DL_SCELL_2_ADMI_REQ_SA + GNB_DL_SCELL_3_ADMI_REQ_SA + GNB_DL_SCELL_4_ADMI_REQ_SA + GNB_DL_SCELL_5_ADMI_REQ_SA + GNB_DL_SCELL_6_ADMI_REQ_SA + GNB_DL_SCELL_7_ADMI_REQ_SA)
KPI.desc: This KPI describes the admission control success ratio in CU for DL CA for SA. It includes every CC event. It indicates the outcome of internal CA admission control process in CU.

KPI.name: 5G SA UL CA admission control success ratio in CU
KPI.lformula: SA UL CA AC SR CU = (all CC successful admission control attempts) / (all CC admission control attempts)
KPI.desc: This KPI describes the admission control success ratio in CU for UL CA for SA. It includes every CC event. It indicates the outcome of internal CA admission control process in CU.

KPI.name: 5G SA DL CA admission control success ratio in DU
KPI.lformula: SA DL CA AC SR DU = (all CC successful admission control attempts) / (all CC admission control attempts)
KPI.nformula: 100* (GNB_DU_DL_SCELL_1_ADMI_SUCC_SA + GNB_DU_DL_SCELL_2_ADMI_SUCC_SA + GNB_DU_DL_SCELL_3_ADMI_SUCC_SA + GNB_DU_DL_SCELL_4_ADMI_SUCC_SA + GNB_DU_DL_SCELL_5_ADMI_SUCC_SA + GNB_DU_DL_SCELL_6_ADMI_SUCC_SA + GNB_DU_DL_SCELL_7_ADMI_SUCC_SA) / (GNB_DU_DL_SCELL_1_ADMI_REQ_SA + GNB_DU_DL_SCELL_2_ADMI_REQ_SA + GNB_DU_DL_SCELL_3_ADMI_REQ_SA + GNB_DU_DL_SCELL_4_ADMI_REQ_SA + GNB_DU_DL_SCELL_5_ADMI_REQ_SA + GNB_DU_DL_SCELL_6_ADMI_REQ_SA + GNB_DU_DL_SCELL_7_ADMI_REQ_SA)
KPI.desc: This KPI describes the admission control success ratio in DU for DL CA for SA. It includes every CC event. It indicates the outcome of internal CA admission control process in DU.

KPI.name: 5G SA UL CA admission control success ratio in DU
KPI.lformula: SA UL CA AC SR DU = (all CC successful admission control attempts) / (all CC admission control attempts)
KPI.desc: This KPI describes the admission control success ratio in DU for UL CA for SA. It includes every CC event. It indicates the outcome of internal CA admission control process in DU.

KPI.name: 5G SA DL CA SCell Release with causes Success Ratio
KPI.lformula: SA DL SCell Release SR = 100*(sum of RRC Reconfig Complete received for SCell Release due to specific reasons / sum of RRC Reconfig sent for SCell Release due to specific reasons)
KPI.nformula: 100*(A2MEAS_REL1DLSCELL_SUCC_SA + DL_INA_PRO_REL_SCELL_SUC_SA + DL_BAD_RLQ_REL_SCELL_SUC_SA + DL_INA_OVHT_REL_SCELL_SUC_SA + DL_HRDRB_REL_SCELL_SUC_SA + DL_INCMPDRB_REL_SCELL_SUC_SA + DL_ELGBLDRB_REL_SCELL_SUC_SA + DL_LNKFPRI_REL_SCELL_SUC_SA + DL_LNKFEXT_REL_SCELL_SUC_SA + DL_RNUSPC_EXT_REL_SCELL_SUC_SA+DL_PREEM_REL_SCELL_SUC_SA) / (A2MEAS_REL1DLSCELL_ATT_SA + DL_INA_PRO_REL_SCELL_ATT_SA + DL_BAD_RLQ_REL_SCELL_ATT_SA + DL_INA_OVHT_REL_SCELL_ATT_SA + DL_HRDRB_REL_SCELL_ATT_SA + DL_INCMPDRB_REL_SCELL_ATT_SA + DL_ELGBLDRB_REL_SCELL_ATT_SA + DL_LNKFPRI_REL_SCELL_ATT_SA + DL_LNKFEXT_REL_SCELL_ATT_SA + DL_RNUSPC_EXT_REL_SCELL_ATT_SA+DL_PREEM_REL_SCELL_ATT_SA)
KPI.desc: This KPI describes how successful RRC Reconfiguration procedure is in PCell for SCell Release with causes for DL CA for SA. The KPI is built based on possible SCell Releases due to specific reasons. Each SCell is counted separately.

KPI.name: 5G SA UL CA SCell Release with causes Success Ratio
KPI.lformula: SA UL SCell Release SR = 100*(sum of RRC Reconfig Complete received for SCell Release due to specific reasons / sum of RRC Reconfig sent for SCell Release due to specific reasons)
KPI.nformula: 100*(A2MEAS_REL1ULSCELL_SUCC_SA + UL_INA_PRO_REL_SCELL_SUC_SA + UL_BAD_RLQ_REL_SCELL_SUC_SA + UL_INA_OVHT_REL_SCELL_SUC_SA + UL_HRDRB_REL_SCELL_SUC_SA + UL_INCMPDRB_REL_SCELL_SUC_SA + UL_ELGBLDRB_REL_SCELL_SUC_SA+UL_PREEM_REL_SCELL_SUC_SA) / (A2MEAS_REL1ULSCELL_ATT_SA + UL_INA_PRO_REL_SCELL_ATT_SA + UL_BAD_RLQ_REL_SCELL_ATT_SA + UL_INA_OVHT_REL_SCELL_ATT_SA + UL_HRDRB_REL_SCELL_ATT_SA + UL_INCMPDRB_REL_SCELL_ATT_SA + UL_ELGBLDRB_REL_SCELL_ATT_SA+UL_PREEM_REL_SCELL_ATT_SA)
KPI.desc: This KPI describes how successful RRC Reconfiguration procedure is in PCell for SCell Release with causes for UL CA for SA. The KPI is built based on possible SCell Releases due to specific reasons. Each SCell is counted separately.

KPI.name: 5G SA UL CA Full SCell Release Success Ratio
KPI.lformula: SA UL full SCell Release SR = 100*(sum of RRC Reconfig Complete received for SCell Release in UL / sum of RRC Reconfig sent for SCell Release in UL)
KPI.desc: This KPI describes how successful RRC Reconfiguration procedure is in PCell for full SCell Release in UL for SA.

KPI.name: 5G SA number of DL SCell deactivations in DU per cell
KPI.lformula: SA DL CA deactivations = sum of acknowledged SA DL SCell deactivations per cause
KPI.nformula: (SCELL_DL_DEACT_SAG_SA + SCELL_DL_DEACT_DEACTMR_SA + SCELL_DL_DEACT_LOWBUFFER_SA + SCELL_DL_DEACT_RLQ_SA + SCELL_DL_DEACT_UEOVHT_SA + SCELL_DL_DEACT_SCELLOVHT_SA + SCELL_DL_DEACT_OUTSYNC_SA)
KPI.desc: This KPI measures the total number of DL SCell deactivations in DU per cell for SA. Deactivations due to a specific reason can be performed in FR1 only or both in FR1 and FR2. Both DL only and DL+UL SCells are considered.

KPI.name: 5G SA average number of users with DL SCell activated in DU per cell
KPI.lformula: SA Avg num of users with DL CA activated = (sum of users with SA DL SCell activated per CC) / (number of samples)
KPI.nformula: (PCELL_UE_1_ACT_SCELL_DL_SA + PCELL_UE_2_ACT_SCELL_DL_SA + PCELL_UE_3_ACT_SCELL_DL_SA + PCELL_UE_4_ACT_SCELL_DL_SA + PCELL_UE_5_ACT_SCELL_DL_SA + PCELL_UE_6_ACT_SCELL_DL_SA + PCELL_UE_7_ACT_SCELL_DL_SA) / (SAMPLES_DL_UE_AMOUNTS)
KPI.desc: This KPI measures the average number of users with DL SCell activated in DU per cell for SA. Both DL only and DL+UL SCells are considered.

KPI.name: 5G SA number of DL SCell suspensions in DU per cell
KPI.lformula: SA DL CA suspensions = (sum of SA DL SCell suspensions per cause)
KPI.desc: This KPI measures the total number of DL SCell suspensions in DU per cell for SA. Suspension due to a specific reason can be performed in FR1 only or both in FR1 and FR2. Both DL only and DL+UL SCells are considered.

KPI.name: 5G SA number of UL SCell deactivations in DU per cell
KPI.lformula: SA UL CA deactivations = sum of acknowledged SA UL SCell deactivations per cause
KPI.desc: This KPI measures the total number of UL SCell deactivations in DU per cell for SA. Deactivations due to a specific reason can be performed in FR1 only or both in FR1 and FR2. Only DL+UL SCells are considered.

KPI.name: 5G SA average number of users with UL SCell activated in DU per cell
KPI.lformula: SA Avg num of users with UL CA activated = (sum of users with SA UL SCell activated per CC) / (number of samples)
KPI.desc: This KPI measures the total number of UL SCell activations in DU per cell for SA. Only DL+UL SCells are considered.

KPI.name: 5G SA number of UL SCell suspensions in DU
KPI.lformula: SA UL CA suspensions = (sum of SA UL SCell suspensions per cause)
KPI.nformula: (SCELL_UL_SUSPEND_SAG_SA + SCELL_UL_SUSPEND_RLQ_SA + SCELL_UL_SUSPEND_NELGBLDRB_SA + SCELL_UL_SUSPEND_MEASGAP_SA + SCELL_UL_SUSPEND_UEOVHT_SA + SCELL_UL_SUSPEND_LOWTXPWR_SA + SCELL_UL_SUSPEND_NFD_SA)
KPI.desc: This KPI measures the total number of UL SCell suspensions in DU for SA. Suspension due to a specific reason can be performed in FR1 only or both in FR1 and FR2. Only DL+UL SCells are considered.

KPI.name: 5G NSA number of DL SCell deactivations in DU per cell
KPI.lformula: NSA DL CA deactivations = sum of acknowledged NSA DL SCell deactivations per cause
KPI.desc: This KPI measures the total number of DL SCell deactivations in DU per cell for NSA. Deactivations due to a specific reason can be performed in FR1 only or both in FR1 and FR2. Both DL only and DL+UL SCells are considered.

KPI.name: 5G NSA average number of users with DL SCell activated in DU per cell
KPI.lformula: NSA Avg num of users with DL CA activated = (sum of users with NSA DL SCell activated per CC) / (number of samples)
KPI.nformula: (PSCELL_UE_1_ACT_SCELL_DL_NSA + PSCELL_UE_2_ACT_SCELL_DL_NSA + PSCELL_UE_3_ACT_SCELL_DL_NSA + PSCELL_UE_4_ACT_SCELL_DL_NSA + PSCELL_UE_5_ACT_SCELL_DL_NSA + PSCELL_UE_6_ACT_SCELL_DL_NSA + PSCELL_UE_7_ACT_SCELL_DL_NSA) / (SAMPLES_DL_UE_AMOUNTS)
KPI.desc: This KPI measures the average number of users with DL SCell activated in DU per cell for NSA. Both DL only and DL+UL SCells are considered.

KPI.name: 5G NSA number of DL SCell suspensions in DU
KPI.lformula: NSA DL CA suspensions = (sum of SA DL SCell suspensions per cause)
KPI.desc: This KPI measures the total number of DL SCell suspensions in DU for NSA. Suspension due to a specific reason can be performed in FR1 only or both in FR1 and FR2. Both DL only and DL+UL SCells are considered.

KPI.name: 5G NSA number of UL SCell deactivations in DU per cell
KPI.lformula: NSA UL CA deactivations = sum of acknowledged NSA UL SCell deactivations per cause
KPI.desc: This KPI measures the total number of UL SCell deactivations in DU per cell for NSA. Deactivations due to a specific reason can be performed in FR1 only or both in FR1 and FR2. Only DL+UL SCells are considered.

KPI.name: 5G NSA average number of users with UL SCell activated in DU per cell
KPI.lformula: NSA Avg num of users with UL CA activated = (sum of users with NSA UL SCell activated per CC) / (number of samples)
KPI.desc: This KPI measures the total number of UL SCell activations in DU per cell for NSA. Only DL+UL SCells are considered.

KPI.name: 5G NSA number of UL SCell suspensions in DU
KPI.lformula: NSA UL CA suspensions = (sum of NSA UL SCell suspensions per cause)
KPI.desc: This KPI measures the total number of UL SCell suspensions in DU for NSA. Suspension due to a specific reason can be performed in FR1 only or both in FR1 and FR2. Only DL+UL SCells are considered.

KPI.name: 5G SA average number of users with DL CA supported in CU per cell
KPI.lformula: SA Avg num of users with DL CA supported = (sum of users with SA DL CA supported per CC) / (number of samples)
KPI.nformula: (PCELL_UE_CAP_2_CC_DL_SA + PCELL_UE_CAP_3_CC_DL_SA + PCELL_UE_CAP_4_CC_DL_SA + PCELL_UE_CAP_5_CC_DL_SA + PCELL_UE_CAP_6_CC_DL_SA + PCELL_UE_CAP_7_CC_DL_SA + PCELL_UE_CAP_8_CC_DL_SA) / (SAMP_UE_CC_CAP)
KPI.desc: This KPI measures the average number of users with DL CA supported in CU per cell for SA. Both DL only and DL+UL SCells are considered.

KPI.name: 5G SA average duration for which each UE had DL CA configured in a PCell in CU per cell
KPI.lformula: SA Avg DL CA configured duration = (sum of durations for which each UE had DL CA configured in a PCell in CU per cell) / (sum of all CC successful configuration attempts)
KPI.nformula: (PCELL_DL_1_SCELL_CONFIG_DUR_SA + PCELL_DL_2_SCELL_CONFIG_DUR_SA + PCELL_DL_3_SCELL_CONFIG_DUR_SA + PCELL_DL_4_SCELL_CONFIG_DUR_SA + PCELL_DL_5_SCELL_CONFIG_DUR_SA + PCELL_DL_6_SCELL_CONFIG_DUR_SA + PCELL_DL_7_SCELL_CONFIG_DUR_SA) / (GNB_DL_SCELL_1_CONFIG_SUCC_SA + GNB_DL_SCELL_2_CONFIG_SUCC_SA + GNB_DL_SCELL_3_CONFIG_SUCC_SA + GNB_DL_SCELL_4_CONFIG_SUCC_SA + GNB_DL_SCELL_5_CONFIG_SUCC_SA + GNB_DL_SCELL_6_CONFIG_SUCC_SA + GNB_DL_SCELL_7_CONFIG_SUCC_SA)
KPI.desc: This KPI measures the average duration for which each UE had DL CA configured in a PCell in CU per cell for SA. Both DL only and DL+UL SCells are considered.

KPI.name: 5G SA average number of users with UL CA supported in CU per cell
KPI.lformula: SA Avg num of users with UL CA supported = (sum of users with SA UL CA supported per CC) / (number of samples)
KPI.desc: This KPI measures the average number of users with UL CA supported in CU per cell for SA. Only DL+UL SCells are considered.

KPI.name: 5G SA average duration for which each UE had UL CA configured in a PCell in CU per cell
KPI.lformula: SA Avg UL CA configured duration = (sum of durations for which each UE had CA configured in a PCell in CU per cell) / (sum of all CC successful configuration attempts)
KPI.desc: This KPI measures the average duration for which each UE had UL CA configured in a PCell in CU per cell for SA. Only DL+UL SCells are considered.

KPI.name: 5G NSA average number of users with DL CA supported in CU per cell
KPI.lformula: NSA Avg num of users with DL CA supported = (sum of users with NSA DL CA supported per CC) / (number of NSAmples)
KPI.nformula: (PSCELL_UE_CAP_2_CC_DL_NSA + PSCELL_UE_CAP_3_CC_DL_NSA + PSCELL_UE_CAP_4_CC_DL_NSA + PSCELL_UE_CAP_5_CC_DL_NSA + PSCELL_UE_CAP_6_CC_DL_NSA + PSCELL_UE_CAP_7_CC_DL_NSA + PSCELL_UE_CAP_8_CC_DL_NSA) / (SAMP_UE_CC_CAP)
KPI.desc: This KPI measures the average number of users with DL CA supported in CU per cell for NSA. Both DL only and DL+UL SCells are considered.

KPI.name: 5G NSA average number of users with UL CA supported in CU per cell
KPI.lformula: NSA Avg num of users with UL CA supported = (sum of users with NSA UL CA supported per CC) / (number of NSAmples)
KPI.desc: This KPI measures the average number of users with UL CA supported in CU per cell for NSA. Only DL+UL SCells are considered.

KPI.name: 5G DL nonGBR UE Throughput for UEs with 2CC FR1 SA CA
KPI.lformula: DL nonGBR IP thp for UEs with 2CC FR1 SA CA = ThpVolDl DL nonGBR UE throughput volume at RLC PDU (MAC SDU) level for UEs with 2CC FR1 SA CA/ThpTimeDl DL nonGBR UE throughput time at RLC PDU (MAC SDU) level for UEs with 2CC FR1 SA CA
KPI.desc: This KPI provides the UE throughput on non-GBR E-RABs in downlink for UEs with 2CC FR1 SA CA.

KPI.lformula: DL nonGBR IP thp for UEs with 3CC FR1 SA CA = ThpVolDl DL nonGBR UE throughput volume at RLC PDU (MAC SDU) level for UEs with 3CC FR1 SA CA/ThpTimeDl DL nonGBR UE throughput time at RLC PDU (MAC SDU) level for UEs with 3CC FR1 SA CA
KPI.desc: This KPI provides the UE throughput on non-GBR E-RABs in downlink for UEs with 3CC FR1 SA CA.

KPI.desc: This KPI provides the UE throughput on non-GBR E-RABs in downlink for UEs with 4CC FR1 SA CA.

KPI.lformula: DL nonGBR IP thp for UEs with 5CC FR1 SA CA = ThpVolDl DL nonGBR UE throughput volume at RLC PDU (MAC SDU) level for UEs with 5CC FR1 SA CA/ThpTimeDl DL nonGBR UE throughput time at RLC PDU (MAC SDU) level for UEs with 5CC FR1 SA CA
KPI.desc: This KPI provides the UE throughput on non-GBR E-RABs in downlink for UEs with 5CC FR1 SA CA.

KPI.lformula: DL nonGBR IP thp for UEs with 1CC FR1 SA = ThpVolDl DL nonGBR UE throughput volume at RLC PDU (MAC SDU) level for UEs with 1CC FR1 SA CA/ThpTimeDl DL nonGBR UE throughput time at RLC PDU (MAC SDU) level for UEs with 1CC FR1 SA CA

KPI.lformula: DL nonGBR IP thp for UEs with 1CC FR2 SA = ThpVolDl DL nonGBR UE throughput volume at RLC PDU (MAC SDU) level for UEs with 8CC FR2 SA CA/ThpTimeDl DL nonGBR UE throughput time at RLC PDU (MAC SDU) level for UEs with 8CC FR2 SA CA

KPI.lformula: DL nonGBR IP thp for UEs with 2CC FR2 NSA CA = ThpVolDl DL nonGBR UE throughput volume at RLC PDU (MAC SDU) level for UEs with 2CC FR2 NSA CA/ThpTimeDl DL nonGBR UE throughput time at RLC PDU (MAC SDU) level for UEs with 2CC FR2 NSA CA

KPI.lformula: DL nonGBR IP thp for UEs with 3CC FR2 NSA CA = ThpVolDl DL nonGBR UE throughput volume at RLC PDU (MAC SDU) level for UEs with 3CC FR2 NSA CA/ThpTimeDl DL nonGBR UE throughput time at RLC PDU (MAC SDU) level for UEs with 3CC FR2 NSA CA
KPI.desc: This KPI provides the UE throughput on non-GBR E-RABs in downlink for UEs with 3CC FR2 NSA CA.

KPI.lformula: DL nonGBR IP thp for UEs with 4CC FR2 NSA CA = ThpVolDl DL nonGBR UE throughput volume at RLC PDU (MAC SDU) level for UEs with 4CC FR2 NSA CA/ThpTimeDl DL nonGBR UE throughput time at RLC PDU (MAC SDU) level for UEs with 4CC FR2 NSA CA
KPI.desc: This KPI provides the UE throughput on non-GBR E-RABs in downlink for UEs with 4CC FR2 NSA CA.

KPI.lformula: DL nonGBR IP thp for UEs with 5CC FR2 NSA CA = ThpVolDl DL nonGBR UE throughput volume at RLC PDU (MAC SDU) level for UEs with 5CC FR2 NSA CA/ThpTimeDl DL nonGBR UE throughput time at RLC PDU (MAC SDU) level for UEs with 5CC FR2 NSA CA
KPI.desc: This KPI provides the UE throughput on non-GBR E-RABs in downlink for UEs with 5CC FR2 NSA CA.

KPI.lformula: DL nonGBR IP thp for UEs with 6CC FR2 NSA CA = ThpVolDl DL nonGBR UE throughput volume at RLC PDU (MAC SDU) level for UEs with 6CC FR2 NSA CA/ThpTimeDl DL nonGBR UE throughput time at RLC PDU (MAC SDU) level for UEs with 6CC FR2 NSA CA
KPI.desc: This KPI provides the UE throughput on non-GBR E-RABs in downlink for UEs with 6CC FR2 NSA CA.
