KPI.lformula: DL nonGBR IP thp for UEs with 7CC FR2 NSA CA = ThpVolDl DL nonGBR UE throughput volume at RLC PDU (MAC SDU) level for UEs with 7CC FR2 NSA CA/ThpTimeDl DL nonGBR UE throughput time at RLC PDU (MAC SDU) level for UEs with 7CC FR2 NSA CA
KPI.desc: This KPI provides the UE throughput on non-GBR E-RABs in downlink for UEs with 7CC FR2 NSA CA.

KPI.name: 5G DL nonGBR UE Throughput for UEs with 8CC FR2 NSA CA
KPI.lformula: DL nonGBR IP thp for UEs with 8CC FR2 NSA CA = ThpVolDl DL nonGBR UE throughput volume at RLC PDU (MAC SDU) level for UEs with 8CC FR2 NSA CA/ThpTimeDl DL nonGBR UE throughput time at RLC PDU (MAC SDU) level for UEs with 8CC FR2 NSA CA
KPI.desc: This KPI provides the UE throughput on non-GBR E-RABs in downlink for UEs with 8CC FR2 NSA CA.

KPI.name: 5G DL nonGBR UE Throughput for UEs with 1CC in FR2 NSA.
KPI.lformula: DL nonGBR IP thp for UEs with 1CC FR2 NSA = ThpVolDl DL nonGBR UE throughput volume at RLC PDU (MAC SDU) level for UEs with 8CC FR2 NSA CA/ThpTimeDl DL nonGBR UE throughput time at RLC PDU (MAC SDU) level for UEs with 8CC FR2 NSA CA
KPI.desc: This KPI provides the UE throughput on non-GBR E-RABs in downlink for UEs with 1CC in FR2 NSA.

KPI.name: 5G UL nonGBR UE Throughput for UEs with 2CC FR1 SA CA
KPI.lformula: UL nonGBR IP thp for UEs with 2CC FR1 SA CA = ThpVolUl UL nonGBR UE throughput volume at RLC PDU level for UEs with 2CC FR1 SA UL CA/ThpTimeUl UL nonGBR UE throughput time at RLC PDU level for UEs with 2CC FR1 SA UL CA
KPI.desc: This KPI provides the UE throughput on non-GBR E-RABs in uplink for UEs with 2CC FR1 SA CA.

KPI.name: 5G UL nonGBR UE Throughput for UEs with 1CC in FR1 SA.
KPI.lformula: UL nonGBR IP thp for UEs with 1CC FR1 SA = ThpVolUl UL nonGBR UE throughput volume at RLC PDU level for UEs with 1CC FR1 SA UL CA / ThpTimeUl UL nonGBR UE throughput time at RLC PDU level for UEs with 1CC FR1 SA UL CA
KPI.desc: This KPI provides the UE throughput on non-GBR E-RABs in uplink for UEs with 1CC in FR1 SA.

KPI.name: 5G DL MAC SDU UE Throughput per MHz at P(S)Cell for FR1
KPI.lformula: Avg DL MAC SDU UE Thr per MHz P(S)Cell FR1 = ThpVolDl DL UE throughput volume at RLC PDU (MAC SDU) level for FR1 / Denominator for calculation of DL RLC PDU (MAC SDU) level UE throughput per MHz at P(S)Cell for FR1
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the average DL RLC PDU (MAC SDU) level end-user throughput per MHz at P(S)Cell for FR1.

KPI.name: 5G DL MAC SDU UE Throughput at P(S)Cell for FR2
KPI.lformula: Avg DL MAC SDU UE Thr P(S)Cell FR2 = ThpVolDl DL UE throughput volume at RLC PDU (MAC SDU) level for FR2/ThpTimeDl DL UE throughput time at RLC PDU (MAC SDU) level for FR2
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the average DL RLC PDU (MAC SDU) level end-user throughput at P(S)Cell for FR2.

KPI.name: 5G DL Share of SCell(s) traffic to overall CA traffic in SA PCell
KPI.lformula: DL Sh SCell traf to overall CA traf SA PCell = ((DL RLC PDU volume transmitted over secondary path for FR2 SA CA + DL RLC PDU volume transmitted over secondary path for FR1 SA CA)/(DL RLC PDU volume transmitted over secondary path for FR2 SA CA + DL RLC PDU volume transmitted over secondary path for FR1 SA CA + DL RLC PDU volume transmitted over primary path for SA CA)) *100
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the downlink proportion of SCell(s) traffic to overall CA-related traffic in SA PCell.

KPI.name: 5G DL Share of CA traffic to overall traffic in SA PCell
KPI.lformula: DL Sh CA traf to overall traf SA PCell = ((DL RLC PDU volume transmitted over secondary path for FR2 SA CA + DL RLC PDU volume transmitted over secondary path for FR1 SA CA + DL RLC PDU volume transmitted over primary path for SA CA)/(DL RLC PDU volume transmitted over secondary path for FR2 SA CA + DL RLC PDU volume transmitted over secondary path for FR1 SA CA + DL RLC PDU volume transmitted over primary path for SA CA + DL RLC PDU volume transmitted to non-CA SA DRBs)) *100
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the downlink proportion of CA traffic to overall traffic in SA PCell.

KPI.name: 5G DL Share of SCell(s) traffic to overall CA traffic in NSA PSCell
KPI.lformula: DL Sh SCell traf to overall CA traf NSA PSCell = ((DL RLC PDU volume transmitted over secondary path for FR2 NSA CA + DL RLC PDU volume transmitted over secondary path for FR1 NSA CA)/(DL RLC PDU volume transmitted over secondary path for FR2 NSA CA + DL RLC PDU volume transmitted over secondary path for FR1 NSA CA + DL RLC PDU volume transmitted over primary path for NSA CA)) *100
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the downlink proportion of SCell(s) traffic to overall CA-related traffic in NSA PSCell.

KPI.name: 5G DL Share of CA traffic to overall traffic in NSA PSCell
KPI.lformula: DL Sh CA traf to overall traf NSA PSCell = ((DL RLC PDU volume transmitted over secondary path for FR2 NSA CA + DL RLC PDU volume transmitted over secondary path for FR1 NSA CA + DL RLC PDU volume transmitted over primary path for NSA CA)/(DL RLC PDU volume transmitted over secondary path for FR2 NSA CA + DL RLC PDU volume transmitted over secondary path for FR1 NSA CA + DL RLC PDU volume transmitted over primary path for NSA CA + DL RLC PDU volume transmitted to non-CA NSA DRBs)) *100
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the downlink proportion of CA traffic to overall traffic in NSA PSCell.

KPI.name: 5G UL Share of SCell(s) traffic to overall CA traffic in SA PCell
KPI.lformula: UL Sh SCell traf to overall CA traf SA PCell = ((UL RLC PDU volume received over secondary path for FR2 SA CA + UL RLC PDU volume received over secondary path for FR1 SA CA)/(UL RLC PDU volume received over secondary path for FR2 SA CA + UL RLC PDU volume received over secondary path for FR1 SA CA + UL RLC PDU volume received over primary path for SA CA)) *100
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the uplink proportion of SCell(s) traffic to overall CA-related traffic in SA PCell.

KPI.name: 5G UL Share of CA traffic to overall traffic in SA PCell
KPI.lformula: UL Sh CA traf to overall traf SA PCell = ((UL RLC PDU volume received over secondary path for FR2 SA CA + UL RLC PDU volume received over secondary path for FR1 SA CA + UL RLC PDU volume received over primary path for SA CA)/(UL RLC PDU volume received over secondary path for FR2 SA CA + UL RLC PDU volume received over secondary path for FR1 SA CA + UL RLC PDU volume received over primary path for SA CA + UL RLC PDU volume received from non-CA SA DRBs)) *100
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the uplink proportion of CA traffic to overall traffic in SA PCell.

KPI.name: 5G UL Share of SCell(s) traffic to overall CA traffic in NSA PSCell
KPI.lformula: UL Sh SCell traf to overall CA traf NSA PSCell = ((UL RLC PDU volume received over secondary path for FR2 NSA CA)/(UL RLC PDU volume received over secondary path for FR2 NSA CA + UL RLC PDU volume received over primary path for NSA CA)) *100
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the uplink proportion of SCell(s) traffic to overall CA-related traffic in NSA PSCell.

KPI.name: 5G UL Share of CA traffic to overall traffic in NSA PSCell
KPI.lformula: UL Sh CA traf to overall traf NSA PSCell = ((UL RLC PDU volume received over secondary path for FR2 NSA CA + UL RLC PDU volume received over primary path for NSA CA)/(UL RLC PDU volume received over secondary path for FR2 NSA CA + UL RLC PDU volume received over primary path for NSA CA + UL RLC PDU volume received from non-CA NSA DRBs)) *100
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the uplink proportion of CA traffic to overall traffic in NSA PSCell.

KPI.name: 5G DL Share of inter-gNB SCell(s) traffic to inter-gNB CA traffic in SA PCell
KPI.lformula: IGNB DL Sh SCell traf to CA traf SA PCell = ((DL RLC PDU volume transmitted over secondary path for Inter-gNB CA)/(DL RLC PDU volume transmitted over secondary path for Inter-gNB CA + P-Cell Data Volume for Inter gNB CA for SA)) *100
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the downlink proportion of inter-gNB SCell(s) traffic to inter-gNB CA-related traffic in SA PCell.

KPI.name: 5G DL Share of inter-gNB CA traffic to overall CA traffic in SA PCell
KPI.lformula: DL Sh IGNB CA traf to overall CA traf SA PCell = ((DL RLC PDU volume transmitted over secondary path for Inter-gNB CA + PCell Data Volume for Inter-gNB CA for SA)/(DL RLC PDU volume transmitted over secondary path for FR1 SA CA + DL RLC PDU volume transmitted over primary path for SA CA)) *100
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the downlink proportion of inter-gNB CA traffic to overall CA traffic in SA PCell.

KPI.name: 5G SA QoS Flow Modification Success Ratio
KPI.lformula: 5G SA QoS Flow Modification SR = 100 * (Number of QoS flows successfully modified) / (Number of QoS flows attempted to modify)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the Success Ratio for QoS Flow modification.

KPI.name: 5G SA Average time for handover target selection due to measurement prioritization
KPI.lformula: Avg time HO target selection measurement prioritization = Aggregated time between measurement reports / Number of samples
KPI.desc: This KPI provides the average time between receiving the first measurement report and the measurement report containing the cell selected as the final target cell for the handover due to measurement prioritization.

KPI.name: 5G SA Maximum time for handover target selection due to measurement prioritization
KPI.lformula: Max time HO target selection measurement prioritization
KPI.desc: This KPI provides the maximum time between receiving the first measurement report and the measurement report containing the cell selected as the final target cell for the handover due to measurement prioritization.

KPI.name: 5G SA Average Number of PCell UEs with Configured five SCell in DL
KPI.lformula: Avg PCell UE 5 SCell Conf = (Cumulative number of PCell CA UEs with five configured SCell in DL) / (number of samples the cumulative value was obtained)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the average number of CA UEs in the current cell configured as a PCell, which have five configured SCell in DL.

KPI.name: 5G SA Average Number of PCell UEs with Configured six SCells in DL
KPI.lformula: Avg PCell UE 6 SCells Conf DL = (Cumulative number of PCell CA UEs with six configured SCells in DL) / (number of samples)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the average number of PCell UEs with Configured six SCells in DL.

KPI.name: 5G SA Average Number of PCell UEs with Configured seven SCells in DL
KPI.lformula: Avg PCell UE 7 SCell Conf DL = (Cumulative number of PCell CA UEs with seven configured SCell in DL) / (number of samples)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the average number of PCell UEs with Configured seven SCells in DL.

KPI.name: 5G SA CA SCell Addition Success Ratio for 5 SCell in DL in PCell
KPI.lformula: SA CA SCell Addition SR 5 SCell = 100*(SA CA SCell Addition successes 5 SCell) / (SA CA SCell Addition attempts 5 SCell)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the SA Carrier Aggregation (CA) SCell Addition Success Ratio for 5 SCell in DL, measured by request and acknowledge messages sent over RRC protocol in PCell.

KPI.name: 5G SA CA SCell Addition Success Ratio for 6 SCell in DL in PCell
KPI.lformula: SA CA SCell Addition SR 6 SCell = 100*(SA CA SCell Addition successes 6 SCells) / (SA CA SCell Addition attempts 6 SCells)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the SA Carrier Aggregation (CA) SCell Addition Success Ratio for 6 SCell in DL, measured by request and acknowledge messages sent over RRC protocol in PCell.

KPI.name: 5G SA CA SCell Addition Success Ratio for 7 SCell in DL in PCell
KPI.lformula: SA CA SCell Addition SR 7 SCell = 100*(SA CA SCell Addition successes 7 SCells) / (SA CA SCell Addition attempts 7 SCells)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the SA Carrier Aggregation (CA) SCell Addition Success Ratio for 7 SCell in DL, measured by request and acknowledge messages sent over RRC protocol in PCell.

KPI.name: 5G SA CA SCell Addition attempts for 5 SCell in DL in PCell
KPI.lformula: SA CA SCell Addition attempts 5 SCell = (SA CA SCell Addition attempts 5 SCell)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the SA Carrier Aggregation (CA) SCell Addition attempts for 5 SCell in DL, measured by request messages sent over RRC protocol in PCell.

KPI.name: 5G SA CA SCell Addition attempts for 6 SCell in DL in PCell
KPI.lformula: SA CA SCell Addition attempts 6 SCells = (SA CA SCell Addition attempts 6 SCells)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the SA Carrier Aggregation (CA) SCell Addition attempts for 6 SCell in DL, measured by request messages sent over RRC protocol in PCell.

KPI.name: 5G SA CA SCell Addition attempts for 7 SCell in DL in PCell
KPI.lformula: SA CA SCell Addition attempts 7 SCells = (SA CA SCell Addition attempts 7 SCells)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the SA Carrier Aggregation (CA) SCell Addition attempts for 7 SCell in DL, measured by request messages sent over RRC protocol in PCell.

KPI.name: 5G SA RAN Paging Success Ratio
KPI.lformula: RAN Paging SR = 100 *(Number of RRC Resume Request1(s) received at gNB-CU in response to RAN Paging per NRBTS/Number of times fullI-RNTI is used as Paging UE-Identity in initial RAN paging attempt per NRBTS)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the Success Ratio for RAN Paging.

KPI.name: 5G Average number of UEs configured as UE-specific CSI RS
KPI.lformula: 5G Average number of UEs configured as UE-specific CSI RS = (Accumulated number of UEs configured as UE-specific CSI RS) / (Number of samples)
KPI.desc: This KPI provides the average number of UEs configured as UE-specific CSI RS

KPI.name: 5G Maximum number of UEs configured as UE-specific CSI RS
KPI.lformula: 5G Maximum number of UEs configured as UE-specific CSI RS
KPI.desc: This KPI provides the maximum number of UEs configured as UE-specific CSI RS

KPI.name: 5G Average number of UEs configured as cell-specific CSI RS
KPI.lformula: 5G Average number of UEs configured as cell-specific CSI RS = (Accumulated number of UEs configured as cell-specific CSI RS) / (Number of samples)
KPI.desc: This KPI provides the average number of UEs configured as cell-specific CSI RS

KPI.name: 5G Maximum number of UEs configured as cell-specific CSI RS
KPI.lformula: 5G Maximum number of UEs configured as cell-specific CSI RS
KPI.desc: This KPI provides the maximum number of UEs configured as cell-specific CSI RS

KPI.name: 5G Average number of UEs in a slot with 1 SU MIMO in DL
KPI.lformula: 5G Average number of UEs with 1 Layer SU MIMO DL = (Accumulated number of UEs with 1 Layer SU MIMO DL) / (Num of data slots used for PDSCH + num of SSB slots + num of TRS slots)
KPI.desc: This KPI provides the average number of UEs in a slot with 1 layer SU MIMO in DL

KPI.name: 5G Average number of UEs in a slot with 2 SU MIMO in DL
KPI.lformula: 5G Average number of UEs with 2 Layer SU MIMO DL = (Accumulated number of UEs with 2 Layer SU MIMO DL) / (Num of data slots used for PDSCH + num of SSB slots + num of TRS slots)
KPI.desc: This KPI provides the average number of UEs in a slot with 2 layer SU MIMO in DL

KPI.name: 5G Average number of UEs in a slot with 3 SU MIMO in DL
KPI.lformula: 5G Average number of UEs with 3 Layer SU MIMO DL = (Accumulated number of UEs with 3 Layer SU MIMO DL) / (Num of data slots used for PDSCH + num of SSB slots + num of TRS slots)
KPI.desc: This KPI provides the average number of UEs in a slot with 3 layer SU MIMO in DL

KPI.name: 5G Average number of UEs in a slot with 4 SU MIMO in DL
KPI.lformula: 5G Average number of UEs with 4 Layer SU MIMO DL = (Accumulated number of UEs with 4 Layer SU MIMO DL) / (Num of data slots used for PDSCH + num of SSB slots + num of TRS slots)
KPI.desc: This KPI provides the average number of UEs in a slot with 4 layer SU MIMO in DL

KPI.name: 5G Average number of UEs in a slot with 1 SU MIMO in UL
KPI.lformula: 5G Average number of UEs with 1 Layer SU MIMO UL = (Accumulated number of UEs with 1 Layer SU MIMO UL) / (Num of data slots used for PUSCH)
KPI.desc: This KPI provides the average number of UEs in a slot with 1 layer SU MIMO in UL

KPI.name: 5G Average number of UEs in a slot with 2 SU MIMO in UL
KPI.lformula: 5G Average number of UEs with 2 Layer SU MIMO UL = (Accumulated number of UEs with 2 Layer SU MIMO UL) / (Num of data slots used for PUSCH)
KPI.desc: This KPI provides the average number of UEs in a slot with 2 layer SU MIMO in UL

KPI.name: 5G PUSCH transmission failure ratio over the first UL slot due to DTX or CRC error
KPI.lformula: 5G PUSCH transmission FR first UL slot due to DTX or CRC error = 100 * (PUSCH transmissions over first UL slot which failed due to DTX or CRC error) / (Total PUSCH transmissions over first UL slot)
KPI.desc: This KPI provides PUSCH transmission failure ratio over the first UL slot due to DTX or CRC error

KPI.name: 5G PUSCH transmission failure ratio over the second UL slot due to DTX or CRC error
KPI.lformula: 5G PUSCH transmission FR second UL slot due to DTX or CRC error = 100 * (PUSCH transmissions over second UL slot which failed due to DTX or CRC error) / (Total PUSCH transmissions over second UL slot)
KPI.desc: This KPI provides PUSCH transmission failure ratio over the second UL slot due to DTX or CRC error

KPI.name: 5G VoNR PUSCH transmission failure ratio over the first UL slot due to DTX or CRC error
KPI.lformula: 5G VoNR PUSCH transmission FR first UL slot due to DTX or CRC error = 100 * (VoNR PUSCH transmissions over first UL slot which failed due to DTX or CRC error) / (Total VoNR PUSCH transmissions over first UL slot)
KPI.desc: This KPI provides VoNR PUSCH transmission failure ratio over the first UL slot due to DTX or CRC error

KPI.name: 5G VoNR PUSCH transmission failure ratio over the second UL slot due to DTX or CRC error
KPI.lformula: 5G VoNR PUSCH transmission FR second UL slot due to DTX or CRC error = 100 * (VoNR PUSCH transmissions over second UL slot whoch failed due to DTX or CRC error) / (Total VoNR PUSCH transmissions over second UL slot)
KPI.desc: This KPI provides VoNR PUSCH transmission failure ratio over the second UL slot due to DTX or CRC error

KPI.name: 5G Average GTP-U packet delay in DL over F1-U per cell
KPI.lformula: sum of (DL GTP packet delay over F1-U) / (Number of DL GTP packets)
KPI.desc: This KPI provides the average (arithmetic mean) time it takes for GTP-U packet in DL to travel over F1-U interface, per cell. The exact time span is divided by two and is measured as a difference between:- sending the GTP-U packet to the gNB-DU at the GTP ingress termination (sending the PDCP packet from PDCP - DUD),- receiving feedback from the gNB-DU at the egress GTP termination (feedback receiving point at the PDCP SN - DDDS),with exclusion of processing time in gNB-DU.

KPI.name: 5G Average air-interface MAC SDU delay in UL per cell
KPI.lformula: sum of (delay UL air-interface for MAC SDU per cell) / (total number of UL MAC SDUs is sent to RLC)
KPI.desc: This KPI provides the average (arithmetic mean) time it takes for MAC SDU packet to travel from the UE to the DU from the point of time when UL grant is assigned, per cell. The exact time span is measured as difference between:- the UL MAC SDU is scheduled in MAC layer as per the scheduling grant sent to UE and- the UL MAC SDU is successfully sent to RLC.

KPI.name: 5G Average air-interface UM RLC SDU delay in DL per cell
KPI.lformula: sum of (delay DL air-interface for UM RLC per cell) / (total number of RLC SDUs transmitted to UE successfully)
KPI.desc: This KPI provides the average (arithmetic mean) time it takes for RLC SDU packet to travel from DU to the UE and back from the UE to DU, in the downlink direction for UM RLC per cell. The exact time span is measured as difference between:- RLC SDU packet arrives in MAC layer and- the reception of HARQ ACK for UM mode for the corresponding RLC SDU packet at air interface.

KPI.name: 5G Average gNB-DU RLC SDU delay in DL per cell
KPI.lformula: sum of (RLC SDU DL delay in DU) / (Number of transmitted RLC SDUs in DL from RLC to MAC)
KPI.desc: This KPI provides the average (arithmetic mean) time it takes for RLC SDU packet to travel from RLC to MAC, per cell.The exact time span is measured as difference between:- the RLC SDU is received in the RLC layer and - the corresponding RLC SDU is sent to MAC layer.

KPI.name: 5G Average gNB-DU burst RLC SDU delay in DL per cell
KPI.lformula: sum of (INIT RLC SDU in burst DL IP latency in DU) / (Number of init RLC SDU in burst transmitted)
KPI.desc: This KPI provides the average (arithmetic mean) time it takes for Initial RLC SDU packet in a burst to travel from gNB-DU to UE, per cell.The exact time span is measured as difference between:- the RLC SDU is received at DU and - the first RLC SDU transmitted on the air interface.

KPI.name: 5G Average gNB-DU RLC SDU delay in UL per cell
KPI.lformula: sum of (RLC SDU UL delay in DU) / (Number of transmitted UL RLC SDU)
KPI.desc: This KPI provides the average (arithmetic mean) time it takes for RLC SDU packet to travel from RLC to PDCP, per cell.The exact time span is measured as difference between:- the RLC PDU being received by the RLC layer and - the corresponding RLC SDU is sent to PDCP layer in CU.

KPI.name: 5G SA DL CA configuration attempts in CU
KPI.lformula: all CC configuration attempts
KPI.nformula: (GNB_DL_SCELL_1_CONFIG_REQ_SA + GNB_DL_SCELL_2_CONFIG_REQ_SA + GNB_DL_SCELL_3_CONFIG_REQ_SA + GNB_DL_SCELL_4_CONFIG_REQ_SA + GNB_DL_SCELL_5_CONFIG_REQ_SA + GNB_DL_SCELL_6_CONFIG_REQ_SA + GNB_DL_SCELL_7_CONFIG_REQ_SA)
KPI.desc: This KPI describes the configuration attempts (successful SCell selection) for DL CA for SA in CU. It includes every CC configuration.

KPI.name: 5G SA UL CA configuration attempts in CU
KPI.lformula: all CC successful configuration attempts
KPI.desc: This KPI describes the configuration attempts (successful SCell selection) for UL CA for SA in CU. It includes every CC configuration.

KPI.name: 5G SA DL CA admission control attempts in CU
KPI.lformula: all CC admission control attempts
KPI.nformula: (GNB_DL_SCELL_1_ADMI_REQ_SA + GNB_DL_SCELL_2_ADMI_REQ_SA + GNB_DL_SCELL_3_ADMI_REQ_SA + GNB_DL_SCELL_4_ADMI_REQ_SA + GNB_DL_SCELL_5_ADMI_REQ_SA + GNB_DL_SCELL_6_ADMI_REQ_SA + GNB_DL_SCELL_7_ADMI_REQ_SA)
KPI.desc: This KPI describes the admission control attempts in CU for DL CA for SA. It includes every CC event.

KPI.name: 5G SA UL CA admission control attempts in CU
KPI.lformula: all CC admission control attempts
KPI.desc: This KPI describes the admission control attempts in CU for UL CA for SA. It includes every CC event.

KPI.name: 5G SA DL CA admission control attempts in DU
KPI.lformula: all CC admission control attempts
KPI.nformula: (GNB_DU_DL_SCELL_1_ADMI_REQ_SA + GNB_DU_DL_SCELL_2_ADMI_REQ_SA + GNB_DU_DL_SCELL_3_ADMI_REQ_SA + GNB_DU_DL_SCELL_4_ADMI_REQ_SA + GNB_DU_DL_SCELL_5_ADMI_REQ_SA + GNB_DU_DL_SCELL_6_ADMI_REQ_SA + GNB_DU_DL_SCELL_7_ADMI_REQ_SA)
KPI.desc: This KPI describes the admission control attempts in DU for DL CA for SA. It includes every CC event.

KPI.name: 5G SA UL CA admission control attempts in DU
KPI.lformula: all CC admission control attempts
KPI.desc: This KPI describes the admission control attempts in DU for UL CA for SA. It includes every CC event.

KPI.name: 5G SA DL CA SCell Release with causes
KPI.lformula: sum of RRC Reconfig sent for SCell Release due to specific reasons
KPI.nformula: (A2MEAS_REL1DLSCELL_ATT_SA + DL_INA_PRO_REL_SCELL_ATT_SA + DL_BAD_RLQ_REL_SCELL_ATT_SA + DL_INA_OVHT_REL_SCELL_ATT_SA + DL_HRDRB_REL_SCELL_ATT_SA + DL_INCMPDRB_REL_SCELL_ATT_SA + DL_ELGBLDRB_REL_SCELL_ATT_SA + DL_LNKFPRI_REL_SCELL_ATT_SA + DL_LNKFEXT_REL_SCELL_ATT_SA + DL_RNUSPC_EXT_REL_SCELL_ATT_SA+DL_PREEM_REL_SCELL_ATT_SA)
KPI.desc: This KPI describes the number of possible SCell Releases for DL CA for SA due to specific reasons. Each SCell is counted separately.

KPI.name: 5G SA UL CA SCell Release with causes
KPI.lformula: sum of RRC Reconfig sent for SCell Release due to specific reasons
KPI.desc: This KPI describes the number of possible SCell Releases for UL CA for SA due to specific reasons. Each SCell is counted separately.

KPI.name: 5G SA UL CA Full SCell Release
KPI.lformula: sum of RRC Reconfig sent for SCell Release in UL
KPI.desc: This KPI describes the number of full SCell Release in PCell in UL for SA.

KPI.name: 5G NSA UL CA admission control attempts in CU
KPI.lformula: all CC admission control attempts
KPI.desc: This KPI describes the admission control attempts in CU for UL CA for NSA. It includes every CC event.

KPI.name: 5G NSA DL CA admission control attempts in DU
KPI.lformula: all CC admission control attempts
KPI.nformula: (SGNB_DU_DL_SCELL_1_ADMI_REQ + SGNB_DU_DL_SCELL_2_ADMI_REQ + SGNB_DU_DL_SCELL_3_ADMI_REQ + SGNB_DU_DL_SCELL_4_ADMI_REQ + SGNB_DU_DL_SCELL_5_ADMI_REQ + SGNB_DU_DL_SCELL_6_ADMI_REQ + SGNB_DU_DL_SCELL_7_ADMI_REQ)
KPI.desc: This KPI describes the admission control attempts in DU for DL CA for NSA. It includes every CC event.

KPI.name: 5G NSA UL CA admission control attempts in DU
KPI.lformula: all CC admission control attempts
KPI.desc: This KPI describes the admission control attempts in DU for UL CA for NSA. It includes every CC event.

KPI.name: 5G NSA DL CA SCell releases with causes
KPI.lformula: sum of RRC Reconfig sent for SCell Release due to specific reasons
KPI.desc: This KPI describes the number of possible SCell releases for DL CA for NSA due to specific reasons. Each SCell is counted separately.

KPI.name: 5G NSA DL CA full SCell releases
KPI.lformula: sum of RRC Reconfig sent for SCell Release in DL
KPI.desc: This KPI describes the number of full SCell releases in PSCell for DL CA for NSA.

KPI.name: 5G NSA UL CA full SCell releases
KPI.lformula: sum of RRC Reconfig sent for SCell Release in UL
KPI.desc: This KPI describes the number of full SCell releases in PSCell for UL CA for NSA.

KPI.name: 5G SA Xn based Inter-gNB HO preparation failure ratio on the target cell due to bad uplink radio conditions
KPI.lformula: Xn HO prep FR due to bad UL radio conditions = Number of failed Xn HO preparation attempts / Number of received Xn HO Requests
KPI.desc: This KPI provides Xn based Inter-gNB HO preparation failure ratio on the target cell due to bad uplink radio conditions

KPI.name: 5G SA NG based Inter-gNB HO preparation failure ratio on the target cell due to bad uplink radio conditions
KPI.lformula: NG HO prep FR due to bad UL radio conditions = Number of failed NG HO preparation attempts / Number of received NG HO Requests
KPI.desc: This KPI provides NG based Inter-gNB HO preparation failure ratio on the target cell due to bad uplink radio conditions

KPI.name: 5G SA Sparse SSSG time ratio for RedCap
KPI.lformula: 5G SA Sparse SSSG time ratio for RedCap = (Total number of slots for all RedCap UEs assigned to sparse SSSG) / (Total number of slots for all RedCap UEs assigned to sparse SSSG + Total number of slots for all RedCap UEs assigned to dense SSSG)
KPI.desc: This KPI provides the ratio between total time RedCap UEs spent in sparse SSSG to total time RedCap UEs spent in sparse and dense SSSGs combined.

KPI.name: 5G Cell in power saving mode due to low voltage ratio
KPI.lformula: 5G Cell pwr save mod low volt R = 100 * Samples when the NR cell is in power saving mode due to low voltage / denom cell avail
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the percentage of time when 5G Cell is in power saving mode due to a low voltage

KPI.name: 5G Cell in power saving mode due to low load ratio
KPI.lformula: 5G Cell pwr save mod low load R = 100 * Samples when the NR cell is in power saving mode due to low load / denom cell avail
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the percentage of time when 5G Cell is in power saving mode due to a low load

KPI.name: 5G Cell in power saving mode due to time of day ratio
KPI.lformula: 5G Cell pwr save mod time of day R = 100 * Samples when the NR cell is in power saving mode due to time of day / denom cell avail
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the percentage of time when 5G Cell is in power saving mode due to time of day

KPI.name: 5G NSA F1 data split ratio in downlink
KPI.lformula: NSA F1 data split R DL = 100 * DL PDCP volume sent over F1-U from gNB-CU for NSA / (DL PDCP volume sent over F1-U from gNB-CU for NSA + DL PDCP volume sent over F1-U from gNB-CU for NSA)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the percentage of NSA data volume sent over F1-U in downlink, compared with the total NSA data volume transmitted via gNB or eNB in downlink.

KPI.name: 5G NSA F1 data split ratio in uplink
KPI.lformula: NSA F1 data split R UL = 100 * UL PDCP volume received over F1-U at gNB-CU for NSA / (UL PDCP volume received over F1-U at gNB-CU for NSA + UL PDCP volume received over X2-U at gNB-CU for NSA)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the percentage of NSA data volume received over F1-U in uplink, compared with the total NSA data volume received via gNB or eNB in uplink.

KPI.name: 5G Average utilization of PDSCH PRBs for slice-aware traffic per cell per resource group
KPI.lformula: Avg util ratio PDSCH PRBs for slice-aware traffic = 100 * (DL PRBs used for slice-aware scheduling per resource group) / (Number of available PRBs on PDSCH for slice-aware traffic in the cell)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the average utilization of PDSCH PRBs for slice-aware traffic per cell per resource group.

KPI.name: 5G Average utilization of PUSCH PRBs for slice-aware traffic per cell per resource group
KPI.lformula: Avg util ratio PUSCH PRBs for slice-aware traffic = 100 * (UL PRBs used for slice-aware scheduling per resource group) / (Number of available PRBs on PUSCH for slice-aware traffic in the cell.)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the average utilization of PUSCH PRBs for slice-aware traffic per cell per resource group.

KPI.name: 5G SA average time of Intra-gNB Intra-DU Handover Execution phase for intra-frequency
KPI.lformula: Average duration of Intra-gNB Intra-DU intra-freq handover execution phase
KPI.desc: This KPI measures the average time of Intra-gNB Intra-DU intra-frequency handover execution phase on source cell.

KPI.name: 5G SA max time of Intra-gNB Intra-DU Handover Execution phase for intra-frequency
KPI.lformula: Max duration of Intra-gNB Intra-DU intra-freq handover execution phase
KPI.desc: This KPI measures the max time of Intra-gNB Intra-DU intra-frequency handover execution phase on source cell.

KPI.lformula: Average duration of Intra-gNB Inter-DU intra-freq handover execution phase
KPI.desc: This KPI measures the average time of Intra-gNB Inter-DU intra-frequency handover execution phase on source cell.

KPI.lformula: Max duration of Intra-gNB Inter-DU intra-freq handover execution phase for VoNR
KPI.desc: This KPI measures the max time of Intra-gNB Inter-DU intra-frequency handover execution phase for VoNR on source cell.

KPI.name: 5G SA average time of Xn based Inter-gNB Handover Execution phase for intra-frequency
KPI.lformula: Average duration of Xn based Inter-gNB intra-freq handover execution phase
KPI.desc: This KPI measures the average time of Xn based Inter-gNB intra-frequency handover execution phase on source cell.

KPI.name: 5G SA max time of Xn based Inter-gNB Handover Execution phase for intra-frequency
KPI.lformula: Max duration of Xn based Inter-gNB intra-freq handover execution phase
KPI.desc: This KPI measures the max time of Xn based Inter-gNB intra-frequency handover execution phase on source cell.

KPI.name: 5G SA average time of NG based Incoming Inter-RAT Handover Execution phase
KPI.lformula: Average duration of Incoming Inter-RAT handover execution phase
KPI.desc: This KPI measures the average time of Incoming Inter-RAT handover execution phase on target 5G cell.

KPI.name: 5G SA max time of NG based Incoming Inter-RAT Handover Execution phase
KPI.lformula: Max duration of Incoming Inter-RAT handover execution phase
KPI.desc: This KPI measures the max time of Incoming Inter-RAT handover execution phase on target 5G cell.

KPI.lformula: Average duration of Incoming Inter-RAT handover execution phase for VoNR

KPI.lformula: Max duration of Incoming Inter-RAT handover execution phase for VoNR

KPI.name: 5G SA average time of NG based Inter-gNB Handover Execution phase for intra-frequency
KPI.lformula: Average duration of NG based Inter-gNB intra-freq handover execution phase
KPI.desc: This KPI measures the average time of NG based Inter-gNB intra-frequency handover execution phase on source cell.

KPI.name: 5G SA max time of NG based Inter-gNB Handover Execution phase for intra-frequency
KPI.lformula: Max duration of NG based Inter-gNB intra-freq handover execution phase
KPI.desc: This KPI measures the max time of NG based Inter-gNB intra-frequency handover execution phase on source cell.

KPI.name: 5G SA average time of Intra-gNB Intra-DU Handover Execution phase for VoNR for intra-frequency
KPI.lformula: The average time of Intra-gNB Intra-DU intra-freq handover for SA for VoNR
KPI.desc: This KPI measures the average time of Intra-gNB Intra-DU intra-frequency handover execution phase for VoNR on source cell.

KPI.lformula: Max duration of NG based Inter-gNB intra-freq handover execution phase for VoNR
KPI.desc: This KPI measures the max time of NG based Inter-gNB intra-frequency handover execution phase for VoNR on source cell.

KPI.lformula: Average duration of Intra-gNB Intra-DU inter-freq handover execution phase

KPI.lformula: Max duration of Intra-gNB Intra-DU inter-freq handover execution phase

KPI.lformula: The average time of Intra-gNB Intra-DU inter-freq handover for SA for VoNR
KPI.desc: This KPI measures the average time of Intra-gNB Intra-DU inter-frequency handover execution phase for VoNR on source cell.

KPI.name: 5G SA max time of Intra-gNB Intra-DU Handover Execution phase for VoNR for inter-frequency
KPI.lformula: The max time of Intra-gNB Intra-DU inter-freq handover for SA for VoNR
KPI.desc: This KPI measures the max time of Intra-gNB Intra-DU inter-frequency handover execution phase for VoNR on source cell.

KPI.lformula: Average duration of Intra-gNB Inter-DU inter-freq handover execution phase for VoNR

KPI.lformula: Max duration of Intra-gNB Inter-DU inter-freq handover execution phase for VoNR

KPI.lformula: Average duration of Xn based Inter-gNB inter-freq handover execution phase
KPI.desc: This KPI measures the average time of Xn based Inter-gNB inter-frequency handover execution phase on source cell.

KPI.name: 5G SA max time of Xn based Inter-gNB Handover Execution phase for inter-frequency
KPI.lformula: Max duration of Xn based Inter-gNB inter-freq handover execution phase
KPI.desc: This KPI measures the max time of Xn based Inter-gNB inter-frequency handover execution phase on source cell.

KPI.name: 5G SA average time of Xn based Inter-gNB Handover Execution phase for VoNR for inter-frequency
KPI.lformula: Average duration of Xn based Inter-gNB inter-freq handover execution phase for VoNR
KPI.desc: This KPI measures the average time of Xn based Inter-gNB inter-frequency handover execution phase for VoNR on source cell.

KPI.name: 5G SA max time of Xn based Inter-gNB Handover Execution phase for VoNR for inter-frequency
KPI.lformula: Max duration of Xn based Inter-gNB inter-freq handover execution phase for VoNR
KPI.desc: This KPI measures the max time of Xn based Inter-gNB inter-frequency handover execution phase for VoNR on source cell.

KPI.name: 5G SA average time of NG based Inter-gNB Handover Execution phase for inter-frequency
KPI.lformula: Average duration of NG based Inter-gNB inter-freq handover execution phase
KPI.desc: This KPI measures the average time of NG based Inter-gNB inter-frequency handover execution phase on source cell.

KPI.name: 5G SA max time of NG based Inter-gNB Handover Execution phase for inter-frequency
KPI.lformula: Max duration of NG based Inter-gNB inter-freq handover execution phase
KPI.desc: This KPI measures the max time of NG based Inter-gNB inter-frequency handover execution phase on source cell.

KPI.name: 5G SA average time of NG based Inter-gNB Handover Execution phase for VoNR for inter-frequency
KPI.lformula: Average duration of NG based Inter-gNB inter-freq handover execution phase for VoNR
KPI.desc: This KPI measures the average time of NG based Inter-gNB inter-frequency handover execution phase for VoNR on source cell.

KPI.name: 5G SA max time of NG based Inter-gNB Handover Execution phase for VoNR for inter-frequency
KPI.lformula: Max duration of NG based Inter-gNB inter-freq handover execution phase for VoNR
KPI.desc: This KPI measures the max time of NG based Inter-gNB inter-frequency handover execution phase for VoNR on source cell.

KPI.name: 5G SA RRC Resume Success Ratio including RNA update and fallback
KPI.lformula: 5G SA RRC Resume SR inc RNA update and fallback = 100 * (Number of RRC Resume Successes at gNB-CU + Number of successful RRC connection resume fallbacks to RRC Setup + RRC releases with suspension sent from gNB-CU in response to RRC Resume Request for RNA update) / (Number of RRC Resume Requests1 received at gNB-CU + Number of RRC Resume Requests received at gNB-CU)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the Success Ratio for RRC Resume including RNA update and fallback.

KPI.name: 5G CA SCell activation depending on HARQ ACK confirmation
KPI.lformula: CA SCell activation success ratio
KPI.desc: This KPI measures the SCell activation procedure for Carrier Aggregation within MAC layer, depending on HARQ ACK confirmation from the UE.

KPI.name: 5G CA SCell deactivation depending on HARQ ACK confirmation
KPI.lformula: CA SCell deactivation success ratio
KPI.desc: This KPI measures the SCell deactivation procedure for Carrier Aggregation within MAC layer, depending on HARQ ACK confirmation from the UE.

KPI.name: 5G SA Average SCell configuration delay
KPI.lformula: SA Average SCell configuration delay
KPI.nformula: (SCELL_CONFIG_DUR_SA + XSCELL_CONFIG_DUR) / (GNB_DL_SCELL_1_CONFIG_SUCC_SA + GNB_DL_SCELL_2_CONFIG_SUCC_SA + GNB_DL_SCELL_3_CONFIG_SUCC_SA + GNB_DL_SCELL_4_CONFIG_SUCC_SA + GNB_DL_SCELL_5_CONFIG_SUCC_SA + GNB_DL_SCELL_6_CONFIG_SUCC_SA + GNB_DL_SCELL_7_CONFIG_SUCC_SA)
KPI.desc: This KPI measures the average SCell configuration delay which is started after SCell selection phase and ends at completion phase (F1AP: UE Context Modification Response received in CU).

KPI.name: 5G SA Average SCell RRC Reconfiguration delay
KPI.lformula: SA Average SCell RRC Reconfiguration delay
KPI.nformula: (SCELL_CONFIG_RRC_RECNFG_DUR_SA + XSCELL_CONFIG_RRC_RECNFG_DUR) / (RRC_RECONF_ADD1DLSCELL_SUCC_SA + RRC_RECONF_ADD2DLSCELL_SUCC_SA + RRC_RECONF_ADD3DLSCELL_SUCC_SA + RRC_RECONF_ADD4DLSCELL_SUCC_SA + RRC_RECONF_ADD5DLSCELL_SUCC_SA + RRC_RECONF_ADD6DLSCELL_SUCC_SA + RRC_RECONF_ADD7DLSCELL_SUCC_SA + SCELL_SWAP_1_SUCC_SA + SCELL_CHANGE_SUCC_SA)
KPI.desc: This KPI measures average SCell RRC Reconfiguration delay which is started after Admission Control phase and ends after reception of RRC Reconfiguration Complete in CU. This KPI (delay over air reconfiguration) is only a small portion of whole SCell configuration process which is captured in NR_6168a.

KPI.name: 5G SA Intra-gNB CA Maximum SCell internal configuration delay
KPI.lformula: SA Intra-gNB CA Maximum SCell internal configuration delay
KPI.desc: This KPI measures the maximum internal delay within gNB for Intra-gNB CA SCell configuration. The measurement interval commences upon SCell selection and concludes immediately prior to the transmission of the RRC Reconfiguration message (encapsulated within an F1AP: DL RRC Message Transfer) from the gNB-CU.

KPI.name: 5G SA Inter-gNB CA Maximum SCell configuration delay
KPI.lformula: SA Inter-gNB CA Maximum SCell configuration delay
KPI.desc: This KPI measures the maximum Inter-gNB CA SCell configuration delay which is started after SCell selection phase and ends at completion phase (F1AP: UE Context Modification Response received in CU).

KPI.name: 5G Initial AM RLC DL success ratio
KPI.lformula: Initial AM RLC in DL success rate = (RLC ARQ ACKs for DL RLC AM initial transmissions) / (Number of DL RLC AM initial transmissions)
KPI.desc: This KPI measures the initial AM RLC in DL success ratio.

KPI.name: 5G Final AM RLC DL success ratio
KPI.lformula: Final AM RLC in DL success rate = (RLC ARQ ACKs for DL RLC AM initial transmissions and retransmissions) / (Number of DL RLC AM initial transmissions)
KPI.desc: This KPI measures the final AM RLC in DL success ratio.

KPI.name: 5G Initial AM RLC DL success ratio for CA
KPI.lformula: Initial AM RLC in DL success rate CA = (RLC ARQ ACKs for DL RLC AM initial transmissions for CA) / (Number of DL RLC AM initial transmissions for CA)
KPI.desc: This KPI measures the initial AM RLC in DL success ratio for CA.

KPI.name: 5G Final AM RLC DL success ratio for CA
KPI.lformula: Final AM RLC in DL success rate CA = (RLC ARQ ACKs for DL RLC AM initial transmissions and retransmissions for CA) / (Number of DL RLC AM initial transmissions for CA)
KPI.desc: This KPI measures the final AM RLC in DL success ratio for CA.

KPI.name: 5G Initial AM RLC UL success ratio
KPI.lformula: Initial AM RLC in UL success rate = (UL RLC AM initial transmissions) / (UL RLC AM initial transmissions + RLC ARQ NACKs for UL RLC AM initial transmissions)
KPI.desc: This KPI measures the initial AM RLC in UL success ratio.

KPI.name: 5G Final AM RLC UL success ratio
KPI.lformula: Final AM RLC in UL success rate = (UL RLC AM initial transmissions and retransmissions) / (UL RLC AM initial transmissions + RLC ARQ NACKs for UL RLC AM initial transmissions)
KPI.desc: This KPI measures the final AM RLC in UL success ratio.

KPI.name: 5G Initial AM RLC UL success ratio for CA
KPI.lformula: Initial AM RLC in UL success rate = (UL RLC AM initial transmissions for CA) / (UL RLC AM initial transmissions for CA + RLC ARQ NACKs for UL RLC AM initial transmissions for CA)
KPI.desc: This KPI measures the initial AM RLC in UL success ratio for CA.

KPI.name: 5G Final AM RLC UL success ratio for CA
KPI.lformula: Final AM RLC in UL success rate = (UL RLC AM initial transmissions and retransmissions for CA) / (UL RLC AM initial transmissions for CA + RLC ARQ NACKs for UL RLC AM initial transmissions for CA)
KPI.desc: This KPI measures the final AM RLC in UL success ratio for CA.

KPI.name: 5G Radio admission success ratio for non-GBR DRBs per resource group
KPI.lformula: Radio admission success ratio for non-GBR DRBs per RG = 100 * (Number of successful admissions for non-GBR DRBs per resource group) / (Number of admission requests for non-GBR DRBs per resource group)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the radio admission success ratio for non-GBR DRBs per resource group.

KPI.name: 5G Radio admission success ratio for NBR DRBs per resource group
KPI.lformula: Radio admission success ratio for NBR DRBs per RG = 100 * (Number of successful admissions for NBR DRBs per resource group) / (Number of admission requests for NBR DRBs per resource group)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the radio admission success ratio for NBR DRBs per resource group.

KPI.name: 5G Radio admission success ratio for UE per resource group
KPI.lformula: Radio admission success ratio for UEs per RG = 100 * (Number of successful UE admissions per resource group) / (Number of UE admission requests per resource group)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the radio admission success ratio for UE per resource group.

KPI.name: 5G Average number of UEs per resource group
KPI.lformula: Average number of UEs per RG = ( The sum of number of UEs per resource group) / (Number of samples per resource group)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the average number of UEs per resource group.

KPI.name: 5G Average number of non-GBR DRBs per resource group
KPI.lformula: Average number of non-GBR DRBs per RG = ( The sum of number of non-GBR DRBs per resource group) / (Number of samples per resource group)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the average number of non-GBR DRBs per resource group.

KPI.name: 5G Average number of NBR DRBs per resource group
KPI.lformula: Average number of NBR DRBs per RG = ( The sum of number of NBR DRBs per resource group) / (Number of samples per resource group)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the average number of NBR DRBs per resource group.

KPI.name: 5G Maximum number of UEs per resource group
KPI.lformula: Maximum number of UEs per RG = Peak number of UEs per resource group
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the maximum number of UEs per resource group

KPI.name: 5G Maximum number of non-GBR DRBs per resource group
KPI.lformula: Maximum number of non-GBR DRBs per RG = Peak number of non-GBR DRBs per resource group
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the maximum number of non-GBR DRBs per resource group

KPI.name: 5G Maximum number of NBR DRBs per resource group
KPI.lformula: Maximum number of NBR DRBs per RG = Peak number of NBR DRBs per resource group
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the maximum number of NBR DRBs per resource group

KPI.name: 5G Radio admission success ratio for GBR DRBs per resource group
KPI.lformula: Radio admission success ratio for GBR DRBs per RG = 100 * (Number of successful admissions for GBR DRBs per resource group) / (Number of admission requests for GBR DRBs per resource group)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the radio admission success ratio for GBR DRBs per resource group.

KPI.name: 5G Average number of GBR DRBs per resource group
KPI.lformula: Average number of GBR DRBs per RG = ( The sum of number of GBR DRBs per resource group) / (Number of samples per resource group)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the average number of GBR DRBs per resource group.

KPI.name: 5G Maximum number of GBR DRBs per resource group
KPI.lformula: Maximum number of GBR DRBs per RG = Peak number of GBR DRBs per resource group
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the maximum number of GBR DRBs per resource group

KPI.name: 5G SA gNB-initiated Drop Ratio - RAN view
KPI.lformula: 5G SA gNB-init Drop Ratio - RAN view = 100 * (number of abnormal releases initiated by gNB) / (Rel Request sent + Number of suspended UE Contexts)
KPI.nformula: (100*(NG_UE_CTXT_REL_GNB_RLF + NG_UE_CTXT_REL_GNB_UE_LOST + NG_UE_CTXT_REL_GNB_UNSPEC + NG_UE_CTXT_REL_GNB_TRS + NG_UE_CTXT_REL_GNB_RDPRCDFL + NG_UE_CTXT_REL_GNB_TXNRELOC + NG_UE_CTXT_REL_GNB_TNGRELOC) / (NNGCC_UE_CTXT_REL_REQ_SENT + NRRCC_RRC_REL_WITH_SUSP_NRNAU))
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the ratio of the number of abnormal UE releases initiated by gNB to the total number of UE releases initiated by gNB.

KPI.name: 5G NSA Initial ERAB setup success ratio
KPI.lformula: 5G NSA Initial ERAB setup success ratio = 100 * (Number of NSA E-RABs successfully established for initial SgNB addition or SgNB modification) / (Number of NSA E-RABs to be added via initial SgNB addition or SgNB modification)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the ratio of initial ERABs set up successfully after passing admission control. Only initial setups are considered, setups related to successful PSCell Change or HO is not counted.

KPI.name: 5G NSA ERAB setup success ratio upon Inter-MeNB HO trigger
KPI.lformula: 5G NSA ERAB setup success ratio Inter-eNB-HO = 100 * (Number of NSA E-RABs successfully established for SgNB addition Inter-eNB-HO) / (Number of NSA E-RABs to be added via SgNB addition Inter-eNB-HO)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the ratio of ERABs set up successfully upon Inter-MeNB HO trigger after passing admission control.

KPI.name: 5G NSA ERAB setup success ratio upon PSCell change trigger
KPI.lformula: 5G NSA ERAB setup success ratio sn-change = 100 * (Number of NSA E-RABs successfully established for SgNB addition sn-change) / (Number of NSA E-RABs to be added via SgNB addition sn-change)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the ratio of ERABs set up successfully upon PSCell change trigger after passing admission control.

KPI.name: 5G NSA Initial ERAB Reconfiguration success ratio
KPI.lformula: 5G NSA Initial ERAB Reconf success ratio = 100 * (Number of successful NSA E-RAB setup attempt reconfigurations completed) / (Number of NSA E-RABs to be added via initial SgNB addition or SgNB modification)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the ratio of initial E-RABs for which SgNB Reconfiguration is completed successfully. The formula monitors the call setup procedure from reception of SgNB Addition Request at SgNB until the X2AP: SgNB Reconfiguration Complete message is received by SgNB with the configuration successfully applied.Only initial setups are considered, setups related to successful PSCell Change or HO is not counted.

KPI.name: 5G Contention based RACH setup success ratio excluding ghost preambles
KPI.lformula: Cont based RACH stp SR exc ghost = 100 * RA msg3 receptions / (RA setup completions for contention based group A preambles - Number of times no response from UE for gNB MSG2 occurs)
KPI.desc: This KPI measures the success ratio of CBRA procedure with exclusion of ghost user events.

KPI.name: 5G Peak number of UEs in the cell
KPI.lformula: Peak number of UEs in the cell
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the peak number of UEs in the cell.

KPI.name: 5G ratio of proactive UL grants used for data transmission
KPI.lformula: 5G Ratio of proactive UL grants used for data transmission = ((Number of PUSCH transmissions for DRB priority proactive UL grants filled with UE data)/(Number of DRB priority proactive UL grants sent to UE)) *100
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the ratio of the proactive uplink grants used for data transmission (not padding).

KPI.name: 5G Cell in Reduced TX Power Saving Mode Ratio
KPI.lformula: 5G Cell in Reduced TX Power Saving Mode Ratio = Number of samples when the cell is in 'reduced TX power saving mode' / Cell availability denominator
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the cell reduced TX power saving mode ratio given as time the cell is in reduced TX power saving mode to total time period

KPI.name: 5G SA Success Ratio of UE Reconfiguration from DMRS type 1 to DMRS type 2 based on channel quality monitoring
KPI.lformula: (UE reconfiguration success for switching from DMRS type 1 to DMRS type 2 / UE reconfiguration attempts fo switching from DMRS type 1 to DMRS type 2) * 100%
KPI.desc: The KPI shows the success rate of UE reconfiguration for the transition from DMRS type 1 to DMRS type 2 in DL based on channel quality monitoring.

KPI.name: 5G SA Success Ratio of UE Reconfiguration from DMRS type 2 to DMRS type 1 based on channel quality monitoring
KPI.lformula: (UE reconfiguration success for switching from DMRS type 2 to DMRS type 1 / UE reconfiguration attempts fo switching from DMRS type 2 to DMRS type 1) * 100%
KPI.desc: The KPI shows the success rate of UE reconfiguration for the transition from DMRS type 2 to DMRS type 1 in DL based on channel quality monitoring.

KPI.name: 5G MAC PDU Cell throughput on PDSCH considering the accumulated time of frames with data slots used for PDSCH
KPI.lformula: NR_6203a = NR_5088 * Share of downlink data slots
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the cell throughput on active PDSCH calculated at MAC layer by dividing the MAC PDU data volume transmitted on initial HARQ tx divided by the accumulated time of frames with data slots used for PDSCH.This KPI takes into account that not all slots are available for PDSCH transmission.Formula is only valid if PDSCH / SBB multiplexing and PDSCH / TRS multiplexing is enabled (actPdschAtSsbSlots = true, actPdschRmCsirsForTracking = true).

KPI.name: 5G MAC PDU cell throughput on PUSCH considering the accumulated time of frames with data slots used for PUSCH
KPI.lformula: NR_6204a = NR_5089 * Share of uplink data slots
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the cell throughput on active PUSCH calculated at MAC layer by dividing the MAC PDU data volume transmitted on initial HARQ tx divided by the accumulated time of frames with data slots used for PUSCH.This KPI takes into account that not all slots are available for PUSCH transmission.Formula is only valid if PUSCH / PRACH multiplexing is enabled (pucchModeSelectact = LongPucch or PrachMultiplexing = true).

KPI.name: 5G DL PRB utilization per cell per PLMN
KPI.lformula: 5G DL PRB utilization per cell per PLMN = ((Number of PRBs used for PDSCH per PLMN)/(Denominator for calculating DL PRB Utilization per PLMN)) *100
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the utilization of PRBs for PDSCH per cell per PLMN

KPI.name: 5G UL PRB utilization per cell per PLMN
KPI.lformula: 5G UL PRB utilization per cell per PLMN = ((PRBs used for PUSCH per PLMN)/(Denominator for calculating UL PRB Utilization per PLMN)) *100
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the utilization of PRBs for PUSCH per cell per PLMN

KPI.name: 5G Maximum utilization ratio of PDSCH PRBs per cell per PLMN
KPI.lformula: Max([Maximum DL PRB utilization for slice-aware scheduling per PLMN])
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the maximum utilization ratio of PDSCH PRBs per cell per PLMN.

KPI.name: 5G Maximum utilization ratio of PUSCH PRBs per cell per PLMN
KPI.lformula: Max([Maximum UL PRB utilization for slice-aware scheduling per PLMN])
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the maximum utilization ratio of PUSCH PRBs per cell per PLMN.

KPI.name: 5G SA share of number of UEs with DL carrier aggregation capability to overall number of UEs on the PCell
KPI.lformula: SA DL CA num of users Sh to overall num of users = 100* (sum of number of SA UEs supporting more than one CC in DL / sum of number of SA UEs supporting 1CC and more in DL)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the proportion of number of UEs with carrier aggregation capability to overall number of UEs in SA DL on the PCell.

KPI.name: 5G NSA share of number of UEs with DL carrier aggregation capability to overall number of UEs on the PSCell
KPI.lformula: NSA DL CA num of users Sh to overall num of users = 100* (sum of number of NSA UEs supporting more than one CC in DL / sum of number of NSA UEs supporting 1CC and more in DL)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the proportion of number of UEs with carrier aggregation capability to overall number of UEs in NSA DL on the PSCell.

KPI.name: 5G SA share of number of UEs with UL carrier aggregation capability to overall number of UEs on the PCell
KPI.lformula: SA UL CA num of users Sh to overall num of users = 100* (sum of number of SA UEs supporting more than one CC in UL / sum of number of SA UEs supporting 1CC and more in UL)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the proportion of number of UEs with carrier aggregation capability to overall number of UEs in SA UL on the PCell.

KPI.name: 5G NSA share of number of UEs with UL carrier aggregation capability to overall number of UEs on the PSCell
KPI.lformula: NSA UL CA num of users Sh to overall num of users = 100* (sum of number of NSA UEs supporting more than one CC in UL / sum of number of NSA UEs supporting 1CC and more in UL)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the proportion of number of UEs with carrier aggregation capability to overall number of UEs in NSA UL on the PSCell.

KPI.name: 5G SA Average number of UL TX switching option1 capable UEs
KPI.lformula: Avg number of UL TX switching opt1 cap UEs = (Accumulated number of UL TX switching opt 1 capable UE) / (Num of samples)
KPI.desc: This KPI provides the average number of UL TX switching option1 capable UEs

KPI.name: 5G SA Average number of UEs configured with UL TX switching option1
KPI.lformula: Avg number of UEs conf UL TX switching opt1 = (Accumulated number of UEs configured with UL TX switching opt 1) / (Num of samples)
KPI.desc: This KPI provides the average number of UEs configured with UL TX switching option1

KPI.name: 5G SA Average number of UL TX switching option1 capable UEs for 2T2T
KPI.lformula: Avg number of UL 2TX switching opt1 cap UEs = (Accumulated number of UL 2TX switching opt 1 capable UE) / (Num of samples)
KPI.desc: This KPI provides the average number of UL TX switching option1 capable UEs for 2T2T

KPI.name: 5G SA Average number of UEs configured with UL TX switching option1 for 2T2T
KPI.lformula: Avg number of UEs conf UL 2TX switching opt1 = (Accumulated number of UEs configured with UL 2TX switching opt 1) / (Num of samples)
KPI.desc: This KPI provides the average number of UEs configured with UL TX switching option1 for 2T2T

KPI.name: 5G SA Percentage of VoNR calls with DL air interface mute
KPI.lformula: 100*(Number of VoNR bearers with DL air-interface mute)/Total VONR Setup in Cell
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the ratio of VoNR calls in the cell that experienced at least one DL air-interface mute to the total VoNR calls in the cell.

KPI.name: 5G SA Percentage of VoNR calls with UL air interface mute
KPI.lformula: 100*(Number of VoNR bearers with UL air-interface mute)/Total VONR Setup in Cell
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the ratio of VoNR calls in the cell that experienced at least one UL air-interface mute to the total VoNR calls in the cell.

KPI.name: 5G SA Percentage of VoNR calls with DL backhaul interface mute
KPI.lformula: 100*(Number of VoNR bearers with DL Backhaul interface mute)/Total VONR Setup in Cell
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the ratio of VoNR calls in the cell that experienced at least one DL backhaul interface mute to the total VoNR calls in the cell.

KPI.name: 5G SA Number of AMF selection failures by gNB
KPI.lformula: Number of failures of AMF selection by gNB
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the number of failures of AMF selection by gNB.

KPI.name: 5G SA Number of RRC Paging message broadcasted
KPI.lformula: Number of RRC Paging messages scheduled for broadcast at 5G-L2-PS
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the number of RRC Paging messages scheduled for broadcast at 5G-L2-PS.

KPI.name: 5G Rank 1 usage share in downlink
KPI.lformula: % of rank 1 usage in DL transmissions = 100 * (rank 1 DL transmissions) / (rank 1 + rank 2 + rank 3 + rank 4 DL transmissions)
KPI.nformula: 100 * Sum(PDSCH_2TX_RI_01 + PDSCH_4TX_RI_01) / Sum(PDSCH_2TX_RI_01 + PDSCH_2TX_RI_02 + PDSCH_4TX_RI_01 + PDSCH_4TX_RI_02 + PDSCH_4TX_RI_03 + PDSCH_4TX_RI_04)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the percentage of rank 1 usage in downlink transmissions.

KPI.name: 5G Rank 2 usage share in downlink
KPI.lformula: % of rank 2 usage in DL transmissions = 100 * (rank 1 DL transmissions) / (rank 1 + rank 2 + rank 3 + rank 4 DL transmissions)
KPI.nformula: 100 * Sum(PDSCH_2TX_RI_02 + PDSCH_4TX_RI_02) / Sum(PDSCH_2TX_RI_01 + PDSCH_2TX_RI_02 + PDSCH_4TX_RI_01 + PDSCH_4TX_RI_02 + PDSCH_4TX_RI_03 + PDSCH_4TX_RI_04)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the percentage of rank 2 usage in downlink transmissions.

KPI.name: 5G Rank 3 usage share in downlink
KPI.lformula: % of rank 3 usage in DL transmissions = 100 * (rank 1 DL transmissions) / (rank 1 + rank 2 + rank 3 + rank 4 DL transmissions)
KPI.nformula: 100 * Sum(PDSCH_4TX_RI_03) / Sum(PDSCH_2TX_RI_01 + PDSCH_2TX_RI_02 + PDSCH_4TX_RI_01 + PDSCH_4TX_RI_02 + PDSCH_4TX_RI_03 + PDSCH_4TX_RI_04)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the percentage of rank 3 usage in downlink transmissions.

KPI.name: 5G SA Initial UE message sent success ratio
KPI.lformula: % of NGAP Initial UE Message sent from gNB after succ RRC Connection att = 100 * (Num of Init UE msg sent) / (Num of succ RRC conn att)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the percentage of NGAP Initial UE Message sent from gNB after RRC Connection attempts that were successfully completed.

KPI.name: 5G SA NGAP connection establishment success ratio
KPI.lformula: NGAP conn est SR = 100 * (Num of succ est UE logicl NGAP conn) / (Num of Init UE msg sent)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the NGAP connection establishment success ratio.

KPI.name: 5G SA Peak GBR call holding time
KPI.lformula: Max duration of SA GBR call
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the maximum value of the duration of SA GBR calls.Note: UEs in RRC Inactive state are excluded.

KPI.name: 5G SA RRC reconfiguration releasing 1 SCell in DL success ratio triggered by A2 in SCell
KPI.lformula: SA RRC reconf DL SCell rel A2 trigg SR = 100 * (RRC reconf DL SCell rel A2 trigg succ) / (RRC reconf DL SCell rel A2 trigg att)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the success ratio of RRC reconfiguration releasing 1 SCell in DL on SA mode triggered by A2 measurement on SCell.

KPI.name: 5G Maximum DL PDCP SDU NR leg throughput per DRB
KPI.lformula: Max DL PDCP SDU NR leg throughput per DRB of a single burst
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the maximum DL PDCP SDU NR leg throughput per DRB of a single burst. Throughput value includes primary- and also supplemental aggregated carriers over NR leg (SA or NSA option 3x).

KPI.name: 5G Combined RACH setup success ratio
KPI.lformula: Combined RACH setup SR = 100 * (Num of RACH setup completions for contention-based preambles + Num of RACH setup completions for dedicated preambles) / (RA setup att for contention-based preambles + RA setup att for dedicated preambles)
KPI.nformula: 100 * Sum(RA_MSG3_RECEP + RA_COMP_DED_PRMBL) / Sum(RA_ATT_CONT_A_PRMBL_SSB_00 + RA_ATT_CONT_A_PRMBL_SSB_01 + RA_ATT_CONT_A_PRMBL_SSB_02 + RA_ATT_CONT_A_PRMBL_SSB_03 + RA_ATT_CONT_A_PRMBL_SSB_04 + RA_ATT_CONT_A_PRMBL_SSB_05 + RA_ATT_CONT_A_PRMBL_SSB_06 + RA_ATT_CONT_A_PRMBL_SSB_07 + RA_ATT_CONT_A_PRMBL_SSB_08 + RA_ATT_CONT_A_PRMBL_SSB_09 + RA_ATT_CONT_A_PRMBL_SSB_10 + RA_ATT_CONT_A_PRMBL_SSB_11 + RA_ATT_CONT_A_PRMBL_SSB_12 + RA_ATT_CONT_A_PRMBL_SSB_13 + RA_ATT_CONT_A_PRMBL_SSB_14 + RA_ATT_CONT_A_PRMBL_SSB_15 + RA_ATT_CONT_A_PRMBL_SSB_16 + KPI.name: 5G Number of active NR cells
KPI.lformula: Num of NR cells with actual measured traffic
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the number of New Radio cells that have actual measured traffic. The cells that have no records for the NCELA measurement (M55308) within a given period are not accounted in this KPI.

KPI.name: 5G Number of active NRBTSs
KPI.lformula: Num of NR gNBs with actual measured traffic
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the number of New Radio Base stations that have actual measured traffic. The NRBTS that have no records for the NCELA measurement (M55308) within a given period are not accounted in this KPI.

KPI.desc: This KPI shows the percentage of initial transmissions on PUSCH in uplink using QPSK modulation. Includes transmissions scheduled with any MCS table (64QAM, 256QAM table and LowSE tables) and both CP-OFDM and DFT-s-OFDM waveforms.Note that with DFT-S-OFDM, MCS00 and MCS01 may use BPSK instead of QPSK.

PUSCH_CP_INI_LOWSE_MCS_02 + PUSCH_CP_INI_LOWSE_MCS_03 + PUSCH_CP_INI_LOWSE_MCS_04 + PUSCH_CP_INI_LOWSE_MCS_05 + PUSCH_CP_INI_LOWSE_MCS_06 + PUSCH_CP_INI_LOWSE_MCS_07 + PUSCH_CP_INI_LOWSE_MCS_08 + PUSCH_CP_INI_LOWSE_MCS_09 + PUSCH_CP_INI_LOWSE_MCS_10 + PUSCH_CP_INI_LOWSE_MCS_11+ PUSCH_CP_INI_LOWSE_MCS_12 + PUSCH_CP_INI_LOWSE_MCS_13 + PUSCH_CP_INI_LOWSE_MCS_14 + PUSCH_CP_INI_LOWSE_MCS_15 + PUSCH_CP_INI_LOWSE_MCS_16 + PUSCH_CP_INI_LOWSE_MCS_17 + PUSCH_CP_INI_LOWSE_MCS_18 + PUSCH_CP_INI_LOWSE_MCS_19 + PUSCH_CP_INI_LOWSE_MCS_20 + PUSCH_CP_INI_LOWSE_MCS_21 + PUSCH_CP_INI_LOWSE_MCS_22 + PUSCH_CP_INI_LOWSE_MCS_23 + PUSCH_CP_INI_LOWSE_MCS_24 + PUSCH_CP_INI_LOWSE_MCS_25 + PUSCH_CP_INI_LOWSE_MCS_26 + PUSCH_CP_INI_LOWSE_MCS_27 + PUSCH_CP_INI_LOWSE_MCS_28)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the percentage of initial transmissions on PUSCH in uplink using 64QAM modulation. Includes transmissions scheduled with any MCS table (64QAM, 256QAM table and LowSE tables) and both CP-OFDM and DFT-s-OFDM waveforms.

KPI.name: 5G SA ratio of SCell suspension
KPI.lformula: SA ratio Scell suspend = 100*((sum of SA DL SCell suspensions per cause + sum of SA UL SCell suspeisions per cause)/(sum of number of SA DL SCell activations + sum of number of SA UL SCell activations + sum of number of SA SCell schdeuling recovery from scheduling suspended state))
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the ratio of the number of times when SCells are in scheduling suspension status, compared to the number of times when SCells are in normal scheduling status, for SA.

KPI.name: 5G NSA ratio of SCell suspension
KPI.lformula: NSA ratio Scell suspend = 100*((sum of NSA DL SCell suspensions per cause + sum of NSA UL SCell suspeisions per cause)/(sum of number of NSA DL SCell activations + sum of number of NSA UL SCell activations + sum of number of NSA SCell schdeuling recovery from scheduling suspended state))
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the ratio of the number of times when SCells are in scheduling suspension status, compared to the number of times when SCells are in normal scheduling status, for NSA.

KPI.name: 5G Initial BLER in PDSCH for VoNR
KPI.lformula: 5G Initial BLER in PDSCH for VoNR = 100 * (initial transmissions sent - initial transmissions success) / (initial transmissions sent)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the failure ratio for the first HARQ transmission for PDSCH for VoNR.

KPI.name: 5G Contention based Msg3 retransmission ratio
KPI.lformula: Cont based Msg3 retx ratio = 100 * (Number of UL Grants for MSG3 retransmissions + RA setup completions for contention based group A preambles ) / (RA msg3 receptions)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the retransmission ratio of Message3 during Contention based RACH setup.

KPI.name: 5G Share of PDSCH resource allocation use of RAT1
KPI.lformula: Sh PRB RAT1 to overall PRB = 100% * (number of PRB scheduled with RAT1 / number of scheduled PRB in PDSCH)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the proportion of number of PRBs scheduled with resource allocation type 1 to overall number of PRBs scheduled in PDSCH.

KPI.name: 5G SA Average number of UEs configured with periodic SRS for positioning
KPI.lformula: 5G SA Avg number of UEs config with periodic pos-SRS = (Number of UEs config with periodic pos-SRS accumulated over all samples) / (PERIOD_DURATION*60)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the average number of SA UEs configured with periodic SRS for positioning.

KPI.name: 5G SA Average number of UEs transmitting periodic SRS for positioning in the current cell
KPI.lformula: 5G SA Avg number of UEs transmit pos-SRS in current cell = (Number of UEs transm pos-SRS in current cell accumulated over all samples) / (PERIOD_DURATION*60)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the average number of SA UEs transmitting periodic SRS for positioning in the current cell.

KPI.name: 5G SA Average number of UEs transmitting periodic SRS for positioning in the neighbor cells
KPI.lformula: 5G SA Avg number of UEs transmit pos-SRS in neighbor cell = (Number of UEs transm pos-SRS in neighbor cell accumulated over all samples) / (PERIOD_DURATION*60)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the average number of SA UEs transmitting periodic SRS for positioning in the neighbor cell.

KPI.name: 5G SA Xn based Inter-gNB intra-frequency handover preparation failure ratio on the target cell due to bad uplink radio conditions
KPI.lformula: Xn intra-freq HO prep FR due to bad UL radio conditions = Number of failed Xn intra-freq HO preparation attempts / Number of received Xn intra-freq HO Requests
KPI.desc: This KPI provides Xn based Inter-gNB intra-frequency handover preparation failure ratio on the source cell due to bad uplink radio conditions

KPI.name: 5G SA Xn based Inter-gNB inter-frequency handover preparation failure ratio on the target cell due to bad uplink radio conditions
KPI.lformula: Xn inter-freq HO prep FR due to bad UL radio conditions = Number of failed Xn inter-freq HO preparation attempts / Number of received Xn inter-freq HO Requests
KPI.desc: This KPI provides Xn based Inter-gNB inter-frequency handover preparation failure ratio on the source cell due to bad uplink radio conditions

KPI.name: 5G SA NG based Inter-gNB intra-frequency handover preparation failure ratio on the target cell due to bad uplink radio conditions
KPI.lformula: NG intra-freq HO prep FR due to bad UL radio conditions = Number of failed NG intra-freq HO preparation attempts / Number of received NG intra-freq HO Requests
KPI.desc: This KPI provides NG based Inter-gNB intra-frequency handover preparation failure ratio on the source cell due to bad uplink radio conditions

KPI.name: 5G SA NG based Inter-gNB inter-frequency handover preparation failure ratio on the target cell due to bad uplink radio conditions
KPI.lformula: NG inter-freq HO prep FR due to bad UL radio conditions = Number of failed NG inter-freq HO preparation attempts / Number of received NG inter-freq HO Requests
KPI.desc: This KPI provides NG based Inter-gNB inter-frequency handover preparation failure ratio on the source cell due to bad uplink radio conditions

KPI.name: 5G SA Xn based Inter-gNB intra-frequency handover for VoNR preparation failure ratio on the target cell due to bad uplink radio conditions
KPI.lformula: Xn intra-freq HO VoNR prep FR due to bad UL radio conditions = Number of failed Xn intra-freq HO VoNR preparation attempts / Number of received Xn intra-freq HO VoNR Requests
KPI.desc: This KPI provides Xn based Inter-gNB intra-frequency handover for VoNR preparation failure ratio on the source cell due to bad uplink radio conditions

KPI.name: 5G SA Xn based Inter-gNB inter-frequency handover for VoNR preparation failure ratio on the target cell due to bad uplink radio conditions
KPI.lformula: Xn inter-freq HO VoNR prep FR due to bad UL radio conditions = Number of failed Xn inter-freq HO VoNR preparation attempts / Number of received Xn inter-freq HO VoNR Requests
KPI.desc: This KPI provides Xn based Inter-gNB inter-frequency handover for VoNR preparation failure ratio on the source cell due to bad uplink radio conditions

KPI.name: 5G SA NG based Inter-gNB intra-frequency handover for VoNR preparation failure ratio on the target cell due to bad uplink radio conditions
KPI.lformula: NG intra-freq HO VoNR prep FR due to bad UL radio conditions = Number of failed NG intra-freq HO VoNR preparation attempts / Number of received NG intra-freq HO VoNR Requests
KPI.desc: This KPI provides NG based Inter-gNB intra-frequency handover for VoNR preparation failure ratio on the source cell due to bad uplink radio conditions

KPI.name: 5G SA NG based Inter-gNB inter-frequency handover for VoNR preparation failure ratio on the target cell due to bad uplink radio conditions
KPI.lformula: NG intrer-freq HO VoNR prep FR due to bad UL radio conditions = Number of failed NG inter-freq HO VoNR preparation attempts / Number of received NG inter-freq HO VoNR Requests
KPI.desc: This KPI provides NG based Inter-gNB inter-frequency handover for VoNR preparation failure ratio on the source cell due to bad uplink radio conditions

KPI.name: 5G SA Maximum number of UEs configured with periodic SRS for positioning per cell
KPI.lformula: 5G SA Max number of UEs config with periodic pos-SRS
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the maximum number of SA UEs configured in the cell with periodic SRS for positioning.

KPI.name: 5G SA Maximum number of UEs transmitting periodic SRS for positioning in the current cell
KPI.lformula: 5G SA Max number of UEs transmit pos-SRS in current cell
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the maximum number of SA UEs transmitting periodic SRS for positioning in the current cell.

KPI.name: 5G SA Maximum number of UEs transmitting periodic SRS for positioning in the neighbor cells
KPI.lformula: 5G SA Max number of UEs transmit pos-SRS in neighbor cell
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the maximum number of SA UEs transmitting periodic SRS for positioning in the neighbor cell.

KPI.name: 5G SA Maximum number of UEs transmitting periodic SRS for positioning per gNB
KPI.lformula: 5G SA Max number of UEs transmit pos-SRS in gNB
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the maximum number of SA UEs transmitting periodic SRS for positioning in gNB.

KPI.name: 5G PDCP PDU lost ratio over NR X2-U in downlink
KPI.lformula: 5G PDCP PDU lost ratio over NR X2-U in downlink.
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the ratio of lost PDCP packets over NR X2-U in downlink direction.

KPI.name: 5G Downlink PDCP PDU lost ratio in F1 interface
KPI.lformula: 5G Downlink PDCP PDU lost ratio in F1 interface
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the lost ratio of PDCP PDU packets on F1 interface in the downlink direction.

KPI.name: 5G SA Complete Accessibility success ratio
KPI.lformula: 5G SA Complete Accessibility Success Ratio = 100* (SR_InitialSetup * Weight_InitialSetup) + 100* (SR_Resume * Weight_Resume) where:SR_InitialSetup = SR_RRC_Initial_Access_FB * SR_Initial_UE_Message * SR_Logical_Connection * SR_UE_Context_Setup;SR_Resume = SR_RRC_Resume_Non_FB: Success rate of RRC Resume procedures, excluding those with fallback, but including RNA Update related events;Weight_InitialSetup = Total_RRC_Setup_Attempts_Weighted / Total_Overall_Access_Attempts;Weight_Resume = Total_RRC_Resume_Attempts_Non_FB / Total_Overall_Access_Attempts;Total_RRC_Setup_Attempts_Weighted: Sum of all RRC setup requests (various service types) + Sum of RRC resume fallback attempts;Total_RRC_Resume_Attempts_Non_FB: Sum of all RRC resume requests - Sum of RRC resume fallback attempts;Total_Overall_Access_Attempts: Sum of all RRC setup requests (various service types) + Sum of all RRC resume requests including fallbacks.
KPI.nformula: 100 * ((Sum(NRRCC_RRC_STPSUCC_TOT + NRRCC_RRC_RESUME_FALLBACK_SUCC) / Sum(NRRCC_RRC_STPREQ_MO_SIGNALLING + NRRCC_RRC_STPREQ_MO_DATA + NRRCC_RRC_STPREQ_MT_ACCESS + NRRCC_RRC_STPREQ_EMERGENCY + NRRCC_RRC_STPREQ_HIPRIO_ACCESS + NRRCC_RRC_STPREQ_MO_VOICECALL + NRRCC_RRC_STPREQ_MO_SMS + NRRCC_RRC_STPREQ_MPS + NRRCC_RRC_STPREQ_MCS + NRRCC_RRC_STPREQ_MO_VIDEOCAL + NRRCC_RRC_RESUME_FALLBACK_ATT))*(Sum(NNGCC_INIT_UE_MSG_SENT) / Sum(NRRCC_RRC_STPSUCC_TOT + REESTAB_ACC_FALLBACK + NRRCC_RRC_RESUME_FALLBACK_SUCC))*(Sum(NNGCC_UE_LOGICAL_CONN_ESTAB) / Sum(NNGCC_INIT_UE_MSG_SENT))*(Sum(NNGCC_UE_CTXT_STP_RESP_SENT) / Sum(NNGCC_UE_CTXT_STP_REQ_RECD))) *(Sum(NRRCC_RRC_STPREQ_MO_SIGNALLING + NRRCC_RRC_STPREQ_MO_DATA + NRRCC_RRC_STPREQ_MT_ACCESS + NRRCC_RRC_STPREQ_EMERGENCY + NRRCC_RRC_STPREQ_HIPRIO_ACCESS + NRRCC_RRC_STPREQ_MO_VOICECALL + NRRCC_RRC_STPREQ_MO_SMS + NRRCC_RRC_STPREQ_MPS + NRRCC_RRC_STPREQ_MCS + NRRCC_RRC_STPREQ_MO_VIDEOCAL + NRRCC_RRC_RESUME_FALLBACK_ATT)/Sum(NRRCC_RRC_STPREQ_MO_SIGNALLING + NRRCC_RRC_STPREQ_MO_DATA + NRRCC_RRC_STPREQ_MT_ACCESS + NRRCC_RRC_STPREQ_EMERGENCY + NRRCC_RRC_STPREQ_HIPRIO_ACCESS + NRRCC_RRC_STPREQ_MO_VOICECALL + NRRCC_RRC_STPREQ_MO_SMS + NRRCC_RRC_STPREQ_MPS + NRRCC_RRC_STPREQ_MCS + NRRCC_RRC_STPREQ_MO_VIDEOCAL + NRRCC_RRC_RESUME_REQUEST1 + NRRCC_RRC_RESUME_REQUEST)) + 100* (Sum(NRRCC_RRC_RESUME_SUCC + NRRCC_RRC_REL_WITH_SUSP_RNAU) / Sum(NRRCC_RRC_RESUME_REQUEST1 + NRRCC_RRC_RESUME_REQUEST - NRRCC_RRC_RESUME_FALLBACK_ATT)) * (Sum(NRRCC_RRC_RESUME_REQUEST1 + NRRCC_RRC_RESUME_REQUEST - NRRCC_RRC_RESUME_FALLBACK_ATT)/Sum(NRRCC_RRC_STPREQ_MO_SIGNALLING + NRRCC_RRC_STPREQ_MO_DATA + NRRCC_RRC_STPREQ_MT_ACCESS + NRRCC_RRC_STPREQ_EMERGENCY + NRRCC_RRC_STPREQ_HIPRIO_ACCESS + NRRCC_RRC_STPREQ_MO_VOICECALL + NRRCC_RRC_STPREQ_MO_SMS + NRRCC_RRC_STPREQ_MPS + NRRCC_RRC_STPREQ_MCS + NRRCC_RRC_STPREQ_MO_VIDEOCAL + NRRCC_RRC_RESUME_REQUEST1 + NRRCC_RRC_RESUME_REQUEST))
KPI.desc: This Key Performance Indicator (KPI) quantifies the end-to-end successful connection establishment probability for User Equipment (UE) operating in 5G Standalone (SA) mode. It serves as a holistic metric, assessing the successful execution of a sequential process, which is partitioned into two distinct phases, each assigned a specific weighting factor.The initial phase encompasses:- Radio Resource Control (RRC) Connection Setup and Resume Fallback: The successful completion probability of initial RRC connection establishment attempts and RRC resume procedures necessitating fallback, across diverse service categories.- Initial UE Message Transmission: The successful transmission of the initial Non-Access Stratum (NAS) message to the 5G Core Network, subsequent to successful RRC connection establishment.- Logical Connection Establishment: The successful establishment of the higher-layer logical bearer (e.g., Protocol Data Unit (PDU) session) subsequent to initial core network signaling exchange.- UE Context Setup: The successful establishment of the UE context within the gNodeB (gNB).The second phase is defined by the RRC Resume procedure, specifically encompassing events associated with Radio Network Area (RNA) Update procedures (facilitating UE location reporting without requiring NG interface resource re-establishment), while explicitly excluding instances involving RRC Resume fallback.An elevated KPI value signifies enhanced robustness and operational efficiency for UE connectivity and service access within the 5G Standalone (SA) network architecture.

KPI.name: 5G PDSCH Average maximum layer per slot
KPI.lformula: Average of the maximum scheduled layer number for PDSCH per slot
KPI.desc: This KPI represents the time-domain average of the maximum number of layers scheduled for Physical Downlink Shared Channel (PDSCH) in a MIMO scenario per slot in the downlink. It provides insight into the utilization of spatial multiplexing capabilities for downlink transmissions. A higher value indicates more effective use of MIMO, potentially leading to increased spectral efficiency and throughput. This KPI is applicable only for FR1.

KPI.name: 5G PUSCH Average maximum layer per slot
KPI.lformula: Average of the maximum scheduled layer number for PUSCH per slot
KPI.desc: This KPI represents the time-domain average of the maximum number of layers scheduled for Physical Uplink Shared Channel (PUSCH) in a MIMO scenario per slot in the uplink. It provides insight into the utilization of spatial multiplexing capabilities for uplink transmissions. A higher value indicates more effective use of MIMO, potentially leading to increased spectral efficiency and throughput. This KPI is applicable for both FR1 and FR2.

KPI.name: 5G UE release ratio due to RLF initiated by UE with cause T310 expiry
KPI.nformula: 100* (RLF_INITIATED_UE_T310_EXPIRY)/(RLF_INITIATED_RNL+ RLF_INITIATED_UE_MEAS_FAULTY+ RLF_INITIATED_UE_PSCELL_CHN_F+ RLF_INITIATED_UE_T310_EXPIRY+ RLF_INITIATED_UE_RACH_FAIL+ RLF_INITIATED_UE__RLC_RETX+ RLF_INITIATED_UE_SRB_INTGRTY_F+ RLF_INITIATED_UE_SCG_CHGE_FAIL+ RLF_INITIATED_UE_SCG_RECNF_F)

KPI.name: 5G DL RLC PDU volume transmitted without repetitions by High RLC
KPI.nformula: (DL_RLC_VOL_TX_H_QOS_GRP_01+ DL_RLC_VOL_TX_H_QOS_GRP_02+ DL_RLC_VOL_TX_H_QOS_GRP_03+ DL_RLC_VOL_TX_H_QOS_GRP_04+ DL_RLC_VOL_TX_H_QOS_GRP_05+ DL_RLC_VOL_TX_H_QOS_GRP_06+ DL_RLC_VOL_TX_H_QOS_GRP_07+ DL_RLC_VOL_TX_H_QOS_GRP_08+ DL_RLC_VOL_TX_H_QOS_GRP_09+ DL_RLC_VOL_TX_H_QOS_GRP_10+ DL_RLC_VOL_TX_H_QOS_GRP_11+ DL_RLC_VOL_TX_H_QOS_GRP_12+ DL_RLC_VOL_TX_H_QOS_GRP_13+ DL_RLC_VOL_TX_H_QOS_GRP_14+ DL_RLC_VOL_TX_H_QOS_GRP_15+ DL_RLC_VOL_TX_H_QOS_GRP_16+ DL_RLC_VOL_TX_H_QOS_GRP_17+ DL_RLC_VOL_TX_H_QOS_GRP_18+ DL_RLC_VOL_TX_H_QOS_GRP_19+ DL_RLC_VOL_TX_H_QOS_GRP_20)/1000
