Avg delay DL RLC gNBDU
KPI.nformula: ( dl_rlc_delay_l_qos_grp_01 + dl_rlc_delay_l_qos_grp_02 + dl_rlc_delay_l_qos_grp_03 + dl_rlc_delay_l_qos_grp_04 + dl_rlc_delay_l_qos_grp_05 + dl_rlc_delay_l_qos_grp_06 + dl_rlc_delay_l_qos_grp_07 + dl_rlc_delay_l_qos_grp_08 + dl_rlc_delay_l_qos_grp_09 + dl_rlc_delay_l_qos_grp_10 + dl_rlc_delay_l_qos_grp_11 + dl_rlc_delay_l_qos_grp_12 + dl_rlc_delay_l_qos_grp_13 + dl_rlc_delay_l_qos_grp_14 + dl_rlc_delay_l_qos_grp_15 + dl_rlc_delay_l_qos_grp_16 + dl_rlc_delay_l_qos_grp_17 + dl_rlc_delay_l_qos_grp_18 + dl_rlc_delay_l_qos_grp_19 + dl_rlc_delay_l_qos_grp_20) / ( dl_rlc_ini_pdu_tx_l_qos_grp_01 + dl_rlc_ini_pdu_tx_l_qos_grp_02 + dl_rlc_ini_pdu_tx_l_qos_grp_03 + dl_rlc_ini_pdu_tx_l_qos_grp_04 + dl_rlc_ini_pdu_tx_l_qos_grp_05 + dl_rlc_ini_pdu_tx_l_qos_grp_06 + dl_rlc_ini_pdu_tx_l_qos_grp_07 + dl_rlc_ini_pdu_tx_l_qos_grp_08 + dl_rlc_ini_pdu_tx_l_qos_grp_09 + dl_rlc_ini_pdu_tx_l_qos_grp_10 + dl_rlc_ini_pdu_tx_l_qos_grp_11 + dl_rlc_ini_pdu_tx_l_qos_grp_12 + dl_rlc_ini_pdu_tx_l_qos_grp_13 + dl_rlc_ini_pdu_tx_l_qos_grp_14 + dl_rlc_ini_pdu_tx_l_qos_grp_15 + dl_rlc_ini_pdu_tx_l_qos_grp_16 + dl_rlc_ini_pdu_tx_l_qos_grp_17 + dl_rlc_ini_pdu_tx_l_qos_grp_18 + dl_rlc_ini_pdu_tx_l_qos_grp_19 + dl_rlc_ini_pdu_tx_l_qos_grp_20)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the average RLC delay in gNB-DU in downlink direction. The delay is calculated as time difference between the reception of the RLC SDU in gNB-DU from PDCP layer and when (first segment of) RLC SDU is sent over the air interface for the first time

KPI.name: Max PRB util DL
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the maximum Physical Resource Block (PRB) utilization in downlink, in percentage

KPI.name: 5G SA Number of cells with at least one SA connection during the period
KPI.desc: 5G SA Number of cells with at least one SA connection during the period

KPI.name: 5G NSA Number of cells with at least one NSA connection during the period
KPI.desc: 5G NSA Number of cells with at least one NSA connection during the period

KPI.name: 5G Total events per second including paging
KPI.desc: 5G NSA Number of cells with at least one NSA connection during the period

KPI.name: 5G Rank 1 usage share in downlink
KPI.nformula: 100 * SUM(pdsch_2tx_ri_01 + pdsch_4tx_ri_01) / SUM(pdsch_2tx_ri_01 + pdsch_2tx_ri_02 + pdsch_4tx_ri_01 + pdsch_4tx_ri_02 + pdsch_4tx_ri_03 + pdsch_4tx_ri_04)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the percentage of rank 1 usage in downlink transmissions

KPI.name: 5G Rank 2 usage share in downlink
KPI.nformula: 100 * SUM(pdsch_4tx_ri_02 + pdsch_2tx_ri_02) / SUM(pdsch_2tx_ri_01 + pdsch_2tx_ri_02 + pdsch_4tx_ri_01 + pdsch_4tx_ri_02 + pdsch_4tx_ri_03 + pdsch_4tx_ri_04)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the percentage of rank 2 usage in downlink transmissions

KPI.name: 5G Rank3 usage share in downlink
KPI.nformula: 100 * SUM(pdsch_4tx_ri_03) / SUM(pdsch_2tx_ri_01 + pdsch_2tx_ri_02 + pdsch_4tx_ri_01 + pdsch_4tx_ri_02 + pdsch_4tx_ri_03 + pdsch_4tx_ri_04)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the percentage of rank 3 usage in downlink transmissions

KPI.name: 5G SA RRC reconfiguration releasing 1 SCell in DL success ratio triggered by A2 in SCell
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the success ratio of RRC reconfiguration releasing 1 SCell in DL on SA mode triggered by A2 measurement on SCell.

KPI.name: 5G NSA RRC reconfiguration releasing 1 SCell in DL success ratio triggered by A2 in SCell
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the success ratio of RRC reconfiguration releasing 1 SCell in DL in NSA 3x mode triggered by A2 measurement on SCell.

KPI.name: 5G A2 measurement based SCell immediate release after addition (ping-pong) ratio
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the ratio of A2 measurement based SCell release (SA and NSA) imdiatly after addition. It indicates ping-pong between SCell additon and release.

KPI.name: 5G NSA SgNB addition preparation failure ratio due to C-plane overload %
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the failure ratio of SgNB Addition preparation procedures due to Control-plane overload. Note: Failures in handover are not included.

KPI.name: 5G NSA Radio bearer addition failure ratio caused by C-plane overload %
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the failure ratio of addition of new radio bearers due to Control-plane overload.

KPI.name: 5G UE context modification failure ratio due to C-plane overload %
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the filure ratio of UE context modification requests due to Control-plane overload

KPI.name: 5G SA RRC connection setup failure ratio due to C-plane overload %
KPI.nformula: 100 * Sum(sa_rrc_estab_neme_fail_ovlcp) / Sum(nrrcc_rrc_stpreq_mo_signalling + nrrcc_rrc_stpreq_mo_data + nrrcc_rrc_stpreq_mt_access + nrrcc_rrc_stpreq_hiprio_access + nrrcc_rrc_stpreq_mo_voicecall + nrrcc_rrc_stpreq_mo_sms + nrrcc_rrc_stpreq_mps + nrrcc_rrc_stpreq_mcs + nrrcc_rrc_stpreq_mo_videocal + nrrcc_rrc_stpreq_emergency)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the RRC connection setup failure ratio due to Control-plane overload for Stand Alone access. RRC connection setup attempts for 'Emergency' or 'Priority Access' PDU sessions are not failed due to C-Plane overload.

KPI.name: 5G SA Number of RRC measurement reports discarded due to C-plane overload #
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the number of RRC measurement reports, Stand Alone and Non-Stan ALone mode, that are discarded due to Control-plane overload.

KPI.name: 5G SA PDU session setup failure ratio due to C-plane overload %
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the failure ratio of PDU sessions setup in Stand Alone mode due to Control-plane overload. PDU Session setup attempts for 'emergency' or 'Priority Access' PDU sessions are not failed due to C-Plane overload. Priority Access can be of three types, High Priority Access (HPA), Multimedia Priority Service (MPS) and Mission Critical Service (MCS).

KPI.name: 5G Number of handover failures due to C-plane overload #
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the number of handovers that failed due to Control-plane overload, for Stand Alone and Non-Stand Alone access.

KPI.name: 5G SA RRC resume failure ratio due to contol plane overload %
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the RRC Ree1 failure ratio due to control plane overload. The failure due to C-plane overload is not counting in case of cause emergency, highPriorityAccess, mps-PriorityAccess and mcs-PriorityAccess. The denominator includes all ree causes.

KPI.name: Avg thp PDCP S1-U DL GTP-U
KPI.nformula: 8 * Sum(dl_pdcp_vol_rcv_s1u_qos_grp_01 + dl_pdcp_vol_rcv_s1u_qos_grp_02 + dl_pdcp_vol_rcv_s1u_qos_grp_03 + dl_pdcp_vol_rcv_s1u_qos_grp_04 + dl_pdcp_vol_rcv_s1u_qos_grp_05 + dl_pdcp_vol_rcv_s1u_qos_grp_06 + dl_pdcp_vol_rcv_s1u_qos_grp_07 + dl_pdcp_vol_rcv_s1u_qos_grp_08 + dl_pdcp_vol_rcv_s1u_qos_grp_09 + dl_pdcp_vol_rcv_s1u_qos_grp_10 + dl_pdcp_vol_rcv_s1u_qos_grp_11 + dl_pdcp_vol_rcv_s1u_qos_grp_12 + dl_pdcp_vol_rcv_s1u_qos_grp_13 + dl_pdcp_vol_rcv_s1u_qos_grp_14 + dl_pdcp_vol_rcv_s1u_qos_grp_15 + dl_pdcp_vol_rcv_s1u_qos_grp_16 + dl_pdcp_vol_rcv_s1u_qos_grp_17 + dl_pdcp_vol_rcv_s1u_qos_grp_18 + dl_pdcp_vol_rcv_s1u_qos_grp_19 + dl_pdcp_vol_rcv_s1u_qos_grp_20) / (PERIOD_DURATION * 60 * 1000)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the average PDCP throughput received over S1-U DL GTP-U tunnel calculated in the measurement period

KPI.name: 5G Average PDCP throughput sent over S1-U UL GTP-U tunnel
KPI.nformula: 8 * sum(ul_pdcp_vol_snt_s1u_qos_grp_01 + ul_pdcp_vol_snt_s1u_qos_grp_02 + ul_pdcp_vol_snt_s1u_qos_grp_03 + ul_pdcp_vol_snt_s1u_qos_grp_04 + ul_pdcp_vol_snt_s1u_qos_grp_05 + ul_pdcp_vol_snt_s1u_qos_grp_06 + ul_pdcp_vol_snt_s1u_qos_grp_07 + ul_pdcp_vol_snt_s1u_qos_grp_08 + ul_pdcp_vol_snt_s1u_qos_grp_09 + ul_pdcp_vol_snt_s1u_qos_grp_10 + ul_pdcp_vol_snt_s1u_qos_grp_11 + ul_pdcp_vol_snt_s1u_qos_grp_12 + ul_pdcp_vol_snt_s1u_qos_grp_13 + ul_pdcp_vol_snt_s1u_qos_grp_14 + ul_pdcp_vol_snt_s1u_qos_grp_15 + ul_pdcp_vol_snt_s1u_qos_grp_16 + ul_pdcp_vol_snt_s1u_qos_grp_17 + ul_pdcp_vol_snt_s1u_qos_grp_18 + ul_pdcp_vol_snt_s1u_qos_grp_19 + ul_pdcp_vol_snt_s1u_qos_grp_20) / (PERIOD_DURATION * 60 * 1000)
KPI.desc: This KPI shows the average throughput sent over NR S1-U GTP-U tunnel in uplink direction.

KPI.name: 5G SA Peak GBR call holding time

KPI.desc: This KPI shows the average percentage of slots with UL grant capability and CCE starvation
